1572860: Stocky brown lark with heavily streaked buff-and-brown back and breast, rufous nape and rufous wing panels conspicuous in flight; pale buff belly, short stout pale bill, short crest often raised, and pinkish legs.
abbbab1: Plain skulking babbler, warm olive-brown above and rufescent on flanks and tail; whitish throat contrasting with greyish breast streaked faintly, pale lores giving open-faced look, dark eye, slightly decurved dark bill and pinkish legs.
abbwar1: Small dull olive-yellow bush warbler, olive-brown above and pale yellowish-buff below; faint pale supercilium, dark eyestripe, rounded wings and tail, slender dark bill with pale base and pinkish legs.
abethr1: Grey-backed thrush with plain ash-grey upperparts, white throat and belly, orange-buff flanks; bold bare yellow-orange eye-ring and lores, yellow-orange bill, and yellowish legs.
abetow: Plain warm grey-brown towhee, uniform dull brown above and paler greyish below with buff undertail coverts; black face mask around base of bill contrasting with greyish face, dark eye, stout conical greyish bill and brownish legs.
abgthr1: Rich rufous-orange ground-thrush, bright orange face and underparts, olive-brown crown and back; two bold white wing bars, white eye-ring, dark malar, slender dark bill and pinkish legs.
abhori1: Bright golden-yellow oriole with entirely black head and throat, yellow body and yellow-and-black wings, yellow tail with black centre; deep pinkish-red bill and red eye, grey legs.
absfin1: Plain grey finch with ash-grey head and back, slightly streaked greyish breast and whitish belly; faint pale eyebrow, stout conical yellowish bill, and dark legs; female browner and more streaked.
abttyr1: Tiny crested grey flycatcher with blackish elongated crest, white central crown and dark grey head; soft grey upperparts faintly streaked, two white wing bars, grey breast and whitish belly, black tail white below, small dark bill and dark legs.
abyrol2: Brilliant pale-blue roller with cinnamon-brown back, turquoise head and underparts, vivid blue wings; long deep-blue tail streamers, black bill and short legs.
abythr1: Olive-brown thrush with plain greyish-brown upperparts, orange-buff flanks and belly, greyish breast and whitish throat with dark streaks; orange-yellow bill, orange eye-ring and yellowish legs.
acafly: Small olive Empidonax flycatcher, olive-green above and whitish below with pale yellow wash on belly; bold whitish eye-ring, two whitish wing bars, broad-based bill dark above and yellowish-orange below, and dark legs.
acowoo: Boldly patterned black-backed woodpecker with glossy black upperparts, white rump and wing patch, white face with black around the bill, red crown patch; pale staring whitish eye, black bill and grey legs.
acrtot1: Small drab flycatcher, olive-green above with two narrow bronzy wing bars and buff lores; pale olive throat and breast with creamy-yellow streaking, yellowish lower belly, dark bill and pale legs.
adepen1: Medium penguin with solid blue-black head and back, pure white underparts; distinctive white eye-ring around the eye, stubby blackish bill partly feathered and reddish at base, pinkish feet.
adewar1: Small grey-and-yellow warbler, grey upperparts and bright yellow throat and breast; yellow eyebrow and broken eye-ring, grey crown, two whitish wing bars, white belly, slender dark bill and dark legs.
afbfly1: Bright cobalt-blue flycatcher, entirely vivid blue with slightly paler underparts and a small black forehead patch; long blue tail, short crest, black bill and black legs.
afbowl1: Small greyish-brown owlet, grey-brown above barred whitish, white underparts barred and spotted brown; rounded head without ear tufts, yellow eyes, pale eyebrows, yellowish-green bill and yellow feet.
afbwar1: Small dark rufous-brown rush warbler, warm brown above and buff-brown below with faint dusky throat spotting; broad rounded brown tail, short rounded wings, dark bill and pinkish legs.
afcdov1: Pale sandy-fawn dove, very pale creamy-grey body with a slim black half-collar on hindneck; pale grey head, dark eye, blackish bill and dark reddish legs.
afcfly1: Slim crested flycatcher with glossy blue-black head and crest, blue-grey back and breast, white belly; long graduated dark tail, black bill and dark legs.
afdfly1: Small plain dusky-brown flycatcher, greyish-brown above and dull buffy-white below with diffuse dusky streaking on breast; faint pale eye-ring, large dark eye, slender dark bill and dark legs.
afecuc1: Brilliant glossy emerald-green cuckoo, iridescent green head, back and breast, with bright yellow lower belly and undertail; greenish bill, red eye-ring and greyish legs; female barred green and rufous.
afepig1: Large slaty-grey pigeon, blue-grey overall with paler grey head and underparts, darker wings and tail; whitish patch on neck side, dark red eye-ring, reddish bill with pale tip and reddish legs.
affeag1: Large striking fish-eagle with snow-white head, breast and tail, rich chestnut belly and wing coverts, and black flight feathers; heavy yellow-and-black hooked bill, yellow cere and yellow feet.
afffin: Small finch with bright crimson face, throat and breast, slate-grey crown and brown back; deep red rump, fine white spots on flanks, blackish belly, blue-grey conical bill and dark legs.
afffly1: Dark forest flycatcher, sooty olive-brown above and whitish below boldly scaled and streaked dusky on breast and flanks; pale lores, large dark eye, broad black bill and dark legs.
afgfly1: Plain pale-grey flycatcher, soft ash-grey above and whitish-grey below with faint dusky streaking on crown; faint pale eye-ring, large dark eye, slender dark bill and dark legs.
afghor1: Slender grey hornbill, dark grey-brown overall with a whitish streak down the back and pale-edged wing feathers; long blackish decurved bill with creamy casket-ridge and stripe, dark legs.
afgori2: Golden-yellow oriole with bright yellow head and body, black mask through the eye, and black-and-yellow wings; yellow tail with black centre, deep pink-red bill and red eye, grey legs.
afgwea1: Bright golden weaver, almost entirely rich golden-yellow with faint orange wash on face and greenish-yellow back; pale yellow eye, stout black conical bill and pinkish legs.
afhbab1: Plain greyish babbler-warbler, grey head and breast, olive-brown back, rufous-buff flanks and belly; reddish-brown eye, slender dark bill with paler base and pinkish legs.
afhbab3: Plain hill babbler with blackish-grey crown and head, olive-brown back, grey breast and rufous-buff flanks; reddish eye, slender dark bill and pinkish legs, darker-headed than relatives.
afhhaw1: Slim grey raptor, pale grey overall with finely barred black-and-white belly and broad black tail band; bare yellow facial skin that flushes, small head, hooked grey bill, broad wings and long yellow legs.
afmdov1: Soft pinkish-grey dove, pale grey-brown body with darker greyish wings and a black half-collar on the hindneck; pale grey forehead, bright orange-yellow eye with red orbital ring, blackish bill and dark red legs.
afmwea: Bright weaver with golden-yellow body, chestnut-tinged crown, and black face mask covering forehead, lores and throat; greenish-yellow back, pale red eye, black conical bill and pinkish legs.
afpfly1: Slender flycatcher with glossy blue-black head, rich chestnut back, wings and very long chestnut tail streamers, greyish breast; bright blue bill and blue eye-ring, dark legs; white-morph males have white back and tail.
afphor3: Black-and-white hornbill, glossy black above and white below with white-tipped outer tail feathers; large dark decurved bill with cream and red markings on the casque, dark legs.
afpsta1: Glossy dark starling with iridescent greenish-black plumage and a contrasting white lower belly and undertail; pale creamy-white eye, blackish bill and dark legs.
afpswi1: Slim pale grey-brown swift, uniform sooty grey-brown with long narrow scythe-like wings and a deeply forked tail; tiny dark bill and dark legs, very slender silhouette.
afpwag1: Black-and-white wagtail, glossy black crown, back and breast band, white face, throat and belly; broad white wing panel, long black-and-white tail, slender black bill and black legs.
afrbro1: Tiny stocky broadbill, rufous-brown above heavily streaked black, whitish below streaked dark; large head, broad flat blackish bill, conspicuous white back patch exposed in display, and pinkish legs.
afrcuc1: Slim grey cuckoo, plain blue-grey head, back and breast, with finely barred black-and-white belly; yellow eye-ring, yellow-based bill with dark tip, long barred tail and yellow legs.
afrgos1: Slim accipiter, slate-grey above, white below finely barred rufous-brown, with grey throat; broad blackish tail bands, yellow eye, yellow cere and bill base, and long yellow legs.
afrgrp1: Plump green pigeon, soft yellow-green head and underparts, greyish nape, maroon shoulder patch and yellow wing edges; lilac-red shoulders, pale bluish bill with red base, and bright red legs.
afrjac1: Rich chestnut waterbird with white throat and foreneck, blue-grey crown, and golden-buff breast band; bright pale-blue frontal shield and bill, and extremely long greyish toes and claws.
afrpip1: Slim streaky pipit, brown above streaked darker, buff-white below with streaked breast; pale supercilium, white outer tail feathers, slender dark bill with pale base, and long pale pinkish legs.
afrrai1: Slate-grey rail with olive-brown back, barred black-and-white flanks and undertail; long slightly decurved bright red bill, red legs, and dark eye.
afrsil1: Tiny pale finch, sandy grey-brown above with finely barred wings, whitish below; blackish rump and pointed black tail, stout silvery-blue conical bill and pinkish-grey legs.
afrsto1: Compact chat, male with black head and back, white half-collar on neck side, orange-rufous breast and white belly; white wing patch and rump, short black bill and black legs.
afrtai2: Tiny, short-tailed forest warbler with a rusty-rufous head and crown, white throat, and grayish breast and underparts; olive-brown back and wings. Notably long, slender black bill and short cocked tail; pinkish legs.
afrthr1: Medium thrush with plain grayish-brown upperparts and head, dull orange-buff flanks and lower breast, and a whitish belly; throat whitish with fine dark streaking. Bill yellow to orange; legs brownish; dark eye.
afsowl1: Small gray-brown scops-owl with short ear-tufts, finely vermiculated and streaked plumage giving a bark-like camouflage, and pale buff-and-dark facial disc. Yellow eyes; small dark bill; feathered legs with grayish feet.
afswar1: Skulking dull brown warbler with rufous-tinged brown upperparts, long graduated tail, and a faint grayish supercilium; buffy-white throat with fine dark streaking and grayish-streaked white breast. Black bill; dark brown legs.
afwowl1: Stocky round-headed owl, dark brown above finely spotted white, with dense brown-and-white barring on the buffy underparts; plain dark facial disc and pale eyebrows. Large dark eyes; yellowish bill; feathered legs.
afywar1: Bright warbler with olive-green upperparts and crown, contrasting lemon-yellow underparts, throat and supercilium; faint dusky eyeline. Slender dark bill; pinkish-brown legs; rounded yellowish-edged wings.
afywhe4: Small yellowish-green white-eye with bright greenish upperparts, yellow throat and undertail, and a grayer belly; bold white eye-ring around a dark eye. Fine pointed dark bill; bluish-gray legs.
agitit1: Small, long-tailed Andean flycatcher with olive-gray upperparts and messy dark streaking on the pale yellowish-tinged underparts; diffuse whitish eyebrow and darker mask, no wingbars. Disheveled look; thin dark bill; dark legs.
ahafra2: Large dark spurfowl, rich brown overall finely vermiculated and spotted buff, with darker scaling on breast and flanks; bare reddish skin around the eye. Stout reddish-orange bill; orange-red legs with spurs.
akepa1: Small, plump Hawaiian honeycreeper; male brilliant orange-red overall with darker brownish wings and tail. Short, slightly crossed pale bill; dark eye; grayish legs.
akiapo: Stocky Hawaiian honeycreeper, yellow-green above and bright yellow below with a yellow face; distinctive bill with a short straight lower mandible and a long downcurved upper mandible. Dark legs; dark eye.
alatyr1: Small olive-green tyrannulet with two pale yellowish wingbars, a thin whitish supercilium, and a whitish ear-patch outlined by a dusky line through the eye; dark olive crown and back, yellowish-washed underparts. Small dark bill.
alblyr1: Large rich rufous-brown ground bird with chestnut throat and rufous underparts; long lyre-shaped tail of broad brown filamentous plumes. Strong dark bill; sturdy grayish legs; dark eye.
aldfly: Small olive-brown Empidonax flycatcher, grayish-olive above with two whitish wingbars, faint pale eye-ring, whitish throat and pale olive-washed breast; whitish belly. Dark upper bill, pale-orange lower bill; dark legs.
aleter1: Medium gray tern with dark gray upperparts and pale gray underparts, a black cap, and a distinctive white forehead patch; white cheeks contrast with the cap. Black bill; black legs; deeply forked tail.
alfant1: Plump, almost tailless long-legged antpitta, olive-brown above with a white throat and bold black-spotted whitish breast; conspicuous buff 'spectacles' (goggles) around the eye. Stout dark bill; long pale legs.
allant1: Slate-gray antbird; male entirely slaty gray with black wings boldly fringed white on the coverts, a black throat, and some black scaling on the crown. Gray iris; dark bill; grayish legs.
allhum: Small hummingbird; male has a brilliant orange-red gorget, green crown and back, and bright rufous flanks, rump and tail. Female greenish above with rufous-washed flanks and white-tipped tail. Straight black bill.
alptap1: Small dark tapaculo, blackish-gray overall with a slightly brown-tinged dark rump and brown flanks barred black on the lower flanks and vent. Short cocked tail; small dark bill; pinkish-brown legs.
altori: Large bright orange oriole with a black back, black bib and throat, black wings with a white wing patch, and black tail; deep orange head and underparts. Thick straight black bill; gray legs.
amaant1: Plump tailless-looking antpitta, warm olive-brown above with a whitish throat and grayish-buff underparts faintly mottled, lacking bold breast spots; pale lores. Stout dark bill; long pinkish-gray legs.
amaant2: Medium antshrike; male gray with a black crown, blackish wings boldly spotted and barred white, and white-tipped tail; pale gray underparts. Stout hooked black bill; gray legs.
amabaw1: Large rufous-brown woodcreeper with finely black-barred head, back and underparts, and a plain bright rufous rump, wings and tail; pale throat. Straight stout dark bill; gray legs; uses stiff tail as a prop.
amahum1: Medium hummingbird with shining green head, throat and upperparts, a bright rufous-chestnut belly and undertail, and a white chest band. Straight bill with red base and dark tip; dark legs.
amakin1: Large green kingfisher, oily dark green above with a bushy crest and a white collar; male has a broad rufous-chestnut breast band, female a green-spotted band. Long heavy black bill; short dark legs.
amapyo1: Tiny pygmy-owl, plain warm brown above lacking white spotting, with a faintly streaked rufous-brown crown and pale eyebrows; whitish underparts streaked rufous-brown. Two black 'false-eye' nape spots; yellow eyes; yellow bill.
amasta1: Tiny antwren; male boldly streaked black-and-white overall, with black-and-white-streaked crown, back and underparts, and a black throat. Slender pointed dark bill; pale legs; short tail.
amatyr1: Very small drab tyrannulet, grayish-olive above and pale yellowish below with a grayish head, faint pale eyering and lores; plain wings with little or no wingbar. Tiny dark bill; pale legs.
ambduc: Large dark dabbling duck, dusky chocolate-brown overall with a contrasting paler grayish head and neck finely streaked; violet-blue speculum bordered black. Yellowish-olive bill (male); orange-red legs; white underwings in flight.
ameavo: Large elegant shorebird, white below with bold black-and-white wing pattern; breeding adult has a cinnamon-orange head and neck. Long thin upturned black bill; very long bluish-gray legs.
amebit: Stocky cryptic heron, warm buffy-brown streaked dark brown overall, with bold dark brown neck streaking and a black streak down the side of the neck; pale throat. Stout yellowish bill; greenish-yellow legs.
amecro: Large all-glossy-black crow with iridescent black plumage, a fan-shaped tail, and broad wings; sturdy build. Heavy black bill; black legs; dark eye.
amedip: Plump slate-gray songbird, uniformly dark gray overall with a slightly browner head and a short cocked tail; pale eyelids show as white blinks. Straight dark bill; pinkish legs.
amedov1: Medium forest dove, brown on the upperparts, head and breast with grayish belly and pale gray tail corners; reddish-brown throat with dark sub-ocular and white facial lines, and amethyst iridescence on the nape. Pinkish eye-skin; longish bill.
amegfi: Small finch; breeding male brilliant lemon-yellow with a black forecap, black-and-white wings, and white undertail coverts; female duller olive-yellow. Conical pinkish-orange bill; pale legs.
amekes: Small colorful falcon; male has a rufous back and tail, blue-gray wings, and a buffy breast; both sexes show a white face with two bold black vertical 'mustache' stripes and a rufous crown patch. Hooked yellow-based bill; yellow legs.
ameoys: Large bold shorebird with a black head and neck, dark brown back, and clean white underparts; bright yellow eye with red orbital ring. Long stout bright orange-red bill; thick pale pinkish legs.
amepip2: Slim brown ground bird, grayish-brown above with a buffy supercilium and streaked breast on a buff or whitish background; dark malar stripe. Thin dark bill; dark legs; white outer tail feathers; pumps tail.
amered: Small active warbler; male glossy black with bright orange patches on the wings, sides and tail base, and a white belly; female gray-olive with yellow patches. Flat dark bill; dark legs; fans tail.
amerob: Large thrush with a dark gray back and head, brick-orange underparts, and a blackish head with broken white eye-ring and white throat streaking. Yellow bill; dark legs; white undertail.
amesun2: Sunbird; male blackish overall with brilliant metallic amethyst-purple throat and forecrown and a glossy green shoulder patch, otherwise velvety black. Long decurved black bill; black legs.
amewig: Medium dabbling duck; male grayish with a pinkish-brown breast and flanks, a creamy-white forecrown, and a broad iridescent green eyepatch on a gray face; white wing patch. Small pale blue bill with black tip; gray legs.
amewoo: Plump, short-legged woodcock with cryptic russet, gray and black-mottled upperparts and rich buff underparts; large dark eyes set high and a barred crown. Very long straight pinkish bill; short pinkish legs.
amgplo: Medium plover; breeding adult black-faced and black-bellied with a bold white stripe from forehead down the neck sides, and gold-spangled blackish upperparts. Short black bill; dark gray legs.
ampkin1: Tiny kingfisher, glossy green above with a buff-orange collar and underparts and a green breast band (faint in male); white throat and belly center. Long black bill; tiny dark legs.
amsfly1: Small plain flycatcher, gray-brown above with two faint pale wingbars, a short slightly downturned bill, and a pale lower mandible; dull whitish-gray throat grading to pale yellowish belly. Faint pale lores; dark legs.
amthum1: Medium mountain-gem hummingbird with bronze-green upperparts and a grayish belly; male shows a brilliant amethyst-purple gorget and a white postocular stripe. Straight black bill; dark legs.
amtspa: Plump sparrow with a rufous crown and rufous eyeline on a gray face, gray unstreaked breast with a central dark spot, and streaked brown back. Bicolored bill (dark above, yellow below); pale legs.
amtsun3: Andean sunangel; dark velvety green above with a glittering amethyst-purple throat patch (gorget) bordered by a whitish breast band; greenish underparts. Short straight black bill; dark legs.
amufal1: Small slim falcon; male slate-gray overall with bright rufous-chestnut thighs and undertail coverts and white underwing coverts; orange-red eye-ring, cere and legs. Female paler gray above, barred below; small hooked bill.
amupaf1: Medium flycatcher with very long central tail streamers, glossy blue-black hood and crest, and bright rufous-chestnut back, wings and tail; underparts pale grey to whitish. Heavy cobalt-blue bill and blue eye-ring; dark legs.
amwpel: Huge white pelican with black primaries and outer secondaries visible in flight, and a massive orange-yellow bill with throat pouch; breeding birds develop a flat horny plate on the upper bill. Orange legs and feet.
anbtyr1: Small, mostly yellow tyrannulet with a grey crown washed greenish, indistinct greyish eye-ring, and yellow-and-grey smudged ear coverts; bright olive-green back and broad yellow wingbars on dark wings. Narrow dark bill; pale legs.
ancant1: Small antwren; male has a solid black crown, bold yellowish supercilium, dark grey upperparts, and yellowish throat and underparts; black wing coverts tipped white, and short graduated black tail edged white. Slim dark bill; pale legs.
anctap1: Small dark tapaculo, uniformly slaty grey overall, often slightly paler grey below, with brownish flanks and faint barring on rear flanks and undertail coverts. Short cocked tail, blackish bill and pale legs.
andavo1: Striking black-and-white wader with a long upturned black bill and a cinnamon-buff head and neck contrasting with white body and bold black wing pattern. Long pale bluish-grey legs.
andcot1: Spectacular cotinga; male brilliant scarlet-orange with a huge fan-shaped crest hiding the bill, black wings, and pale grey inner wing patch; tail black. Stout pale bill, dark legs. Females duller brownish.
andcou1: Large coucal with a glossy blue-black head, neck and underparts contrasting with chestnut-rufous wings and back; long broad blackish tail. Heavy black bill, red eye, and dark legs.
anddro1: Medium glossy blue-black drongo with a deeply forked tail; overall uniform black with a bluish sheen. Stout black bill, dark red eye, and black legs.
andduc1: Compact stiff-tailed diving duck; male rich chestnut-brown body with a black head, a bright sky-blue bill, and a stiff black tail often cocked upright. Female dull greyish-brown with pale cheek stripe.
andeme1: Medium hummingbird with glittering green upperparts and throat-breast, contrasting clean white belly and lower underparts, and a small white spot behind the eye. Straight black bill with pinkish base to lower mandible; greenish-bronze tail.
andfla2: Pale pinkish-white flamingo with deep crimson on the lower neck and wing coverts, black flight feathers, and uniquely yellow legs with no rear toe; bill pale yellow with a black tip and downcurved.
andfli1: Large terrestrial woodpecker, barred buff and black above, with pale buffy underparts, a black crescent on the upper breast, golden-yellow rump and underwings, and a grey face with a red malar (male). Long pale bill, grey legs.
andgoo1: Large stocky goose, mostly white with black flight feathers and a black tail, and a contrasting black-and-white folded wing pattern. Short pinkish bill with black tip; coral-red to pink legs.
andgua1: Dark olive-brown guan with a small bushy crest, fine white scaling on the neck and breast, a small bare red throat patch, and a long broad tail. Dark bill, reddish legs.
andgul1: Medium gull with a dark hood (sooty in breeding), white crescents above and below the eye, pale grey back and wings, and a black-and-white wingtip pattern. Dark red bill and legs.
andhil3: Large mountain hummingbird; male has glittering green throat bordered below by a black band, white belly, dark green-bronze upperparts, and a chestnut-and-white patterned tail. Straight black bill.
andlap1: Striking lapwing with a grey head and breast, glossy bronzy-green back, white belly, and a black breast band; bold black-and-white wings with iridescent sheen. Red bill with black tip, red legs, and a small wing spur.
andpar1: Small all-green parakeet, slightly paler and yellowish-green below, with a long pointed tail; rather plain with no bold markings. Pale horn-coloured bill and pinkish legs.
andsha1: Thrush-shaped shama with glossy black head, breast, wings and tail, contrasting white belly and white rump and lower back, with slightly rufous-tinged flanks; upperparts can show warm brown tones. Long black graduated tail, dark bill and legs.
andsis1: Small finch; male has a black cap, olive-green upperparts, and yellow underparts and rump, with yellow wing flashes and dark wings. Conical pale bill, dark legs.
andsni1: Cryptic snipe with rich buff-and-black striped upperparts, barred buff-and-black flanks and breast, white belly, and a strongly patterned head. Very long straight bill, pale greenish-grey legs.
andsol1: Slim solitaire, plain slaty-grey overall, paler grey below, with a faint pale eye-ring and rufous tones in the wings; flashing white outer tail. Short dark bill, orange-yellow legs.
andswi1: Slender swift with a white throat and white belly contrasting with brown upperparts, a white rump band, and long pointed swept-back wings; slightly forked tail. Tiny dark bill.
andtin1: Plump ground bird with cryptic buff-brown plumage heavily barred and streaked black, a paler buff throat and belly, and a small head on a slender neck. Slightly downcurved bill, yellowish legs.
angswa1: Glossy blue-black swallow with a chestnut forehead and throat, dusky grey-washed underparts, and a deeply forked tail with white tail spots. Short black bill and dark legs.
anhing: Slim long-necked waterbird; male glossy black with silvery-white streaks and plumes on the wing coverts, a long kinked snaky neck, and a long fan-shaped tail. Sharp yellowish dagger bill, dark legs.
aniani: Small Hawaiian honeycreeper, uniformly bright yellow-green, slightly brighter yellow on the face and underparts, with a short slightly downcurved pale bill. Pale legs; rather plain and warbler-like.
annhum: Compact hummingbird; male has a brilliant iridescent rose-red crown and gorget (throat) extending onto the sides of the neck, bronze-green back, and dull greyish underparts. Straight black bill.
anpowl1: Tiny owl, rufous-brown to grey-brown above with white spots, whitish underparts streaked rufous-brown, a rounded head with no ear tufts, and two black 'false eye' patches on the nape. Yellow eyes, yellowish bill and feet.
anpswi: Tiny swift, blackish-brown above with a white rump and white belly contrasting with a dark breast and throat; long narrow wings and a forked tail. Tiny dark bill.
ansgre1: Plain olive-green greenbul, brighter yellowish-olive below with a greyish wash on the throat and a faint reddish-brown tinge in the wings and tail; rather featureless face. Slender dark bill, greyish legs.
antant1: Plump, plain antpitta with neutral brown upperparts, uniform light grey underparts, paler throat and whitish lores; lacks any breast band. Long pinkish legs, dark bill with paler base.
anteup2: Stocky euphonia; male has a sky-blue crown and nape ('helmet'), dark violet-blue face, throat and upperparts, and bright orange-yellow forehead, rump and underparts. Short stubby dark bill, dark legs.
antnig: Slim nightjar, cryptic mottled grey-brown and buff, with a buffy throat patch (white in male) and bold white wing-bar across the long pointed wings, visible in flight. Tiny bill, very short legs.
antspi1: Small slender furnariid streaked dark brown and buff above with a rufous crown and wing patch, pale buff-streaked underparts, and a very long pointed graduated tail. Fine dark bill, pale legs.
antter1: Pale grey tern with a full black cap, white cheeks and rump, pale grey underparts, and long deeply forked white tail streamers. Bright coral-red bill and red legs.
antwre2: Warm cinnamon-brown above with fine dark barring on wings and tail, white underparts with dull brown flanks, a narrow white supercilium, and blurry brownish streaking on the cheeks. Slim dark bill, pinkish legs.
apapan: Small Hawaiian honeycreeper, deep crimson-red overall with black wings and tail and a white lower belly and undertail; slightly downcurved black bill and black legs.
apifly1: Medium Myiarchus flycatcher, grey-brown above with a bushy crest, pale grey throat and breast, yellow belly, and rufous edges in the wings and tail; tail tipped pale. Straight dark bill, dark legs.
aplfal: Slender long-tailed falcon, slate-grey above with a bold white supercilium framing a dark cap, a black 'cummerbund' band across the lower belly separating buffy breast from rufous thighs and vent. Yellow cere and legs.
apostl1: Stocky dark grey bird with a pale-streaked greyish breast, blackish wings and a long blackish tail with a faint greenish-purple gloss; loose shaggy plumage. Short stout dark bill, dark legs.
apowre1: Small chunky buffy-brown wren with a streaked back, dark barring on the wings and tail, a grey supercilium and greyish throat, and warm buff flanks. Slim dark bill, pinkish legs.
apuspi1: Dark spinetail with a pale grey supercilium on a dark grey face, dark grey back, dark rufous hindcrown and nape, and rufous wings; sooty-black throat and dark grey underparts. Very long graduated dark tail, dark bill and legs.
aquwar1: Streaky warbler, buff-and-black streaked above with a pale central crown stripe bordered by dark lateral stripes, a bold buff supercilium, and pale yellowish-buff underparts with fine flank streaks. Pointed bill, pale pinkish legs.
arafan1: Small fantail, grey-brown above with a buffy supercilium, blackish face mask, white throat, and warm buff underparts; long graduated tail tipped white and often fanned. Fine black bill, dark legs.
araman1: Striking manakin; male pearly white with a brilliant red crown and crest, black wings and black tail, and red legs; short black bill. Females olive-green. Small, compact body.
arasco1: Small compact scops-owl with mottled and streaked grey-brown plumage finely cross-barred below, small ear tufts, and pale facial disc; cryptic desert camouflage. Yellow eyes, dark bill, feathered greyish feet.
arcnew1: Small vanga-like bird, greyish-brown above with a rufous forecrown, a conspicuous rufous eye-ring, buffy-white throat and belly, and cinnamon-buff breast and flanks. Black bill, pale yellow eyes, dark legs.
arcwar2: Plain greenish leaf warbler, olive-green above and whitish below with a yellowish wash, a long pale yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, and a single faint pale wingbar. Dark-tipped bill with orange lower mandible; pale legs.
arcwar3: Small leaf warbler, bright olive-green above and yellowish-white below with washed yellow flanks. Bold yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, and a single faint wing bar. Thin dark bill with pale lower mandible; pinkish-orange legs.
ariwoo: Medium woodpecker, plain brown above with white spotting on wings, and whitish underparts heavily spotted and barred brown. White face with brown crown and ear-stripe; male shows a red nape patch. Straight dark bill, grey legs.
armbab1: Medium-large grey-brown babbler, dark above with whitish chevron 'arrow' markings on the throat and breast. Plain greyish-brown belly, dark face, and a pale staring orange-yellow eye. Stout dark curved bill; dark legs.
arrcha1: Robin-chat with slate-grey crown and upperparts, bright orange-rufous breast, throat and underparts, and a rufous-edged tail. Dark face lacking strong markings. Slender black bill, dark legs; upright robin-like posture.
artspi1: Small slender spinetail, rufous-brown above and pale buffy-grey below with fine streaking. Rufous crown, plain face, and a long, deeply forked, spiny rufous tail. Thin dark bill; greyish legs.
asbant1: Plump antbird; male slate-grey overall with a black face mask and throat and a contrasting whitish lower belly. Female browner with paler underparts. Short stout black bill, dark legs; pale eye.
asbfly: Small plain flycatcher, greyish-brown above and whitish below with faint greyish wash on breast and flanks. Bold whitish eye-ring and pale lores giving a big-eyed look; faint pale wing edgings. Dark bill with pale base to lower mandible; dark legs.
asbowl1: Small stocky owlet, warm brown above finely barred buff and white below with dense brown barring on breast and flanks. Rounded head lacking ear tufts, pale eyebrows, and yellow eyes. Yellowish bill; feathered yellow feet.
asbspi1: Small spinetail, warm rufous-brown above with rufous wings and tail, and dull buffy-grey underparts. Greyish-brown crown with a pale buff supercilium ('brow') and plain face. Thin dark bill; greyish legs.
asbwhe1: Small white-eye, bright yellowish-green above and on the throat and breast, with a contrasting whitish-grey belly. Prominent white eye-ring and dark lores. Thin pointed dark bill; greyish legs.
asccuc1: Small slim cuckoo, plain ashy-grey overall, slightly paler grey below, with a long graduated tail tipped white. Dark eye with reddish orbital ring; small slightly decurved blackish bill, yellowish legs.
ascspl1: Small lark; male sandy grey-brown above with a black face, throat and a black line running down the centre of the underparts; ashy-grey crown and nape. Female plainer buff-brown. Stout pale conical bill, pale legs.
asctap1: Small dark tapaculo, uniformly ashy slate-grey overall, slightly paler grey on the face and throat, with browner wings and tail. Small black bill; brownish legs; short cocked tail and skulking rounded shape.
asecuc1: Tiny glittering cuckoo; male brilliant metallic emerald-green above and on the head and breast, with white belly barred green. Female bronzy-green above, barred below. Short orange-yellow bill with dark tip; dark legs.
asfblu1: Striking thrush-sized bird; male glossy ultramarine and violet-blue on crown, back, rump and undertail, with the rest of the body velvety black. Female duller greenish-blue overall. Black bill, blackish legs; bright red eye.
asgsta1: Medium starling, entirely glossy blackish-green with iridescent oily sheen across the plumage. Striking bright ruby-red eye stands out against dark head. Slender black bill, blackish legs; slim body and short square tail.
asgwea2: Small weaver; breeding male bright golden-yellow with a black face mask covering forehead, lores and throat, and golden crown; olive-yellow back. Female dull olive-yellow and streaked. Stout conical dark bill, pinkish legs.
ashbul1: Medium bulbul, ashy-grey above with contrasting bright yellow-olive wing panels and a brown crown. Whitish-grey throat and underparts with a slight crest. Slim dark bill, dark legs; reddish-brown to dark eye.
ashcis1: Small plain cisticola, greyish-brown above with faint darker streaking on the back and a greyer, finely streaked crown. Pale whitish-grey underparts, washed buff on flanks. Thin pointed bill, pinkish legs; longish tail tipped pale.
ashcus2: Medium cuckooshrike; male uniform pale ashy-grey above and on the head and breast, paler grey to whitish on the belly, with dark wings and tail. Female finely barred below. Stout blackish bill, dark legs.
ashdro1: Slim glossy drongo, uniformly dark ashy-grey overall (paler grey than Black Drongo) with a long, deeply forked tail. Bright red eye; some races show pale facial patch. Stout slightly hooked black bill, black legs.
ashfly1: Small flycatcher, soft blue-grey above and on the head with paler grey underparts whitening on the belly. Narrow whitish eye-ring and dark lores. Slim dark bill with paler base, dark legs; upright posture.
ashgre1: Tiny greenlet, olive-green above with a plain grey head, yellowish throat and breast, and whitish belly. Pale lores, dark eye. Short stout pinkish bill; pale legs; warbler-like compact shape.
ashmar1: Small house-martin, blue-black glossy above with a contrasting white rump and dusky-white underparts washed grey on the throat and undertail. Slightly forked dark tail; tiny black bill, feathered white legs and feet.
ashmin1: Slim minivet, pale ashy-grey above and on the crown with a black forehead and eye-line, white forehead band, and clean white underparts. Black wings and tail with white edgings. Fine black bill, black legs.
ashpri1: Small slim warbler, slaty grey-blue above and on the crown with rufous-buff flanks and whitish underparts. Reddish eye, short black eyebrow, dark lores. Long graduated tail held cocked, tipped black-and-white; thin black bill, pinkish legs.
ashsta2: Medium starling, entirely dull ashy slate-grey, slightly glossy, with darker wings and tail. Pale creamy-white to yellowish eye contrasting with grey face. Slender dark bill, blackish legs; slim long-tailed shape.
ashtai1: Tiny tailorbird, olive-green above with a rufous-chestnut crown and face, greyish nape, and pale whitish-grey underparts. Long graduated tail often cocked. Thin slightly decurved bill (pale lower mandible), pinkish legs.
ashtit2: Small tit, grey above and pale grey-white below, with a black cap and bib and contrasting white cheeks. Whitish wing edgings form a faint panel. Small black bill, dark legs; black centre stripe down belly faint.
ashtyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, olive-green above with a contrasting grey head and crown, and pale yellowish-white underparts washed olive on the breast. Whitish eye-ring or pale lores, two faint wing bars. Small dark bill, dark legs.
ashwoo1: Large woodpecker, almost uniformly ashy-grey overall with a slightly paler grey head and faint yellowish wash on the face; male shows red on the cheek/malar. Long chisel-shaped pale grey bill, grey legs.
ashwoo2: Stocky woodswallow, smoky ashy-grey overall, slightly paler grey below, with darker wings and a short tail tipped white. Broad-based triangular wings. Thick blue-grey bill with black tip; dark legs.
asidow1: Medium-large wader, breeding plumage rich rufous on the head, neck and underparts with dark-mottled greyish-brown back. Pale supercilium, dark crown. Very long, straight, blackish snipe-like bill; dark greenish legs.
asidrc2: Slim glossy black drongo-cuckoo, entirely blue-black with a faintly forked tail and a few white bars on the undertail. White barring on thighs and vent. Slightly decurved blackish bill; dark legs; red eye.
asidrc3: Slim glossy black cuckoo resembling a drongo, entirely blue-black with a square to slightly forked white-barred undertail and white-barred thighs. Decurved blackish bill; dark legs; dark red eye.
asikoe2: Large cuckoo; male glossy bluish-black overall with a striking pale greenish-grey bill and crimson-red eye. Female dark brown densely spotted and barred with white and buff. Strong slightly decurved bill, grey legs.
asikoe3: Large cuckoo; male entirely glossy greenish-black with a pale grey-green bill and red eye. Female dark brown heavily spotted, streaked and barred buff-white. Stout slightly curved bill, greyish legs; long tail.
asiope1: Medium-large white stork with a distinctive gap in the closed mandibles; mostly greyish-white body with black flight feathers and tail. Dull greenish-yellow heavy bill that does not fully close; dull pinkish to reddish legs.
asistu1: Tiny short-tailed warbler, warm reddish-brown above with a scaly-marked crown and a bold long whitish supercilium contrasting with a dark eyestripe. Whitish underparts washed buff on flanks. Fine pale bill, pinkish legs; near-tailless look.
aspfly1: Slim flycatcher with a black, glossy crested head and bright rufous-chestnut back, wings and very long tail streamers; greyish-white below. White morph male all white with black head. Broad blue bill, blue eye-ring, dark legs.
aspsta2: Pied starling, boldly patterned black-and-white: black crown, nape, upper back and breast, with white cheeks, forehead, rump and belly. Orange-red bare skin around the eye. Pointed yellow-tipped orange-red bill, yellowish legs.
aspswi1: Tiny slender swift, uniformly dull grey-brown overall with long narrow scythe-shaped wings and a long, deeply forked tail (often held closed to a point). Very short blackish bill, tiny dark legs.
asslau1: Medium laughingthrush, warm olive-brown overall with bright golden-yellow edgings on the wings and tail forming yellow wing panels. Greyish head and throat, dark face. Slim dark slightly decurved bill, dark legs.
astant1: Small antwren, grey above with white-spotted black wing coverts and a black crown; pale grey-white throat and breast grading to a pale buff-yellow belly. Dark eye-stripe. Thin dark bill, pale legs.
astcra1: Small crake, olive-brown above with a slate-grey face, breast and flanks, the flanks barred black-and-white, and a contrasting white throat. Bright yellow-green bill with red base; reddish to pinkish legs.
astfly: Medium Myiarchus flycatcher, grey-brown above with a slightly bushy crown, pale grey throat and breast, and a pale lemon-yellow belly. Rufous edges on the wings and tail; two whitish wing bars. Longish dark bill, dark legs.
astgna1: Small plump gnateater; male rufous-brown above with a grey crown and breast, a long silvery-white plume behind the eye, and a black-and-white spotted throat patch; whitish belly. Short stout dark bill, pale pinkish legs.
astwar2: Tiny leaf warbler, greenish above with a grey crown bordered by a yellow median crown-stripe and bold yellow supercilium; bright yellow rump and double yellow wing bars. Ashy-grey throat, yellow belly. Fine dark bill, pale legs.
aswant1: Small antwren, ashy-grey overall, paler grey below, with contrasting rufous-edged wings forming a warm panel on the otherwise grey body. Faint pale wing markings. Thin dark bill; greyish legs; short tail.
atbtan1: Small bush-tanager, olive-green above with a grey head and a contrasting whitish-grey throat, and pale yellow underparts washed olive on the breast. Faint pale eye-ring or arc; whitish belly. Short dark bill, dark legs.
attwoo1: Small black-and-white woodpecker with a solid black back showing a white ladder-barred central patch, heavily barred white flanks, and a black-and-white striped face. Male has a yellow crown patch. Black bill, grey legs; only three toes.
audori: Greenish-yellow oriole with a black face mask, black throat patch, black wings and black tail contrasting with a bright olive-yellow body and back. Straight bluish-grey bill, grey legs; medium slim songbird.
augbuz2: Stocky black-and-white raptor: blackish head, back and wings, pure white underparts, and a bright rufous-orange tail. Broad wings show white flight feathers with dark trailing edge. Yellow cere and legs, hooked black bill.
aukpar1: Large long-tailed parrot; male has a brilliant scarlet head and underparts, dark green back and wings with a pale green wing-stripe, and a blue lower back and rump. Orange-red upper bill, grey legs.
aumowl1: Large pale owl with a heart-shaped white-to-rufous facial disc rimmed dark, mottled grey-brown and rufous upperparts finely speckled white, and whitish underparts with fine dark spots. Dark eyes, pale bill, feathered legs.
auonig1: Small slim nightjar-like bird, soft greyish-brown finely vermiculated and barred dark; pale face with a dark double crown-stripe and band over the nape. Large dark eyes, tiny bill with bristles, long banded tail.
aupowl1: Tiny compact owl, rich brown above with fine pale spotting and a rufous-and-grey morph; whitish underparts with brown streaking. Two dark false-eye patches on the nape, yellow eyes, yellowish bill and feet.
aurwar1: Plain warm brown warbler, unstreaked olive-brown above and buffy-white below, with a short pale supercilium over the eye. Long rounded tail, slender pointed dark bill, grey legs; nondescript reedbed bird.
ausbla1: Entirely glossy black bird with a faint bluish sheen, slender body and longish graduated tail. Pointed conical black bill, dark eyes, black legs; medium-sized icterid-like blackbird.
ausbrt1: Large blackish ground-dwelling megapode with a bare red head and neck, a bright yellow (male) wattle hanging from the neck, and a laterally flattened fan-like black tail held upright. Brownish-black plumage, stout legs.
auscan1: Small streaky brown furnariid, drab brown above with dark stripes on the upperparts and crown, whitish throat sometimes with a pale rufous chin patch, and pale buff underparts with blackish streaks on breast-sides and flanks. Short rufous-edged tail, black bill with pale base, pinkish legs.
ausfig1: Stocky oriole-like bird; male grey above and on breast with greenish wings, a pale yellow-green belly, black head and bare red skin around the eye. Stout grey-black bill, dark legs.
ausgre1: Tiny dark grebe; breeding adult blackish above with a glossy black head, a chestnut stripe down the neck-side, and a pale oval yellow patch at the gape base. Dark bill, short body, almost tailless.
ausibi1: Large white ibis with a bare black scaly head and neck, a long down-curved black bill, and black plume-like tips on the inner wings. Plumage otherwise white; blackish legs with reddish tinge.
ausmag2: Boldly black-and-white crow-sized songbird with a white nape and shoulders, white rump and tail base, and otherwise glossy black body and wings. Pale blue-grey bill with black tip, dark legs, red-brown eyes.
auspar1: Mostly dull green parrot with a dusky-red forehead and belly patch, faint dark scalloping, and a long maroon-red tail. Greenish-brown upperparts, greyish bill, grey legs; slim long-tailed parakeet.
auspel1: Very large pelican, mostly white with black wings and black tail, and a huge pale pink bill with a large throat pouch. Black-edged wings show in flight; pale eyes with yellow ring, bluish-grey legs.
auspip3: Slim streaky brown pipit, buff-brown above with dark streaking, pale buff underparts with bold dark streaks on the breast, and a pale supercilium. White outer tail feathers, slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
ausrai1: Slim rail with olive-brown black-streaked upperparts, slaty blue-grey face and underparts, and black-and-white barred flanks and undertail. Long slightly downcurved reddish bill, reddish legs.
ausrav1: Large all-black corvid with a glossy purple-green sheen, prominent shaggy throat hackles, and white eyes in adults. Heavy black bill, black legs; longish wings, square-tipped tail.
ausshe1: Large dark shelduck; dark brownish-black body, chestnut breast, blackish-green head with a white neck-ring (male), and a large white forewing patch with green and chestnut. Dark bill and legs.
austhr1: Robust thrush, dark olive-brown above with a slightly darker head, warm tawny-buff underparts, and a paler throat with fine dark streaks. Bright orange-yellow bill, yellow eye-ring and orange-yellow legs.
ayweye1: Small bright yellow warbler-like bird, greenish-yellow above and rich yellow below, with a bold white eye-ring and a yellow forehead. Fine pointed dark bill, greyish legs; compact rounded body.
ayweye3: Small white-eye, bright greenish-yellow above and uniformly yellow below, with a conspicuous white eye-ring and a yellow forehead and throat. Slender pointed dark bill, pale legs.
azaspi1: Small brown spinetail with a rufous crown and rufous wing-coverts contrasting with plain grey-brown back and face, a pale grey throat with a dark central smudge, and dull buff-grey underparts. Long graduated rufous-brown tail, dark bill, greyish legs.
azbpit1: Stout colourful pitta with green upperparts, a black head with a white throat, an azure-blue rump and wing patch, pale blue breast, a black central belly patch, and scarlet lower belly and undertail. Stout dark bill, greyish legs.
azchum1: Medium hummingbird with glittering green upperparts, a shining azure-blue crown, white underparts, and a greenish-blue tail. Bill is red with a dark tip, dark legs.
azhjay1: Deep blue jay with a pale azure-blue hood over the crown and nape bordered by a black mask and throat, and otherwise rich blue body, wings and tail. Black bill, black legs; medium long-tailed jay.
azrpar9: Large green parrot with a yellowish-green head and mantle, blue lower back and rump, blue bend of wing, and fine yellow margins on the wing-coverts. Male has a red bill; yellow eyes, grey legs.
azrtan1: Pale blue tanager with a purplish-blue crown, dark lores, a mottled greenish-blue and black mantle, and bold dark spots across the chest. Black wings and tail with blue edges; grey dark-tipped bill, grey legs.
azstan1: Mostly turquoise-blue tanager with a brighter blue head and underparts, slightly greyer-blue back, and bright azure-blue shoulders contrasting with darker wings. Stout dark bill, dark legs.
azugal1: Slim pale gallinule, greenish-brown above with a powder-blue face, neck and breast, white undertail, and a long thin neck. Bright yellow bill, long yellow-green legs and very long toes.
azujay1: Striking deep azure-blue jay with a contrasting blackish head, throat and upper breast, and uniform rich blue back, wings and tail. Black bill, black legs; medium-sized.
azukin1: Small kingfisher with brilliant deep azure-blue upperparts and head, an orange-buff throat and rich rufous-orange underparts, and white neck-side spots. Long black dagger bill, short red-orange legs.
azutit2: Small white-and-blue tit with a clean white head, an azure-blue crown-band through the eye, blue wings with a white wing-bar, blue tail, and white underparts. Tiny dark bill, blue-grey legs.
azwmag2: Slender long-tailed magpie with a glossy black cap, pale grey-buff body, and sky-blue wings and a very long blue tail. White throat, black bill, dark legs.
babcra1: Small dark crake with a rufous forehead and face, olive-brown upperparts with white-marked wing-coverts, cinnamon-rufous throat and breast, and boldly black-and-white barred flanks and undertail. Blue-grey green-based bill, salmon-red legs.
babcuc2: Slim cuckoo, rufous-brown above finely barred dark, with a pale supercilium, whitish underparts narrowly barred dark, and a long barred tail. Slightly downcurved dark bill with yellowish base, yellowish legs.
babcus1: Largish grey cuckooshrike, slaty blue-grey above and on breast, with fine dark barring on the whitish lower belly and undertail. Black face mask through the eye, heavy black bill, dark legs, staring yellow eye.
babowl1: Large brown owl with a dark brown facial disc, two pale crescent-shaped white eyebrow-and-collar bands, brown upperparts, and tawny-buff underparts narrowly barred dark. Pale bill, dark eyes, feathered legs.
babpar1: Plump partridge with finely barred grey-brown upperparts, a chestnut breast-band, buff and chestnut face, a dark eye-line and pale supercilium, and grey-and-chestnut barred flanks. Dark bill, red legs.
babpic1: Tiny piculet, olive-brown above with fine pale spotting, golden-yellow forehead, and pale underparts barred dark across the breast. Male has orange-tipped crown feathers; short dark bill, grey legs.
babpit1: Brilliant pitta with luminous emerald-green crown and upperparts, an aquamarine-blue rear crown patch, a broad black mask, an ivory-white throat, and yellow flanks finely barred black. Blue belly patch, cobalt-blue tail; dark bill, pinkish legs.
babshr1: Small shrike with a black forehead and broad black mask, blue-grey crown and nape, a deep chestnut-maroon back, white underparts washed rufous on the flanks, and black wings with a white patch. Black bill, black legs.
babtan1: Deep blue tanager, rich cobalt-blue overall with contrasting black lores, black wings and black tail edged blue. Stout dark bill, dark legs; medium-sized highland tanager.
babwar: Warbler with a chestnut crown, throat, breast-sides and flanks, a dark mask, a buff neck patch, and grey-streaked greenish upperparts with two white wing-bars. Whitish belly, thin dark bill, dark legs.
babwoo1: Large robust woodcreeper, warm rufous-brown overall with finely barred dusky underparts and throat, plain rufous wings and tail, and an unstreaked back. Heavy straight pale pinkish bill, grey legs.
babwoo2: Small woodpecker with a black crown, olive-green back, and underparts narrowly barred dark olive and pale buff. Male shows red on the crown; dark bill, greyish legs.
babwre1: Largish wren boldly patterned with black-and-white barring across the back and wings, a streaked crown, white supercilium, white throat and breast, and a buff-cinnamon belly. Longish dark bill, dark legs.
bacant1: Dark antbird; male slaty-black overall with a bare blue facial skin patch around the eye and a slightly browner back. Black bill, greyish legs; female is rufous-brown with the same blue facial skin.
bacant2: Boldly black-and-white barred all over including head, back, wings and underparts, with a shaggy black-and-white crest. Stout hooked blackish bill, grey legs. Female browner with rufous tones. Medium thrush-sized antbird.
bacdov1: Long-tailed slim pigeon, rich rufous-brown above with fine dark barring across the back, wings and long graduated tail; buffy-pink underparts. Male shows iridescent green-purple neck gloss. Dark bill, reddish legs.
baceag2: Large powerful eagle, glossy blue-black above and across the head, chest and short crest, contrasting with rich rufous-chestnut belly, thighs and underwing coverts. Yellow cere and feet, black-banded tail.
bacori1: Striking medium-sized oriole, entirely glossy black except for a vivid crimson-red lower belly and undertail patch. Stout pinkish-grey bill, dark eyes, grey legs.
bacspa: Plain rufous-and-grey sparrow with a streaked chestnut-brown crown and back, unmarked greyish face and pale buffy underparts. Long rounded tail, large dark bill, pinkish legs. Lacks bold facial pattern.
baeant1: Plump terrestrial antbird, warm rufous-brown overall with a grey crown and a large conspicuous bare bluish-white patch of skin around the eye. Underparts greyish-rufous. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
baeowl1: Large dark eagle-owl with prominent ear tufts, dark brown upperparts and head, finely dark-barred buff underparts. Bare yellowish facial skin, dusky bill, dark eyes, feathered legs.
baepig2: Pale grey-brown pigeon with a vinous-tinged head and breast, a bold whitish wing panel formed by white-edged wing coverts, and a conspicuous bare red ring of skin around the eye. Dark bill, reddish legs.
baerob1: Plain greyish-brown thrush with paler grey underparts and a whitish throat, distinguished by a bold bare yellow-orange ring of skin around the eye. Yellow bill, yellowish legs.
bafcur1: Large black curassow with a curly black crest, white belly and vent. Male glossy black with a yellow knob/cere at base of bill; female barred black-and-white on wings, neck and tail with rufous tones. Grey legs.
baffal1: Slim small forest-falcon, slaty-grey above and on the head, with finely dark-barred white underparts and several narrow white tail bands. Bare yellow-orange facial skin, hooked yellow-based bill, long yellow legs. Rufous morph occurs.
bafibi1: Dark glossy ibis appearing dull purplish-bronze, with bare pinkish-red skin on the face and throat and a long down-curved pinkish bill. Reddish legs. Medium-sized, slender.
bagcot1: Compact cotinga, male entirely deep velvety black with a contrasting bright golden-yellow patch on the bend of the wing. Stout black bill, dark legs. Female olive-green.
bagtan2: Stocky tanager, mostly glossy black on head, back, wings and breast with a vivid golden-yellow rump, belly and lower underparts. Short stout black bill, dark grey legs.
bagwea1: Yellow-and-black weaver with a black mask and crown, yellow forehead, nape and underparts, and black-streaked olive-yellow back and wings. Pale eye, blackish pointed bill, pinkish legs.
bahant1: Small antwren, grey above with a black cap, a white supercilium and black-and-white streaked wings and back. Male grey below, female buffier. Slender dark bill, pale legs.
bahmoc: Slim long-tailed mockingbird, greyish-brown above with dark streaking on the back and flanks and a faint malar streak; whitish underparts. Long dark tail with white corners, slim dark bill, dark legs.
bahspi1: Plain grey spinetail, uniformly dull greyish overall with a slightly browner crown and wings, paler throat. Long graduated dark tail, slender dark bill, greyish legs.
bahtan1: Brightly coloured tanager with a deep chestnut-rufous head, bright green body and wings, and a blue collar across the nape and breast. Short stout dark bill, grey legs.
bahyel1: Large yellowthroat warbler, olive-green above with bright yellow underparts and a broad black mask bordered above by a grey-white band across the forehead. Long stout dark bill, pinkish legs.
baifly1: Boldly streaked flycatcher, brown above with a yellow crown patch, blackish mask through the eye and white supercilium and throat; whitish underparts streaked dark on breast, washed yellow. Rufous-edged wings and tail, stout dark bill.
baisan: Small slim long-winged sandpiper, scaly buff-brown above with dark feather centres, a buffy streaked breast band and white belly. Wingtips project well past the tail. Short straight black bill, blackish legs.
baispa: Streaky grassland sparrow with an ochre-buff face and crown stripe, a fine necklace of dark streaks across the buffy breast and bold dark streaking on a chestnut-and-buff back. Short conical bill, pinkish legs.
baitro1: Trogon with a glossy blue-black head and upper breast, bright orange-yellow belly separated by a white breast band; metallic green-blue back. Tail white below with black bars. Yellow eye-ring and bill. Female greyer.
baleag: Large dark-brown raptor with a pure white head and neck and a white tail, contrasting blackish-brown body and wings. Massive hooked yellow bill, bare yellow legs and feet. Immatures all dark mottled.
balica1: Glossy black drongo with a strongly forked tail, the outer tail feathers curving outward; whitish lower belly and vent distinguish it. Stout black bill, dark legs, reddish eye.
balori: Brilliant orange-and-black oriole, male with a solid black head, back and wings and vivid orange underparts, rump and tail sides; white wing bar. Sharp pointed grey-blue bill, grey legs. Female yellowish-orange.
bamant1: Medium antshrike, male barred black-and-white overall with a black crown. Stout heavy hooked black bill and a striking pale yellow eye. Grey legs. Female rufous-and-buff barred.
bamwoo1: Greenish woodpecker, dull olive-green above and below with a reddish wash on the crown and nape (male). Pale chisel-shaped greenish-yellow bill, dark eye, greyish legs.
banana: Tiny warbler-like bird, dark grey above with a bold white supercilium, black cheeks and crown, yellow breast and rump, and white throat; small white wing spot. Short curved black bill, grey legs.
banant1: Slim dark antbird, male slaty-grey overall with bold white tips to the wing coverts and white-tipped tail feathers. Slender black bill, grey legs. Female browner with buffy underparts.
banant2: Small terrestrial antbird, brown above with bold black-and-white scaly barring across the back, a white rump band and white-spotted wings; whitish underparts barred on the sides. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
banbro1: Stocky broadbill, deep purplish-maroon below and on the head with a black crown, back and wings boldly marked with yellow streaks and patches. Broad bright blue-and-yellow bill, dark legs.
bankin1: Distinctive kingfisher, male rufous-and-black banded above with a chestnut crown, bright blue rump and white underparts; finely barred back. Large bright red bill, dark legs. Female more rufous-barred overall.
banlap1: Boldly patterned lapwing, brown above with a black crown and broad black breast band; white face, throat and belly. Red facial wattle and bill base, yellowish bill tip, reddish legs.
banmyn1: Greyish myna, slate-grey overall with a darker black crown, brick-orange bare skin behind the eye and a buffy-orange vent. Orange-yellow bill with a reddish base, yellowish legs; pale wing patch in flight.
banpit3: Brilliant pitta, deep blue below with a black-and-blue head, glossy blue crown stripes, golden-yellow eyebrow and orange-rufous nape; greenish back. Stout black bill, pale legs. Female barred yellow-and-black below.
banpit4: Vivid pitta, male with a black head, broad golden-yellow eyebrow, deep blue underparts and a chestnut-and-green back; barred wings. Stout black bill, pinkish legs. Female more barred.
banpri1: Small dark warbler-like bird, slaty-grey above and on the head with finely black-and-white barred whitish underparts. Long graduated dark tail, slender black bill, pinkish legs.
banqua1: Small quail, greyish-brown above with bold black-and-white barring on the flanks and sides, a plain greyish face and breast. Short dark bill, dull legs.
banwar2: Small warbler-like bird, grey above with a paler grey head, white throat and finely dark-barred whitish lower underparts; rufous-edged wings. Pale eye, slender dark bill, pale legs.
banwoo2: Bright red-and-green woodpecker, crimson-red wings and crown contrasting with olive-green back and finely barred buff-and-dark underparts; reddish face. Pale chisel bill, greyish legs.
banwre1: Boldly marked wren, warm rufous-brown above with a white supercilium, black-streaked white cheeks and a heavily black-spotted white breast and flanks. Long barred tail, slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
barant1: Boldly black-and-white barred antshrike, male barred all over with a black-and-white crest. Stout hooked dark bill, pale yellow eye, grey legs. Female warm rufous with plain rufous crest and buff underparts.
barant2: Plump terrestrial antthrush, dark olive-brown above with finely dark-barred buffy underparts and a buff supercilium and throat. Short cocked tail, slender dark bill, long pinkish legs.
barbec1: Small becard, male grey above with a black cap and finely black-barred whitish underparts; white-edged wings. Stout hooked dark bill, dark legs. Female olive-and-yellow barred.
barbro1: Striking broadbill, deep maroon-red below with a black head, back and wings and a bold white wing stripe; whitish underwing line. Broad two-toned blue-and-yellow bill, dark legs.
barbut1: Small quail-like buttonquail, mottled brown above with bold black barring on the buffy breast and flanks (female with black throat and rufous nape). Short pale bill, yellowish legs, pale eye.
barfly1: Tiny brilliant flycatcher, male deep orange overall with a contrasting black back, wings and tail and a black patch through the eye. Small dark bill, dark legs. Female duller orange-brown.
barfru1: Plump fruiteater, male green above with a black head and throat bordered by a yellow line, and finely black-barred yellowish-green underparts; red eye. Short stout reddish bill, pinkish legs.
bargol: Compact diving duck; drake has glossy purple-black head with a white crescent-shaped patch before the golden-yellow eye, black back with a row of white shoulder spots, and clean white flanks and underparts. Steep forehead, stubby dark bill, orange legs.
barhaw1: Heavy, broad-winged, short-tailed raptor; slaty-black head, throat, breast and upperparts with a white belly finely barred black. Black tail crossed by one broad white band. Bare facial skin, cere, hooked bill and stout legs all bright yellow.
barowl1: Medium robust hawk-owl; plain grey-brown above, whitish underparts boldly streaked dark brown. Rounded head lacking ear-tufts, large yellow eyes, no facial disk rim. Greyish hooked bill, feathered legs ending in pale yellow feet.
barpar1: Tiny short-tailed green parakeet; bright grass-green overall, slightly paler yellow-green below, finely barred with narrow black bars across the back, wings, flanks and crown. Pale horn bill, pinkish legs.
barpuf1: Stocky big-headed puffbird; rufous-brown crown and upperparts heavily barred black, buffy-white underparts barred dark throughout, plain whitish throat. Large slightly hooked yellowish bill, short dark legs.
barrai1: Large long-legged rail; grey head and breast, rufous-chestnut hindneck and nape, olive-brown back, and black-and-white barred belly, flanks and undertail. Stout reddish bill, pinkish-red legs.
barswi: Small dark swift with stubby spine-tipped tail; sooty blackish overall with a contrasting whitish-grey rump band and paler throat. Cigar-shaped body, short curved wings, tiny dark bill.
bartin2: Plump round-bodied terrestrial tinamou; rich rufous-brown above finely barred and vermiculated darker, paler cinnamon-buff below, dull grey throat. Small head, slender slightly downcurved bill, sturdy greyish legs.
bartyr1: Tiny slim flycatcher; olive-green upperparts and crown, pale yellow throat and whitish underparts, with diagnostic broad chestnut-rufous patches around the eye forming a bay eye-ring on the lores. Pale eye, small thin bill.
barwaf1: Small finch with slaty-grey head, back and breast, contrasting bright rufous belly, flanks and undertail, and a white throat. Bold white supercilium and dark eyeline; conical grey bill, dark legs.
barwar2: Slim large reed warbler; plain warm brown above, whitish below washed buff on flanks, white throat, faint pale supercilium. Long heavy pointed dark bill, peaked crown, long graduated tail, pale legs.
basdov1: Slender long-tailed ground-dove; greyish head and breast, warm brown back, pinkish-buff underparts, and a distinctive coppery-bronze nape patch scaled with fine black barring. Bluish eye-ring, slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
basowl: Small earless screech-owl; cinnamon-tawny grey-brown overall, finely vermiculated and streaked darker, with a pale-bordered facial disk. Large dark eyes (not yellow), greenish-yellow bill, feathered tarsi.
batant1: Small plump antbird; male slaty-grey overall with a white throat patch and a black tail boldly tipped white. Whitish eye, stout black bill, pale grey legs.
batant3: Tiny antwren; male grey above with a black throat and breast, white belly, and a black tail broadly tipped white forming a pale terminal band. Slender dark bill, greyish legs.
batapa2: Small slim warbler-like bird with long graduated tail; greyish-olive above, yellow underparts crossed by a narrow black breast band, whitish throat. Pale eye, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
batbar1: Small hermit hummingbird; bronzy-green upperparts, buffy-rufous underparts and rump, black face mask bordered buff, and a coppery throat. Tail dark, tipped white, slightly decurved bill with pale lower mandible.
batbel1: Robust cotinga; male is entirely pure white with a striking patch of bare blue-green skin around the throat and lores. Stout pale bill, dark legs; rounded heavy-bodied shape.
batear1: Slim ground-foraging furnariid; plain dull grey-brown crown and upperparts, narrow whitish supercilium with dark eyeline, rufescent cheeks, and a faintly streaky breast. Black tail with a dark rusty band at the base, slightly decurved bill, pale legs.
batfal1: Small dashing falcon; slaty-black crown, back and upper breast, with finely barred black-and-white lower breast and flanks, and a contrasting rufous belly, thighs and throat. Yellow eye-ring, cere and legs; long pointed wings.
batfru1: Plump cotinga; male bright green above, green below scaled and spotted yellow on the breast, with a black tail crossed by a broad pale band near the tip. Stout reddish-orange bill, coral legs.
batgua1: Large dark guan; brownish-bronze body, blackish head with a small white-streaked area on the neck and face, and a long broad tail tipped pale grey forming a band. Bare reddish throat dewlap, bluish facial skin, dark legs.
bathaw1: Slender dark falcon-like kite; sooty blackish-brown overall with a small white throat patch and variable white spots on the eyelids. Long pointed wings, large dark eyes, short hooked bill, short legs.
batlar1: Small pale sandy lark; plain pinkish-buff to greyish-sand above, paler whitish below, with little streaking. Diagnostic dark subterminal band across the rufous-based tail tip. Short stout pale bill, pale legs.
batman1: Tiny compact manakin; male brilliant scarlet-red crown, nape and breast, black face, wings and back, with yellow lower belly. Tail black with a pale band; pale eye, dark bill, orange legs.
batnig1: Small slim nightjar; greyish-brown finely vermiculated plumage, blackish about the face, and a long tail crossed by a broad white band toward the tip (white reduced in female). No white wing patches; tiny bill, short legs.
batoro1: Stocky blackbird-relative; entirely glossy black plumage with a contrasting broad pale bluish-white conical bill that is notably wide-based and flattened. Dark eye, black legs.
batpig1: Large heavy pigeon; soft grey head and breast fading to paler grey belly, a narrow white half-collar above an iridescent green-bronze nape patch, and a broad pale grey band across the dark tail tip. Yellow bill with black tip, yellow legs.
batsee1: Small finch; male slaty-grey overall with a contrasting bright rufous-chestnut undertail and lower belly. Stout conical yellowish bill; tail dark with whitish spots near the base.
battre1: Slim bark-creeping bird; mottled grey-brown and buff streaked upperparts, whitish underparts, pale supercilium, and a dark tail crossed by narrow blackish bars. Long slender decurved bill, stiff tail, pale legs.
battro1: Medium trogon; male glossy green head, breast and upperparts, bright red belly bordered above by a white breast band, and a finely black-and-white barred undertail. Yellow eye-ring and bill, short legs.
batwhi1: Robust whistler; male olive-green above with yellow-tinged underparts, a glossy jet-black hood, and a diagnostic patch of loose bare red skin on the throat. Stout dark bill, greyish legs.
bawant1: Small antbird; male black above and on the throat and breast, with a white belly and white edgings on the wing coverts and flanks. Pale eye, slender black bill, greyish legs.
bawbec7: Small stocky becard; male grey above with a black crown and back, two bold white wing bars, and clean white to pale grey underparts. Short stout hooked dark bill, grey legs.
bawbul2: Small crested bulbul; glossy black head, upperparts and breast contrasting sharply with a white belly and white wing patch. Short black crest, dark eye, black bill, dark legs.
bawcow4: Plain greyish blackbird-relative; uniform dull grey-brown body slightly paler below, with warmer rufous-tinged wings. Dark lores and reddish-brown eye, stout dark conical bill, dark legs.
bawfly1: Small flycatcher-shrike; male glossy black head, throat, breast and upperparts contrasting with a white belly and a large white wing patch. Broad flat black bill, large dark eye, dark legs.
bawfly2: Slim flycatcher; male deep cobalt-blue crown, back and breast, jet-black face, throat and sides, with a clean white belly. Dark eye, fine black bill, dark legs.
bawhae1: Striking crested hawk-eagle; pure white head, underparts and underwings contrasting with black back, wings and short crest, and a black-and-white barred tail. Yellow cere and legs, dark hooked bill.
bawhor2: Large hornbill; mostly black body with a white belly, white-tipped tail and white trailing wing edge. Large pale casque atop a long curved bill, black-and-cream toned, bare facial skin, dark legs.
bawmoc1: Slim long-tailed mockingbird; slaty blue-grey upperparts, head and breast, contrasting with a white belly, and a black mask through the red eye. Long graduated tail, slender slightly decurved black bill, dark legs.
bawnig1: Medium nightjar; greyish-brown cryptically vermiculated plumage with a tawny-cinnamon nuchal collar, white throat band, white wing band and white tail corners/tip (buff in female). Tiny bill, short legs.
bawnig3: Medium nightjar; overall grizzled greyish-brown finely speckled black, buff and whitish, male with a tawny-cinnamon hindneck collar, small white throat patch, white wing bands and white tail bands and tips. Tiny dark bill, short legs.
bawowl1: Medium owl; blackish-brown crown, upperparts and breast finely barred white, contrasting with a black facial disk. Large dark eyes, yellow bill, feathered legs with yellow feet.
bawpri1: Small long-tailed warbler-like bird; greyish-brown above with two narrow whitish wing bars, pale yellowish-white underparts, and a faint dark eyeline below a pale supercilium. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs, often-cocked graduated tail.
bawsee1: Small finch; male glossy black head, throat, breast and upperparts contrasting sharply with a white belly and undertail, and a small white wing speculum. Stout pale bluish-grey conical bill, dark legs.
bawswa1: Small swallow; glossy blue-black upperparts, crown and breast-sides contrasting with clean white underparts, and a black undertail. Slightly forked tail, short black bill, dark legs.
bawtan1: Stocky tanager; male glossy black overall with a contrasting white belly and lower flanks and a white wing patch. Pale eye, stout conical dark bill, dark legs.
bawtyr1: Tiny tody-flycatcher; black crown and face, olive-green back, two yellowish wing bars, yellow throat and underparts, and a black tail. Pale eye, fine straight dark bill, pale legs.
bawwar: Small slender warbler; boldly streaked black and white throughout, with a black-and-white striped crown, black cheek patch, and white wing bars. Thin slightly decurved dark bill, dark legs; creeps along bark.
bawwar1: Small warbler with grey-brown upperparts and whitish underparts densely barred dark brown across breast and belly; plain greyish head and short cocked tail. Slender dark bill; pinkish legs.
bayant1: Plump round antbird with rufous-chestnut upperparts, wings and tail; dusky-brown crown and rufous-chestnut underparts darker on breast, paler on belly with whitish-buff belly centre. Stout dark bill, very short tail, long pinkish legs.
baybro1: Stocky broadbill, glossy black above and on hood with a broad white collar and yellow back streaks; black breast band over white belly washed yellow on flanks. Broad pale blue bill; pinkish legs.
baycou1: Large coucal with grey crown, light chestnut body, and darker bay-chestnut wings and long graduated tail. Heavy black bill; black feet; dark red eye.
baygro1: Bulky finch-like bird: male golden-yellow on underparts, rump and collar with a black hood, black wings, tail and upper back. Very heavy pale grey conical bill; pinkish legs.
baymac: Very large macaw, bright blue above on crown, wings, back and tail; rich golden-yellow underparts and breast. White facial skin lined with fine black feather lines, black throat. Massive black bill; dark feet.
baymar1: Dark olive-brown blackbird with heavy yellowish streaking below; bright yellow on bend of wing and yellow-edged shoulder, rufous wing patch. Long pointed black bill; dark legs.
baytan2: Small tanager: male glossy black on head, back, wings and tail with a bright golden-yellow rump, breast and belly. Short pointed black bill; dark legs.
baytan3: Tanager with deep blue head, upperparts, wings and tail contrasting with a bright yellow throat, breast and belly. Conical dark bill; greyish legs.
baywea1: Breeding male weaver with bright yellow crown and nape, dark brown streaked back and wings, and dark brown mask over ear-coverts and throat; pale yellowish-buff underparts. Heavy conical horn bill; pinkish legs.
baywoo1: Reddish-bay woodpecker, entirely rich rufous-chestnut on back, wings and tail with faint dark barring; paler chestnut-brown underparts and head, with a small red nape patch on male. Long pale greenish-yellow bill; grey legs.
baywre1: Boldly marked wren with bright rufous-chestnut back, wings and tail; black cap and nape, white face and throat, and black-and-white barred flanks below white underparts. Slim dark bill; greyish legs.
bbbeat1: Large green bee-eater with a long shaggy blue throat and beard; grass-green upperparts, yellowish belly streaked rufous, and squared tail. Heavy slightly down-curved black bill; greyish legs.
bbbeat2: Small bee-eater, green above with a black eye-mask, white forehead and chin, blue throat patch, and a black breast band over buffy belly. Slender down-curved black bill; dark legs.
bbbtan1: Dark tanager-finch with blackish upperparts, head and wings contrasting with a white throat and grey breast and belly. Short conical black bill; dark legs.
bbctyr1: Plain chat-tyrant with grey-brown upperparts, dull rufous-cinnamon underparts, and a contrasting whitish or buff supercilium; dusky wings with rufous edging. Small black bill; black legs.
bbfgle1: Rufous-brown ovenbird with a prominent long buff supercilium, plain rufous-brown upperparts, brighter rufous tail, and buffy underparts faintly streaked on breast. Straight pale-based bill; greyish legs.
bbgsta1: Glossy starling, iridescent green-blue above and on head with a contrasting velvety black belly; female duller with grey-brown streaked underparts. Black bill; black legs; pale eye.
bbifin1: Inca-finch with rufous back and mantle, grey crown and nape, black face and throat, and a striking buff bridle of broad malar stripe and supercilium; buffy underparts, black tail with white outer feathers. Yellow-orange bill and legs.
bbmtou1: Mountain-toucan with blue-grey body, black crown and nape, golden-yellow rump, rufous undertail, and bright blue facial skin. Entirely black bill; reddish eye-skin.
bbnthr1: Small thrush with olive-brown upperparts, plain grey breast and whitish belly, and a faint pale eye-ring; black bill and bright orange-yellow legs distinctive.
bbrwar1: Streaky reed-warbler with warm brown upperparts, buffy-white underparts, and a bold whitish supercilium bordered above by a black lateral crown stripe. Fine pointed bill; pinkish legs.
bbsfin1: Small seed-finch: male entirely glossy black with a heavy black conical bill; compact rounded body, dark legs.
bbsrob1: Scrub-robin with warm brown upperparts and rufous rump and tail tipped white, whitish underparts, and a pale supercilium with dark eyeline. Slim dark bill; long pale legs.
bbwdov1: Small dove, pale grey-brown above with glossy blue-black wing spots, pinkish-grey head and breast, and whitish belly; chestnut in flight feathers. Black bill; reddish-purple legs.
bbwduc: Long-necked whistling-duck with rich chestnut breast and back, black belly, grey face with white eye-ring, and a broad white wing patch. Bright coral-pink bill and legs.
bbwqua1: Dark wood-quail, rich chocolate-brown overall with a contrasting white throat and a small bare red eye-ring. Stout dark bill; greyish legs; rounded body.
bbwtyr1: Small pied tyrant, black above on crown, back, wings and tail with clean white underparts, forehead and face. Short black bill; black legs.
bcatan1: Dark tanager: male sooty grey above with a red tinge and a concealed orange-red crest; blackish face and cheeks, salmon-orange throat darkening to greyer belly. Stout dark bill; grey legs.
bcbeag1: Large eagle-like raptor, blackish-grey above and on hooded chest, with finely grey-barred white belly and broad wings; short white-based tail. Yellow cere and feet; dark hooked bill.
bcfgle1: Foliage-gleaner with a black cap and contrasting long pale supercilium, rufous-brown back and bright rufous tail, and tawny-buff throat and underparts. Straight pale-based bill; greyish legs.
bchpar1: Tiny short-tailed green parrot with a blue crown patch, golden-yellow back patch, red throat spot and red rump. Black bill; pinkish legs.
bcptan1: Palm-tanager with olive-green back, grey nape and underparts, black crown and face, and bold white spots before and behind the eye. Black bill; greyish legs.
bcptyr1: Tiny round pygmy-tyrant with olive-green upperparts, a blackish cap, white eye-ring, and pale yellowish-white underparts; very short tail. Small dark bill; pale legs.
bcrfin: Brown rosy-finch, warm cinnamon-brown body washed pink on belly, rump and wings, with a contrasting grey crown patch. Small dark conical bill (yellowish in non-breeding); black legs.
