bcrthr1: Rock-thrush: male slate-blue head and breast, white throat and wing patch, and bright orange-rufous belly and tail; blue-grey back. Dark bill; dark legs.
bcslar1: Small lark-finch: male sandy-grey above with a black crown, black face and underparts, and white cheek patch and nape sides. Pale conical bill; pinkish legs.
bctspi1: Small tit-spinetail with a dusky-brown cap, plain grey-brown back, buffy underparts, and a long graduated rufous-edged tail. Fine pointed bill; greyish legs.
bcweye2: Small green white-eye with a bold white eye-ring, black forehead and crown, whitish underparts, and yellow throat and undertail. Slender dark bill; greyish legs.
bcwfin2: Warbling finch, grey above with a black cap and face mask, white throat and underparts, and white-tipped tail. Short conical dark bill; pinkish legs.
bcwpar1: Wood-partridge with brown back, slaty-grey breast streaked white, a buffy-rufous crown and pale supercilium, and bare red orbital skin. Black bill; red legs.
bcwspi1: Small wren-spinetail with a rufous forecrown, sandy-brown back streaked black, whitish supercilium, and plain pale underparts. Blackish maxilla, whitish mandible; light tan legs; pale eye.
beabel1: Bellbird: male glossy chocolate-brown body with a white head and throat, adorned with long black wattles hanging from the throat. Stout dark bill; dark legs.
beafir1: Finch-like firetail with olive-brown upperparts, finely black-and-white barred underparts, a bright crimson rump and bill, and a black face mask bordered pale blue eye-ring. Red bill; pale legs.
beagua1: Large dark guan, blackish-brown overall with fine white streaking on neck and breast, a bare bluish-grey face, and a small red throat wattle. Dark bill; reddish legs.
beajay1: Striking jay, deep violet-blue overall with a blacker face and throat and a contrasting pale blue crown and nape. Black bill; dark legs.
beasib1: Slim sibia with chestnut-rufous body, a glossy black head and throat, blue-grey wings and a long graduated grey-and-black banded tail. Slender black bill; pale legs.
beasun1: Tiny sunbird: breeding male iridescent green head, back and throat with a long graduated tail, plus a yellow lower breast band edged with red and maroon. Slender down-curved black bill; dark legs.
beatac1: Tiny tyrant, streaky brown above and buffy below, with a black mask and a black throat patch in males spreading onto the upper breast. Small dark bill; dark legs.
beathk1: Large heavy thick-knee, grey-brown above and on breast with a black-and-white face pattern: black cap and eyestripe set off by a white forehead and eyebrow. Massive upturned black bill with yellow base; greenish-grey legs; large yellow eye.
beawoo1: Medium woodpecker with black-and-white barred back, white underparts finely barred with black, and a bold black moustachial stripe through a white cheek. Male has a red rear crown; female all black. Black bill, grey legs.
beehum1: World's tiniest bird; breeding male iridescent with a fiery pinkish-red head and throat extending to pointed gorget feathers, bluish-green back, and pale grey underparts. Tiny straight black bill. Female green above, whitish below with white tail tips.
beibab1: Slender, long graduated tail often cocked; sandy-grey above with heavy dark streaking on crown and back, dark eye-line, white throat, and pale underparts washed rusty with rufous streaking on flanks. Pale pinkish legs, short fine bill.
belfly1: Small olive-grey flycatcher with a tufted crest, dull olive upperparts, two pale wing bars, pale eye-ring, and a broad cinnamon-buff breast band across grey-olive underparts. Dark bill, dark legs.
belgul: Large gull with blackish back and wings, white head and underparts, and a broad black band across an otherwise white tail. Yellow bill with red and black tip, yellow legs. Non-breeders show dusky-brown head smudging.
belkin1: Stocky big-headed kingfisher with shaggy crest, slate-blue head and upperparts, white collar, and a blue-grey breast band. Female adds a rufous lower band/flanks. Heavy dark dagger bill, short dark legs.
belmel1: Large grey honeyeater with white scaling on back, blackish-brown head, olive-yellow wing patch, and pale blue bare facial skin with a small white line behind the eye. Buffy undertail base, dark bill, lacking red wattles.
belmin1: Plump olive-green honeyeater with a yellowish-olive body, bright orange-yellow bill and orange-red bare skin behind the eye, and orange legs. Slightly paler greenish-yellow underparts.
belspa2: Grey-headed sparrow with a plain dark-grey head, white throat bordered by a thin black malar, brown streaked back, dingy whitish underparts with a central breast spot. Pale stout conical bill, dark central crown stripe absent.
belvir: Small drab vireo, olive-grey above and pale below with a yellowish wash on flanks, faint white spectacles, one or two weak wing bars, and a small hooked bill. Greyish legs; rather plain-faced overall.
belyel1: Yellowthroat warbler; male has a broad black face mask bordered above by a pale grey-blue band, bright yellow throat and underparts, and olive-green upperparts. Female lacks mask, olive above, yellow below. Thin dark bill.
benbus1: Small streaky lark, sandy-brown above with heavy dark streaking, rufous wing panel, and whitish underparts with dark streaking across the buffy breast. Pale supercilium, short stout pinkish bill, pale legs.
benthr: Slim greyish-brown thrasher with faint blurry spotting on a pale buffy breast, plain face, pale eye, and a relatively short, slightly downcurved blackish bill with pale base. Long tail, greyish legs.
berant1: Male has a black crown, white supercilium, broad black eye-stripe, black-speckled white cheeks, rufous-brown upperparts, rufous rump, black wings with white-tipped coverts, and a long dusky tail with whitish underparts.
berhum: Medium hummingbird with glittering green head, breast and back, contrasting rufous-chestnut wings and rump, and a coppery-bronze tail. Underparts greenish to greyish. Bill straight with a reddish lower mandible base.
berpip1: Small compact pale pipit, sandy-grey above with fine streaking, whitish underparts with light breast streaking, a bold white supercilium, and a dark eye-line. Short tail, fine dark bill, pale legs.
besbab1: Small shrike-babbler; male has a black crown and broad black mask through the eye, grey upperparts, white throat and underparts, chestnut-tinged flanks, and white-and-yellow markings on black wings. Stout hooked bill.
besra1: Small forest hawk (sparrowhawk type); adult slate-grey above, whitish below with rufous barring on breast and flanks, and a barred grey tail. Yellow cere and legs, hooked dark-tipped bill, yellow to orange eye.
besrob1: Rufous-toned scrub-robin with warm brown upperparts, a rufous rump and tail, whitish underparts with dark malar and breast streaking, and a bold white supercilium with dark eye-line. Slim dark bill, pinkish legs.
bestan1: Brilliant tanager spangled overall with iridescent beryl-green and blue scaling; black-streaked green back, blue-green underparts, black face mask and crown patch. Short black bill, grey legs.
bewpar1: Plump partridge with brown upperparts, grey-brown scaled underparts, a chestnut-brown breast, and a distinctive bushy black-and-rufous throat tuft (beard). Reddish bill and red legs; reddish orbital skin.
bewqua1: Round forest quail with mottled brown plumage, an unspotted chestnut crown, blackish face and throat, and rufous underparts. Conspicuous black ear patch, red bill, red legs, and a reddish eye-ring.
bewwre: Small grey-brown wren with a long, often-cocked tail edged white, a bold white supercilium, plain greyish underparts, and finely barred wings and tail. Thin slightly downcurved bill, pinkish legs.
bfbwar1: Small plain warm-brown bush warbler, rufescent-brown above and pale buffy-grey below with a darker breast wash, a faint buff supercilium, and dark eye-line. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs; rounded tail.
bffgle: Rufous-toned foliage-gleaner, rich rufous-brown above with bright rufous wings and tail, a buff throat and supercilium, and buff-fronted face grading to dull brown underparts. Straight pale-based bill, greyish legs.
bfoboo: Large white-and-brown booby with mottled grey-brown upperparts, white underparts, streaky brownish head, and bright turquoise-blue webbed feet. Long pointed grey-blue bill, pale staring eyes.
bfwqua1: Dark forest quail with sooty-brown to blackish plumage, a black face and forecrown, fine grey speckling, and dark rufous-brown underparts. Dark bill, reddish to dark legs, reddish orbital skin.
bhcfly1: Small crested flycatcher with glossy blue-grey to blackish-blue upperparts, head and crest, paler grey underparts, and a slight white wing marking. Black bill, dark legs; rather long tail.
bhnthr1: Olive-brown nightingale-thrush with a contrasting black hood (head and throat), greyish-olive upperparts, grey underparts paling on the belly, and a bright orange eye-ring, bill, and legs.
bhpfly1: Paradise-flycatcher with a glossy blue-black head and crest, rich rufous-chestnut back, wings and very long tail, and rufous underparts. Bright blue eye-ring and blue-based bill, dark legs.
bhsbab1: Male has a glossy blue-black head, wings and tail with chestnut upperparts and chestnut wing tips; white chin shading to grey breast then pinkish belly, with a yellow patch on the breast side. Black-and-grey bill.
bhsfin1: Stocky sierra finch with a black hood (head and throat), yellowish to greyish-brown back, plain pale grey to buffy underparts, and a bright yellow-orange conical bill. Dark legs.
bhtfly1: Tiny tody-flycatcher with a black crown, head and upperparts, bright yellow underparts and throat, and a long thin black bill. Yellow-green edged wings; dark legs. Very small, big-headed shape.
bhulau1: Laughingthrush with rufous-brown plumage finely scaled black, a greyish crown, rufous face and underparts, and bold black-and-grey scaling on the wings and tail. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
bhwdov1: Small ground dove with a blue-grey head, rich rufous-chestnut back, wings and underparts, and glossy metallic blue-purple wing spots. Reddish bill, purplish-red legs; dark tail band.
biawar1: Small leaf warbler, olive-green above and yellowish below with a grey crown bordered by lateral dark crown stripes, a yellow median crown stripe, bold yellow eye-ring, and one pale wing bar. Fine bill, pinkish legs.
bicant2: Round antbird with rich rufous-brown upperparts, contrasting white underparts and throat, and a black face. Large bare bluish skin patch around the eye. Dark bill, greyish-pink legs.
bicant3: Plump two-toned antpitta, ferruginous-rufous on head, throat, upperparts, wings and tail, contrasting with sooty-grey underparts and a whitish central belly. Black bill, greyish legs; upright stance, short tail.
bicant4: Small antvireo; male slate-grey above and on head, paler grey below, with a concealed white back patch and faint pale wing markings. Stout slightly hooked dark bill, pale legs.
biccon1: Small conebill, slate-blue to grey above and warm cinnamon-buff below, with a pale eye-ring and a fine sharply pointed black bill. Greyish legs; plain unmarked wings.
bichaw1: Slim forest hawk, dark slate-grey above, with pale grey to whitish underparts and rufous thighs/flanks. Long barred tail, yellow cere and legs, hooked dark bill, reddish eye.
bicthr: Small grey-brown thrush, olive-brown above with a warmer reddish-brown tail, greyish face, and whitish underparts with dusky spotting on the buffy breast. Thin dark bill with yellowish base, pinkish legs.
bicwre1: Large boldly patterned wren, grey-brown above with a long white supercilium, white throat and underparts, plain back, and barred wings and tail. Slightly downcurved dark bill, greyish legs.
bisswi1: Large swift, sooty-black overall with a broad white collar across the breast (broken at the nape), long scythe-like wings, and a slightly forked tail. Tiny black bill, dark legs.
bkbalb: Large white-bodied albatross with a dark blackish-grey back and upperwings, white underwing with broad black margins, white head, and a dark brow line over a pale eye. Yellow-orange bill with reddish tip.
bkbbit1: Small dark bittern; male blackish-brown above with a buff-streaked neck and breast, pale buffy wing patch, and dark crown. Yellowish dagger bill, yellow-green legs; streaky cryptic underparts.
bkbbrt1: Large blackish brushturkey with sooty-black plumage, bare reddish head and neck skin, and a yellow bill. Stout yellow to dull legs; bulky body with a flattened tail.
bkbcuc: Slim brown cuckoo, grey-brown above and whitish below, with a red eye-ring, small white tail-tip spots, and an all-dark slightly downcurved bill. Long graduated tail; grey legs.
bkbcus2: Male slate-grey overall with a blackish face, paler grey underparts grading darker, and a black bill. Dark wings and longish tail; dark legs. Slim cicadabird shape.
bkbkin1: Tiny dwarf-kingfisher with brilliant rufous-orange head and underparts, lilac-and-blue iridescent back and wings, a violet wash on the rump, and a bright red bill. Red legs; very short tail.
bkbkoe1: Large slender cuckoo; male entirely glossy blue-black with a striking deep-red eye and a heavy black bill. Female brown above, heavily spotted and barred buff and dark, with a pale-streaked head and barred whitish underparts. Legs grey.
bkbmag1: Large long-tailed magpie with black head, breast, and back, bold white belly and white wing patches (scapulars), and a very long graduated black tail glossed iridescent green-blue. Stout black bill and black legs.
bkbowl1: Medium dark owl with sooty blackish-brown plumage finely barred white across head, back, and underparts, giving a banded look; pale facial disc rim, yellow-orange bill, and orange-yellow eyes. Rounded head without ear tufts.
bkbsht1: Large robust grey-brown tyrant-flycatcher; dusky grey-brown above, paler greyish below with faint dark streaking on throat and breast, white outer tail feathers, and a short stout black hooked bill. Long blackish legs.
bkbsun1: Small slender sunbird; male metallic green head and back with a broad black belly, a bright scarlet breast band edged blue-green, and yellow pectoral tufts. Long decurved black bill; blackish legs. Female plain greyish-olive.
bkbtan1: Striking tanager; deep velvety black hood, back, and wings contrasting with a brilliant crimson-scarlet rump, breast, and throat, and a black belly. Silvery-blue lower mandible base on the conical bill; dark legs.
bkbtit2: Small crested tit; black crown and short crest, black throat and bib, white cheeks, and rich rufous-buff nape patch and underparts. Greyish back and wings. Short stubby black bill and dark grey legs.
bkbtit3: Tiny long-tailed tit; rufous-chestnut crown bordered by black lateral crown-stripes (black brows), buffy face, blackish throat patch, and rufous-buff breast band over whitish belly. Grey back, long tail, tiny black bill.
bkbwar: Small wood-warbler; breeding male has a flaming fiery-orange throat and face framed by black crown, ear patch, and back streaking, with bold white wing bars, orange-streaked sides, and white belly. Thin pointed dark bill.
bkbwoo: Medium black-backed woodpecker; solid glossy black upperparts, white underparts barred black on the flanks, black-and-white barred face with a white moustachial stripe, and a yellow crown patch on the male. Stout dark bill, grey legs.
bkcant2: Antshrike with bushy black crest; male blackish above and on crest, with white wing bars and spots, pale grey to whitish underparts, and a black throat. Heavy hooked black bill. Female browner with rufous crest.
bkcbab2: Chunky thickset brown babbler with a blackish crown, long supercilium that is orange-brown in front and white behind, a bright white throat, and warm orange-brown breast. Brown upperparts; pinkish legs and dark bill.
bkcbul1: Small bulbul with a glossy black crown and face, contrasting with a brilliant flame-orange throat and breast, olive-green upperparts and wings, and a pale yellowish belly. Dark eye, short blackish bill, dark legs.
bkcchi: Small plump chickadee; neat black cap and black bib, bright white cheeks, grey back and wings with white-edged feathers, and buffy-white underparts with warm flanks. Tiny black bill, dark grey legs.
bkcdon: Striking thrasher-like bird; glossy black cap and nape, warm cinnamon-brown back, buff-orange underparts, a long black tail with white tips, and bare yellow skin patch on the neck. Pale eye, black bill, dark legs.
bkcgna: Tiny slender gnatcatcher; breeding male blue-grey above with a black cap reaching the eye, white eye-ring, white underparts, and a long black tail with white outer feathers. Thin black bill, black legs.
bkchum: Small hummingbird; male metallic green above, with a black throat (gorget) bordered below by a thin iridescent violet band, and dull grey-white underparts. Straight slender black bill; dark forked tail. Female green above, whitish below.
bkcori: Slender oriole; mostly glossy black hood, back, wings, and tail, with contrasting bright yellow shoulders, rump, and lower belly. Pointed black bill with bluish base; dark grey legs.
bkcpip1: Small chunky manakin-like flycatcher with big eyes; black crown and nape, bright rusty-chestnut upperparts and breast, blackish flight feathers edged yellow-green, and a rufous tail with black central feathers. Yellow bill and yellow legs.
bkcsco1: Small screech-owl; dark brown-grey plumage with a darker blackish crown, fine vermiculations and streaking, indistinct facial disc rim, and short ear tufts. Dark brown eyes; greyish bill, feathered legs.
bkcspa: Small slim sparrow; plain grey head and underparts with a black chin and lores on the breeding male, brown back streaked black, and a long dark tail. Distinctive bright pink bill; pinkish legs.
bkcspa1: Neat sparrow with a black crown and broad black face mask separated by a white median crown-stripe and white supercilium; olive-green back, grey nape, white throat and underparts. Stout dark bill, pale legs.
bkcsta1: Medium starling; greyish-white head and underparts with a bold black breast band (collar), brownish-grey back and wings, white wing patches, and bare yellow skin around the eye. Pointed dark bill, dull legs.
bkctch1: Bush-shrike with a black crown, bold white supercilium, rufous-chestnut wings, grey-brown back, and pale greyish-buff underparts. Long graduated tail tipped white; stout black hooked bill, blackish legs.
bkctit1: Tiny tyrant with a tall wispy black crest; black crown and crest, white face and throat, blackish streaking, grey-brown back, and pale yellowish-white underparts streaked dark. Yellow eye, tiny black bill, dark legs.
bkcvir1: Small stocky vireo; glossy black head and nape broken by bold white spectacles (eye-ring plus loral spot), olive-green back, two white wing bars, and white underparts with yellow-washed flanks. Stout dark bill.
bkcwhe1: Small white-eye with a blackish cap contrasting with bright olive-green upperparts, a conspicuous white eye-ring, yellow throat and undertail, and greyish-white belly. Slender dark bill; greyish legs.
bkcwhi1: Compact whistler; male grey-brown above with a blackish chin and face, a whitish throat, olive-yellow breast and belly, and a greyish head. Short stout black bill; dark grey legs. Female plainer brownish.
bkefai1: Hummingbird-like fairy; glossy green crown and upperparts, pure white underparts, and a black mask through the eye with a coppery-violet ear patch (male). Long white-edged tail; short straight black bill, dark feet.
bkehem2: Small tanager-finch; grey crown and nape, blackish mask/ear-coverts, olive-grey back, and warm buff-orange underparts and throat. Pale eye; thin pointed dark bill, dark legs.
bkfalb: Large dark albatross; overall sooty grey-brown plumage with pale whitish feathering around the base of the dark bill and below the eye, and whitish undertail coverts. Long narrow wings; blackish bill, dark legs and feet.
bkfant2: Plump terrestrial antthrush; warm rufous-brown crown and upperparts, slaty-grey breast and underparts, and a black face and throat. Short cocked tail; pale bluish-grey eye-ring, slender dark bill, long greyish legs.
bkfbrf1: Brushfinch with a slaty-grey head and back, a black face and throat (black lores and bib), rufous-chestnut crown, bright yellow breast and underparts, and olive-green wings. Conical dark bill; dark legs.
bkfbun1: Small bunting; breeding male has a greenish-grey head with a blackish face and lores, olive-grey breast, yellow lower belly, and brown back streaked black. Pinkish lower mandible; pink legs. Female browner, streaked.
bkfcus1: Large grey cuckooshrike; pale blue-grey overall, slightly paler below, with a black face mask and lores, black flight feathers, and a long grey tail. Stout black bill; dark legs. Female has fine barring below.
bkfgra: Small dark finch-like grassquit; male sooty black on the head, throat, and breast, contrasting with olive-green upperparts and dark belly. Short conical black bill; dark legs. Female dull olive-brown overall.
bkfibi1: Large ibis; grey neck and breast, blackish back and wings glossed bronze, a buff-grey crown and shaggy buff nape, a black face and belly, and a broad white wing patch. Long decurved dark bill; reddish legs, red eye.
bkfruw1: Small warbler; rich rufous-chestnut upperparts and crown, a black face and throat (black mask and bib), and a contrasting rufous breast over a greyish belly. Slender dark bill; dark legs. Female lacks the black face.
bkhbat1: Tiny batis; male has a black crown and broad black face mask, white supercilium, grey back, white underparts crossed by a broad black breast band, and black wings with a white stripe. Red eye; black bill and legs.
bkhber1: Plump cotinga; glossy black head and throat, olive-green upperparts and wings, and yellow underparts boldly barred with dark olive scaling. Red iris; short stout dark bill; greyish legs.
bkhcan2: Small finch; male has a glossy black head and throat (hood) contrasting with a chestnut-brown back and white underparts washed cinnamon on the flanks, and dark wings. Conical pale-pink bill; pinkish legs.
bkhcus1: Cuckooshrike; male has a black head and throat, grey back and breast, blackish wings, and a paler grey belly. Dark grey graduated tail; stout black bill, dark legs. Female greyer with barred underparts.
bkhgro: Stocky grosbeak; male has a black head, black-and-white wings with bold white patches, a black back, and rich cinnamon-orange collar, breast, and rump, with yellow belly. Massive conical pale grey bill; grey legs.
bkhpar: Medium parakeet; bright green body, a black head and face, bluish wash on the breast, blue-tinged flight feathers, and a long tapering tail. Bare reddish thighs; black bill, pinkish legs.
bkhpit1: Small plump pitta; glossy black head and breast, deep red lower belly, bright blue wing patch (lesser coverts) and rump, and chestnut-brown back. Short tail; stout black bill; long pinkish legs.
bkhtan1: Small tanager; male has a black head, throat, and upper back contrasting with bright golden-yellow lower back, rump, and underparts, and blue-tinged wings. Short conical dark bill; greyish legs.
bklbab1: Greyish-brown babbler; brown upperparts, paler greyish underparts with faint streaking, a dark crown, and a conspicuous black mask through the lores and eye (black lores). Pale staring eye; dark bill, dull legs.
bkmtou1: Large toucan; black body with a bright yellow throat and breast, white upper-tail coverts, and red undertail coverts. Enormous bill yellow above grading to chestnut-maroon and black below; blue eye-skin, blue legs.
bknfrd1: Small plump fruit-dove; male has a glossy black head and nape, grey breast and back grading to green wings, a whitish throat, and a crimson-red lower belly and undertail. Yellowish bill; reddish legs. Female all green.
bknsti: Tall slender wader; glossy black crown, nape, back, and wings contrasting sharply with pure white face, underparts, and rump. Extremely long bright pink-red legs; long thin straight black bill; red eye.
bknwea2: Medium weaver with bright golden-yellow head and underparts, olive-green back, and a sharply contrasting black mask covering forehead, eye, throat and upper breast (black extends as a band). Bill conical and black; eye reddish; legs pinkish-grey.
bkpwar: Small warbler; breeding male has black crown, white cheeks, white underparts boldly streaked black on flanks, and olive-grey black-streaked back with two white wing bars. Pointed dark bill; orange-pink legs and feet.
bkrfin: Stocky finch with sooty-black body, a pale grey patch on the rear crown/nape, and rosy-pink wash on wings, rump and belly. Short conical bill (dark in breeding male); blackish legs.
bkrfla1: Medium golden-backed woodpecker with crimson crown and crest, golden-yellow back and wings, black rump, and white underparts heavily scaled/spotted black. Black-and-white streaked face and neck; long dark bill; greenish-grey legs.
bkrwax: Tiny pale grey-brown waxbill, finely barred, with red eye-stripe through the eye, whitish underparts, and a black rump and tail. Short conical red bill; pinkish legs.
bksscb1: Large dark scimitar-babbler, warm brown above and white below, with a broad orange-rufous stripe along the flanks; black malar streak and a jagged black-streaked breast band. Long downcurved pale bill; greyish legs.
bktflo1: Dark flowerpiercer, black above and on head with grey rump and silvery shoulders; rich rusty-chestnut underparts, a large black throat patch and a chestnut moustachial stripe. Short upturned hook-tipped black bill; dark legs.
bktgna: Tiny slender gnatcatcher, blue-grey above and pale grey below, with a long black tail showing white outer edges (mostly black from below); breeding male has a black cap. Thin black bill; black legs.
bktgul: Medium gull with white head and underparts, dark slate-grey back and wings, and a broad black tail band on otherwise white tail. Yellow bill with a black ring and red tip; yellow legs; pale eye.
bkther1: Small dark hermit hummingbird, bronzy-green above and dusky grey-buff below, with a blackish throat and a buffy malar/eye-stripe; long graduated tail with white tips. Long decurved bill, red below with dark tip; dark legs.
bktspa: Crisp grey sparrow with brownish back, plain grey head marked by two bold white stripes (supercilium and submoustachial) framing a black triangular throat patch. White-cornered black tail; small dark bill; greyish legs.
bkttro2: Large trogon; male has black face and throat, iridescent green crown, nape, back and upper breast, a white breast band, and deep red lower breast and belly. White eye with no eye-ring; yellow bill; black-and-white vermiculated wing.
bkttro6: Trogon; male has dull yellowish-olive head and breast shading to bright yellow belly, dark green back, and an orange-yellow eye-ring. Fine black-and-white barred wing panel; tail black below with white tips. Greenish-yellow bill; dark legs.
bkvori: Slim oriole, mostly deep black on head, back, throat, breast and wings, with contrasting rich yellow-orange belly and undertail; black tail. Sharp pointed bluish-grey bill; blue-grey legs.
bkwcus1: Slim cuckooshrike, uniform dark slate-grey body with black wings and a black face/lores; long black tail tipped white. Slightly hooked black bill; dark eye; black legs.
bkwpet: Small gadfly petrel, grey above with a dark M across the upperwings, white forehead and underparts, and a grey breast-side patch. Underwing white with a bold black diagonal bar and black tip. Short black hooked bill; pinkish legs with black-tipped feet.
bkwvir: Olive-green vireo, greyish on the crown, with a white supercilium bordered above by a dark line, a dark eyeline, and a thin dark whisker (malar) stripe below the cheek. Whitish underparts washed yellow on flanks; stout grey bill; grey legs.
blaant1: Antshrike; male entirely glossy black with a concealed white patch between the scapulars, slightly heavier head. Stout hook-tipped black bill; dark grey legs.
blaant2: Antbird; male uniform slaty-black, slightly paler grey on belly, with a small concealed white interscapular patch and white-tipped wing coverts. Slender black bill; greyish legs.
blaant4: Antbird; male dark slate-grey to blackish overall, marginally paler below, with white feather edgings on the wing coverts and a hidden white back patch. Thin black bill; dark legs.
blaant5: Small antbird; male almost entirely dark grey, slightly paler grey on the underparts, with faint pale wing-covert tips. Slender black bill; greyish legs; near-identical to Blackish Antbird.
blabab2: Brown babbler with a dark sooty-black cap contrasting the warm grey-brown back, wings and tail; greyish-brown underparts paling on the throat. Pale eye; slightly downcurved dark bill; dusky legs.
blabaz1: Small black raptor with a long, upright black crest, white breast band, and chestnut-and-white barring on the lower breast/belly; broad rounded blackish wings glossed green. Bluish-grey hooked bill; bluish legs.
blabit1: Slim dark bittern, blackish-slate overall with a buff-and-rufous streaked patch down the sides of the neck and pale-streaked throat. Long yellowish bill; dark legs; long neck and dagger bill.
blabul1: Slim glossy black bulbul (this race white-headed): body sooty-black with a contrasting clean white head and neck. Bright coral-red bill and red legs; slightly crested.
blabus1: Stocky black antbird-like bird, entirely sooty-black with a small concealed white interscapular patch. Distinctive heavy, slightly upturned wedge-shaped black bill; dark legs.
blabus3: Small bustard; male has black neck and underparts contrasting a finely vermiculated brown-and-buff back and crown, with white cheek patches and white wing patches visible in flight. Pinkish bill base; yellowish legs.
blabut1: Large all-black butcherbird with a heavy bluish-grey, black-tipped hooked bill. Glossy black plumage overall; dark eye; blackish-grey legs; robust head and body.
blacar1: Black caracara, entirely glossy black with a white patch at the tail base/rump and white wing-base flash in flight; bare orange-yellow facial skin and throat. Pale bluish hooked bill; yellow-orange legs.
blacat1: Small slender all-black catbird with greenish-blue gloss, a black bill and dark eye; long blackish tail. Slim mockingbird shape; blackish legs.
blacks1: Small slim grey chat, plain ashy-grey overall, slightly paler below, with a contrasting black tail flicked open frequently. Thin black bill; black legs; upright posture.
blacra1: Small slaty-black crake with a contrasting bright yellow bill and red eye; entirely dark blue-grey plumage. Bright red legs and feet; short cocked tail.
blacuc1: Slim all-black cuckoo, sooty-black overall, sometimes with faint white barring on the undertail; long graduated tail. Decurved black bill; yellow eye-ring; dark legs.
blacur1: Large glossy black curassow with a curly black crest, bright yellow-orange knob/cere at the base of the bill, and a white belly and vent. Greyish legs; bulky game-bird body.
blacur2: Large sooty-black currawong with a small white patch at the base of the primaries and a white tail tip. Heavy black hooked bill; piercing yellow eye; black legs.
bladro1: Slim glossy black drongo with a long, deeply forked tail; entirely blue-black plumage with a small white rictal spot at the gape. Stout slightly hooked black bill; red eye; black legs.
blaeag1: Large soaring eagle, entirely blackish-brown with a yellow cere and yellow feet; long broad wings held in a shallow V and a long tail. Pale base to the primaries shows faint barring; long fingered wingtips.
blafan1: Small fantail; male entirely glossy black, sometimes with a tiny white spot near the eye; broad fanned black tail. Thin black bill; dark legs; active upright posture.
blagos1: Large black-and-white hawk; blackish upperparts, head and upper breast contrasting clean white underparts (some all-dark morph). Yellow cere and yellow legs; dark hooked bill; barred flight feathers and tail.
blagua1: Large slaty-black guan, glossy dark plumage overall, with bright sky-blue bare facial skin and throat, and a red iris. Blackish bill; coral-red legs; long broad tail.
blahon1: Tiny slender honeyeater; male glossy black above and on the head with white underparts and a black central stripe down the breast/belly. Fine decurved black bill; black legs.
blahor1: Large all-black hornbill, glossy black with a white-tipped tail; male has a pale yellowish bill and casque (female blackish bill), with bare bluish-white facial skin or white cheek stripe. Dark legs; bulky body.
blaill1: Skulking brown babbler with a sooty-grey to blackish cap contrasting warm rufous-brown upperparts; greyish-white throat and breast, buffy flanks. Dark bill; pinkish-grey legs.
blaman1: Small manakin; male entirely glossy blue-black with a white concealed interscapular patch and pale eye (whitish iris). Short black bill; dark legs; compact body.
blanig1: Small dark nightjar, blackish-brown finely mottled with rufous and grey; male shows small white spots on the outer wing and white tail corners. Cryptic plumage; tiny dark bill; short legs.
blanun1: Slim all-black puffbird-relative, entirely sooty-black plumage with a contrasting bright coral-red bill. Dark eye; blackish legs; long tail.
blaoys1: Large dark oystercatcher, entirely sooty blackish-brown with a long stout bright orange-red bill, yellow-orange eye-ring and red eye. Stout pinkish-white legs.
blapar1: Medium dusky parrot, dull blackish-grey to sooty-brown overall with paler grey edgings; short squared tail. Pale horn-grey hooked bill; greyish legs; slim long-tailed silhouette.
blapew1: Small dark pewee, sooty blackish-grey overall, slightly paler on the throat and belly, with a slight peaked crest. Broad flat bill, dark above and orange-yellow below; dark legs.
blapit1: Stocky thrush-like bird; male entirely glossy black with a heavy build and stout black bill. Dark eye; blackish legs; rounded head and short tail.
blaplo1: Striking medium lapwing with black crown, throat and breast contrasting sharply with white nape, neck-sides and belly; grey back and wings with metallic green-purple gloss, white wing patches. Black bill, red eye, long black legs, and a black carpal spur.
blarai1: Slim dark rail, slaty-grey overall, often appearing blackish, with browner-tinged back and faintly barred flanks and undertail. Long greenish-yellow bill, red eyes, and reddish-pink legs and feet; rounded short tail held cocked.
blarob1: Uniformly sooty-black thrush, males appearing all black with little gloss. Bright orange-yellow bill, narrow orange-yellow eye-ring, and yellow-orange legs; females browner. Medium thrush with upright posture.
blasha1: Slender glossy black thrush-like bird with long graduated tail often cocked, plumage entirely deep black with faint blue sheen. Black bill, dark eyes, blackish legs. Slim shama shape with elongated tail.
blasic1: Very large iridescent black bird-of-paradise with extremely long graduated tail; velvety black plumage glossed blue-green, fan-like erectile flank and breast plumes with violet-blue iridescent tips. Long decurved black bill, pale blue gape, blackish legs.
blasis1: Small black siskin with contrasting yellow lower belly, vent and yellow wing patches and tail base; head, breast and back glossy black. Conical dark bill, dark legs. Compact finch shape.
blasno1: Round-headed sandy grey-brown sparrow-like bird with creamy-white underparts; pale forehead and supercilium broken by black forehead line, black lores and bib, buffish-orange neck-sides, faint mantle streaking. White wing panels and tail-sides; short conical bill, dark legs.
blasol1: Mostly jet-black thrush-like bird with bold white cheek patch, white tuft under the shoulder, and white outer tail feathers conspicuous from below. Red eye, orange lower mandible, dark legs; medium size.
blatap1: Small dark slaty-grey tapaculo, males appearing uniformly blackish-grey, slightly paler below; females browner especially on flanks. Short black bill, blackish legs, short cocked tail. Mouse-like compact shape.
blatap2: Small tapaculo, adult male uniformly dark grey looking black in field, females and young browner on lower underparts with little brown on flanks. Short black bill, blackish legs, short upcocked tail.
blbant1: Antshrike with male glossy black above on back and wings showing white-tipped wing coverts and white-spotted wings, blackish-grey below; rounded heavy hooked black bill. Females rufous-brown above, buffy below. Grey legs.
blbant2: Small antwren, male grey above with bold black throat, breast and belly, bordered by a white stripe down the side of the neck and flanks; white-tipped wing coverts. Slender dark bill, grey legs. Female buffier below.
blbbar3: Stocky black barbet with bright scarlet-red throat and forecrown patch; rest of plumage glossy black with yellow wing-edging. Heavy pale-based blackish bill with bristles, dark legs. Robust short-tailed shape.
blbbar5: Plump green barbet with intricate head pattern: black crown and brow, blue throat and band, red forecrown spots and red side patches, yellow on face. Heavy pale ivory bill with dark culmen, greenish legs.
blbboa1: Tiny flycatcher-like bird with broad flattened bill; male black above with yellow eyebrow and yellow rump, black breast band across bright yellow underparts and throat. Broad black bill, dark legs. Compact, large-headed.
blbcon1: Small warbler-like tanager with deep blue upperparts including crown, back and wings, and contrasting rich rufous-cinnamon underparts; faint blue eyebrow. Short fine black bill, dark legs. Plump, short-tailed.
blbcra1: Small crake with rufous-chestnut head and breast, olive-brown back, and boldly black-and-white barred flanks, belly and undertail. Greenish-yellow bill, reddish legs. Plump, short cocked tail.
blbcuc1: Slim long-tailed cuckoo with rich chestnut upperparts and throat, contrasting black belly and undertail; long graduated tail tipped black. Greenish-yellow bill, red eye-ring, grey legs. Elegant slender shape.
blbfly1: Small flycatcher, olive-green above with two pale wing bars, whitish throat and yellow belly, greyish breast. Notably black bill (both mandibles), pale eye-ring, pinkish legs. Compact tyrant shape.
blbgna1: Plump gnateater, male grey-headed with black throat and breast, rufous-brown back and wings, black belly; silvery-white post-ocular tuft behind eye. Short black bill, long pinkish legs. Rotund, short-tailed.
blbgra1: Small finch, breeding male glossy blue-black overall with a white inner-wing patch (axillary) visible in display; conical pointed dark bill, dark legs. Female plain brown above, streaky buff below.
blbgro2: Robust grosbeak, male black on head, back, wings and breast with bright yellow lower breast, belly and rump; white wing markings. Heavy conical silvery-grey bill, dark legs. Stocky build.
blbhon1: Grey honeyeater heavily dark-streaked over back, wings and underparts, with plain whitish throat, rufous flanks and a white line above the dark eye-line. Slender slightly decurved bill, pale cream legs.
blbkin4: Large kingfisher with chestnut head and underparts, turquoise-blue back, wings and tail, and a broad black band across the upper back and shoulders; black-and-red massive bill (red upper, black lower). Red legs.
blbman1: Small manakin, male velvety black with sky-blue back and mantle and a scarlet-red crown patch; rounded body. Short dark bill, orange legs. Female plain olive-green. Compact, short-tailed.
blbori1: Oriole with male having black hood, back, wings and tail and bright orange-yellow underparts, rump and neck-sides; white wing markings. Sharp pointed grey-blue bill, grey legs. Slim, medium size.
blbpar1: Stocky green amazon parrot, mostly bright green with darker scalloped feather edges; some red in the wing speculum and a yellowish wash. Distinctive pale/blackish bill, grey-pink legs, white eye-ring. Rounded short tail.
blbpar2: Large brown parrotbill with grey head, black eyebrow and black bib/throat patch, warm brown upperparts and paler underparts; very deep stubby yellow-orange bill. Pinkish legs. Robust, long-tailed.
blbpar4: Mid-sized bright grass-green parrot with rounded tail; male shows a large purplish-blue patch on centre of chest and belly. Pinkish-white horn bill, pink cere, grey legs. Female lacks the blue belly patch.
blbpep1: Stocky vireo-like bird, olive-green above with grey crown and a chestnut-rufous brow band across the forehead; pale yellowish-grey underparts. Heavy hooked black bill, grey legs. Big-headed, short-tailed.
blbpit1: Small rotund pitta, bright crimson-red below and on belly with a glittering blue breast band; greenish-brown back, blackish head with blue malar streak. Black bill, pinkish legs. Plump, near-tailless.
blbpuf1: Chunky puffbird, glossy black above and on crown with a broad white collar and white throat, and a black breast band across white underparts. Heavy black hooked bill, dark legs. Large-headed, stubby.
blbpuf2: Small bush-shrike, male glossy black above with white-edged wings and a fluffy white rump that can be puffed up; clean white underparts. Striking red eye, black hooked bill, grey legs.
blbqua1: Tiny round quail, male slate-blue on breast and flanks with chestnut belly, black-and-white facial pattern (black throat bar bordered white) and brown streaked back. Short black bill, yellow-orange legs.
blbscy1: Slim rufous-brown woodcreeper with extremely long, slender, sickle-shaped down-curved black bill; warm brown plumage with faint streaking on head and breast, rufous wings and tail. Greyish legs.
blbsee3: Small finch-like seedeater, male uniformly dark blackish-blue (slaty-blue with darker wings); stout conical dark bill, dark legs. Female plain warm brown. Compact, rounded shape.
blbsib1: Slim long-tailed babbler with black crown, back and tail, white throat and pale grey underparts, and grey wing panel; the long graduated tail is broadly white-tipped. Slender dark bill, pale legs.
blbsic1: Medium brown bird-of-paradise, male warm brown with bare maroon-grey eye-skin, black throat, erectile bronze neck plumes and elongated purple-tipped flank plumes, and horn-like blue-green forehead tufts. Black sickle-shaped bill, yellow gape.
blbtan1: Small tanager, male blue-green below with a cinnamon-buff head, black face mask, black back, and straw-yellow rump, wing coverts and vent. Short dark conical bill, grey legs. Compact tanager.
blbtan2: Vivid tanager, male brilliant turquoise-blue overall with a contrasting black back and black wings and tail; bright yellow eye. Stout black bill, dark legs. Plump, medium build.
blbthr1: Plain greyish-brown thrush, warm brown above, paler grey-brown below with whitish belly and a streaked whitish throat; faint pale wing-edging. Notably blackish bill, dark legs. Typical thrush shape.
blbthr2: Thrush with male having slate-grey head, throat and upperparts, black breast band, and rich orange-rufous flanks and belly fading to white; orange eye-ring. Orange-yellow bill, yellow legs.
blbtou1: Medium green toucanet with a broad pale blue band across the lower breast separating the green throat from green belly; chestnut undertail. Bicoloured bill (dark upper, paler/yellowish base), greyish legs.
blbtre1: Stocky dark brown furnariid, rich rufous-brown above with rufous wings and tail and fine buff streaking on head and breast; warm brown underparts. Notably straight blackish bill, greyish legs.
blbwoo1: Large robust woodcreeper, rufous-brown with fine black barring across the head, neck, back and underparts and unbarred rufous wings and tail. Heavy straight dark bill, grey legs. Strong, stiff-tailed.
blbwoo3: Large crested woodpecker with all-black body, bright red crest and red malar stripe, and a broad white neck stripe; some show a white scapular line. Pale chisel bill, grey legs.
blbwre1: Wren with bright rufous-brown back and wings, white throat and breast, and contrasting black belly finely barred with white; grey crown and white supercilium. Slender dark bill, grey legs.
blcant1: Large plump antpitta, blackish crown and head with white-spotted upperparts and bold black-scaled white underparts; rufous-tinged flanks. Heavy black bill, long pinkish legs. Round-bodied, near-tailless.
blcant2: Small antwren, male grey below with a black cap, black-and-white streaked back, black wings with white wing bars, and a white-tipped tail. Fine dark bill, grey legs. Slim, active.
blcant3: Small antbird, male blue-grey overall with a black chin and throat and white-tipped wing coverts forming dotted wing bars; greyish belly. Slender dark bill, pale grey legs. Compact.
blcapa2: Small warbler-like bird with bright yellow underparts, olive-green back and wings, and a broad black band across the breast extending up as a black collar. Grey crown, white face, dark eye, thin black bill and pale legs.
blcbab2: Tiny rufous-brown babbler with warm chestnut crown and upperparts, paler buff-orange underparts, and a distinctive black chin and lores. Short stubby dark bill, rounded body, pinkish legs.
blcbar1: Stocky barbet with a bright red face and throat bordered below by a broad black band, black crown and back, and yellowish-white underparts. Heavy pale ivory bill, yellow-edged wing feathers, dark legs.
blcbec1: Small flycatcher-like bird; male glossy black cap contrasting with grey back, pale grey underparts, and black wings with white scalloping. Stout hooked grey bill, dark eye, grey legs.
blcbul2: Olive-green bulbul with bright yellow underparts and a sharp pointed black crest and black face. Olive-green back and wings, dark eye with reddish iris, short dark bill, dark legs.
blcchl1: Plump finch-like bird with vivid grass-green body, bright yellow underparts and forehead, and a sky-blue crown and nape. Narrow black band across forehead, short stout dark bill, dark legs.
blcfly1: Small drab Empidonax flycatcher with dark grey-black cap contrasting with olive-grey back, pale grey underparts, and bold white eye-ring. Two whitish wing bars, dark wings, small bill with pale lower mandible, dark legs.
blcfru1: Plump cotinga; male bright green above with a black head and broad black chest band, and yellow-and-green streaked lower underparts. Short broad bill, red iris, greenish legs, rounded body.
blcgna1: Small rounded ground bird; male rich rufous-brown above with a black face, throat and breast bordered by white, and buffy flanks. Short dark bill, long pinkish legs, almost tailless silhouette.
blchaw1: Large rufous raptor with bright cinnamon-rufous body and wings, a contrasting whitish head, and a narrow black crescent across the upper breast. Black flight feathers and tail tip, bluish bill with yellow cere, pale legs.
blchem1: Slim tanager with a black cap and face, grey back, and rich buffy-rufous underparts and throat. Olive wing tones, pointed dark bill, dark eye, dark legs.
blchon2: Olive-grey honeyeater with white underparts, a black head, and a black chin patch. Distinctive crescent of bare bluish-white skin over the eye, white nape band, thin dark curved bill, dark legs.
blchor1: Large black hornbill; male all glossy black with a white belly and white outer tail tips, topped by a tall black casque on a black bill. Female has chestnut head and neck. Dark legs, bare blue throat skin.
blchum1: Small hummingbird with shining green upperparts and crown, a glittering blue-violet throat and chest, and white belly. Straight medium black bill, dark eye, dark legs, square dark tail.
blcjay1: Bold large jay with a black head, throat and breast, deep violet-blue upperparts and wings, and creamy-white belly. Pale blue spot above and below the eye, stout black bill, black legs.
blcjay2: Handsome blue jay with rich purplish-blue body, a black face mask, and a black band across the lower throat forming a collar. Pale blue forehead and crown streaks, black bill, dark legs.
blckin1: Striking kingfisher with a black cap, white collar and throat, and deep purple-blue back, wings and tail. Rich orange-buff underparts, large coral-red bill, red legs, white wing patch in flight.
blclor1: Brilliant red parrot with a black cap, blue belly and thighs, and green wings. Bright red breast and back, yellow underwing band, orange bill, grey legs, short rounded tail.
blcman1: Tiny stocky manakin; male velvety black with a sky-blue cap covering the crown. Short black bill, dark eye, pale legs, rounded compact body and short tail.
blcpar1: Small green parakeet with a dark brownish-black crown and forehead, scaly-edged greenish breast, and red on the wing-bend and underwing. Olive-green back, reddish belly patch, dark horn bill, long pointed tail.
blcpar2: Green Amazon parrot with bluish cheeks and throat, a yellowish-orange forehead, and an orange-red wing speculum. Mostly green body with scalloped feather edges, dark bill, grey legs.
blcpri1: Pale prinia, buffy-grey above and creamy-white below with a broad black breast band and pale yellowish flanks. Whitish supercilium, long graduated tail with pale tips, thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
blcsal1: Robust saltator with a black hood covering the head and throat, grey-olive back, and pale grey-buff underparts. Heavy black bill, white throat edging absent, dark eye, dark legs.
blcsis2: Small siskin; male yellow-green with a black crown cap, black chin, and yellow underparts and rump. Greenish back streaked dusky, yellow wing patches, conical pointed bill, dark legs.
blcspa1: Greyish sparrow with a chestnut-and-grey streaked back, plain grey underparts, and a black band across the chest. Grey head with chestnut shoulder, pale supercilium, stout conical bill, pinkish legs.
blcswa1: Small dark swallow with blue-black upperparts, a black cap, and dusky-grey underparts. Slightly forked tail, small black bill, dark legs, slender streamlined body.
blctan1: Compact tanager; male pale silvery-blue with a black cap, black face mask, and black-streaked greenish back. Bluish wings and tail, short dark conical bill, dark legs.
blctan2: Tanager with a sky-blue crown and forehead, dark slaty-blue body, and rufous-brown lower belly. Blackish face, blue-edged wings, stout dark bill, dark legs.
blctin1: Plump ground bird with a black cap and nape, rufous-brown upperparts barred dusky, and warm cinnamon underparts. Grey face and neck sides, short decurved bill, reddish legs, rounded tailless shape.
blctit1: Stocky white-and-grey bird; male pale silvery-grey with a black crown patch (cap), black wings and tail. Pinkish-based stout bill with dark tip, bare pinkish skin around eye, grey legs.
blctit4: Small grey titmouse with pale grey upperparts, whitish underparts, buffy flanks, and a tall pointed black crest. Pale grey face, black forehead, small dark bill, grey legs.
blctro1: Trogon; male with a blue-black head and breast, glossy blue-violet crown and nape, green-glossed black back, and red belly. Black-and-white barred undertail, yellow eye-ring and bill, dark legs.
blctyr1: Tiny tyrannulet with a black cap and face, olive-green back, and pale greyish-yellow underparts. Two pale wing bars, white eye-ring or supercilium, small dark bill, dark legs.
blctyr2: Small tyrant with a black head and throat, broad black chest band, rufous-chestnut back and wing patches, and a grey-and-yellow belly. Pale eye-ring, short dark bill, dark legs.
blcwar1: Warbler with olive-green upperparts, grey-and-yellow underparts, and a black face and cheeks. Rufous-tinged crown with grey supercilium, dark eyestripe, thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
blcwar2: Olive-yellow warbler with bright yellow underparts, olive-green back, and a black crown bearing a short black crest. Yellow supercilium, dark eyestripe, thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
blcwax2: Tiny waxbill with grey-brown upperparts, pale whitish underparts, a black crown, and a black rump and tail. White face below the black cap, red flanks faint, small reddish-pink bill, dark legs.
blcwoo1: Boldly patterned woodpecker; black-and-white barred back, white underparts, a black face with white cheek stripes, and a red crown and nape (male). Golden-yellow forehead patch, chisel bill, grey legs.
blcwoo4: Cinnamon-buff woodpecker with a tall shaggy pale blond crest, rufous-brown wings, and a dark-barred chestnut body. Black moustache, pale ivory bill, dark eye, greyish legs.
blcwoo5: Pale ochre-buff woodpecker with a blond crest, plain ochraceous head and underparts, and a barred rufous back and wings. Pale bill, faint black malar (male red), dark eye, grey legs.
blcyuh1: Tiny grey yuhina with a short black crest, grey-brown upperparts, paler grey underparts, and a black chin. White vent, thin reddish bill, dark eye, pinkish legs, slender body.
blecuc1: Slim brownish-grey cuckoo with plain grey-brown upperparts, pale buff underparts, and a bold black eye-stripe through the ear coverts. Whitish supercilium, slightly curved dark bill, grey legs, long tail.
blekin1: Small dazzling kingfisher with deep cobalt-blue upperparts, bright rufous-orange underparts, and bluish-black ear coverts. Orange spot before the eye, long black bill, red legs, electric-blue back stripe.
blfant1: Dark ground antthrush with sooty-brown upperparts, slate-grey underparts, and a black face. Chestnut-buff nape patch, bare blue skin around the eye, short dark bill, long pinkish legs, cocked short tail.
blfant2: Antbird; male slaty-grey overall with a black face mask and throat, and paler grey underparts. White or pale iris, short black bill, dark legs, rounded body and short tail.
blfapa1: Slim warbler-like apalis, olive-grey above with a black face and throat, and whitish underparts. Grey crown, pale eye, long graduated tail with white tips, thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
blfbul1: Brown bulbul with greyish-brown upperparts, whitish underparts, and a black face and forehead. White eye-ring conspicuous, yellow undertail coverts, dark eye, slender dark bill, dark legs.
blfbus1: Stocky bushshrike with bright yellow underparts, olive-green back, and a black forehead and face. Greenish-yellow crown, orange-tinged breast, hooked black bill, blue-grey legs.
blfcot1: Medium cotinga, mostly slaty-grey with a black face mask and forehead, paler grey underparts, and darker grey wings and tail. Bare bluish eye-ring skin, short broad black bill, dark legs.
blfcou1: Large coucal with glossy black head and underparts, chestnut-rufous wings, and a black face. Yellow eye, heavy black decurved bill, long broad black tail, dark legs.
blfdac1: Small finch-billed bird; male turquoise-blue above and on head with a black mask, throat and back, bright yellow eyes and pale blue-white underparts. Short conical dark bill, dark legs.
blfdot1: Small dumpy plover with a bold black face mask and broad black breast band, white forehead and supercilium, sandy-brown crown and upperparts, white underparts, and chestnut shoulder patch. Reddish bill with black tip, pinkish legs, red eye-ring.
blffly1: Medium flycatcher with large bill; male has an entirely deep-blue hood with shining bright blue forehead and brow, olive-brown back and wings, blackish tail, and rich orange-rufous breast and belly. Black bill and legs.
blfgro1: Stocky grosbeak with a massive pale silvery bill; black face and throat, olive-green back and wings, golden-olive crown and breast, and grey lower underparts. Dark legs.
blfhaw1: Compact white hawk with a large white head finely streaked black and a bold black face mask, black back and wings, white underparts, and black tail with a single white band. Orange cere, black-tipped bill, orange-yellow legs.
blfhon1: Large honeyeater, olive-green above and white below with a dark blackish head and throat; striking bare bright blue skin around the eye. Long slightly curved black bill, grey legs.
blfjac1: Slender jacamar with a long needle-like black bill; glossy bluish-green head, back, breast and wings, white throat, and rufous-chestnut belly. Short blackish legs, long graduated tail.
blflau1: Medium laughingthrush with rufous-brown body, a slaty-grey crown and black face mask, bold white crescents around the eye and white moustache, and whitish-streaked throat. Dark bill, pinkish-brown legs.
blfmal1: Large slim cuckoo with a long graduated tail; greyish-brown plumage, paler buff belly, and conspicuous bright apple-green bill. Bare red skin around the eye, dark legs.
blfmon1: Blue-grey monarch flycatcher with a black face patch around bill and forehead, blue-grey head, back, throat and breast, and rich rufous-orange belly and undertail. Pale blue-grey bill, dark legs.
blfnun1: Slim sooty-black puffbird, uniformly dark grey-black overall with a slightly paler belly, and a striking bright orange-red bill. Black legs, long tail.
blfowl1: Massive brown fish-owl with prominent horizontal ear-tufts, dark-streaked buffy-brown plumage barred and streaked darker, a paler face, and yellow eyes. Heavy grey-black bill, feathered legs, large unfeathered greyish feet.
blfpar3: Small stocky finch, almost entirely deep grass-green with a brilliant cobalt-blue face and forehead and a red rump and uppertail. Stout conical blackish bill, pinkish legs.
blfred1: Small redstart; male has a deep blue head, throat, back and breast with a bright shining blue forehead and brow, and a contrasting bright orange-rufous belly and rump. Fine black bill, black legs.
blfrob1: Plump dark robin-chat, deep blackish-blue overall with a brilliant glistening cobalt-blue forehead and forecrown patch and shoulder spot. Black bill, long blackish legs, broad rounded tail.
blfsol1: Slate-grey thrush-like solitaire, uniform grey overall darkening to a black face, lores and throat, with paler grey underparts. Bright orange bill and orange legs.
blftan1: Smooth-plumaged tanager, pale grey above and whitish-grey below with a sharply contrasting black face, throat and upper breast. Slightly upturned pale silvery-blue bill, dark legs.
blfter1: Pale grey marsh tern with a black cap extending down through the eye to the bill base, white cheeks and throat, grey body, and white rump and tail. Bright orange-red bill and legs.
blfwar1: Tiny warbler, olive-green above with a yellow throat and breast, white belly, a grey crown, a bold black face mask and ear-coverts, and a white moustachial stripe. Fine dark bill, pale legs.
blfwoo1: Smoky grey woodswallow with a small black face mask from bill through the eye, uniform grey body, and a white-tipped dark tail. Stout blue-grey black-tipped bill, dark legs.
blgant2: Robust antshrike with a hooked bill; male dark blackish-grey overall with a black crown, white edges to the wing coverts forming wing bars, white tips to the tail feathers, and a hidden white back patch. Dark grey bill and legs.
blgbar1: Stocky barbet with a heavy pale bill; scarlet crown and nape, black face, black back, white upper breast crossed by a broad black breast band, and pale greenish-yellow belly. Greyish legs.
blgdov1: Small dove; male soft pale blue-grey overall, slightly paler below, with dark chestnut-black spots on the wing coverts and a whitish face. Dark bill, pinkish-red legs, dark-tipped tail with white corners.
blgtan1: Olive-brown tanager, dull olive above and buffy-ochre below with a black face mask and crown sides, and a concealed yellow crown stripe. Stout dark bill, dark legs.
blhant1: Terrestrial antthrush with an upright stance; rich brown upperparts, slaty-grey underparts, a black crown and face, and rufous nape and ear-coverts. Black bill, long pinkish legs, short cocked tail.
blhant2: Antshrike with a hooked bill; male entirely sooty-black with a black hood and breast, dark grey lower belly, and small white tips on the wing coverts forming faint wing spots. Black bill and legs.
blhant3: Antbird; male slaty-grey overall with a black hood (crown, face and throat), and a concealed white interscapular patch. Black bill, pinkish-grey legs, red eye.
blhant4: Small antwren; male deep rufous-chestnut on back, rump and uppertail, otherwise black on head, breast and belly, with white tips to the wing coverts and white flanks. Black bill and legs.
blhapa1: Slim long-tailed warbler-like bird, plain grey above and pale grey below with a contrasting blackish head and face. Fine black bill, pale legs, pale eyes.
blhbul1: Olive-yellow bulbul with a glossy black head, throat and crest, olive-green back and wings, yellowish underparts, and a yellow-tipped black tail. Black bill, dark legs, pale eyes.
blhcou2: Large coucal with a long broad tail; black head, neck and underparts glossed bluish, chestnut-rufous wings and back, and a black tail. Heavy black bill, dark legs, red eyes.
blheag1: Large blackish hawk-eagle with a short crest; sooty-black overall, finely barred white on flanks and thighs, with a strongly black-and-grey banded tail. Yellow cere and legs, dark bill.
blhfan1: Medium long-tailed fantail, dull blue-grey on head, breast, back and shoulders with pale blue streaking, a buff belly, and rufous lower back, rump and outer tail feathers. Dark bill and legs, tail often cocked and fanned.
blhgon1: Boldly patterned bushshrike, glossy black above on head, back, wings and tail, with vivid scarlet-red underparts from throat to belly. Stout black bill, dark legs, red eye.
blhhem1: Slim tanager-finch, olive-grey above with a black head and face contrasting a long white supercilium, and pale buffy-grey underparts. Fine dark bill, dark legs.
blhher1: Large grey heron with a black crown, hindneck and head sides, white face and throat, grey body, and white underwing coverts contrasting black flight feathers in flight. Dark bill with paler lower mandible, dark legs.
blhhon1: Small honeyeater, olive-green above and whitish below with a glossy black head and throat and a white nape crescent. Bare bluish skin above the eye, short dark bill, dark legs.
blhibi1: Large white ibis with a bare black head and neck, all-white body plumage, and a long down-curved black bill. Black legs, sometimes with dusky plumes; bare reddish under-wing skin in breeding.
blhjay1: Crested jay, pinkish-vinaceous brown body with a black crown and crest, a black face and chin, a white-streaked head, and black-and-white barred blue wings and tail. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
blhlap1: Sandy-brown lapwing with a black crown and slender black crest, white face and throat, black breast band, white belly, and white wing patches. Red bill with black tip, red facial wattles, long reddish legs.
blhori1: Bright golden-yellow oriole with an entirely black hood (head, throat and upper breast), black wings with yellow markings, and a yellow-and-black tail. Stout pink-red bill, grey legs, red eye.
blhpar1: Stocky green parrot with a deep blue head, neck and breast, green back, wings and belly, and red undertail coverts. Pale horn-coloured bill with dark base, greyish legs, bare white eye-ring.
blhpar4: Stout short-tailed parrot with a black crown, orange-buff cheeks and nape, green back and wings, yellow thighs, and white belly and breast. Dark grey bill, grey legs.
blhpit1: Plump short-tailed pitta; male has a glossy violet-blue crown, nape and underparts, a black face, brown back and wings, and a blue rump. Pale bill, long pinkish legs.
blhsal1: Large heavy-billed saltator, olive-green above with a black crown, face and breast sides framing a white throat and supercilium, and buffy underparts. Thick blackish bill, dark legs, reddish eye.
blhsib1: Slim long-tailed babbler, grey above and pale grey below with a glossy black head and crest, and a grey-and-black tail. Fine dark bill, pale legs.
blhsis1: Small finch; male greenish-yellow below and on the rump with a contrasting black head and throat, olive-green back, and yellow wing patches. Conical pinkish bill, dark legs.
blhspi1: Small spinetail with a mostly black face and forecrown, dark grey hindcrown and back, tawny-rufous wing coverts, dark brownish rump, and mostly grey underparts with paler belly. Dark bill, grey legs.
blhthr1: Dark thrush, sooty olive-brown to blackish overall with a contrasting black hood (head and throat) on some forms, and olive-brown body. Bright orange-yellow bill, yellow-orange legs, yellow eye-ring.
blhtro1: Trogon; male has a glossy blue-black head and breast, metallic green back, black-and-white barred wing panel, and a bright golden-yellow belly with a clean breast border. Pale blue bill, pale blue eye-ring, dark legs; black-and-white barred undertail.
blhwea1: Small weaver; breeding male golden-yellow below with a black hood covering face and throat, chestnut wash on nape and breast band, yellowish-green back, and yellow wing edgings. Stout conical black bill, pinkish legs, red eye.
blhwoo1: Medium green woodpecker with grey-green back and wings, plain grey underparts, a black crown and nape (male with red patches), and a bright crimson rump conspicuous in flight. Pale grey-yellow bill, greenish legs, dark moustache.
blkcus1: Slim slender cuckooshrike; male glossy all-black with a yellow-orange gape and shoulder; back, underparts and head uniformly black. Black bill, blackish legs. Female olive-green above, barred yellowish below with a yellow-edged tail.
blkflo1: Small all-black tanager-finch with a slaty-blue gloss, faint dark rufous shoulder patch, and a sharp upturned hooked black bill adapted for piercing flowers. Underparts and head matte black; dark legs and red-brown eye.
blkjac1: Large blackish hummingbird; male glossy blue-black overall with a contrasting white outer-tail and white-tipped tail feathers conspicuous in flight. Straight black bill, blackish feet, dark eye. Compact heavy-bodied shape.
blkmag1: Large crow-like corvid, entirely glossy black with bold white wing patches (white primaries and secondaries) flashing in flight, a stout black bill, short bushy crest, and dark legs. Pale or reddish eye.
blknod: All-dark sooty-black tern with a sharply demarcated white cap fading to grey on the nape, a long slender straight black bill, and a slightly forked dark tail. Blackish legs; dark wings and underparts.
blkoys: Large stocky all-blackish-brown shorebird; sooty black head and breast grading to dark brown body, a long heavy straight bright red-orange bill, stout pale pink legs, and a red eye-ring around a yellow eye.
blkpho: Small flycatcher with sooty-black head, breast and upperparts contrasting sharply with a clean white belly and undertail. Thin black bill, black legs, dark eye. Slim upright posture, frequently pumps tail.
blkrai: Tiny dark rail; slaty-black plumage with fine white speckling on the back and wings, a chestnut-brown nape patch, and a short stubby black bill. Red eye, dark legs. Sparrow-sized, very secretive.
blksaw1: Small slender sooty-black swallow with a deeply forked tail, uniformly dark blackish-brown plumage above and below with a faint greenish-blue gloss, a small black bill, and dark legs.
blksco2: Bulky black sea duck; drake entirely glossy black with a swollen bright orange-yellow knob at the base of the otherwise black bill. Black legs, dark eye. Female sooty-brown with pale cheeks and dark cap.
blkski: Distinctive tern-like waterbird; black crown, nape and upperparts contrasting with white forehead and underparts, long pointed black wings, and a unique knife-like red-and-black bill with the lower mandible far longer than the upper. Red legs.
blksun1: Small sunbird; male iridescent blue-black overall with glittering metallic green-blue crown and shoulder gloss, blackish underparts. Long thin decurved black bill, dark legs. Female olive above, dull yellowish below.
blkswi: Medium-large sooty blackish-brown swift with long scythe-shaped wings, a slightly forked tail, paler greyish forehead and faint scaling on the underparts. Tiny black bill, dark feet, fast gliding flight.
blktur: Stocky dark shorebird; breeding adult slaty-black head, breast and upperparts with a small white loral spot and white speckling on the face and shoulder, white belly. Short stout black bill, dark reddish legs.
blkvul: Large blackish vulture; uniformly sooty-black plumage with a bare wrinkled grey-black head, short square tail, and broad wings showing pale silvery patches at the wingtips (primary bases) in flight. Pale legs, hooked grey bill.
bllcis1: Large montane cisticola; bright rufous crown and nape, plain dark-brown back, and clean whitish underparts. Diagnostic large black patch on lores and around the eye, black bill, dull pink legs, reddish-brown eye.
bllser1: Tall grey ground-bird with shaggy finely vermiculated grey plumage, black-and-white barred crown crest, whitish supercilium, black-barred flight feathers and tail, a long neck and tail. Black bill, long slender black legs, dark eye.
blltit1: Bright tit; golden-yellow face and underparts with a bold black crown and erect crest, black eyestripe and a broad black central stripe down the breast and belly. Olive-yellow back, dark wings with pale edging. Short black bill, grey legs.
blmfin1: Small finch; grey crown and nape, black face and ear mask bordered by white, yellow lores and throat, grey breast grading to white belly, brown-streaked back. Bicoloured bill (dark above, pinkish below), pinkish legs.
blnara1: Slim toucan-like aracari; black head, throat and breast, deep red lower back and rump, dark green upperparts, and a yellow belly with a red band. Long bicoloured bill, blackish above and pale ivory-yellow on the upper mandible. Bluish facial skin, grey legs.
blnchl1: Small plump finch-like bird; bright green upperparts, yellow underparts, a sky-blue crown and nape, a narrow black mask across the forehead and through the eye, and a blue hindcollar. Short stubby grey bill, grey legs.
blncra1: Large pale-grey crane with a long black neck and head, a bare red crown patch, a small white ear patch behind the eye, and black flight feathers forming a black bustle over the tail. Greenish-grey bill, blackish legs.
blnmon1: Small flycatcher; male bright azure-blue overall with whitish-blue belly, a small black patch on the nape, and a narrow black gorget line across the upper breast. Blue-grey bill, dark legs, dark eye.
blnmou1: Slender long-tailed mousebird; soft ash-grey body with a powder-blue nape patch, a short crest, and a very long graduated tail. Stubby bill red above and black below, red bare skin around the eye, reddish legs.
blnori1: Bright oriole; golden-yellow body with a broad black band running through the eye and meeting around the nape, black wings with yellow edging, and a yellow-and-black tail. Stout pinkish-red bill, grey legs, red eye.
blnpit1: Plump rounded pitta; rich rufous-brown overall with a buff face, a glossy blue patch on the hindcrown and nape, faint dark scaling, and short tail. Stout blackish bill, long pale pinkish legs.
blnswa2: Large white swan with a contrasting black head and upper neck, a bright red knob and bicoloured red-and-grey bill, a white stripe behind the eye, and white body plumage. Pinkish-grey legs.
blnswi1: Medium sooty-brown swiftlet with long swept-back wings, a slightly forked tail, uniformly dark blackish-brown plumage that is slightly paler grey-brown on the underparts, a tiny black bill and dark feet.
blntan1: Colourful tanager; turquoise-blue head and throat, deep blue-black mantle and breast, and bright buffy-yellow belly and rump, with green-and-blue wing and tail edging. Short conical black bill, grey legs.
blnter1: Slender pale tern; white overall with a pearl-grey back, a narrow black band running from the eye around the black nape, deeply forked white tail and long pointed wings. Slim black bill tipped paler, black legs.
blnwoo1: Slim woodpecker; barred brown-and-buff upperparts, finely barred buffy underparts, a grey face with a red malar (male), black crown and a black throat patch on the neck. Slightly decurved grey bill, greenish legs.
blophe1: Plump partridge-like pheasant; soft pale grey body with bold whitish shaft-streaks, apple-green wash on the breast and wings, and vivid crimson splashes on the face, throat, breast streaks and tail edges. Red orbital skin, red legs, dark bill.
blpyel1: Warbler; olive-green upperparts and bright yellow underparts, with a broad black mask across the forehead and through the eyes (male) bordered above by grey, and a yellow throat. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
blrman1: Tiny compact manakin; male velvety black overall with a brilliant sky-blue crown and a contrasting bright blue rump and lower back. Short black bill, pinkish-orange legs, dark eye.
blrpar1: Small stocky short-tailed parrot; male green with a grey-blue head, a blackish back, red bill, and a bright blue rump and lower back. Yellowish shoulder, dark wings. Pale legs, dark eye.
blrpit1: Plump rounded pitta; rufous-brown crown and upperparts with a glossy blue patch on the lower back and rump, a buffy face, greyish underparts, and short tail. Stout blackish bill, long pinkish legs.
blsant1: Small antbird; male uniformly bluish-slate-grey overall, slightly darker on the wings and tail, with a concealed white interscapular patch. Short stout black bill, dark grey legs, dark eye.
blsbar1: Stocky barbet; glossy black crown and upperparts heavily spotted and streaked with golden-yellow and red, a red forehead, and yellow underparts with black spotting on the flanks. Heavy pale bill, grey legs.
blspuf1: Plump big-headed puffbird; dark brown above and below with extensive bold white streaking on head and body, a buffy-tan throat with variable rufous on the breast, and a pale facial crescent. Heavy black bill, dark legs.
blsrob1: Slim long-tailed scrub-robin; entirely sooty-black plumage with a long graduated tail tipped white, broad rounded wings, and an upright posture. Slender black bill, blackish legs, dark eye.
blsrob2: Small black-and-white robin; black crown, nape, back, wings and tail, a bold white supercilium, white throat and underparts, and a conspicuous white wing patch. Black bill, dark brown eye, grey-pink legs.
blsspa1: Plain sparrow-like bird; olive-green back and wings, grey head with two bold black lateral crown stripes, pale grey underparts, and white throat. Heavy bicoloured bill (dark above, pale below), pinkish legs, dark eye.
blswoo1: Streaky woodcreeper; warm brown upperparts with a rufous rump and wings, blackish head and underparts boldly streaked with whitish teardrop spots, and a buff throat. Straight slender blackish bill, grey legs.
bltant1: Small antbird; male slaty-grey overall with a black face, throat and breast and a black tail, a concealed white back patch, and grey underparts. Short black bill, dark legs, red eye.
bltant2: Small antbird; male blackish-grey above with a black throat and breast, a white-spotted wing, white belly, and a concealed white back patch. Short black bill, greyish legs, dark eye.
bltant3: Large robust antshrike; male slaty-black overall with a black crown and throat, faint fine grey vermiculations, and a heavy hooked black bill. Dark grey legs, pale eye. Bulky big-headed shape.
bltapa1: Slender long-tailed warbler; greenish upperparts, a grey crown, a black throat and breast band, yellow lower breast and belly, and white cheeks. Thin black bill, pale legs, pale eye, long graduated tail.
bltbab1: Skulking babbler; warm rufous-brown upperparts, a greyish head, a black throat and upper breast spotted with white, and buffy-brown underparts. Short stout blackish bill, pinkish legs, pale eye-ring.
bltbar1: Small stocky African barbet with a black crown, white supercilium and white cheek stripe framing a black throat, white-streaked dark upperparts, and whitish underparts often washed yellow with dark flank spotting; stout black bill and grey legs.
bltbar2: Plump Asian barbet, grass-green overall with a vivid blue face and throat, a black-and-crimson crown, and red patches at the sides of the neck; heavy pale yellowish bill and greenish-grey legs.
bltbob1: Small round quail-like gamebird; male has a bold black-and-white head pattern with white supercilium and throat above a solid black bib, rich rufous-chestnut underparts scalloped with white below, and brown mottled upperparts; short grey bill, grey legs.
bltcan1: Small drab finch, greyish-brown above with fine dusky streaking, a yellowish rump, a black chin and throat patch, and pale buff-grey underparts; short conical horn-coloured bill and pinkish legs.
bltcou1: Large long-tailed coucal, glossy blue-black on head, throat, back and tail contrasting with a creamy-white belly and chestnut-brown wings; heavy black bill, red eye, and dark grey legs.
bltcra1: Small dark rail, slate-grey to blackish overall with a faintly browner back, and a contrasting short black tail; short greenish bill and bright red legs and feet.
bltcuc1: Slim long-tailed cuckoo, brown above and barred buff-and-dark below, with a long graduated tail broadly barred black and white; pale eye-ring, dark bill, and yellow legs.
blteme1: Tiny glittering hummingbird; male is brilliant metallic emerald-green overall with a forked blue-black tail and a black bill; small with short straight bill and dark feet.
bltfal1: Tiny shrike-like falcon, glossy black above including crown and a black mask, with a white forehead, throat and underparts and rufous thighs and vent; small hooked black bill and black legs.
bltfan1: Small dark fantail, sooty black overall with fine white spotting across the breast and white tips to the long fanned black tail; slender black bill and dark legs.
bltfly1: Small flycatcher, olive-brown above with a bright lemon-yellow rump, pale eye-ring, ochre throat and breast fading to whitish belly, rufous wing edgings, and a blackish tail; flat dark bill and dark legs.
bltgol1: Small hummingbird, glittering golden-green above and on the underparts with a shining blue throat patch and a rufous-tinged golden tail; mostly red bill with a dark tip and dark feet.
bltgro1: Stocky finch-like grosbeak, bright yellow head and underparts with an olive-black back, wings and tail, and black thighs; very heavy conical silvery bill and grey legs.
bltgro2: Large heavy-billed saltator, glossy black overall on head, throat, back and breast with a slate-grey belly; massive bright red bill and dark legs.
blthon1: Medium olive-grey honeyeater, brownish-olive above and paler streaked below, with a distinctive black throat and face mask and a pale yellow ear streak; slender slightly decurved dark bill and grey legs.
bltjay1: Small jay, deep azure-blue above with a black face mask and black throat, a whitish or pale blue forehead band, and bluish underparts; black bill and black legs.
bltlau1: Medium grey-brown laughingthrush with a clean grey crown and nape, a broad black mask and black throat, and plain greyish underparts; dark bill and pinkish-grey legs.
bltlea1: Dark terrestrial ovenbird, rich dark brown overall with a contrasting rufous-chestnut rump and a black tail, and a paler rufous throat; long slightly decurved dark bill and dark legs.
bltmac1: Large macaw, turquoise-blue above and golden-yellow below, with a blue throat, bare whitish facial skin lined with blue feather streaks, and a long blue tail; heavy black bill and dark grey legs.
bltman1: Medium hummingbird; male is glittering bronze-green above with a velvety black central stripe down the throat and breast bordered by blue-green, and a wine-purple tail; long slightly decurved black bill.
bltmot1: Medium motmot, mostly green overall with a turquoise-blue throat patch, a green crown, and a long green tail (lacking racket tips); short black bill and dark legs.
bltmun1: Small munia, dark brown above with fine pale shaft streaks, a black face, throat and central breast, and pinkish-brown scaly underparts; stubby grey conical bill, long blackish tail, and grey legs.
bltori1: Striking oriole, bright golden-yellow with a full black hood covering head and throat, black wings, and a mostly black tail; stout pinkish-red bill and grey legs.
