capcro2: Large all-black crow with a glossy purple-and-greenish sheen, slim build, and a longish slender black bill. Long wings and squarish tail; dark legs. Uniformly black with no pale areas.
capfra2: Large grayish-brown spurfowl finely vermiculated and streaked, with paler whitish streaking on underparts. Bare red facial skin around the eye; bright red bill and red legs. Stocky game-bird with a rounded tail.
capgls1: Medium glossy starling entirely iridescent blue-green, with deep violet-blue flanks and belly; glossy greenish-blue head, back and breast catching metallic sheen. Bright orange-yellow eye stands out. Black bill and blackish legs. Sleek, plump-bodied with a short squared tail.
capgra1: Robust warbler-like bird with a long graduated tail and rich rufous-brown cap and nape. Back is dark brown heavily streaked black; underparts buffy with fine dark streaking on breast. Black malar stripe borders pale throat. Dark bill and brownish legs.
capowl1: Tiny owl with rounded head lacking ear-tufts; grey-brown crown finely spotted whitish, plain greyish face with pale eyebrows and yellow eyes. Brown upperparts, white underparts with rufous-brown streaking. Two black 'false eye' spots on nape. Yellow bill, yellow feet.
cappet: Boldly pied petrel: blackish head and throat, brown-black upperparts heavily checkered white on back and inner wings, white rump. Wings show two large white patches above. Underparts white. Stocky body; short black bill, blackish legs and feet.
capsee1: Tiny finch with stubby conical bill; male mostly warm cinnamon-rufous with contrasting glossy black crown, wings and tail, and a small white wing patch. Black bill, dark legs. Compact, small-headed seedeater shape.
capspa: Boldly marked sparrow: male has black head with broad white C-shaped curve around grey ear-coverts, chestnut back, grey rump, white throat with black breast band. Underparts greyish-white, chestnut flanks. Heavy black conical bill, pinkish legs.
capsug1: Large brown sugarbird with an extremely long, flowing dark tail far exceeding body length. Brown streaked upperparts and breast, white belly, yellow undertail-coverts, rufous-brown throat and malar area. Long decurved black bill, dark legs. Slender, long-tailed shape.
capuch1: Large bizarre cotinga, ash-brown overall with a bare blue-grey 'monk's hood' face and crown of short pale plumes. Wings and tail darker brown, bright cinnamon-rufous undertail-coverts. Stout dark bill, dark legs. Heavy-bodied, large-headed shape.
capwag1: Plain greyish-olive wagtail with a grey-brown back, off-white underparts and a narrow dark breast band. White supercilium and dark eyestripe; whitish throat. Long tail with white outer feathers, wagged constantly. Slender thin black bill, dark legs.
capwea1: Large weaver: breeding male bright golden-yellow with greenish wash on back and wings, pale whitish eye (cream iris), and dull orange-tinged face and throat. Underparts yellow. Long pointed blackish bill, pinkish legs. Sturdy, large-billed weaver.
capwhe1: Striking wheatear with black cap and broad white supercilium meeting across forehead; black face mask and black breast band below white throat. Brown back, white underparts, rufous flanks. White rump and black-and-white tail. Black bill, black legs.
capwhe2: Small white-eye with bright yellowish-green upperparts, a bold white eye-ring, and greyish-white to pale grey underparts (greener in some). Yellow throat and undertail. Slender dark bill, greyish legs. Tiny, round-bodied, active warbler-like form.
capwhe6: Small white-eye with greenish-grey upperparts and a distinct white eye-ring; underparts greyish-buff washed cinnamon or peach on flanks and belly, yellow throat. Slender pointed dark bill, greyish legs. Tiny rounded body typical of white-eyes.
carcha1: Robin-chat with slate-grey upperparts, bright orange breast and flanks, and a white belly. Short white supercilium over dark face. Orange rump and outer tail feathers contrast with dark central tail. Slender black bill, blackish legs. Upright chat posture.
carchi: Small tit with a neat black cap and black bib, white cheeks, and plain grey back, wings and tail. Underparts whitish with buff-grey flanks. Short black bill, dark grey legs. Compact, round-headed, very similar to Black-capped Chickadee.
cardov1: Plain ground dove with greyish-buff upperparts glossed bronzy-green on the nape, white forehead and face, and pinkish-white underparts. White wing edge visible in flight. Reddish eye-ring, dark bill, reddish legs. Plump-bodied, medium-sized dove.
carela1: Drab grey-olive flycatcher with a slight bushy crest, often showing a whitish crown patch. Greyish head, olive-grey back, pale yellowish-white underparts. Two whitish wing bars, pale eye-ring. Dark bill with pale base, dark legs. Nondescript medium flycatcher.
cargra1: Slim glossy black grackle with violet-blue iridescence overall and a long keel-shaped (V-folded) tail. Male all-black with bright pale yellow or whitish eye. Long pointed black bill, black legs. Slender, long-tailed blackbird shape.
carlor1: Medium lory entirely deep crimson-red, with a slightly darker maroon-red wash on wings and back. Bright reddish-orange bill, dark grey-black eye-ring and facial skin, dark grey legs. Stocky parrot with short squared tail; striking uniform red plumage.
carmyz1: Small honeyeater: male brilliant scarlet-red on head, breast and rump, with contrasting blackish-brown wings, back and tail. Belly washed darker. Slender slightly decurved black bill, dark legs. Tiny, active, nectar-feeding shape.
cartap1: Small dark tapaculo, uniformly slate-grey overall, slightly paler grey below, with blackish-brown flanks and lower belly often faintly barred brown. Short cocked tail. Blackish bill, brownish legs. Skulking, mouse-like rounded body with stubby tail.
carthr1: Rock-thrush with blue-grey head, throat and upper breast contrasting with rich orange-rufous lower breast, belly and rump. Brown back and wings, rufous tail with dark centre. Dark bill, dark legs. Stocky, upright thrush shape with strong colour contrast.
carwoo1: Small woodpecker with brownish back barred and spotted whitish, white underparts heavily streaked dark, and a streaked face. Male has red rear crown and nape. Dull olive-brown rump. Dark grey bill, greyish legs. Compact, finely patterned woodpecker.
carwre: Warm rufous-brown wren with a bold white supercilium, buffy-cinnamon underparts, and a long slightly cocked tail finely barred dark. Whitish throat. Faint dark barring on wings and tail. Long slightly decurved dark bill, pinkish legs. Plump, energetic wren.
casant1: Large antshrike entirely glossy black; male shows white fringing on wing coverts forming wing bars and a semi-concealed white patch on the back. Female all black, lacking the white wing fringing. Heavy hooked black bill, dark grey legs. Robust antshrike build.
casfin: Rosy finch: male has rose-red crown, pink-washed face, throat and breast fading to whitish belly, and brown streaked back tinged pink. Brown-streaked flanks, notched tail. Pale conical bill with straight culmen, brownish legs. Sturdy, peaked-crowned finch.
caskin: Grey-headed kingbird with a dark grey head and breast, white chin contrasting sharply, and pale yellow belly. Olive-grey back, dusky wings, and a dark blackish-brown tail with a narrow whitish tip. Heavy black bill, black legs. Stout, upright flycatcher.
casoro2: Large red-brown cacique with rich chestnut upperparts and an olive-yellow breast and neck-sides; greyish throat and pale blue-white eyes. Distinctive pale yellow bill with a raised casque over the forehead. In flight tail shows yellow with olive central stripe. Dark legs.
casspa: Plain pale sparrow, grey-brown above with fine dark streaking on the back, and clean unmarked pale buff-grey underparts. Faint pale supercilium, plain face. Rounded tail with faint pale corners. Pale conical bill, pinkish legs. Nondescript, flat-headed sparrow.
casvir: Vireo with a blue-grey head, bold white spectacles (eye-ring joined to lores), olive-green back, and whitish underparts with yellowish-olive flanks. Two whitish wing bars on dusky wings. Stout dark bill with hooked tip, grey legs. Sturdy, drab vireo.
cattyr: Slim ground-dwelling tyrant: greyish-brown above, pale yellow below, with a whitish throat and face and a concealed orange-red crown patch. Long pinkish to pale legs and a thin dark bill. Upright, long-legged terrestrial flycatcher shape.
caugua1: Large dark guan, blackish-brown overall with a bronzy-green gloss, fine white streaking on the neck and breast, and a chestnut belly and vent. Bare red dewlap at throat, bare bluish-grey face skin, dull red bill. Reddish legs. Long-tailed, slender game bird.
causno1: Large grey snowcock with a grey head, white throat bordered by a chestnut-and-grey neck stripe, and grey upperparts vermiculated darker. Breast and flanks grey streaked chestnut and white, white belly. Stout pale bill, reddish legs. Bulky, partridge-like body.
cavswa: Small swallow with a steel-blue cap and back, rufous-buff forehead, rump, throat and collar, and pale whitish underparts. Dark wings and a squarish, slightly notched dark tail. Short black bill, dark legs. Compact swallow with a square tail.
cawfin1: Ground finch: male has a grey hood and back, black throat bordered by white moustachial stripes ('bridle'), and bright yellow underparts and rump. Wings show yellow edging. Short conical greyish bill, dark legs. Stocky, terrestrial finch.
cayjay1: Striking jay with a black hood, breast and throat, white nape patch, and violet-blue upperparts and wings. Underparts and tail tip creamy-white to pale buff. Bright blue eye-skin or pale eye, black bill, black legs. Robust, long-tailed jay.
cbfdov1: Plump green fruit-dove, mostly bright green with a grey head and breast, and a deep claret-red lower breast patch. Yellow belly and yellow-edged wing feathers, yellow undertail. Short greenish-yellow bill, reddish legs. Compact, rounded fruit-dove.
cbgcuc1: Large terrestrial ground-cuckoo with a glossy blue-black head and breast, green-glossed black wings and long tail, and a buff-brown belly. Bare coral-red and pale blue facial skin around the eye. Heavy coral-red and yellow bill, greenish legs. Long-legged, long-tailed.
cbipig2: Large imperial-pigeon with a pale grey head, neck and breast, blackish-green glossed wings, back and tail, and a rich cinnamon-rufous belly and vent. Dark bill, reddish legs. Heavy-bodied, broad-winged, large pigeon.
cbjbab1: Plump terrestrial babbler with rich chestnut crown, back and wings, a blue-grey face and breast, and a black-and-white striped throat and flanks. Bright blue eye-skin, dark bill, pinkish legs. Rounded, short-tailed, ground-dwelling shape.
cbmtan1: Mountain tanager with a black head and back, bright blue shoulders and wing edgings, and chestnut underparts. Some show a small pale facial spot. Stout black bill, dark legs. Robust, colourful, medium-large tanager with blue, black and chestnut.
cbqthr1: Ground-dwelling quail-thrush: male has grey-brown upperparts, a black face and throat bordered white, and a rich chestnut breast band. White belly with black-spotted flanks, white supercilium. Dark bill, pinkish legs. Plump, terrestrial, scaled-flanked.
cbrthr1: Rock-thrush with a blue-grey head, back and throat, contrasting with a deep chestnut-rufous breast, belly and rump. Wings dark with some white, tail rufous. Dark bill, dark legs. Stout, upright thrush with bold grey-and-chestnut contrast.
cbsfin: Heavy-billed seed-finch: male glossy blue-black on head, back and breast with a rich chestnut belly and vent, and a small white wing speculum. Very thick, swollen pale conical bill, dark legs. Stocky, large-headed finch.
cbttyr1: Tiny tody-tyrant, olive-green above with a cinnamon-buff breast and yellowish belly. Pale eye-ring, dusky wings with faint buff wing bars and edgings. Short broad dark bill, pale legs. Minute, large-headed, short-tailed flycatcher.
ccbeat1: Bee-eater with green upperparts, a rich cinnamon-chestnut breast, a black eye-mask, and a white throat bordered below by a narrow black band. Greenish belly, blue undertail. Long slender black decurved bill, dark legs. Slim with elongated central tail feathers.
ccbfin: Brushfinch with a rich chestnut crown and nape, black face and sides of head, and a white throat. Olive-green back and wings, blackish breast band, white belly, olive flanks. Black bill, brownish legs. Stocky, ground-feeding finch.
ccbwar1: Plain bush warbler, warm rufous-brown above with a distinct chestnut-rufous crown, a pale buff supercilium, and greyish-buff underparts. Dark eyestripe. Whitish throat. Thin pointed bill, pinkish legs. Skulking, rounded, fairly large bush warbler.
ccfdov1: Plump green fruit-dove, mostly green with a deep crimson-red crown, a pale grey breast, and an orange-yellow lower belly and vent. Greenish-yellow wing edgings. Short greenish bill, reddish legs. Compact, rounded fruit-dove with red cap.
ccfgle1: Foliage-gleaner with a rufous-chestnut crown and nape, plain warm brown back, and rufous wings and tail. Buff throat and pale brownish underparts, faint dusky scaling on breast. Pale supercilium, straight pale bill, greyish legs. Slim, long-tailed ovenbird.
ccfgle2: Medium ovenbird with warm rufous-brown upperparts and bright chestnut crown contrasting a grayish-olive face. Underparts dull olive-brown with a buffy throat. Notable orange-red iris and a stout straight dark bill; legs grayish.
ccswea1: Sparrow-sized brown weaver with a chestnut crown bordered by long whitish supercilia meeting on the nape. Brown back, plain whitish underparts, dark malar stripe, and a pale rump. Stout conical pale bill; pinkish legs.
cedwax: Sleek silky fawn-brown bird with a pointed crest, black mask edged white, and pale yellow belly. Gray wings show waxy red tips, and the gray tail ends in a bright yellow band. Short dark bill; gray legs.
ceghor1: Slim gray hornbill with grayish-brown upperparts, paler underparts, and a long curved cream-and-black bill lacking a large casque. Whitish belly and white-tipped tail feathers; dark legs. Medium hornbill with a long tail.
cehpar1: Tiny stocky green parrot with a bright red crown and rump, blue throat patch, and golden-orange nape and back wash. Short tail; underparts yellowish-green. Short red bill; orange legs.
cerwar: Small wood-warbler, sky-blue above with a narrow black breast band across white underparts and black streaks on the flanks. Two white wing bars and white throat. Thin dark bill; dark legs. Compact, short-tailed.
ceyfro1: Cryptic rufous-brown frogmouth mottled and barred with buff and black, with white spots on scapulars and breast. Huge flat triangular head, broad pale-tipped gape, large dark eyes. Wide hooked pale bill; small pale legs.
ceyjun1: Junglefowl with glossy orange-red and golden body plumage, dark green tail, and bare red facial skin with a yellow-centered red comb. Female smaller, brown with fine barring. Strong legs with spurs in male.
ceymag1: Striking blue-and-chestnut magpie with deep purplish-blue body and wings, chestnut head and neck, and a long blue white-tipped tail. Bright red bill, red eye-ring, and red legs.
ceymyn1: Glossy black myna with purple-green sheen, bold yellow wing patch in flight, and a heavy orange-red bill. Distinguished by black bristly forehead feathers and yellow nape wattles only behind the eye. Yellow legs.
ceyspu1: Dark gamebird; male blackish with bold white spotting on head, neck and breast, chestnut belly and rufous-brown back. Bright red bare facial skin and red legs with double spurs. Stout grayish bill.
ceywhe1: Small olive-green white-eye with a bold white eye-ring, yellowish throat and breast, and grayish-white belly. Darker, larger and duller than other white-eyes. Fine pointed dark bill; grayish legs.
cfweye1: Olive-green white-eye with a white eye-ring, yellow throat and undertail, white belly, and diagnostic chestnut-rufous flanks. Greenish upperparts; thin dark bill and grayish legs. Small and active.
chaant1: Antshrike; male has black-and-white streaked forehead, black crown and crest, black upperparts barred white, and white underparts with fine black barring. Female warmer with rufous crest and buff underparts. Pale iris; bluish-gray lower bill and legs.
chaant5: Plump round antpitta, rich brown above with an orange-tinged buffy-brown breast and underparts, short tail and long pale legs. Stout dark bill; rotund posture with fluffed plumage.
chaapa1: Small slender warbler-like bird, dark slate-gray overall with a rufous throat and breast; chin white in north, rufous in south. Short tail, slender pointed dark bill, dark legs. Pale eye.
chacha1: Large brown chachalaca with grayish neck and head, brownish-olive upperparts, paler buff belly, and a long broad chestnut-tipped tail. Bare reddish throat skin; dark bill; grayish legs.
chacis1: Small warm-brown cisticola with a plain rufous-tinged crown, unstreaked rufescent upperparts, and whitish underparts washed buff. Short rounded tail with pale tips. Fine dark bill; pinkish legs.
chaear1: Slender rufous-brown furnariid with a long pale supercilium, streaked dusky-and-buff throat, and rufous wings and tail. Buffy underparts; longish slightly decurved dark bill. Grayish legs.
chahum1: Small hummingbird, glittering bronze-green above and on the throat and breast, with a contrasting white belly. Tail bronze-green to coppery. Bill straight, blackish above and pinkish-red below; short dark legs.
chaowl1: Medium grayish-brown owl, finely barred and mottled, with a rounded head lacking ear tufts, a pale facial disc, and dark eyes. Whitish underparts barred and streaked dark. Pale bill; feathered legs.
chapip1: Streaky brown pipit, buffy-brown above with dark streaking and a buffy-white belly with fine breast streaking. Pale supercilium and pale outer tail feathers. Slender pinkish bill; pinkish legs.
chaswi2: Small dark sooty-brown swift with slightly paler grayish throat and rump, blackish wings, and a short squared tail. Slim cigar-shaped body, scythe-like wings; tiny dark bill and legs.
chbant1: Antbird; male slate-gray with a chestnut-brown back, wings and tail and a bare blue eye-ring. Female browner with grayish head. Black bill, gray legs. Plump with short cocked tail.
chbant2: Antshrike; male boldly black-and-white barred on crown, back, wings and underparts with a rufous-chestnut back. Female has rufous crown and similar barring. Pale eye; black bill, gray legs.
chbbun1: Bunting; male has a white crown bordered black, chestnut nape and breast band, gray face and throat, and streaky brown back. Whitish belly. Stout conical bill; pinkish legs.
chbchi: Small chickadee with a dark sooty-brown cap and bib, white cheeks, rich chestnut back and flanks, and grayish-white underparts. Short dark bill; dark gray legs.
chbchl1: Stocky finch-like bird, bright green above with a blue crown and nape, a thin rufous-chestnut forehead band, and yellow underparts with a chestnut central belly stripe. Short stubby bill; gray legs.
chbcor1: Hummingbird with shining green upperparts and throat, bright chestnut breast, belly and undertail, and a rufous-and-bronze tail. Short straight black bill; conspicuous white leg puffs. Stocky.
chbcuc2: Very large pale gray cuckoo with a massive pale curved bill, bare red eye-ring, long barred tail, and faintly barred grayish underparts. Slim long-winged silhouette; grayish legs.
chbcuc3: Slim cuckoo, slaty-gray head and upperparts with rich chestnut-rufous underparts. Long graduated dark tail with white spotting beneath; yellow eye-ring. Slender dark bill; yellowish legs.
chbeat1: Bright green bee-eater with a rufous-chestnut crown, nape and upper back, yellow throat bordered by a black-and-rufous band, and green underparts. Long slender black decurved bill; lacks long tail streamers.
chbeup1: Small finch-like euphonia; male glossy blue-black above and on the throat with a rich chestnut breast and belly. Female olive-green above, yellowish below. Short thick bluish bill; gray legs.
chbflo1: Flowerpiercer; glossy black on upperparts, wings and throat with rufous-chestnut breast and belly and slate-blue shoulders. Dark eye; short hook-tipped upturned black bill; dark legs.
chbgna1: Plump gnateater, brown above with a gray crown and a bold white postocular tuft, a black face and chestnut breast band, and whitish belly. Short tail, long pale legs; short dark bill.
chbkin2: Forest kingfisher with a glossy dark chestnut-brown crown, back and tail, a violet-blue rump and wing patches, and buff-rufous underparts. Large bright red bill; red legs.
chbmal1: Slim malkoha, dark glossy green-gray above with a greenish gloss, gray throat and breast grading to chestnut belly, and a long graduated tail. Bare red facial skin; pale greenish bill; gray legs.
chbmoc1: Slim gray-brown mockingbird, grayish above and whitish below, with a bold whitish supercilium over a dark eyeline. Dark wings with pale edgings; long dark tail tipped white. Slender dark bill; dark legs.
chbmon1: Monarch flycatcher; glossy blue-black above and on the throat with rich chestnut underparts. Some forms white-bellied. Pale blue bill with black tip; dark legs. Compact with rounded tail.
chbmun1: Small finch with a chestnut-brown back and wings, a black face and a broad chestnut breast band above a white belly, and a black lower belly patch. Stout blue-gray conical bill; gray legs.
chbnut3: Nuthatch with blue-gray upperparts, a black eyestripe, white throat and cheeks, and rich cinnamon-chestnut underparts. White corners on the tail. Long straight gray bill; gray legs.
chbowl1: Small owlet, rufous-chestnut above with fine pale spotting and barring, a rounded head lacking ear tufts, and whitish underparts streaked rufous-brown. Yellow eyes; greenish-yellow bill; yellow legs.
chbpar1: Plump partridge, brown above with black markings, a gray breast, chestnut flanks streaked white, and a black-and-white patterned throat with red facial skin. Dark bill; reddish legs.
chbpar2: Rotund partridge, olive-brown above scaled black, with a gray face, rufous-chestnut throat and breast, and a whitish belly. Bold red bare orbital skin; black bill; reddish legs.
chbpar3: Brown bamboo-partridge with a gray supercilium, throat and breast, a rufous-chestnut nape band, and bold chestnut-and-black spotting on buffy flanks. Reddish-brown upperparts; dark bill; greenish legs.
chbsan: Sandgrouse; male sandy-buff above with a plain unmarked back, a narrow dark breast band, and a chestnut-brown belly. Pin-tailed central feathers. Female finely barred and spotted. Short bill; feathered legs.
chbscb1: Babbler with rufous-brown upperparts, a long bold white supercilium and a broad black eye-mask, white throat and breast, and chestnut flanks. Long decurved yellowish bill; grayish legs.
chbsee1: Tiny seedeater; male slate-gray above and on the head with chestnut-rufous underparts. Female plain buffy-brown. Stout conical pale bill; dark legs. Small, round-bodied finch.
chbtan1: Tanager; male turquoise-blue with a chestnut back and crown patch, black face mask, and turquoise underparts. Female duller greenish-blue. Short dark bill; gray legs.
chbtho1: Rufous-brown furnariid with a chestnut lower back and pale-streaked reddish crown, a pale gray-brown supercilium and dark mask, and grayish-brown underparts with reddish breast speckling. Pale bluish-white iris; dark bill; grayish legs.
chbthr2: Medium thrush with blackish hood and throat, dark grey back and wings, pale grey upper breast grading to rich rufous-chestnut lower breast and belly. Yellow bill, narrow orange eye-ring, and dull yellow legs.
chbtou1: Large black toucan with white-cream throat washed faintly yellow, red lower breast band, and red-and-yellow undertail coverts. Enormous mostly black bill with a yellow stripe along the upper ridge; bare blue facial skin around dark eye.
chbwar1: Small, very plain brown bush warbler with warm olive-brown upperparts, faintly streaked crown, buff-tinged breast with faint dark spotting, and whitish belly. Short rounded wings, longish graduated tail, pale lower mandible, and pinkish legs.
chbwre3: Plump dark wren with rich chestnut-brown body, bright chestnut-orange face and breast, and dusky crown and back. Short cocked tail, slightly decurved blackish bill, and dark legs; bare bluish skin around eye.
chcant1: Stocky antbird with shaggy chestnut crest, blackish face and throat, and warm rufous-brown body. Bare pale blue skin around the eye, blackish bill, and grey legs.
chcant2: Plump round antpitta with rich rufous-chestnut crown and nape, grey-brown back, olive-brown flanks, and whitish underparts boldly streaked dark on breast. Stubby tail, long pinkish legs, and short pale-based bill.
chcbab1: Small babbler with bright rufous-chestnut cap, white face and throat with fine black moustachial streaks, grey-brown back, and buff-washed underparts. Short black bill and pinkish legs.
chcbab2: Medium grey-brown babbler with rich chestnut crown, long broad white supercilium over dark eye-line, white throat and breast, and brown back. Long graduated tail, slender slightly decurved blackish bill, and grey legs.
chcbec1: Compact becard with rufous-chestnut crown and upperparts, paler buffy underparts, and a faint blackish forehead. Stout slightly hooked dark bill, large head, short tail, and grey legs.
chcbla2: Glossy black blackbird with a contrasting rich chestnut-rufous crown, nape, and throat. Sharp pointed conical black bill, dark eye, and black legs.
chccot1: Robust cotinga with slaty-grey body, rich chestnut crown and rufous patch at the bend of the wing and base of the tail. Short stout blackish bill, dark eye, and grey legs.
chcgna1: Plump gnateater with chestnut crown and nape, slaty-grey face and breast, olive-brown back, and whitish belly; male shows a tuft of long silvery-white postocular plumes. Short tail, pinkish legs, and short blackish bill.
chclau2: Olive-brown laughingthrush with a bright chestnut-rufous crown and crest, grey ear-coverts, and reddish-chestnut wing and tail edgings. Slightly decurved dark bill and brownish legs.
chclau3: Olive-brown laughingthrush with a neat chestnut cap, white throat, grey-brown breast, and warm flanks; greyish face. Slender dark bill and pinkish-brown legs.
chclon: Sparrow-sized longspur; breeding male has black crown, buff face with black eyestripe, chestnut nape, black belly and breast, and warm buff throat; streaky brown back. Pale conical bill, dark legs, and white tail sides with black inverted-T pattern.
chcpih1: Uniform dark slate-grey cotinga with a distinctive chestnut crown and nape and pale cinnamon undertail coverts. Large head, short tail, stout slightly hooked dark bill, and dark eye.
chcpuf1: Stocky big-headed puffbird with rich chestnut crown and nape, black mask, white throat and collar, buffy underparts barred and scaled dark, and brown back. Heavy black bill and dark legs.
chcsta1: Sleek starling with grey upperparts, whitish head, and a chestnut wash on the cheeks (male); pale grey underparts and dark wings and tail. Pointed dark bill and reddish legs.
chcswi1: Large dark swift, blackish overall with a rich chestnut-rufous collar across the throat and nape. Long swept-back wings, slightly forked tail, and tiny dark bill.
chcwar2: Tiny active leaf warbler with chestnut-tinged crown bordered by dark lateral crown-stripes, yellowish supercilium, greenish back, yellow throat and breast, and pale belly. Fine dark bill and pale legs.
chcwoo1: Medium woodpecker with rich rufous-chestnut body finely barred black, a pale buff-yellow head and bushy crest, and a red malar streak (male). Pale yellowish bill and grey legs.
cheant1: Tiny antwren; male grey with a black throat and breast and a contrasting chestnut crown; whitish wing markings. Female buffier with chestnut crown. Slender dark bill and pinkish legs.
cheant2: Small round antpitta uniformly rich chestnut-rufous over the head, breast, and upperparts, paler on the lower belly. Stubby tail, short dark bill, and long pinkish-grey legs.
cheara1: Medium aracari with black head and chestnut ear patch, olive-green back, yellow underparts crossed by a red and black breast band, and red rump. Large bicoloured bill, blackish above and ivory below, with reddish base.
chebul1: Bulbul with bright chestnut-rufous back, wings, and tail, contrasting whitish head and underparts, and a grey-streaked crown. Slim blackish bill and dark legs.
chebun2: Bunting with grey crown finely streaked black, chestnut ear-coverts and nape, streaked brown back, and white underparts with a rusty breast band above black breast streaks. Conical pinkish bill and pinkish legs.
chemun: Small finch with deep chestnut-rufous body and contrasting black head, breast, and lower belly. Heavy pale blue-grey conical bill and greyish legs.
chephe1: Large long-tailed pheasant, buffy grey-brown overall with fine black barring and scaling, a short crest, and bare red facial skin. Very long broadly barred grey-and-brown tail; pale legs.
chepic1: Tiny piculet with plain rich cinnamon-chestnut upperparts and underparts and a dark crown spotted white (male shows orange-red forecrown spots). Short stiff dark tail, short dark bill, and grey legs.
chesee1: Small seedeater; male uniform rich chestnut-rufous below and on the rump with a contrasting grey back, crown, and wings. Stubby pale conical bill and dark legs.
chetea1: Compact dabbling duck; male has a glossy dark green head, rich chestnut-spotted body, dark scapulars, a white flank patch, and a green wing speculum. Dark grey bill and dark legs.
chethr1: Thrush with grey head and neck, deep rufous-chestnut back, breast, and flanks, and a paler grey belly; blackish wings and tail. Yellow bill, yellow eye-ring, and yellowish legs.
chewoo2: Medium woodpecker with rich rufous-chestnut plumage barred blackish, a pale shaggy crest, and a red malar stripe (male). Pale ivory bill and grey legs.
chewoo3: Small woodpecker with black-and-white barred upperparts, white-spotted wings, whitish underparts streaked dusky, and a black-and-white striped face; male shows red on the crown. Short dark bill and grey legs.
chfmac1: Medium green macaw with a chestnut-maroon forehead band, dusky-blue crown, bare whitish facial skin, and blue in the flight feathers. Reddish underwing and undertail; large blackish bill and grey legs.
chgshr1: Large pale grey shrike with a broad black mask, black wings with bold white patches, and a long black-and-white tail; whitish underparts. Stout hooked black bill and dark legs.
chhcra1: Small dark crake with rich chestnut head and breast, olive-brown back, and dusky barred flanks and belly. Short greenish bill, red eye, and reddish legs.
chhlau1: Laughingthrush with a chestnut hood over the head and throat, olive-brown body, and greyish wing and tail edgings. Slender dark bill and pinkish legs.
chhoro1: Large oropendola, black with a chestnut rump, lower back, and undertail; bright chestnut head contrasts with body. Long pale ivory bill with orange tip, blue eye, and bright yellow outer tail feathers.
chhtan1: Small tanager; male grey overall with a deep chestnut head and a small black forehead and mask. Slender pointed dark bill and greyish legs.
chhtes1: Tiny stub-tailed warbler with bright golden-chestnut crown, dark olive-green upperparts, and rich yellow underparts; a short pale supercilium. Fine dark bill and pale pinkish legs.
chhwrb1: Tiny brown wren-babbler with scaled brown upperparts, a proportionally long tail, and a white breast flecked with dark spots; lacks rusty tones. Fine dark bill and pinkish legs.
chibar1: Plump green barbet with a heavy pale bill, bright red and blue markings on the face and throat, and an otherwise grass-green body. Stout pale bill bordered by bristles, and greyish legs.
chibat1: Small black-and-white flycatcher-like bird; male has grey crown, black eye-mask, white throat, and a broad black breast band; female has a chestnut breast spot. White wing markings, dark bill, and dark legs.
chibla1: All-black thrush (male) with an orange-yellow bill and narrow yellow eye-ring; dark legs. Female dark sooty-brown with a duller yellowish-brown bill.
chicar1: Slim brown caracara with pale buffy-streaked body, dark brown cap and back, pale rump and tail base, and a dark tail tip; pale patch in the primaries. Pale bluish-grey bill with bare reddish face and yellowish legs.
chicis1: Small plain cisticola with grey-brown upperparts faintly streaked, a plain greyish-buff face, and whitish underparts; plain rufous-tinged tail with faint subterminal spots. Fine dark bill and pinkish legs.
chiegr: Slender white egret with, in breeding plumage, a shaggy nape crest, yellow bill, blue-green facial skin, and bright yellow feet on black legs. All-white plumage and dark eye.
chifli1: Large woodpecker with finely barred brown-and-buff body, a plain greyish head and face, a red malar stripe (male), and a barred tail. Long pointed dark bill and grey legs.
chifra1: Stocky game bird with blackish underparts boldly spotted and barred white, a chestnut-bordered black-and-white face, white throat, and brown back with white spots. Dark bill, red eye-skin, and yellowish-orange legs.
chifri1: Large black seabird with very long pointed wings and deeply forked tail; long grey hooked bill. Male glossy black with red throat pouch and a white belly patch. Female black with white breast and belly, brownish wingbar.
chilew1: Tiny olive-green leaf warbler with greenish-white underparts; bold yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, and pale crown stripe on a dark crown. Two pale yellowish wingbars; pale lower mandible, dark upper; pinkish-brown legs.
chimoc1: Slim grey-brown mockingbird with paler greyish underparts and a long dark tail tipped white at corners. Dark eyeline with pale supercilium, slender slightly decurved black bill, dark legs.
chipen2: Medium penguin with black back and white underparts; white face crossed by a thin black line (chinstrap) running under the chin. Black cap, black bill, pinkish legs and feet.
chipig2: Large dark pigeon with purplish-maroon head and breast, grey back and belly; broad pale band across the nape edged with iridescent green. Dark bill, reddish legs.
chirav: Large all-black raven with a glossy purplish sheen; heavy black bill with nasal bristles covering more than half its length. White bases to neck feathers show only when ruffled; black legs and feet.
chirub1: Small chat-like bird, brown above with a vivid red throat bordered by black and white framing; bold white supercilium and white submoustachial stripe. Bluish-grey breast band on male; pale belly, blackish bill, pinkish legs.
chispa: Small slim sparrow with rufous crown, white supercilium, and a black eyeline through the eye. Grey unstreaked face and underparts, brown streaked back; small dark bill, pinkish legs.
chiswa1: Small swallow, glossy blue-black above and clean white below, with a white rump contrasting the dark back and slightly forked tail. Small black bill, dark legs.
chiswi: Small sooty grey-brown swift with paler greyish throat; long narrow curved wings and a short stubby squared tail. Cigar-shaped body, tiny black bill, dark legs.
chithr1: Plain dark sooty-grey to brownish-grey thrush, uniformly coloured above and below with a slightly paler throat; bright yellow-orange bill, yellow eye-ring, and yellow-orange legs.
chithr2: Olive-brown thrush above with heavily black-spotted whitish underparts; bold whitish supercilium and dark-bordered pale ear patch, two pale wingbars. Yellowish bill, pinkish legs.
chitin1: Plump partridge-like tinamou, mottled grey-brown above with fine dark barring and pale streaks; buff-grey underparts finely barred. Small head, slender decurved bill, grey legs, very short tail.
chivir1: Small greenish vireo, olive above and pale yellowish-white below; faint pale supercilium, dark eyeline, and reddish eye. Greenish-yellow flanks, stout grey hooked bill, grey legs.
chiwed1: Slim brown-grey bird with a pointed crest, plain greyish-brown plumage paler below; faint whitish throat. Long dark tail tipped white, dark bill, dark legs.
chiwed2: Slim grey-brown crested bird, paler greyish below with subtle dark streaking on breast; whitish throat. Long tail with white tips, dark bill, dark legs.
chnant1: Plump round antpitta, dark slaty-grey overall with a chestnut nape patch and brownish wings; whitish throat scaled with grey, pale crescent below eye. Stout dark bill, long pinkish legs, nearly tailless.
chobla1: Glossy black blackbird with a faint bluish sheen, sturdy build; pointed conical black bill and dark eye. Distinctive grooved fluffy feathers at base of bill; black legs.
chopoo1: Greyish-brown nightjar with intricate dark vermiculation; pale whitish throat band and a white-spotted scapular line. Large dark eyes, tiny bill with wide gape, short legs.
chospi2: Rufous-and-buff spinetail with a rufous crown and wings, streaked back; bold black throat patch streaked white, buffy-yellow underparts. Very long graduated tail, dark bill, pale legs.
chotap1: Small dark blackish-grey tapaculo, slightly paler grey below with brownish flanks and rump; short cocked tail. Stubby black bill, pinkish legs; skulking mouse-like shape.
chotou1: Large black toucan with white throat and yellow upper breast bordered by a thin red band; red undertail coverts. Huge bicoloured bill, mostly black with a yellow upper ridge; blue skin around eye, grey-blue legs.
chotyr1: Tiny olive tyrannulet, greenish above with pale yellowish underparts and a whitish throat; faint pale eyering and lores. Yellow edges on wing feathers, short dark bill, dark legs.
chovir1: Small bright greenish vireo, yellow-green above and yellow below; bold yellow spectacles (eyering plus loral stripe) and two pale wingbars. Stout grey bill, grey legs.
chowch1: Large dark brown ground bird with a stout body; blackish head and breast in male, rufous-brown breast in female, both with a bold white throat patch. Pale eye, strong dark bill, sturdy legs.
chpher1: Stocky heron, deep reddish-chestnut head, neck and breast over a slaty-grey back in breeding plumage; pure white wings, belly and tail. Yellow bill tipped dark, greenish-yellow legs.
chptit1: Tiny grey penduline-tit, grey-brown above and pale buff-white below; black mask through eye, pale grey crown. Sharp conical grey bill, short tail, dark legs.
chrbab1: Brown babbler, rufous-brown above with a chestnut rump; whitish throat and breast spotted and streaked with black. Dark crown, pale eye, dark bill, sturdy legs.
chrcha1: Robin-chat with slate-grey back and wings, bright orange face, throat, breast and belly; orange extends over the whole underparts with no black mask. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
chrshe: Small all-dark sooty-brown shearwater, uniformly chocolate-brown above and below with slightly paler underwing; slender dark hooked bill, dark legs, short rounded tail.
chrtho1: Tiny grey-brown thornbill, pale greyish below with a bright chestnut rump; finely scalloped pale forehead, creamy-white eye. Short dark bill, dark legs, short dark tail.
chrwoo1: Olive-brown woodcreeper, rufous wings and chestnut rump and tail; head and breast boldly streaked with buff teardrop spots. Long straight pale horn-coloured bill, greyish legs.
chsant1: Tiny antwren, greenish-olive above with a chestnut shoulder patch and yellow rump; greyish-yellow underparts, dull olive face. Short thin black bill, pale legs.
chspet1: Small sparrow-like finch, plain grey-brown above and pale grey below; male shows a bright yellow throat spot and chestnut shoulder patch. Stout conical bill, pale legs.
chswar: Warbler with bright yellow-green crown, white face and underparts, and bold chestnut streaks down the flanks; black eyeline and moustache. Greenish back with yellow-edged wingbars, dark bill, pale legs.
chtant1: Small antwren, brown above with a checkered black-and-white throat; buffy-cinnamon belly and breast. Greyish face, short dark bill, pale legs; rounded skulking shape.
chtant2: Small antbird, warm brown above with a chestnut tail; grey face and breast, paler belly. Female warmer brown below. Short black bill, pale legs, short cocked tail.
chtapa3: Small greyish apalis, grey above and paler grey below with a chestnut throat patch; red eye. Long graduated tail often cocked, thin black bill, pinkish legs.
chtmin1: Colourful babbler with rufous-chestnut crown, olive-grey back, and yellow underparts; black-and-yellow streaked throat, bright chestnut-and-yellow wing panels. Long graduated tail, small dark bill, pinkish legs.
chtsee1: Small finch, greyish-brown above with a chestnut throat patch and rufous rump; whitish belly, dusky breast. Stubby conical greyish bill, dark legs.
chtspi1: Rufous-and-grey spinetail with a chestnut crown and wings, grey-brown back; chestnut throat patch, greyish underparts. Long pointed graduated tail, dark bill, pale legs.
chttou3: Green toucanet, mostly bright green with a chestnut-tipped tail and chestnut undertail; blue-grey throat. Large bill, blackish with a pale yellow upper ridge; dark legs.
chtwoo1: Greenish woodpecker, olive-green back and wings with chestnut-edged flight feathers; yellow nape crest, finely checkered black-and-white throat and breast. Pale bill, greyish legs.
chucis1: Small warbler-like cisticola, rufous-brown crown and warm brown back; buffy underparts paler on the throat. Plain unstreaked back, short cocked tail, thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
chucis2: Small cisticola, rufous crown contrasting greyish-brown streaked back; pale buff-white underparts. Faint pale eyering, short tail, thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
chukar: Plump grey-brown partridge with buff underparts; bold black band crossing the forehead, through the eyes and encircling the cream throat. Black-and-chestnut barred flanks, red bill, red legs.
chutap1: Dark tapaculo, slaty-grey above with a bright rufous-orange throat and breast; greyish belly barred buff, brown flanks. Short cocked tail, dark bill, pinkish-grey legs.
chutap2: Small dark grey tapaculo, uniform slaty-grey with brownish flanks and rump finely barred; short cocked tail. Stubby black bill, brownish legs; skulking shape.
chvcon1: Small conebill, male deep blue above with a chestnut vent and white wing patch; pale bluish-grey underparts. Slender pointed black bill, dark legs.
chvnut1: Small grey nuthatch, blue-grey above with a black eyestripe and white throat; buff underparts with a chestnut vent and flanks. Straight pointed grey bill, greyish legs.
chwbab1: Small babbler with rufous-chestnut wings and tail contrasting with grey head and olive-brown back; underparts dull greyish-white. Note the bluish bare skin around the eye, short black bill and pinkish legs.
chwcha1: Large slim chachalaca with grey-brown body, rufous-chestnut primaries showing in flight, and a long broad olive-brown tail tipped pale. Small grey head, bare reddish facial skin, dark bill, greyish legs.
chwcin1: Brown ovenbird with whitish belly and throat, buff supercilium, streaked breast, and rufous-chestnut wing patch visible in flight. Dark brown back, dark slightly decurved bill, dark legs.
chwcuc1: Slender crested cuckoo, glossy black above with a long graduated black tail, bold white nuchal collar, rufous-chestnut wings, and warm orange-buff throat and breast fading to white belly. Black bill, dark crest.
chweye1: Small chunky wattle-eye; male glossy black above with deep chestnut throat and breast and black belly, female duller chestnut. Bold fleshy turquoise-blue wattle and eye-ring, short black bill, dark legs.
chwfog1: Olive-brown foliage-gleaner with rich rufous-chestnut wings, crown and tail contrasting with buffy-streaked throat and breast and dull olive underparts. Buff supercilium, straight pale-based bill, greyish legs.
chwhoo1: Stout furnariid with streaked buff-and-brown head and breast, plain olive-brown back, and bright rufous-chestnut wings and tail. Heavy slightly upturned hook-tipped pale bill; greyish legs.
chwqua1: Plump round wood-quail with deep chestnut-rufous underparts, dark brown finely marked upperparts, and a chestnut crown. Bare red orbital skin around the eye, short stout dark bill, dark legs.
chwwid: Large cryptic nightjar mottled rufous, grey-brown and black, blending like bark; warm buff throat band, rounded long-tailed shape, very large dark eyes and tiny bill set in a broad flat head. Dark legs.
chyfin1: Distinctive yellow-finch with pale lead-grey crown, nape, back and flanks contrasting sharply with bright lemon-yellow face, throat and central underparts. Short conical greyish bill, pinkish legs.
cibatt1: Medium flycatcher-like bird, olive-brown above with a rufous rump and tail; underparts bright lemon-yellow, washed olive on breast. Pale staring eye, stout slightly hooked pinkish bill, greyish legs.
cibbun1: Bunting with bold black-and-white striped head pattern and cinnamon-rufous breast, belly and back. Grey throat, streaked brownish wings. Pinkish conical bill, pinkish legs.
cibflo1: Small flowerpiercer; male blue-grey above with rich cinnamon-rufous underparts and a black mask; female duller olive-grey above, buffy below. Short upturned hook-tipped black bill, dark legs.
cibkin1: Compact kingfisher with deep blue-violet upperparts and a broad cinnamon-buff band across the lower breast and belly; buff collar and underparts. Heavy black-and-orange bill, dark legs.
cibspi1: Plain greyish-brown spinetail with cinereous-grey breast and face, rufous wing patch and crown, and a long graduated brown tail. Dull greyish underparts, thin dark bill, greyish legs.
cibwar1: Warm cinnamon-brown bracken-warbler, rich rufous-brown above with slightly paler tawny throat and breast; faint pale supercilium, broad rounded brown tail. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
cicada1: Slim cuckooshrike; male uniformly dark slaty-grey with black face mask around the bill and blackish wings; female barred grey and buff below. Slender dark bill, dark legs.
cicspa1: Tiny flat-headed spadebill, olive-brown above with a cinnamon-rufous crown patch and face, whitish throat and pale yellowish-buff underparts. Very broad flat blackish bill, pale legs.
ciftyr1: Small olive-green tyrannulet with a cinnamon-rufous forecrown, lores and eye-ring, grey crown, and pale cinnamon-buff cheeks bordered by a dusky band; yellow underparts with olive streaking, two pale wingbars. Thin dark bill.
cihpig1: Plump green-pigeon; male has cinnamon-rufous head and upper breast, green back and yellow-green underparts, maroon wing patch and grey nape. Pale bluish bill, reddish legs. Female duller green-headed.
cinant1: Medium antshrike; male uniform cinereous slate-grey with a concealed white interscapular patch and slightly paler grey underparts; female greyer-olive. Stout hook-tipped black bill, dark legs.
cinatt1: Bright rufous-cinnamon bird, warm rufous above and on wings and tail, paler cinnamon-buff below; pale eye and slightly hooked pinkish-horn bill. Greyish legs, upright stance.
cinbec1: Plump becard, uniformly warm cinnamon-rufous above with rufous wings and tail and buffy-cinnamon underparts; paler buff lores. Stout black bill, dark legs.
cinbec2: Small becard; male grey above with blackish cap, whitish underparts and grey wings edged paler; female warm rufous above with buffy underparts. Stout dark bill, greyish legs.
cinbit1: Small rufous-cinnamon bittern, uniformly bright cinnamon above and buffy below with faint streaking on the foreneck; rounded wings plain rufous. Long yellowish bill, greenish-yellow legs.
cinbul1: Slim bulbul with grey upperparts, paler grey head and whitish underparts; brownish wings edged rufous. Slight crest, dark bill, dark legs.
cinbun1: Plain ashy-grey bunting, grey-brown above with greyish head and breast, whitish belly and yellowish throat; pale eye-ring. Pinkish conical bill, pinkish legs.
cincon1: Small warbler-like conebill, grey above and pale buffy-cinnamon below with a paler buff supercilium and a small rufous forecrown patch. Thin pointed black bill, dark legs.
cinfly2: Compact flycatcher, dark olive-brown above with a hidden yellow crown patch and bright cinnamon-rufous underparts; rufous edges to wings and tail, two cinnamon wingbars. Small dark bill, dark legs.
cinhao1: Small hawk-owl largely chestnut-rufous, with an entirely rufous head, white markings on the wings and a whitish mottled belly; long tail and pointed wings. Large yellow eyes, pale bill, yellowish feet.
cinhum1: Medium hummingbird with bronze-green upperparts and entirely rich cinnamon-rufous underparts and tail. Straight reddish bill tipped black, dark legs.
cinmat1: Tiny stub-tailed flycatcher, rufous-cinnamon above and on the short tail, paler cinnamon-buff below, with a grey crown and a concealed orange crown patch. Small dark bill, pale legs.
cinmou1: Plain grey mourner, uniformly cinereous-grey overall, slightly paler below, with two faint pale-tipped wingbars and partly concealed orange-tufted feathers on the flanks. Stout dark bill, dark legs.
cinsco1: Small eared screech-owl, warm cinnamon-brown overall with fine darker vermiculations and streaking, indistinct facial disc rim and short ear tufts. Cinnamon-toned underparts, yellow-brown eyes, pale bill.
cintan1: Tanager with pale bluish-grey body, a rich rufous-chestnut crown and nape, and a black face and throat. Greyish back, paler grey underparts, stout black bill, dark legs.
cintea: Dabbling duck; breeding male deep cinnamon-rufous overall with red eyes, blackish back and a powder-blue forewing patch. Female mottled brown. Long blackish spatulate bill, yellowish legs.
cintin1: Plump ground tinamou, uniformly dark sooty cinereous-grey overall, slightly browner on the back, with a rounded body and almost no visible tail. Reddish-grey bill, reddish legs.
cinwoo1: Cinnamon-rufous woodpecker with a bushy rufous crest, plain rich cinnamon upperparts and wings, and black scaling or barring on the buffy underparts and back. Pale greenish bill, greyish legs.
cirtro1: Trogon; male has a dark slaty-grey head and breast, deep crimson belly, cinnamon-brown back and a cinnamon-rufous rump; blue bare orbital skin. Female browner. Stout pale bill, dark legs.
citcaf1: Small flycatcher with grey head and breast, bright olive-yellow back and yellow underparts; bold white eye-ring. Broad flat dark bill, dark legs.
cither1: Hermit hummingbird, bronzy-green above with a cinnamon-buff throat, breast and underparts and a buff rump; long graduated white-tipped tail. Long decurved bill with reddish lower mandible.
citspa1: Sparrow with grey head, rufous crown stripe and rufous eyeline, plain grey-brown back, whitish underparts and a long cinnamon-rufous tail. Stout greyish conical bill, pinkish legs.
cittro1: Trogon; male has a glossy green back and breast, lemon-yellow belly, blue-grey wings finely vermiculated, and a pale whitish staring eye. Yellow bill, pale blue-grey lower tail. Female greyer.
citwar1: Olive-yellow warbler, bright yellow-olive above and rich lemon-yellow below, with a bold golden-yellow supercilium and dusky eyeline; greyish crown wash. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
citwoo1: Stout woodcreeper, warm cinnamon-brown overall with a rufous-chestnut rump, wings and tail and a buffy-streaked cinnamon throat and breast. Straight pale greenish-horn bill, greyish legs.
civpih1: Large plain grey piha, uniformly soft cinereous-grey overall, slightly paler below, with rufous-cinnamon undertail coverts. Stout broad blackish bill, dark legs; upright bulbous-headed shape.
clagre: Large slender black-and-white grebe with a long thin neck; black cap that stops above the bright orange-red eye, white face and foreneck. Long bright orange-yellow dagger bill, lobed greenish feet.
clalew1: Small greenish leaf warbler, olive-green above and whitish below, with a bold yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, and two pale yellowish wingbars; greyish crown with faint pale crown-stripe. Thin pale-based bill, pale legs.
clanut: Stocky pale grey corvid with black wings showing large white trailing-edge patches and a white-sided black tail. Long pointed black bill, black legs.
clarai11: Large grey-brown rail with a long slightly decurved bill, greyish cheeks, cinnamon-buff breast, and black-and-white barred flanks. Brownish streaked back, orange-based bill, dull greyish legs.
clcrob: Plain medium thrush with uniform warm olive-brown upperparts and slightly paler tawny-buff underparts, faint dark throat streaking. Greenish-yellow bill, reddish-brown eye, and pinkish-gray legs. Lacks any bold markings.
clcspa: Small pale sparrow with crisply streaked brown back, buffy unstreaked breast, and clean gray nape. Boldly marked face: brown crown with pale central stripe, broad buff supercilium, gray cheek patch outlined dark, and dark moustachial line. Pinkish bill and legs.
clifly1: Stocky flycatcher resembling a swallow; dark sooty-brown head and upperparts contrasting with bright rufous-cinnamon wing patches, rump, and tail base. Underparts streaked rufous and dusky. Short black bill, broad-based; dark legs.
clishb1: Plump shrike-like babbler; male has gray crown, white supercilium, black eyestripe, olive-green back, and white throat and underparts. Wings show chestnut and black with white markings. Rufous lower back; stout bluish-gray hooked bill.
cliswa: Compact swallow with squarish tail, steel-blue crown and back, pale buff rump, and chestnut face with dark throat patch. Pale buffy-white forehead, whitish underparts. Short black bill and dark legs.
clocis1: Tiny short-tailed cisticola; richly streaked black-and-buff crown and back, plain buffy-white underparts. Streaked rump, short tail tipped pale. Pinkish bill, pale pinkish legs; very small and rounded.
clopyo1: Small dark pygmy-owl; rich rufous-brown to chocolate upperparts finely spotted whitish, white-and-brown barred underparts with streaked flanks. Pale eyebrows, yellow eyes, two black nape false-eye spots. Yellowish bill and feet.
clrwar1: Large plain warbler with warm olive-brown upperparts and buffy-white underparts, washed brown on flanks. Long pale supercilium, pale throat, long sloping forehead. Long pointed dark bill, pale lower mandible; grayish legs.
clwman1: Tiny stocky manakin; male brilliant deep red on head, breast, and back, with brown-and-white wings showing thickened club-shaped secondaries, and brown belly. Pale eye, short blackish bill, dark legs.
cobrob1: Small robin-chat; male slate-blue head and upperparts with bold white supercilium, bright orange-rufous throat, breast, and flanks, white belly. Blackish wings and tail. Thin black bill, dark legs.
cobscb1: Scimitar-babbler with black crown and nape, rufous-brown back, white throat and breast, and rufous flanks and belly. Long decurved orange-red bill is the key feature; dark legs, dark face.
cobtan1: Small olive bush-tanager; olive-green upperparts, yellowish breast band fading to gray belly, gray-brown head with a white spot or pale crescent behind the eye. Dark bill, pinkish-gray legs.
cocant1: Antshrike; male wholly glossy blue-black, slightly paler below, with a striking pale yellowish-white eye contrasting against black plumage. Stout black hooked bill, dark gray legs.
cocfin2: Small finch; male pied with black crown forming a short pointed crest, black face and throat, white cheeks and underparts, gray-brown back. Stubby pinkish conical bill, pale legs.
cocher1: Large heron with black crown and hindneck, white face and foreneck, gray back and wings, and white underparts with black flank stripe. Long yellowish dagger bill, dark legs; tall and slender.
cocjac2: Slender jacamar; iridescent coppery-green head, back, and breast, rufous belly, white throat patch (male). Long straight needle-like black bill, short legs; glittering metallic plumage.
cocthr1: Uniform warm rufous-brown thrush, slightly paler cinnamon below, with faint pale throat streaking and a thin pale eye-ring. Dark bill, pinkish-brown legs; plain overall.
cocwoo1: Medium woodcreeper; warm brown overall with rufous wings, rump, and tail, buffy streaking on head, nape, and breast over olive-brown. Long, slightly decurved pale horn bill; grayish legs.
codfin1: Plump finch; mostly blue-gray with white throat and central belly stripe, contrasting chestnut flanks and undertail. Short conical pale bill, dark legs; clean tricolored look.
coffal1: Large long-tailed forest-falcon; blackish above, white below, with a pale collar across the nape and barred long tail with white bands. Bare yellow facial skin, yellow legs, hooked bill.
cogdov: Tiny short-tailed ground dove; sandy gray-brown with scaly-spotted breast and crown, dark spots on wing coverts, rufous primaries flashing in flight. Pinkish bill with dark tip, pink legs.
cohcuc1: Slim hawk-like cuckoo; ashy-gray head and upperparts, whitish underparts with rufous wash and dark barring on belly, broad dark bands on long gray tail. Yellow eye-ring, yellow legs, downcurved bill.
colant2: Antshrike; male has black crown and rear crest, chestnut-brown back and wings with white spotting, and white face, collar, and underparts with black throat patch. Pale eye, stout black hooked bill.
colara2: Small toucan with black head and breast, red-and-black breast band, yellow belly, olive-green back, red rump. Large bicolored bill, pale yellow above and dark below with serrated edge. Bare red facial skin.
colbab1: Plain babbler with pale buffy-brown upperparts, whitish underparts, and a distinctive whitish head with a narrow black collar across the upper breast. Stout pale yellowish bill, sturdy legs.
colcha1: Large brown chachalaca with grayish head, olive-brown body, and rufous belly and undertail; pale-tipped tail feathers. Bare reddish throat skin, dark bill, gray legs; long-tailed and slender.
colcre1: Small crescentchest; gray crown and face, black-and-white facial striping, rufous nape, olive-brown back, and a black crescent breast band across buffy-white underparts. Slender dark bill, pale legs.
coleto1: Stocky starling with silvery-gray to whitish body, blackish wings and tail, and a large bare pinkish facial mask around the eyes. Short dark bill, dark legs; distinctive naked face.
colfin1: Stout bulbul-like finchbill; olive-green body, gray head with bushy black-bordered face and white throat-cheek markings, dark crest. Short thick ivory conical bill, pinkish legs.
colgna1: Tiny long-tailed gnatwren; warm brown above, whitish below, with a bold black-and-white striped face and a black crescent collar across the breast. Long thin black bill, pale legs.
colgro1: Large heavy-billed grosbeak; male has black head, olive-yellow back and underparts, black wings and tail, and yellow nape. Massive pale grayish conical bill; pinkish legs.
colkin1: Kingfisher with turquoise-blue upperparts and wings, white underparts and broad white collar, and a dusky line through the eye. Large heavy black bill, dark legs.
colkin9: Mangrove kingfisher with greenish-blue upperparts, buffy-white underparts and collar, dark eye-stripe. Heavy black bill, dark legs; very similar to Collared Kingfisher but duller, buff-tinged.
colowl1: Tiny owlet; rufous-brown to gray-brown finely barred upperparts, white throat and barred underparts, low-contrast face with pale eyebrows and yellow eyes, two black nape false-eyes. Yellow bill and feet.
colplo1: Small slim plover; sandy-brown crown and upperparts, white forehead and underparts, a thin black breast band, and rufous patches on the nape and forecrown. Thin black bill, pinkish legs.
colpuf1: Plump puffbird; rufous-orange crown and upperparts, white underparts crossed by a single black breast band, white throat. Large heavy black hooked bill, red eye, dark legs.
colred1: Small warbler; slate-gray upperparts and throat, bright yellow underparts, a chestnut crown patch, and a complete white eye-ring. Black tail with white outer feathers; thin black bill, dark legs.
colspa1: Slim long-legged hawk; gray upperparts, finely rufous-barred white underparts, and a paler gray head. Yellow eye, yellow cere and long yellow legs; rounded tail with dark bands.
colsun2: Tiny sunbird; male metallic green head, back, throat, and upper breast, with a violet breast band and yellow belly. Short decurved black bill, dark legs; glittering iridescent plumage.
coltow1: Towhee with rufous-chestnut crown and nape, olive-green back, black face mask, white throat with black scaling, and grayish underparts. Stout dark conical bill, pinkish legs.
coltro1: Trogon; male has metallic green head, back, and breast, bright red belly separated by a white breast band, and finely white-barred black-and-white undertail. Yellow bill, orange eye-ring, dark legs.
colwar: Plain warbler; grayish-olive upperparts, gray head, whitish-gray underparts with tawny-buff undertail coverts, white eye-ring, and a rufous wash on the crown. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
combab3: Slim long-tailed babbler; pale sandy gray-brown above with diffuse streaking, whitish below, plain face with pale eye. Long graduated tail, slender yellowish bill, pale legs.
comblh1: Large bulky dark hawk; uniform blackish-slate plumage, broad wings, and a short tail with a single broad white band and white tip. Yellow cere and bare yellow legs; heavy hooked bill.
combri2: Robust bulbul; olive-brown above, paler grayish-white below, with a contrasting bright rufous-chestnut tail and rump, and bare bluish skin around the eye. Stout pale bill, sturdy legs.
combro1: Plump ground-pigeon; warm grayish-brown with a pale buff forehead, iridescent green-and-bronze wing patches edged buff, and faint scaling. Pinkish breast, dark bill, reddish legs.
combuz6: Medium broad-winged buzzard; brown above, whitish below with variable brown barring and a dark belly band, pale throat. Barred tail, yellow cere and legs; plumage variable from pale to dark.
comfla1: Golden-backed woodpecker; bright golden-yellow back and wings, black-and-white striped face and neck, red crown and crest (male), white underparts with black scaling. Pale bill, three-toed grayish feet.
comgal1: Slate-gray waterhen with brownish back, white flank stripe, white undertail patches, and a bright red frontal shield and red bill tipped yellow. Long greenish-yellow legs with red garter.
comgon1: Striking bush-shrike; black upperparts, wings, and tail, with a golden-yellow crown and brilliant scarlet-red throat and underparts. Black bill, dark legs; bold red-yellow-black pattern.
comgra: Medium blackbird with long, keel-shaped tail and pale yellow eye. Male glossy black overall with iridescent bronze body and blue-purple sheen on the head; female smaller and duller. Long pointed black bill and black legs.
comior1: Small warbler-like bird with greenish-yellow upperparts and bright yellow underparts. Breeding male has a black cap and black tail with two bold white wing bars; bushy white flank plumes when displaying. Bluish-grey bill and legs.
comjer1: Tiny, slender warbler-like bird with olive-green upperparts and pale yellow underparts. Faint pale supercilium, fine pointed dark bill and a long-ish tail. Pale legs; overall plain and small.
commin1: Small terrestrial ovenbird, drab sandy-brown above with paler underparts and faint dusky streaking on the breast. Shows a buffy supercilium, rufous patch in the wing visible in flight, and dark band on the tail tip. Slender dark bill, pale legs.
comnew1: Small grey-brown vireo-like bird, plain greyish above and pale buffy-grey below with a slightly rufous-tinged tail. Indistinct face pattern, dark eye, short straight blackish bill and dark legs.
comnig: Slim nightjar with long pointed wings showing a bold white bar across the primaries. Cryptic mottled grey-brown plumage above; barred underparts. Male has a white throat patch and white subterminal tail band. Tiny dark bill, very short legs.
compau: Large long-tailed nightjar, cryptically mottled grey-brown and rufous with a buffy collar. In flight shows a white wing band and broad white outer tail feathers (male). Dark bill, short legs; rounded head with large dark eyes.
compoo: Small, short-tailed nightjar with cryptic mottled grey-brown plumage. White throat band contrasts with dark breast; rounded wings without a white wing bar. Small white tail corners, tiny dark bill, very short legs.
compot1: Large grey-brown nightjar-like bird with cryptic bark-mimic plumage, finely mottled and streaked grey, brown and black. Huge head with very large dark eyes, broad gape and short hooked bill; long tail. Pale-grey legs, upright posture.
comtai1: Tiny long-tailed warbler with green upperparts and whitish underparts. Rufous-orange crown, whitish supercilium and face; the long tail is often cocked, with elongated central feathers in breeding males. Slender curved pinkish bill, pinkish legs.
comwea1: Chunky, short-tailed weaver with a heavy bill. Breeding male has a yellow crown and breast with a black face mask and black-and-tawny streaked upperparts. Compact rounded body; stout pale bill, pinkish legs.
comwoo1: Plain grey-brown shrike-like bird, brownish-grey above and paler buffy-grey below. Pale whitish supercilium contrasting with a darker eye-line; whitish-edged tail. Stout slightly hooked dark-grey bill and grey legs.
comyel: Small warbler with olive-green upperparts and yellow throat and breast. Male has a broad black face mask bordered above by a whitish band; whitish belly. Female plainer, lacking the mask. Thin pointed dark bill, pinkish legs.
conwar: Stocky ground warbler, olive-brown above and pale yellow below with a grey hood covering the head and breast. Bold complete white eye-ring stands out against the grey. Pinkish bill and pale pinkish legs; long undertail coverts.
cooela1: Small drab flycatcher, greyish-brown above and pale with a yellowish belly. Two pale wing bars and a small bushy crest that may show concealed white. Faint eye-ring, short dark bill, dark legs.
coohaw: Medium accipiter with blue-grey upperparts, dark cap, and rufous-barred whitish underparts. Long banded grey-and-blackish tail with a rounded, white-tipped end; rufous cheeks. Yellow eyes (red in adults), yellow legs and cere, hooked dark bill.
coopet: Small gadfly petrel, grey above with a darker M-pattern across the wings and a dark cap. Underparts and underwings largely white; white forehead. Slender black bill, pinkish legs with dark webbing.
copbar1: Small plump green barbet with a heavy pale bill. Bright crimson forehead and throat patch, yellow eye-ring and yellow patches around the face; streaked yellow-green underparts. Short tail; greenish legs.
copgoo1: Tiny goose-like duck. Male white-headed with a dark greenish crown, dark breast band, glossy green back and white face; shows a white wing patch in flight. Female duller with a dark eye-line. Short dark bill, dark legs.
copkin1: Striking kingfisher with brilliant blue crown, back and wings, white underparts and very long white racket-tipped central tail streamers. Bright red bill and red legs; large head, compact body.
copowl1: Tiny owl, greyish-brown above with pale spotting and two black false-eye spots on the nape. Whitish underparts streaked brown; pale eyebrows and a finely barred tail. Yellow eyes, yellow bill, feathered yellowish legs.
copsun2: Small sunbird; breeding male iridescent coppery-purple to violet overall, glittering green-bronze on the head, with a long decurved black bill. Female olive-green above and yellowish below. Blackish legs; slim build.
copthr1: Slim, long-tailed thrush, warm rufous-brown above with a contrasting grey crown and nape. Whitish throat and belly with a bold black malar streak forming a collar across the breast. Long rufous tail; slender dark bill, pale legs.
coqcou1: Medium cuckoo-relative, brownish above with a grey head and rufous-buff underparts. Bare blue-and-purple skin around the eye; pale buffy supercilium. Long graduated tail, stout slightly decurved blackish bill, grey legs.
corcan1: Small streaky brown ovenbird, drab grey-brown above with faint streaking and paler buffy underparts. Indistinct pale supercilium and a slightly rufous tinge in the wings and tail. Slender dark bill, pale legs.
corhum1: Small hummingbird, glittering green above and on the throat and breast, with a contrasting coppery-bronze rump and tail. Whitish belly; the green throat shines in good light. Straight black bill, dark legs.
cornut1: Small nuthatch, blue-grey above and pale buffy-grey below. Male has a black crown and a black eye-stripe separated by a bold white supercilium; female has a greyer crown. Short straight dark bill, dark legs.
corpip1: Streaky brown pipit, heavily dark-streaked above with prominent pale braces (back stripes) and a buffy, streaked breast. Whitish belly and white outer tail feathers; long hind claw. Thin pointed bill, pale pinkish legs.
corwre1: Boldly patterned wren with rich rufous-brown upperparts and a black-and-white streaked face. Whitish throat and breast, buffy belly, and a black-barred tail. Long slightly decurved dark bill, greyish legs.
cosbil1: Slender glossy black hoopoe-relative with strongly iridescent blue-green sheen on the body and wings. Very long graduated tail; long, thin, strongly decurved black bill. Short blackish legs.
coshum: Tiny hummingbird, green above and whitish below. Male has a brilliant violet-purple crown and throat (gorget) with elongated flaring purple feathers at the sides. Female plain green above, pale below. Short straight black bill.
cosowl1: Medium scops-owl, greyish-brown finely vermiculated above with a pale nuchal collar. Buffy underparts with dark streaks and barring; prominent ear tufts. Dark-rimmed facial disc, orange-brown eyes, pale bill, feathered legs.
cosswa1: Large all-white swan-like waterbird with black wingtips visible in flight. Distinctively goose-like with a bright red-orange bill and red-orange legs; pale eye. Long neck held slightly straight.
cotfly1: Tiny tyrant flycatcher with a black crown and upperparts, contrasting bright yellow underparts and a long black tail often cocked. Yellowish wing edgings; large dark eye. Flat black bill, dark legs.
cotsun2: Slim sunbird; breeding male iridescent green-and-coppery with a glittering green crown, dark coppery-red throat and purple-blue lower throat band. Female greyish-olive above, yellowish below. Long decurved black bill, dark legs.
coukin: Large flycatcher, grey head with a darker mask, olive-green back, and bright yellow underparts shading to whitish throat. Brownish wings and notched brown tail. Heavy thick black bill, dark legs.
cowpar1: Small green parakeet, mostly bright grass-green with a contrasting cobalt-blue patch in the primaries (wing), visible especially in flight. Pale orange-buff patch on the lower belly/chin area; horn-coloured bill, pinkish legs.
cowscj1: Crestless jay with deep blue head, wings and tail, a contrasting greyish-brown back patch, and white throat bordered by a partial blue breast band. Whitish underparts; bold whitish eyebrow. Stout black bill, black legs.
cozvir1: Stocky vireo with chestnut-brown crown, nape and ear coverts and chestnut-brown upperparts. Whitish lores and bold white eye-ring form spectacles; off-white underparts with chestnut-brown sides and two pale wing bars. Stout greyish bill, grey legs.
crachi1: Stocky ovenbird, dark brown above with a rufous rump, whitish supercilium and whitish cheeks. Throat whitish, breast smoky grey, belly brown with rufous flanks; rufous wing band and mostly blackish tail. Blackish bill with paler base, dark legs.
crahaw: Slim dark grey raptor with very long yellow-orange legs. Plumage slate-grey overall with a bold single white band across the long black tail and white at the base; pale band visible in flight. Hooked black bill, yellow legs.
craplo1: Striking black-and-white wader, mostly white with a black back and black-streaked crown. Very heavy, thick, dagger-like black bill; long blue-grey legs. Large-headed, plover-like shape with white underwings.
cratan1: Bright red tanager-like bird with a prominent long scarlet crest. Body deep red with greyish flanks and belly; sexes similar, female slightly duller with a shorter crest. Stout blackish bill, dark legs.
crbant1: Small antwren, grey above with a black crown, bold whitish supercilium, and a thin black eye-line. Black wings with two white wing bars and white-tipped scapulars; creamy-white underparts with a cream-washed throat and breast. Thin dark bill, grey legs.
crbcan2: Small reddish-brown ovenbird, warm brown above with a contrasting rufous tail and rufous wing patches. Pale buffy underparts, whitish throat and a faint pale supercilium. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
crbdro1: Glossy black drongo with a strongly iridescent blue-green sheen. Stout crow-like bill; deeply forked tail with broadly splayed, slightly twisted outer feathers. Red eye, black legs.
crbfin1: Tiny finch-like bird; breeding male black above with a brilliant crimson-red crown stripe, throat and breast and a white belly. Female plain buffy-brown with paler underparts. Short conical pale bill, pinkish legs.
crbgna1: Tiny slender gnatcatcher, blue-grey above and creamy-buff to whitish below. Long blackish tail edged white; thin white eye-ring and a fine pointed dark bill. Dark legs; delicate active build.
crbgon1: Striking bush-shrike, glossy black above with a brilliant scarlet-crimson throat and underparts and a long black tail. Shows a white wing stripe. Heavy hooked black bill, blackish legs; bold red-and-black contrast.
crbpar1: Mostly green parakeet with a deep crimson-red belly and breast and blue in the flight feathers. Brownish-scaled ear coverts and a maroon-red tail underside. Dark horn-coloured bill, greyish legs.
crbsun2: Tiny sunbird; male glossy crimson-red back and head with iridescent green-blue crown and throat, yellow underparts. Slender decurved black bill, dark legs. Female olive above, yellowish below.
crbtan1: Stocky tanager; male brilliant scarlet head, breast and rump contrasting with velvety blue-black back, wings, belly and tail. Thick silvery-blue based black bill, dark legs.
crbthr1: Plain medium thrush, warm grey-brown above, pale creamy-buff belly and whitish throat with fine dark streaks; bright yellow bill and yellow eye-ring, pinkish legs.
crbwoo2: Large pale woodpecker; creamy-buff back and wings, blackish underparts; male with full red crest and head, white facial line. Long ivory-grey chisel bill, grey legs.
crbwoo5: Large black woodpecker with deep crimson belly and underparts, black-and-buff barred flanks; broad red crest, buff-and-black facial stripes. Pale stout bill, grey legs.
crbwoo6: Small pied woodpecker; black-and-white barred back and wings, whitish underparts with dark streaks, red crimson nape patch; male red crown, black-and-white face. Dark bill, greyish legs.
crcbab1: Small babbler, rufous-chestnut crown and warm brown upperparts, grey face, white throat bordered by black crescent across chest, buff-grey underparts. Short dark bill, pinkish legs.
crcgro: Heavy black-hooded finch-like bird; male slaty-black overall with deep red-pink crescent collar across upper breast and reddish wash; massive blackish conical bill, dark legs.
crcpuf1: Plump puffbird; brown above with pale scaling, white throat and breast crossed by a dark brown crescent band, buff streaked belly. Heavy hooked black bill, greyish legs.
crcspi1: Slim ovenbird; warm rufous wings and tail, creamy-buff crown and pale supercilium, greyish-brown back, buffy-white underparts. Slender dark bill, greyish legs.
crctan1: Velvety black tanager with vivid scarlet-red hood, nape and rump forming a broad collar; jet-black wings, belly and tail. Pale silvery-blue based bill, dark legs.
crcwar: Small warbler; grey crown and nape, bright olive-green back, white supercilium, yellow underparts with a chestnut crescent patch on upper breast. Thin pointed bill, dark legs.
crcwoo1: Large black-and-white woodpecker; black back, white V-stripes on neck meeting on lower back, barred belly; male entirely red crested head. Pale ivory bill, grey legs.
crcwoo2: Striking pale woodpecker, entirely creamy-yellow to whitish body and head with full bushy crest, contrasting brown-black flight feathers; male red malar stripe. Pale bill, grey legs.
crebar1: Boldly patterned barbet; black-and-white speckled upperparts and erect crest, yellow-and-red face and underparts with black breast band, red vent. Heavy pale bill, grey legs.
crebec1: Large becard; male slaty-blackish above with glossy black crown and slight crest, paler grey underparts. Thick hooked dark bill, grey legs. Female rufous-brown.
crebel1: Plump grey-brown bird with white face bordered by black, black throat and breast band, raised dark crest with white forecrown; buff underparts. Stout dark bill, grey legs.
crebob3: Small round quail; rufous-brown mottled body, fine black-and-white spotting below; pointed buffy crest, white-and-black face pattern. Short dark bill, dull legs.
crebun1: Glossy blue-black bunting; male deep black with rufous-chestnut wings and tail and tall pointed crest. Conical pale bill, dark legs. Female streaky buff-brown, crested.
crecou1: Slim grey-blue cuckoo; bluish-grey head and crest, greenish-brown back, lilac breast, white belly, rufous undertail; bare blue-and-purple eye patch. Black bill, dark legs.
crecur2: Large blackish curassow, glossy black body with white-tipped tail and white belly; rounded crestless head with bright red-orange knobbed bill, grey-red legs.
credor1: Tiny tyrant; olive-brown above, bright yellow below, blackish spiky erect crest, faint pale wing markings. Short dark bill, dark legs.
credro1: Glossy black drongo with strongly forked tail and a curled crest of feathers over the forehead; deep red eye, black bill and legs.
creduc1: Brownish duck with mottled grey-brown body, dark spangled flanks, dark crown extending as a shaggy crest; dark eye-line, dull bill, grey legs; iridescent green-purple speculum.
creeag1: Large grey-brown eagle; pale grey head with prominent single pointed crest, grey-brown upperparts, finely barred whitish underparts; broad rounded wings, barred long tail. Black bill, yellow legs.
crefin1: Stocky bulbul-like bird; grey body, olive-green wings and tail, pointed greyish crest, dark face. Thick stubby pale-yellow bill, pinkish legs.
crefra2: Buff-brown francolin densely barred and streaked; bold white supercilium, dark eyeline, scaly streaked breast, plain buff belly. Slight crest, red legs, dark-tipped reddish bill.
cregal1: Dark grey tapaculo-like bird with bushy pointed crest, slaty-grey head and breast, brown back, rufous flanks and white belly. Short stout dark bill, strong pinkish legs.
cregos1: Medium hawk; grey-brown above, prominent short crest, whitish throat with dark central stripe, rufous-barred white underparts, barred tail. Hooked dark bill, yellow legs.
cregua1: Large brown guan; dark olive-brown body with white-streaked neck and breast, small bushy crest, bare red throat dewlap, red eye-skin. Dark bill, pinkish-red legs.
cregui3: Black guineafowl finely spotted white all over; bare blue-and-red face with curly black crest of feathers atop head. Short pale bill, dark grey legs.
crehon2: Slim dark honeyeater; slaty grey-black upperparts and breast, white-scaled flanks, bright yellow patches on wings and tail edges. Slender curved black bill, dark legs.
crehor1: Small rufous ovenbird; warm rufous-brown back, wings and tail, pale buff underparts, greyish crown forming a short crest, pale supercilium. Slim pale bill, pinkish legs.
crejay1: Brown crow-like bird with tall pointed brown crest, rufous-brown plumage, white half-collar on neck side, dark wings and tail. Stout black bill, dark legs.
