rbbeat1: Stocky large-headed bee-eater; mostly grass-green with a scarlet-red forehead and shaggy red beard streaking the lilac-and-buff throat and breast, buffy belly. Heavy slightly decurved blackish bill, greyish legs.
rbbmag: Striking long-tailed corvid; black head, neck and breast with a whitish nape patch, bright violet-blue back, wings and very long blue tail tipped white, and a whitish belly. Coral-red bill, red legs.
rbbtyr1: Robust flycatcher; greyish-brown head and back, contrasting bright rufous belly and undertail, and rufous wing-panels and tail edges visible in flight. White throat. Black bill, dark legs.
rbbwea1: Large bulky weaver, sooty-black overall with white flecking on the flanks and white feather bases showing on the wings. Heavy bright red bill, brownish legs. Robust, big-headed shape.
rbctyr1: Small chat-tyrant; dark grey-brown above with a white supercilium, rufous-orange breast band across whitish underparts, and rufous edges to the wing-coverts and tail. Thin black bill, dark legs.
rbdhor1: Small hornbill, dark blackish-brown above with a white belly, white spotting on the wing-coverts and a contrasting white-tipped tail. Stout red-and-cream casqued bill, dark legs.
rbifin1: Neat finch; grey head and breast with a bold black mask, bib and forehead, rufous back, wings and rump, white belly, and a black tail with white outer edges. Pointed bright yellow bill, orange-yellow legs, reddish-brown eye.
rbopar2: Spectacular bird-of-paradise; male has dark maroon-brown body, yellow mantle and back, an emerald-green face, yellow wash on the neck, and a fan of crimson-red flank plumes with two long curled blackish tail wires. Pale bluish bill.
rbptan1: Crisp pied tanager; glossy black head, throat, back and wings sharply contrasting with clean white underparts and white rump. Bright coral-red bill, dark legs.
rbsbab1: Slim long-tailed babbler; warm olive-brown above with a rufous crown, a long white supercilium and a dark eyeline, buffy-white throat and breast grading to olive flanks. Long decurved bright red bill, greyish legs.
rbsrob1: Slender ground-robin; brown above with a bold white supercilium, white-spotted wing-coverts, whitish underparts with fine dark streaking on the breast, and a rufous rump and tail tipped black-and-white. Black bill, pinkish legs.
rbwbab1: Chunky dark forest babbler; mostly dark brown with fine dark scaling on the upperparts, a whitish throat and a rusty-orange breast. Short straight dark bill, pinkish-brown legs, very short tail.
rbwfin2: Small warbling-finch; grey head and upperparts with a contrasting rusty-orange brow and face, yellowish-olive wash on the back, and pale yellowish underparts. Conical dark bill, pinkish legs.
rbwqua1: Plump rounded quail; dark brown above mottled black, with a rich rufous-orange breast and face, brown crown, and a bare reddish eye-ring. Dark belly. Short dark bill, greyish legs.
rcatan1: Medium tanager; male dull brownish-red overall, brighter rose-red on the throat and breast, with a flame-red crown patch bordered grey. Female olive-buff with a duller orange crest. Stout dark bill, greyish legs.
rcbfin1: Brushfinch; olive-green back and wings, blackish head with a bright rufous-chestnut crown, grey throat and breast, and yellowish belly. Conical black bill, dark legs.
rcfdov1: Plump colourful fruit-dove; mostly green with a soft grey head and breast, a rose-pink crown bordered yellow, an orange lower belly, and a yellow-tipped tail. Greenish-grey bill, purplish legs.
rcgspa1: Ground-sparrow; olive-brown upperparts, a rusty-red crown, a black-and-white face pattern with white throat, and clean greyish-white underparts. Stout dark bill, pinkish legs.
rcnthr1: Plain nightingale-thrush; uniform warm olive-brown above with a contrasting reddish-rufous crown, grey face and breast, and pale whitish belly. Orange bill and bold orange eye-ring, orange-pink legs.
rcqdov1: Plump terrestrial dove; rich rufous-chestnut crown and nape, slaty-grey face and breast with a pale facial stripe, brown upperparts and buffy belly. Dark bill, reddish legs.
rcrcha1: Striking robin-chat; bright orange-rufous crown, face, throat, breast and entire underparts, slaty blue-grey back and wings, and a rufous rump and tail. Dark bill, blackish legs.
rcsbab1: Large babbler with long, decurved pale bill and long tail. Olive-brown above, white throat and breast streaked dusky on flanks, with bold rufous-chestnut patches on the cheeks and sides of neck. Dull pinkish legs.
rctspi1: Tiny, slender furnariid with very long, narrow, pointed tail. Grey-brown above with rufous-chestnut crown, pale buffy throat and underparts, and faint streaking. Short fine dark bill and pale legs.
rcttyr1: Tiny tody-flycatcher with bright rufous-orange crown and nape, blackish face and back, and contrasting yellow throat and underparts. Dusky wings with pale edges, short flat black bill, dark legs.
rcweye1: Small flycatcher-like bird with glossy blue-black upperparts and head, white underparts, and a bright red fleshy wattle above the eye (male). White wing patch. Black bill and legs; female duller with chestnut throat.
rdjant1: Small slim antbird; male slate-grey overall with paler grey throat and whitish-tipped wing coverts forming faint marks; tail dark. Slender black bill, dark legs. Female browner with buffy underparts.
rebbla1: Stocky blackbird; male glossy black with vivid scarlet-red throat and breast and a thin red supercilium. Sharp pointed grey-black bill, dark legs. Female streaky brown with reddish wash on breast.
rebbus1: Stocky antbird with a distinctive heavy, upturned (recurved) blackish bill. Male sooty-black overall; female rufous-chestnut with greyer head. Dark legs.
rebbut2: Small quail-like buttonquail; warm rufous and buff above heavily spotted and barred black, with rufous-buff breast and flanks spotted black. Pale eye, short pale bill, pale legs; female brighter.
rebcha1: Small warbler-like bird; male slate-grey above with black face, white supercilium and white throat, bright rosy-red breast and belly, and white neck patch. Slim black bill, dark legs.
rebcou1: Large dark coua; deep blackish-slate to dark brown overall with paler grey-brown breast and a bare blue eye-patch. Heavy black bill, blackish legs.
rebeme1: Tiny hummingbird; male glittering emerald-green overall with deeply forked blue-black tail and a coral-red bill tipped black. Female greener above, greyish below.
rebfai1: Tiny long-tailed fairywren; breeding male glossy black with a bright crimson-red back/saddle patch and long cocked black tail. Fine black bill; female plain warm brown with paler underparts.
rebfin1: Brushfinch with olive-green upperparts, grey underparts, and a rufous-chestnut crown, ear-coverts and throat sides. Blackish face mask, stout dark bill, dark legs.
rebfir1: Small grass-finch; olive-brown above, pale grey below, with a vivid red brow/lores stripe and red rump and bill base. Cocked tail, pale grey face, dark legs.
rebfir2: Tiny finch; male rosy-red overall, slightly browner on wings and back, with fine white speckling on breast sides. Pinkish-red bill, pale legs; female grey-brown with red rump and red lores.
rebfra1: Large grey-brown spurfowl finely vermiculated and streaked overall, with whitish streaking below. Bare red skin around eye, bright red bill and red legs.
rebfru1: Plump cotinga; male olive-green above with black head and throat bordered by a broad red breast band, and yellow-and-black scaled belly. Stout dark bill, coral legs; female greener, scaled below.
rebgra1: Large slim glossy black grackle with a bright red-and-yellow bare eye patch and a striking scarlet-red lower belly and undertail. Pointed black bill, pale yellow eye, black legs.
rebhaw2: Variable buteo hawk; commonly white below with grey upperparts and a rufous-barred breast band, broad rounded wings and white tail with black subterminal band. Yellow cere and legs, dark hooked bill.
rebhor1: Slender hornbill with a long curved red bill, greyish-brown head and neck, white underparts, and blackish wings spotted white. Bare dark facial skin, blackish legs.
reblei: Small colorful babbler; olive-green above, yellow throat shading to orange-flushed breast, with red-and-yellow wing panel and forked tail. Bright red bill, yellowish eye-ring, pinkish legs.
rebmac2: Medium-large macaw, mostly green with a bluish wash on head and wings and a dull dark red lower-belly patch. Bare ochre-yellow facial skin, black bill, dark legs, long tapering tail.
rebnut: Small compact nuthatch; blue-grey above, rusty-orange below, with a black crown, white supercilium and bold black eyestripe. Short straight grey bill, short tail, greyish legs.
reboxp1: Starling-like bird; plain olive-brown above, paler buff below, with a broad all-red bill and a conspicuous bare yellow ring around the red eye. Short legs with strong claws.
rebpar1: Small stocky parrot; greenish above with grey-brown head, and male shows bright orange-red belly. Pale horn bill, greyish legs; female greener-bellied.
rebpar2: Medium parrot, mostly dull bronzy-green with a bluish head and breast, dark scaling, and a red undertail-covert patch. Pale reddish bill, bare eye-ring, dark legs.
rebpar4: Slim long-tailed parakeet; green above, pinkish-grey breast and belly, with a black chin-stripe and broad black band across lower cheek, bluish crown. Male has red upper bill; female all-dark bill.
rebpar5: Plump partridge; rich chestnut-rufous underparts, brown-and-grey upperparts with dark scaling, and a grey breast band. Bare red facial skin, red legs, dark bill.
rebpar6: Small stocky pardalote; greyish above with whitish-spotted black wings and crown, pale yellowish underparts washed buff, and a distinctive broad red-and-yellow brow stripe. Short stubby bill.
rebpar7: Large green amazon parrot with a bright red forecrown and forehead, bluish wash to face and crown, and red wing-speculum. Horn bill, pale eye-ring, grey legs.
rebpig1: Large pigeon; mostly dull purplish-grey, slightly browner on back, paler grey rump and belly. Pale yellow bill with red base, dark eye with red orbital ring, pinkish-red legs.
rebpit1: Stocky short-tailed pitta; dark blue-green back and wings, blackish head, and bright scarlet-red belly with a violet-blue breast band above it. Stout dark bill, long pinkish legs.
rebque1: Small weaver/sparrow-sized finch; breeding male buff-brown above streaked black, with a black face mask, pinkish-buff crown and breast, and a heavy red conical bill. Female plain buffy with pale/red bill.
rebsap: Woodpecker with entirely deep red head, neck and breast, black-and-white barred back and wings, white wing patch and rump, and pale yellowish belly. Black bill, greyish legs.
rebscy1: Slender rufous-brown woodcreeper with a strikingly long, thin, strongly downcurved red bill. Streaked head and breast, plain rufous wings and tail, dark legs.
rebsta1: Slim grey starling with a pale whitish head and neck, greyish body, glossy blackish wings and tail. Bright red bill tipped black, reddish-orange legs, pale eye.
rebtou2: Toucan with a large yellowish-green and black bill, black upperparts, white-to-yellow throat and breast bordered below by a broad red band, and red undertail/rump. Bare bluish eye-skin, dark legs.
rebtro: Large white seabird with fine black barring on the back, a long pointed black mask through the eye, and very long white tail streamers. Slender decurved bright red bill, black primaries.
rebtyr2: Tiny tyrannulet; greyish-olive above with greyer cap, pale yellowish underparts, and pale wing edgings. Short bill with reddish/pinkish base, pale lores, dark legs.
rebwoo: Woodpecker with finely black-and-white barred (zebra) back, pale grey-buff underparts, and a red crown and nape (male; female red on nape only). Straight chisel bill, greyish legs.
rebwoo1: Large stout woodcreeper; rich rufous-brown overall with a plain face, faint pale streaking on throat, and a heavy straight pinkish-red bill. Bare blue-grey eye-skin, dark legs.
recbar1: Plump green barbet; bright green body with a red crown and red spots on the face, blue cheeks and throat, black eye-line and yellow-and-blue facial markings. Heavy blackish bill.
recbus1: Small bustard; mottled buff-and-black upperparts, black belly and breast, grey neck, and a fine red-tipped crest. Buff-and-black patterned face, slim bill, pale legs.
reccar: Crested finch; grey above, white below, with a bright red head, crest and throat sharply cut off from the white breast by a grey collar. Pale pinkish-horn bill, dark legs.
reccar2: Crested finch with red head, crest and throat, black-bordered red breast bib, grey-brown back and white underparts. Pale stout bill, dark legs.
reccar4: Small finch; black back and wings, white underparts, grey collar, and a red head, throat and breast with a red patch reaching the upper breast. Pale bill, dark legs.
reccor: Tiny waxbill; male brown above, pale buff below, with sky-blue face, breast and flanks, and a bright crimson cheek patch. Coral-red bill, pinkish legs; female lacks red cheek.
reccot1: Slim grey cotinga; uniform slate-grey overall with a wispy red-maroon crest, white-streaked grey belly, and red eye. Short black bill, dark legs.
reccou2: Large coua; greenish-grey body, paler grey breast, with a chestnut-red crown and a bare blue-and-purple eye patch. Pale-tipped tail, black bill, grey legs.
reccra1: Tall elegant crane; mostly white with black neck, black secondaries forming a black 'tail' tuft over the white tail, and a bare red crown patch. Long dark legs, greyish bill.
reccro1: Small short-tailed warbler with rufous-chestnut crown and nape contrasting with grey-brown back; greyish-white throat and breast grading to buff flanks. Short straight dark bill, pale legs; rounded compact body.
reccuc1: Slim grey cuckoo with slate-grey head, throat and upperparts; orange-rufous breast band fading to white belly finely barred grey. Long grey tail tipped white, yellow eye-ring and feet, slightly downcurved dark bill.
recdov1: Small dove; male deep rusty-red on back, breast and wings with pale grey head and a narrow black half-collar on hindneck. Grey belly, dark blue-grey flight feathers, dark squarish tail, dark bill, reddish legs.
recfin1: Small finch; male slate-grey overall with a bright crimson crest patch on crown (often hidden) bordered black, plain grey underparts. Stout conical pinkish-grey bill, dark legs; pale eye-ring.
recflu1: Tiny secretive rail; male with deep rufous-chestnut head, neck and breast, blackish back boldly spotted and barred white. Short cocked tail, short dark bill, dark legs; rounded plump body.
reclar1: Small lark with rufous-chestnut crown and ear-coverts, streaked sandy-brown back, plain whitish underparts with rufous patches at sides of breast. Pale supercilium, short conical pinkish bill, pale legs.
recman1: Tiny compact manakin; male velvety black body with a brilliant scarlet-red head and nape, and bright yellow-orange thighs. Short black bill, orange-red legs; rounded stubby silhouette.
recmyz1: Small honeyeater; male glossy black overall with a bright red head and throat extending to a red collar across the upper breast. Slender slightly decurved black bill, blackish legs.
recowl1: Small owlet; slate-grey head and upperparts, broad rufous-orange band across the chest, white belly streaked dark. Rounded head without ear tufts, yellow eyes, yellowish bill and feet; dark tail with white bars.
recpar: Stocky green amazon parrot; bright red forehead and crown, blue band behind eye, green cheeks and body with paler scalloped neck. Pale horn bill, grey legs; red wing-speculum patch visible in flight.
recpar1: Slender parrot; deep crimson-red cap, lime-green cheeks, yellowish-green underparts with a bright red lower belly and undertail. Blue-purple breast and rump, long tail, distinctive long pale bill, grey legs.
recpar2: Stocky green parrot; male with bright blue crown and red cheeks/ear-coverts, otherwise grass-green plumage and brownish mantle. Reddish-brown bill, grey legs; short squarish tail.
recpar3: Small stocky green parrot; male with bright red forehead and crown, blue-purple shoulder patch and brownish ear-coverts. Yellowish-green underparts, blue-tipped green tail; pale horn bill, grey legs.
recrob1: Tiny robin; male with jet-black head, throat and upperparts, a small red forehead spot, and a brilliant scarlet breast. White wing patch and outer tail, white belly; fine dark bill, dark legs.
recsun2: Small sunbird; male iridescent green head and back with a metallic violet-blue throat and a broad scarlet breast band, blackish belly. Long elongated central tail feathers, slender decurved black bill.
recwid3: Small widowbird; breeding male glossy black with a bright scarlet-red crescent across the throat and upper breast. Very long broad black tail, stout bluish bill, dark legs.
recwoo: Medium woodpecker with black-and-white horizontally barred back (ladder pattern), large white cheek patch, black crown and moustache. White underparts spotted black on flanks; male shows tiny red cockade at side of crown; dark bill, grey legs.
recwoo1: Medium woodpecker; black-and-white finely barred back and wings, plain pale grey-buff underparts, and a yellowish forehead. Male with full red crown and nape; straight dark bill, grey legs.
redbis: Small weaver; breeding male brilliant orange-red with a black face, forecrown, throat and lower belly; brown wings and tail. Red rump, stout conical black bill, pinkish-brown legs; rounded body.
redcro9: Stocky finch with crossed mandible tips; male brick-red overall, brighter on rump, with dark brownish wings and notched tail. Stout deep crossed dark bill, blackish legs; large-headed silhouette.
redegr: Medium heron; slaty blue-grey body with a shaggy rufous-cinnamon head and neck. Long bicolored bill pink at base with black tip, blackish legs and feet; loose plumes on neck and back.
redfod1: Small weaver-like bird; breeding male entirely bright scarlet-red except blackish lores and brown-edged wings and tail. Stout conical horn-brown bill, pale brownish legs; rounded compact body.
redhea: Medium diving duck; male with a rounded rufous-red head, black breast, grey body and black rear. Pale blue bill with white ring and black tip, yellow eye, grey legs; high-domed head profile.
redher1: Tiny hermit hummingbird; rich rufous-cinnamon underparts and rump, bronzy-green upperparts, dark mask through eye. Short straight or slightly decurved blackish bill, short tail with little projection.
redjun: Wild ancestor of chicken; male with glossy golden-orange hackles, dark green-black breast and tail with long arching sickle feathers. Red comb and wattles, bare reddish face, grey legs; metallic sheen overall.
redsho1: Medium dabbling duck; male with finely dark-spotted rufous-buff body, a small pale-buff head with dark crown, and a long broad spatulate dark bill. Pale eye, blue forewing patch, orange-yellow legs.
redsis1: Small siskin; male deep crimson-red with a black hood (head and throat), black wings and tail, and black flanks. Red rump and breast, conical greyish bill, dark legs; compact finch shape.
redspu1: Medium ground bird; male warm chestnut-brown overall finely vermiculated and spotted, with greyer head. Bare red facial skin around eye, red legs with multiple spurs, dark bill; rounded plump body.
redthr1: Small plain ground bird; grey-brown above, pale greyish-white below with a small dull rufous-red throat patch. Faint pale eyebrow, slender dark bill, pale legs; nondescript compact build.
redwar1: Small warbler; entirely bright deep red body with a contrasting white (or grey) ear patch on the cheek. Blackish wings and tail, fine pointed dark bill, dark legs; vivid and unmistakable.
redwat1: Large honeyeater; grey-brown streaked white overall with a bare reddish patch behind the eye and a long dangling red-pink wattle on each side of neck. Yellow belly, white-tipped long tail, dark bill, pinkish legs.
reebul1: Medium bulbul; plain warm brown above, paler greyish-brown below, with a bare red ring of skin around the eye. Slim dark bill, brownish legs; rounded crestless head, fairly long tail.
reedov1: Large dove; pinkish-grey head and underparts with a black half-collar on the hindneck and a bold red eye-ring around an orange eye. Grey-brown back, blackish tail tipped grey, dark bill, reddish legs.
reepar1: Small green parakeet; mostly green with a brownish crown scaled blue, a dark brownish-red ear patch, blue in the wings and a long red-brown tail. Variable dark-red belly patch; pale bill, grey legs.
reevir1: Slim vireo; olive-green above, clean white below, with a grey crown bordered by a black-edged white supercilium and a dark eyeline through a red eye. Sturdy hooked grey bill, blue-grey legs.
refbar2: Small barbet; black above heavily spotted white, with a red forehead patch, white supercilium and yellowish moustache. Whitish underparts streaked dusky, stout pale bill, dark legs; chunky body.
refboo: Medium seabird; white-morph adult mostly white with black flight feathers, blue facial skin and a pinkish-blue bill. Diagnostic bright red feet and legs; pointed wings, tapered tail, slender pointed bill.
refcis1: Small warbler-like cisticola; plain warm brown above, buffy-white below, with a bright rufous-red face, forecrown and cheeks. Rufous wing panel, longish rounded tail, slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
refcoo1: Medium dark coot; slaty-grey to blackish body, blacker head, with a bright red frontal shield and forehead and a yellow bill. Whitish undertail, red eye, lobed greenish legs; rounded swimming body.
refcou1: Large long-tailed ground-cuckoo; dark olive-green back with blue wash on wings and tail, dark grey underparts, and a rufous-red crown. Bare blue skin around the eye, dark bill, long greyish legs.
refcro1: Small short-tailed warbler; grey-brown above, buffy-cinnamon below, with a rufous-tinged face and pale supercilium. Short straight dark bill, pale legs; very short tail and rounded compact shape.
refgua1: Large brown guan; rich dark brown overall with fine white streaking on neck and breast, a pale supercilium and bare red orbital skin and small red dewlap. Smallish head, dull pinkish legs, dark bill.
reflio2: Medium babbler; warm olive-brown body with a striking crimson-red face, throat and forehead extending onto the wing panel. Greyish crown and nape, longish tail, stout dark bill, brownish legs.
reflio3: Medium babbler; grey-brown body with a vivid scarlet-red face, lores and wing patch, and silvery-grey ear-coverts. Reddish-tipped tail, blackish crown, stout dark bill, pinkish-brown legs.
refmou1: Slim long-tailed mousebird; soft grey-brown plumage with a wispy crest, a bright red bare patch around the eye and a red-and-black bill. Very long slender tail, red legs; sleek streamlined shape.
refpar3: Distinctive parrot; brown head with whitish-buff streaking, dark red nape feathers blue-tipped forming a ruff-like fan when raised. Green wings and back, red underparts scaled blue, dark bill, grey legs.
refpar4: Slim green parakeet; bright green overall with a crimson-red forehead and crown, a red streak behind the eye and red patches on the rump sides. Long green tail, blue in wing, pale grey bill, grey legs.
refros1: Stocky rosefinch; male grey-brown with a bright crimson-pink forehead, face, throat and breast streaked dusky, and a brownish streaked back. Stout dark conical bill, dark legs; large heavy-billed finch.
refspi1: Small spinetail; warm brown above with a rufous-red crown and rufous wings, plain greyish-buff underparts. Dull pale face, longish rufous tail, slender dark bill, greyish legs; slim active build.
reftin4: Tiny barbet; black above boldly spotted yellow-white, with a bright red forehead spot and yellow-edged wing feathers. Yellowish underparts, black eyestripe with white moustache, stout dark bill, grey legs.
refwar: Small warbler with a bright crimson face, throat and breast set off by a black crown and ear patch curving behind the eye. Upperparts gray, belly white, with a pale whitish nape patch and rump. Thin dark bill; dark legs.
refwar2: Tiny long-tailed prinia, plain gray-brown above with a rusty-orange forehead and forecrown. Underparts pale buffy-white. Short dark bill, fine and pointed; pale pinkish legs; cocked graduated tail.
regcoo1: Large slaty-black coot with a yellow frontal shield topped by a red knob (garter), and a yellow bill with a reddish base. Eyes red; legs and lobed toes greenish-yellow. Stocky, rounded waterbird.
reghon1: Striking black honeyeater densely spangled white-and-yellow on breast, belly and wing edges, giving a scaly look. Head and neck black with bare warty pinkish facial skin. Bill black, slightly downcurved; tail edged yellow.
regpar1: Slim long-tailed parrot, mostly rich yellow-green with a yellower head and underparts; black-edged wing coverts form a red shoulder patch and yellow band. Long blue-black tail. Bill reddish-orange; gray legs.
regsun2: Small dazzling sunbird, male with glittering green head and back, an orange-red breast band, and bright yellow belly with red flank tufts. Wings and tail blackish. Bill thin, decurved, black; dark legs.
regwhi1: Plump whistler, male with a black head and broad black breast band separating a bright yellow throat from a yellow belly; olive-green back, blackish wings and tail. Stout dark bill; gray legs.
rehbar1: Stocky barbet with a vivid red head and throat, a yellow-orange collar, and green upperparts; underparts yellowish-green. Male shows a black mask and bluish nape band. Heavy pale ivory bill; grayish legs.
rehbun1: Bright finch, male with a brick-red face, throat and breast, yellow-green upperparts, and a yellow belly and rump. Wings and tail greenish-brown. Conical pale grayish bill; pinkish legs.
rehcis2: Small streaky cisticola, gray-brown above with heavy blackish streaking on a grayish back and a finely streaked rufous-tinged crown. Underparts pale buffy-white. Thin dark bill; pinkish legs; longish graduated tail.
rehman1: Small compact manakin, male glossy velvet-black with a brilliant scarlet-red hood covering head and nape; red extends onto upper back. Bill short and dark; legs pale pinkish. Females plain olive-green.
rehmyz1: Tiny myzomela, male with an entirely bright scarlet-red head, throat and upper breast and red rump; back and wings blackish, belly grayish-white. Fine decurved black bill; dark legs.
rehtan1: Stocky tanager, male with a brilliant red head and throat contrasting with a yellow-orange body and greenish-yellow wings and back. Pale grayish bill, fairly thick; dark legs. Females duller olive-yellow.
rehtan2: Large tanager with a deep red hood over head, throat and breast, blackish back and wings, and a yellow lower belly and rump. Stout pale bill; dark legs. Bright red contrasts sharply with dark upperparts.
rehtro1: Long-tailed trogon, male with a deep crimson-red head, throat and breast separated from a scarlet belly by a narrow white band. Back cinnamon-brown, wings finely vermiculated gray; tail black with white tips. Bill bluish.
rehwoo: Boldly patterned woodpecker with an entirely bright red head and neck, snow-white underparts and rump, and a glossy blue-black back and tail. Large white wing patches show in flight. Stout gray bill; gray legs.
reisee2: Small drab seedeater, grayish-olive above with faint streaking and a plain grayish-buff face and underparts; pale eyebrow indistinct. Heavy conical pale horn-colored bill; pinkish legs. Subtle dingy plumage overall.
relcra1: Small rail, rich rufous-chestnut head, neck and breast with a barred black-and-white belly and flanks; olive-brown back. Bill greenish, fairly short; distinctive bright red legs and feet. Red eyes.
relhon1: Small honeycreeper, male brilliant violet-blue with a turquoise crown, black back, wings and mask, and a black tail. Bright red legs are diagnostic; underwings flash yellow. Bill long, slender and decurved, black.
relpar10: Mid-sized green amazon parrot with a red forehead and lores, a lilac-blue crown, and yellow cheeks; bright red wing-speculum and dark-scaled neck. Pale horn-colored bill with darker tip; grayish legs.
relser1: Large long-legged ground bird, grayish-brown with fine streaking, a shaggy crest of forward-curling feathers on the forehead, and a long barred tail. Bill reddish and slightly downcurved; long bright red legs.
relthr1: Slate-gray thrush with a paler gray throat finely streaked black, a white vent, and a long blackish tail with white corners. Bold red-orange bill, eye-ring and legs are diagnostic.
reltin1: Plump ground tinamou, grayish-brown above with fine dark barring on wings, a gray neck and breast, and buffy barred flanks. Small dark downcurved bill; notably bright red or orange-red legs.
rempar: Medium green parakeet with scattered bright red feathers on the face, forehead and crown, and red leading wing-edges; otherwise all green with a long tapered tail. Pale horn bill; gray legs; white eye-ring.
renara1: Slender aracari toucan with a black head and breast, a maroon-red collar across the nape and upper back, green-black wings and a red rump. Bill mostly ivory-white with a dark base; pale eye-skin.
rencra1: Plump rail with a rich rufous-chestnut head, neck and breast, olive-brown back, and faintly barred flanks. Bill greenish, short and stout; legs olive-green to grayish. Red eyes; rounded body.
renfra1: Robust francolin with brown-streaked upperparts, a grayish finely vermiculated breast, and bare red skin around the eye and throat. Bill red-based, dark-tipped; bright red legs. Bulky game-bird build.
renibi1: Large dark ibis, glossy blackish-brown overall with a bare black head topped by a patch of red warty skin on the nape, and a white shoulder patch. Long decurved blackish bill; red legs.
rensap: Medium woodpecker with a red forecrown and a red nape patch, a black-and-white striped face, a black breast band, and pale yellowish underparts. Back barred black-and-white; bold white wing stripe. Dark bill; gray legs.
rensti: Small short-billed sandpiper, breeding adult with a brick-red face, throat and upper breast, dark-streaked crown and back with rufous feather edges, and a white belly. Short straight black bill; black legs.
rentan1: Jewel-like tanager with a turquoise-blue crown and cheeks, a velvety-black back and throat, a deep rufous-red nape band, and green-and-blue wings. Underparts blue-green. Short dark bill; gray legs.
rentro1: Long-tailed trogon, male with a crimson-red crown, nape and breast, a black face and throat, and a scarlet belly separated by a white band. Back deep brown; tail black with white tips. Bluish bill.
renwoo1: Large woodpecker, mostly glossy black with an entirely bright red head, crest and neck and a red breast; lower belly faintly barred. Heavy pale ivory bill; dark legs. Striking all-red head on black body.
rercac1: Mid-sized blackbird, glossy black overall with a contrasting bright crimson-red rump and lower back. Eyes pale blue; sharply pointed ivory-yellow bill. Slim build with a longish tail; dark legs.
rerfru1: Large crow-like cotinga, glossy blue-black overall with a fluffy orange-red ruff of erectile feathers on the throat and upper breast. Heavy black bill; dark legs. Bulky body and broad rounded tail.
rerpar1: Slim ground parrot, male bright emerald-green on head and breast with a yellow belly, a brick-red rump, and a yellow shoulder patch on green wings. Long green-and-blue tail. Dark bill; gray legs.
rertin1: Tiny barbet, black above with a brilliant scarlet-red rump, a yellow forehead spot, and yellow wing edgings; underparts dusky-yellow. Short stout black bill; dark legs. Compact, big-headed shape.
rerwoo1: Small woodpecker, olive-green above with a red crown (male), a barred greenish back, and a red rump; underparts greenish-olive finely barred. Short dark bill; gray legs. Plain face with faint pale eyebrow.
resflo1: Tiny flowerpecker, glossy blue-black above with a vivid scarlet-red breast and central belly, white flanks finely streaked black. Short stubby dark bill; dark legs. Stout compact body and short tail.
resfly1: Slender black-and-white flycatcher, glossy blue-black above and on the head with a white throat and underparts; a small shaggy crest. Wings and tail black. Fine black bill; black legs; alert upright posture.
reshaw: Medium buteo with rufous shoulders and underwing coverts, reddish-barred underparts, and a dark brown back with pale feather edges. Tail blackish with narrow white bands. Hooked yellow-based dark bill; yellow legs.
resmac2: Small green macaw with a bare whitish facial patch, a bluish forehead, and bright red leading wing-edges and underwing coverts. Long green-and-blue pointed tail. Blackish bill; dark legs.
resowl1: Small rufous scops-owl, warm reddish-brown overall with fine dark vermiculations, short ear tufts, and a paler facial disc. Underparts rufous-buff with sparse dark streaks. Pale bill; brown eyes; feathered legs.
respar1: Large stocky parrot, mostly deep green with a maroon-red head, breast and belly, a blue band across the lower nape, and blue-green wings. Long green tail. Heavy blackish bill; gray legs.
resque1: Spectacular trogon, male shimmering emerald-green on head, back and breast with extremely long green tail-streamers, a crimson belly, and a rounded crest. White undertail; yellow bill. Iridescent metallic green plumage.
resspi2: Small spinetail, gray-brown above with a rufous crown and rufous wing-panel and a darker tail; throat whitish with a faint dusky patch, underparts pale grayish. Short dark bill; grayish legs. Longish graduated tail.
restan1: Sleek tanager, male glossy blue-black overall with a bright scarlet-red shoulder patch (often partly hidden). Bill black with a pale base. Slim build; dark legs. Females plain grayish-olive.
restyr1: Small olive tyrannulet, greenish above with two pale wing-bars, a yellowish face with a dark line through the eye, and pale yellow underparts. Small thin dark bill; dark legs. Slim, fine-billed flycatcher.
reswoo1: Small woodpecker, olive-brown above with a barred back, a red crown (male), and red-tinged ('stained') feather bases on the wing; underparts olive finely barred whitish. Short dark bill; gray legs.
retbar1: Plump green barbet with a scarlet-red throat patch, a yellow band below it, a blue cheek and crown, and a black forehead and eye-stripe. Underparts green. Heavy pale bill with bristles; grayish legs.
retcar2: Large glossy blue-black falcon-relative with white belly and lower breast contrasting sharply with the dark hood, back and wings. Bare facial skin and throat bright orange-red; stout pale-tipped bill. Dark legs.
retcom1: Spectacular Andean hummingbird; male glittering green head and breast with reddish-violet back and rump, and an extremely long, deeply forked iridescent golden-red tail far longer than the body. Short straight blackish bill.
retgre1: Olive-green forest bulbul with greyish head and white throat, yellow-tinged underparts, and a bright rufous-chestnut tail and wing-edges. Erect bushy crown feathers; dark bill, greyish legs; medium-sized.
rethaw: Large broad-winged buteo, dark brown above, pale buffy-white below with a dark belly-band of streaks. Adult shows a rich brick-red upper tail with a thin dark subterminal band. Hooked yellow-based bill, yellow legs.
rethel1: Stocky grey-and-black helmetshrike with dark grey head and breast, paler belly, and blackish wings and tail. Bold pale yellow eye encircled by a fleshy yellow eye-wattle; black bill, orange legs. Sociable, crested look.
retlau1: Striking laughingthrush with crimson-red crown, wings and tail, grey nape and back, and a black face mask and throat. Greyish underparts; silvery ear patch. Dark slightly decurved bill, brownish legs; medium-sized.
retmin1: Small colourful babbler with grey-brown back, rufous wing-panels and tail edges, black crown and face, and a long white supercilium. Pale yellowish-white underparts; dark bill, pinkish legs.
retpar1: Large green Amazon parrot with a red forehead and lores, bluish wash on crown and cheeks, and a broad red wing-speculum. Tail green with a red base band tipped yellowish. Pale horn bill, grey legs.
retthr1: Grey-brown thrush with a brick-red throat and upper breast bordered below by pale belly, and rufous-red outer tail feathers. Reddish supercilium; greyish back. Yellow bill with dark tip, pinkish legs.
rettro: Large white seabird washed rosy-pink, with fine black eye-stripe and small black markings on flanks. Bright red bill; very long thin bright-red central tail streamers. Black feet; pointed wings.
retvan1: Small tit-like vanga; male grey crown and nape, white forehead, ear-coverts and underparts, a neat black bib, rufous wing-coverts, and a rufous-red rump and tail. Dark eye; short black bill, dark legs.
revbar1: Plump green barbet with green body, a contrasting bright red vent, and blue-streaked head with red and yellow facial markings. Heavy pale ivory bill; greyish legs. Large-headed, short-tailed.
revbul: Sooty-brown bulbul with a black scaly-crested head, fine white scaling on back and breast, white rump and white-tipped dark tail, and a bright crimson-red vent. Black bill and legs.
rewbla: Glossy all-black blackbird; male with brilliant scarlet shoulder patch (epaulet) edged below by a yellow bar. Conical pointed black bill, dark legs. Female streaky brown and sparrow-like.
rewbul: Brown-backed bulbul with a tall pointed black crest, white cheeks bordered by black, a red whisker spot below the eye, white underparts with a broken breast-band, and a red vent. Black bill and legs.
rewfai1: Small long-tailed fairywren; breeding male with iridescent silvery-blue crown, ear-coverts and mantle, black throat and nape band, chestnut-rufous shoulders, and buffy-white underparts. Cocked dark tail; black bill, brownish legs.
rewfra2: Plump game-bird with rufous neck and breast, heavily black-and-white scalloped and streaked upperparts and flanks, and a chestnut-orange wing-patch. Pale throat; yellowish legs, dark-tipped pale bill.
rewlap1: Tall striking lapwing with black crown, breast and central throat, white cheek-stripe down the neck, sandy-brown back, and white belly. Red facial wattles and red bill with black tip; long bright yellow legs.
rewpar1: Bright green parrot with a vivid lime-green head, scarlet-red wing-coverts forming a bold red shoulder patch, and a blue-black lower back. Long green tail; red-orange bill, grey legs. Female duller, less red.
rewpri1: Small slim warbler-like bird, grey-brown above with a rufous wing-panel, long graduated tail, and pale buffy-whitish underparts. Plain face; fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
rewsta1: Large glossy iridescent blue-black starling with rich chestnut-red flight feathers conspicuous in flight. Slender slightly decurved black bill, black legs; long graduated tail and dark red eye.
rewtin1: Plump terrestrial tinamou, mottled greyish-brown above with fine barring, a grey head and neck, pinkish-buff underparts, and rufous-chestnut wings showing in flight. Slender decurved bill, reddish legs.
rfcwin1: Small dark finch-like waxbill, olive-brown above with crimson-red rump, and grey underparts spotted with white. Male shows a bright red face-mask around the eyes; stout blackish bill, dark legs.
rfwqua1: Compact rounded wood-quail with bright rufous-orange face, throat and forehead, dark brown crown, olive-brown finely barred upperparts, and rufous-tinged barred underparts. Stout dark bill, grey legs.
rhgrol1: Smallest ground-roller, slender and long-legged, with deep rufous head and underparts, a black throat and upper breast streaked white, dark green upperparts and tail, and a sky-blue and white wing-patch. Black bill, dark legs.
rhihor1: Huge black-and-white hornbill with white belly and white tail crossed by a broad black band. Massive cream-coloured bill topped by a large upcurved red-and-orange casque. Black legs; pale eye in male.
rhptyr1: Tiny rounded flycatcher with a rufous head and face, olive-green back, and dull yellowish-olive underparts. Short tail, large dark eye, broad-based small dark bill; pale legs.
ribant1: Slim antbird; male uniformly slate-grey with white-tipped wing-coverts forming faint wing spots and white-tipped tail. Female greyer-brown with paler underparts. Slender dark bill, grey legs.
ribgul: Medium gull, pale grey back and white head and underparts, black wingtips with white spots. Yellow bill encircled by a distinct black ring near the tip; yellow legs, pale eye.
ridhaw1: Small stocky buteo, dark grey-brown above, with greyish breast and rufous-barred underparts and thighs. Tail grey with several dark bands. Yellow cere and yellow legs; female browner overall.
ridrai1: Large grey-brown rail with rusty-cinnamon breast, grey cheeks, and bold black-and-white barred flanks and undertail. Long slightly decurved orange-based bill; dull greyish legs; short cocked tail.
riflem1: Tiny rotund wren-like bird with greenish upperparts, whitish underparts, and a very short tail and slender slightly upturned bill. Male greener, female browner with spotted wings; pale supercilium, pale legs.
rinant2: Small ground antpipit, olive-brown above and white below with a bold blackish breast-band of streaks (necklace). Pale eye-ring, large dark eye, pinkish legs, upright pipit-like stance; short dark bill.
rindov: Pale greyish-brown dove with a soft pinkish-grey breast, paler belly, and a narrow black half-collar on the hindneck. Dark eye, slender black bill, dark reddish legs; whitish tail corners.
rinkin1: Large kingfisher, blue-grey above with a shaggy crest, a broad white collar, rufous-chestnut underparts, and a white throat. Massive dagger-like black bill; dark legs. Female with grey breast band.
rinwoo1: Chestnut-rufous woodpecker with rich rufous body, a buffy crest, and a bold black throat-and-chest band, plus pale yellowish nape collar. Male shows red malar stripe; pale ivory bill, grey legs.
rivlap1: Pale grey-and-white lapwing with a black crown and forecrown, white face and neck, grey breast bordered by a black breast-band, and white belly. Long black bill, blackish legs; black-tipped white wings.
rivter1: Slender pale grey tern with a black cap, white underparts, deeply forked long tail streamers, and long pointed wings. Bright yellow-orange dagger bill; red legs. Graceful build.
rivtyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, pale grey above and whitish below, with a small concealed crest and two faint pale wing-bars. Short dark bill, dark eye, pale legs; plain unmarked face.
rivtyr2: Small flycatcher; male dull sooty-grey overall, slightly paler below, with a faint pale wing-edging and a stout bluish-grey bill. Female browner with rusty wing-bars; dark legs.
rivwar1: Olive-brown warbler with greyish-olive upperparts, whitish underparts, and a dark crown bordered by a bold whitish supercilium and dark eye-line. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs; longish cocked tail.
rivwre1: Boldly patterned wren, rich rufous-brown above with a black-and-white barred face and white supercilium, white throat and breast finely barred black on the sides. Slender dark bill, greyish legs.
riwfin1: Small finch, grey above and whitish below, with a bold blackish breast-band (necklace) across the upper breast, grey head, and a white throat. Conical greyish bill, pale legs.
rkipig1: Large heavy pigeon, pale grey head and underparts with a pinkish wash, dark glossy green back and wings, and a prominent bright red knob at the base of the bill. Reddish bill, dark legs.
rnbfin1: Brushfinch dark olive-green above with blackish wings and tail, entirely bright yellow underparts, a blackish face, and a bright rufous-chestnut crown stripe. Small yellow supraloral spot; dark bill, pinkish legs.
rnfgle1: Rufous-brown foliage-gleaner with bright rufous head and throat, olive-brown back, rufous wings and tail, and finely streaked buffy underparts. Pale supercilium; slender pale-based bill, greyish legs.
rnwrai1: Stocky wood-rail with a grey head, rich rufous-chestnut neck and breast, olive-brown back, and black belly and tail. Greenish-yellow bill; long bright red legs; red eye.
roahaw: Slim small hawk, grey-brown head and breast, finely rufous-barred lower underparts, brown back, and rufous wing-patches visible in flight. Tail with several pale bands; yellow cere and yellow legs, pale eye.
robacc1: Plump accentor, grey-brown streaked above with a plain greyish head, an unmarked rusty-orange (robin-like) breast, and a whitish belly. Fine dark bill, reddish-brown legs; pale eye.
robbun1: Small bunting; male with slate-blue head, upperparts and wings, a contrasting rosy-pink lower breast and belly, and a pinkish-white throat. Conical greyish bill, pinkish legs. Female buffy-brown.
robcha2: Small slim warbler-like bird; male slate-grey above with a bold white supercilium and white throat, and a vivid rosy-red breast band across the chest; lower belly white. Slender dark bill, dark legs.
robgro: Stocky black-and-white finch with a black head and upperparts, white belly and rump, white wing patches, and a triangular rose-red bib on the upper breast; rosy-red underwing. Massive pale conical bill, grey legs.
robqua1: Small rotund quail; greyish-brown above finely vermiculated, with heavy reddish-brown and dark barring on the buff underparts; rufous-buff face. Short reddish bill, dull reddish legs.
robwoo1: Large black woodpecker with a flaming red crest and head; black back and wings, finely barred buff-and-black underparts, and a buffy-white neck stripe. Long pale ivory bill, dark grey legs.
rocear1: Slim rusty-brown ovenbird with a plain warm brown back, paler buffy throat and breast, and a faint pale supercilium; rufous tail and wing patches. Long slightly decurved dark bill, dark legs.
rocmar5: Plain pale sandy-brown swallow; uniform dusty brown above, paler greyish-buff below with a slightly darker throat; squarish tail showing small white spots on spread feathers. Short black bill, dark legs.
rocpar2: Plump grey-bodied partridge with a clean white throat bordered by a sharp black necklace; bold black-and-chestnut barred flanks and a grey breast. Red bill and red legs.
rocpen2: Small penguin with blue-black upperparts, white underparts, and a thin yellow eyebrow stripe ending in drooping spiky yellow plumes; red eyes and a stout orange-red bill. Pink feet with black soles.
rocsan: Stocky shorebird; breeding adult mottled black, rufous and grey above with a dark patch on the lower breast and streaked flanks; short slightly drooping black bill with yellowish base, dull yellow legs.
roctap1: Small dark sooty-grey tapaculo with a slightly paler grey throat and breast and faint brownish barring on the rear flanks; short cocked tail. Short black bill, brownish legs.
rocwre: Pale grey-brown wren finely speckled above, with buffy-white finely streaked underparts and cinnamon-buff flanks; long buffy-tipped tail with dark subterminal band. Long slender slightly decurved bill, dark legs.
roeowl1: Large brown eagle-owl with prominent blackish ear tufts; tawny-brown upperparts boldly marked black, buff underparts with bold dark streaks and fine barring; orange eyes and a whitish throat. Feathered legs.
rofpar2: Stocky green parrot with a rosy-pink face and forecrown, scaly greyish-green breast, green body, and bright red-and-blue patches in the wing. Pale horn bill, dark grey legs.
rofpar3: Small long-tailed green parakeet with a bright red forecrown and forehead, scaly buff-and-dusky breast, green body, and red wing-bend; maroon-red tail below. Dark bill, grey legs.
rohpar1: Small green parakeet with a rosy-red crown and forehead, green body and wings, dull scaly breast, and reddish-brown tail underside. Dark grey bill, grey legs.
rolcis2: Plain warm brown cisticola with an unstreaked rufous-tinged crown, greyish-brown back, and buffy underparts; rufous wing panel and a long graduated tail tipped with pale spots. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
roltyr3: Tiny olive-green tyrannulet with a greyish head, faint pale eyering and supercilium, pale yellow wing bars, and pale yellowish underparts. Short bill with dark upper and pale lower mandible, pale legs.
ronwaa1: Small antbird; male heavily streaked black-and-white on head, back and breast, with warm rusty flanks and rusty lower back and rump. Slender dark bill, greyish legs.
ropbus1: Striking pale grey-brown shrike with a white throat and a vivid crimson-red breast streak running down the centre of the underparts; long graduated tail. Stout black hooked bill, dark legs.
rorant1: Small antwren; male grey above with a black crown, bold white supercilium, black-and-white streaked back, and white wing bars; pale grey-white underparts. Slender dark bill, grey legs.
rorbar1: Small rufous-brown ovenbird with a finely buff-streaked crown and breast, warm rufous wings and tail, and a buffy throat. Short straight dark bill, dull legs.
rospip1: Slim pinkish-grey pipit; breeding adult olive-brown above with dark streaking, and a pinkish-buff flush on the unstreaked breast and supercilium; two pale wing bars. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
rosrob1: Tiny robin; male dark slate-grey above with a small white forehead spot, dark throat and a bright rose-pink breast patch; white belly. Fine black bill, dark legs.
rosspo1: Large pink wading bird with a bare greenish-grey head, white neck, deep pink wings and body, and crimson shoulder patches; long flattened grey spatula-tipped bill. Reddish-pink legs.
roster: Slim pale tern; pale grey above, white below with a long white deeply forked tail and a black cap; long fine bill black with a red base. Short red-orange legs.
rostur1: Large glossy violet-blue turaco with a tall crimson crest, crimson flight feathers, a yellow facial patch and bill base; bare red eye-ring. Stout yellow-and-red bill, dark feet.
rotbec: Stocky big-headed flycatcher-like bird; male grey above and paler grey below with a blackish crown and face, and a diffuse rose-pink throat patch. Stout black hooked bill, dark legs.
rotman1: Small compact manakin; male glossy black-bodied with a brilliant red crown and nape and red thighs; white eyes. Short pale bill, pinkish legs; tail rounded.
rottan1: Medium tanager; male grey-green above and pale grey below with a rose-red face, throat and forecrown. Stout pale grey conical bill, grey legs.
rottan2: Long-tailed thrush-like tanager; male blackish-grey above and on the head with a bold white postocular stripe, and bright rose-red throat, breast and undertail. Stout dark bill, dark legs.
royfly1: Olive-brown flycatcher with a buff-mottled throat, cinnamon rump and tail, and a spectacular hidden fan-shaped crest of scarlet-orange feathers tipped blue-black. Broad flat bill, dark legs.
royter1: Large pale tern; pale grey above, white below, with a shaggy black crest on the rear crown and a white forehead; long slender bright orange bill. Short black legs.
rrwfin1: Small finch with grey upperparts and head, a pale buffy throat and upper breast, and greyish-white belly; little white in the dark tail. Small conical greyish bill, pinkish legs.
rsptyr1: Tiny tyrant; olive-brown above with a rufous crown patch, bold rufous edges to the wing feathers, a pale eyering, and buffy-yellow underparts. Small dark bill, pale legs.
rtatan1: Robust tanager; male dull dark red overall, deeper crimson-red on the throat and crown and duskier on the back and wings. Stout dark grey bill, grey legs.
rtathr1: Dark thrush-like ant-thrush; slaty-blackish body with a contrasting rich rufous-chestnut rump and tail; pale grey on the lower belly. Slender dark bill, pinkish-grey legs.
rtbcoc1: Large black cockatoo with a rounded crest; male glossy black with a broad bright red panel across the tail. Massive dark grey bill, dark grey legs.
rtbeat1: Slim bee-eater; green back and wings, blue rump and undertail, a black mask and crown, and a scarlet-red throat. Long fine black decurved bill, dark legs; pointed central tail feathers.
rthhum: Tiny hummingbird; male metallic emerald-green above and on the crown, greyish-white below, with a brilliant iridescent ruby-red throat (gorget). Long straight black bill, dark feet.
rtlhum: Medium hummingbird with bronzy-green upperparts and crown, greyish underparts, and a rufous-chestnut tail and lower belly. Straight reddish bill with dark tip, dark feet.
rtpgua1: Large blackish guan glossed greenish, with a small whitish-flecked crest, a bare blue facial skin, and a bright red dewlap and throat. Bluish bill, red legs.
rtwbab1: Tiny short-tailed wren-babbler; rich rufous-brown above with fine white spotting on the wings, a rufous-orange throat and breast, and pale-spotted belly. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
rubacc1: Streaky accentor; brown above with dark streaks, a buffy-white supercilium, a finely streaked rufous-orange breast band, and white throat. Thin pointed dark bill, pinkish-brown legs.
rubant1: Plump terrestrial antthrush; dark brown above with a slaty face, and a bright rufous-chestnut breast; short cocked tail. Stout dark bill, pinkish legs.
rubant2: Small antvireo; male has a dark grey cap, face and breast, white throat-centre and belly, with rufous back, wings and tail and pale wing spotting. Short stout dark bill, grey legs.
rubant3: Small antwren; warm rufous-brown above, with a rufous-buff breast spotted black, and a greyish face. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
rubant4: Small antwren; male brownish-rufous above with a black face and broad black-bordered white stripe down the throat and breast sides; rusty flanks. Thin dark bill, grey legs.
rubant5: Tiny compact antpitta; olive-brown above with a greyish crown, a pale eyering and lores, and a rich rusty-orange breast fading to whitish belly. Short stout bill, pale legs; long-legged stance.
rubant7: Tiny rounded antpitta; plain warm brown above with rusty forehead and lores, and rusty-rufous breast fading to paler belly. Short stout dark bill, pale legs; long-legged upright stance.
rubcha1: Large brown chachalaca; greyish-brown above and on the head with a rufous-chestnut belly and undertail; bare reddish facial skin. Dark bill, grey legs; long broad rufous-tipped tail.
rubcon1: Small slender warbler-like tanager with bluish-grey upperparts and crown, contrasting bright rufous forehead, brow and entire underparts. Short pointed conical blackish bill, dark legs, plain wings without bars.
rubcra1: Small dark rail with slate-grey face and breast, deep chestnut-rufous lower breast, and blackish belly and flanks finely barred with white. Short greenish bill, bright orange-red legs and red eye.
rubeag2: Compact raptor with blackish hood and upperparts, white throat and upper breast, and rich rufous-chestnut lower breast, belly and thighs finely streaked black. Short crest, dark hooked bill, yellow feet.
rubeup1: Small stocky finch-like tanager; male glossy steel-blue-black above including hood and throat, with rich rufous-orange belly and vent. Stubby grey bill, dark legs; female olive-green with rufous undertail.
rubfan2: Small dark fantail with sooty grey-brown upperparts, dark face, and a broad rufous-buff breast band over a paler belly. Long graduated tail often fanned, fine black bill, dark legs.
rubfly2: Small olive flycatcher with greyish-olive head, plain olive back and wings, and a strong tawny-rufous wash across the breast fading to yellowish belly. Thin dark bill, pale eye-ring, dark legs.
rubfly3: Tiny rotund flycatcher with rufous-brown upperparts, whitish throat, and buff-washed breast and flanks. Distinct buff supercilium and lores, large dark eye, short dark bill, pinkish legs.
rubher: Medium hermit hummingbird with bronzy-green upperparts and entirely rich rufous-cinnamon underparts. Long decurved bill with reddish lower mandible, white-tipped graduated tail, no facial stripes.
rubhon1: Medium honeyeater with grey head, face and underparts streaked darker, contrasting bright rufous-brown back, rump and wing edgings. Slim slightly decurved black bill, dark legs.
rubhon2: Small honeyeater with grey-brown upperparts, white throat, and a narrow rufous-cinnamon band across the upper breast above a white belly. Fine dark bill, dark legs, faint pale eye area.
rubkoo1: Large stocky kingfisher with dark blue-black crown and upperparts, bluish wings and tail, white throat, and rich rufous underparts and rump. Heavy pale-and-dark bill, short dark legs.
rublea1: Medium dark furnariid with deep rufous-chestnut upperparts and rufous breast, blackish belly, and bright rufous rump and tail. Straight slender blackish bill, dark legs.
rubmin1: Small terrestrial ovenbird, sandy grey-brown above and pale buff below with faint streaking, and bold rufous wing panel obvious in flight. Short straight dark bill, dark legs, dark tail.
rubnig1: Dark nighthawk with sooty blackish-brown upperparts mottled paler, and contrasting rich rufous-cinnamon belly and undertail. Tiny dark bill, long pointed wings, no white wing patch.
rubnil1: Plump flycatcher; male deep blue above with brilliant azure crown, neck-patch and shoulders, blackish face, and bright orange-rufous throat and underparts. Short black bill, dark legs.
rubnun1: Small slim puffbird, dull brown above with pale rufous-buff underparts, rusty chin, throat and lores, and a pale supraloral spot. Short fine dark bill, pale belly center, dark legs.
ruboro1: Large oropendola with olive-brown head and breast grading to russet-chestnut back, rump and belly, and a black-tipped yellow tail. Long pointed pale ivory bill, dark legs, pale eye.
rubowl2: Medium wood-owl with rounded head lacking ear tufts, warm rufous-brown facial disc and upperparts, and pale underparts densely barred rusty-brown. Dark eyes, yellowish bill, feathered legs.
rubowl3: Medium wood-owl with dark rufous-brown facial disc rimmed black, brown upperparts spotted buff, and ochre-buff underparts with fine dark barring. Dark eyes, yellow bill, white-feathered legs.
rubpep1: Stout vireo-like bird with olive-green upperparts, grey crown and nape, and a broad rufous-chestnut brow and forecrown. Heavy hooked pinkish bill, pale grey throat, yellowish-buff breast.
rubpic1: Tiny piculet with olive-brown upperparts, blackish crown spotted white (male with red flecks), and rich rufous-cinnamon underparts. Short straight bill, stubby tail, zygodactyl feet.
rubrob: Medium thrush with grey-brown head and underparts, contrasting bright rufous-orange back, wing coverts and flanks. Yellow bill and eye-ring, dark wings and tail, dark legs.
rubsee1: Tiny finch; male grey-brown above with cinnamon-rufous rump, throat and underparts, and a small white wing speculum. Short stubby greyish conical bill, dark legs.
rubsee2: Plump cryptic shorebird, upperparts and breast scalloped grey-brown and buff in a scaly pattern, with rich rufous-cinnamon belly and flanks. Short stubby bill, short yellowish legs.
rubsho1: Small skulking chat with slaty blue-grey upperparts and entirely rich rusty-orange underparts from throat to belly. Fine dark bill, long pinkish legs, large dark eye, rounded short wings.
rubsib1: Slim long-tailed babbler with rufous-chestnut head, back and tail, grey wings, and pale greyish-white underparts. Fine dark bill, grey-edged wing panel, dark legs.
rubsol1: Plain warm rufous-brown thrush with paler belly and a rufous-chestnut throat. Conspicuous yellow eye-ring and yellow lower mandible, reddish eye, dark legs.
rubspi2: Small furnariid with grey-brown crown and upperparts, rufous wings, and a bright rufous-orange throat and breast over a pale grey belly. Slender dark bill, longish graduated tail, dark legs.
rubspi4: Slim spinetail with rufous-chestnut crown, back, wings and tail, and plain pale buffy-grey face and underparts. Fine pointed bill, longish graduated tail, dark legs.
rubsti1: Small antwren with rufous-brown crown and back, grey face and underparts, black throat patch spotted white, and rufous wings. Slender dark bill, dark legs, longish tail.
rubtap1: Plump dark tapaculo with dark brown upperparts, slaty-grey breast crossed by a rusty-rufous band, and barred buff-and-black flanks and belly. Short dark bill, stout pinkish legs, cocked tail.
rubthr1: Medium thrush with greyish-olive head and upperparts, whitish streaked throat, and rich rufous-orange lower breast and belly. Yellow-orange bill and eye-ring, dark legs.
rubtit3: Small black-and-white tit with glossy black head, white cheek patch, grey back, and white wing markings, with a rich rufous-cinnamon belly and vent. Short black bill, dark legs.
rubtre1: Robust furnariid with dark rufous-brown upperparts, rufous tail, and tawny-buff streaked breast over a brown belly. Heavy slightly hooked dark bill, dark legs.
rubtri1: Small cuckooshrike; male with grey-black upperparts and head and bright rufous-orange rump, throat and underparts. Short black bill, dark legs; female browner and barred below.
rubtyr1: Tiny olive tyrannulet with greyish crown, bold rufous-cinnamon brow and forehead, olive-green back, and two yellowish wing bars. Pale yellow underparts, fine dark bill, dark legs.
rubwar1: Small skulking warbler, uniform warm russet-brown above and on the breast, with a paler whitish belly and faint mottling on the throat. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs, rounded graduated tail.
rubwoo1: Medium woodpecker with black-and-white barred upperparts and wings, pale face, red crown and nape (male), and rich rufous-chestnut underparts with a red vent. Straight chisel bill, dark legs.
rubwre1: Medium wren with rufous-brown crown and back, grey face finely streaked white, and bright rufous-cinnamon throat and breast. Slim slightly decurved bill, barred wings and tail, dark legs.
rubwre2: Small wren with rufous-brown upperparts, whitish supercilium, finely barred wings and tail, and warm buff-rufous underparts. Thin dark slightly decurved bill, pinkish legs.
rucant1: Medium antshrike; male with bright rufous-chestnut crown, grey-brown upperparts, grey face and underparts, and black-and-white barred wing coverts. Stout hooked dark bill, dark legs.
rucant2: Plump terrestrial antthrush, dark sooty-brown above with a bright rufous-chestnut crown and nape, blackish face and throat, and dark grey underparts. Short dark bill, long pinkish legs, cocked short tail.
rucant3: Plump ground antpitta with rufous-chestnut crown and nape, olive-brown back, and bold black-and-white scaled underparts. Stout dark bill, long pale legs, large dark eye, almost tailless.
rucbab1: Small babbler with bright rufous-chestnut cap, olive-grey upperparts, and a pale greyish-yellow face and underparts with fine dark throat streaks. Short fine bill, yellowish eye-ring, pinkish legs.
rucbab2: Medium babbler with rufous-chestnut crown, olive-brown upperparts, greyish face, and whitish underparts faintly streaked on the breast. Slim dark bill, reddish eye, grey legs.
ruccra1: Small rail with rufous-chestnut crown and nape, olive-brown upperparts, grey face and breast, and white throat with finely barred flanks. Greenish bill, reddish legs, red eye.
rucdot1: Compact plover with grey-brown upperparts, white supercilium, grey face, and a broad rufous-chestnut breast band bordered below by a black band over a white belly. Short dark bill, dark legs.
rucela1: Small flycatcher with rufous-brown crown contrasting greyish-olive upperparts, plain face, and pale whitish-yellow underparts. Short dark bill, faint wing bars, dark legs.
rucfly1: Small flycatcher; male slaty-blue above with a black face mask, white throat, and a bright rufous-orange breast and flanks. Fine dark bill, white wing flash, dark legs.
rucful1: Small babbler with bright rufous-chestnut crown, olive-brown upperparts, grey face, and pale buffy-white underparts. Fine dark bill, faint dark lateral crown stripes, pinkish legs.
rucgre1: Small drab vireo-like bird with olive-green upperparts and pale whitish-grey underparts washed yellowish on flanks. Distinctive rusty-rufous crown contrasting with grey face and white throat; pale eye. Short straightish pinkish bill and pale legs.
ruckin: Tiny, plump olive-grey songbird with greenish wings showing two white wing bars and a dark bar below the lower bar. Bold white eye-ring broken at top; males flash a concealed scarlet crown patch. Thin black bill, dark legs with paler feet.
ruckin1: Stocky forest kingfisher with deep blue back, wings and tail, buff-rufous underparts and a broad rufous collar across the nape. Greenish-blue crown finely scaled; large heavy red bill, reddish legs.
ruclau1: Medium brown laughingthrush with olive-brown upperparts and bold black-and-rufous barring on wings and tail tip. Rufous chin and throat, greyish breast, white-tipped tail corners. Blackish lores; dark bill and pinkish legs.
rucmot1: Medium motmot with green back and wings, rufous-cinnamon underparts and a russet-brown crown. Black eye-mask bordered above by turquoise; long blue-green tail ending in bare-shafted racket tips. Stout black serrated bill, dark legs.
rucmot2: Large motmot with green upperparts, rufous head and breast, and a green belly with a black central spot. Black eye-mask; long blue-green racket-tipped tail. Heavy black bill, dark grey legs.
rucnig1: Cryptic grey-brown nightjar mottled and vermiculated for camouflage, with a rufous hindneck collar and rufous on the cheeks. Buff throat patch; males show white spots in wingtips and white tail corners. Tiny bill, short legs.
rucnun1: Small plump puffbird-relative with olive-brown upperparts, rufous-cinnamon underparts and face, and a rufous cap. Pale eye-ring; greyish wash on flanks. Short straight blackish bill, dark legs.
rucrob1: Large dark thrush, blackish overall with a broad bright rufous-orange collar across the lower throat and breast. Sooty-black head, back and belly. Yellow bill, yellow legs and yellow eye-ring.
rucsee1: Small finch-like seedeater, male boldly patterned: black crown, face and breast band with a white throat, white half-collar, rusty-buff nape collar and rusty flanks, dark upperparts and white wing speckling. Stubby pale bill, dark legs.
rucspa: Chunky grey-faced sparrow with rufous crown, grey nape and rufous-streaked brown back. Plain grey underparts, whitish throat bordered by a thin dark malar stripe; white eye-ring and rufous eyeline. Stout greyish bill, pinkish legs.
rucspa1: Grey-headed sparrow with bold black-and-grey striped head, a rufous nape collar and rufous shoulder patches. Grey underparts with a small black breast spot, brown streaked back. Conical greyish bill, pinkish legs.
rucspi1: Small slim furnariid with grey-brown back, rufous crown and rufous wing panel. Pale grey face and underparts, dusky throat with blackish streaking. Long dusky tail; thin dark bill, greyish legs.
rucsun2: Small sunbird, male with glossy metallic green-blue upperparts and head, a coppery-red cheek patch, and bright yellow underparts with an orange wash on the breast. Slender slightly curved black bill, dark legs.
rucswa2: Glossy blue-black swallow with entirely rufous-chestnut underparts and a rufous rump. Blue-black crown, back and deeply forked tail. Small black bill, dark legs.
ructan1: Medium tanager, male glossy blue-black overall with a concealed scarlet-red crown patch. Velvety black plumage; pale blue-grey base to lower mandible, dark legs. Female olive-brown above, ochre-buff below.
ructan3: Small warbler-like tanager with grey back, rufous-orange crown and rich rufous breast fading to yellowish-buff belly. Grey face; plain wings. Thin dark bill, dark legs.
ructes1: Tiny near-tailless wren-like bird, bright olive-green above and grey below, with a russet-rufous crown and crown sides. Bold whitish supercilium and dark eyeline. Stub tail; thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
rucwar: Small active warbler with olive-green back, bright yellow throat and breast, and whitish belly. Rufous crown, white supercilium, and a dark eyeline through a grey face. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs; often cocks the tail.
rucwar1: Olive-green warbler with grey head and a rufous-russet central crown patch bordered by blackish lateral stripes. Whitish supercilium, grey throat grading to yellow belly. Thin dark bill, pale legs.
rucwar4: Small warbler with olive-green back, bright yellow underparts, and a chestnut crown. White supercilium and dark eyeline on a grey face, white throat. Thin dark bill, pinkish legs; often cocks tail.
rudapa1: Small slender warbler with greenish-grey upperparts, a greyer head, and pale yellowish to whitish underparts. Rufous-buff wash on the breast or vent; pale eye, long graduated tail. Thin black bill, pinkish legs.
rudcra1: Small dark crake, deep rufous-chestnut overall with a slaty-grey head and neck, darker on crown. Reddish underparts; short cocked tail. Short greenish bill, reddish legs.
rudkin1: Stocky kingfisher, deep rufous-cinnamon to reddish-orange overall, slightly paler below, with a violet-tinged lilac wash on the rump. Very large bright red bill, red legs.
rudpig: Plump pigeon, dull vinaceous-purple to ruddy brown overall, deeper wine-red on head and underparts, with a slightly greyer rump and tail. Dark bill, dull red legs.
rudspi1: Small dark furnariid, rich rufous-chestnut overall with a darker dusky head and a contrasting blackish throat patch. Short rufous tail; thin dark bill, greyish legs.
rudtof1: Tiny flycatcher, rufous-cinnamon crown and upperparts with bright rufous wings, and pale yellowish underparts. Greyish face with a pale eye; small flat black bill, pale legs.
rudtre1: Small rufous-brown furnariid with bright rufous upperparts and tail, and underparts boldly spotted with buff-white teardrop spots edged black. White throat, dark face; thin dark bill, dusky legs.
rudwoo1: Plain reddish-brown woodcreeper, uniform rufous-chestnut overall with brighter rufous wings and tail and a slightly greyer crown and face. Unstreaked plumage; straight dark bill, dark legs.
ruegls1: Large glossy starling, iridescent purple-bronze overall with a long graduated tail and a bronzy-green wash on wings. Dark face; pale creamy-white eye. Black bill, black legs.
ruewar2: Small long-tailed warbler with streaked greyish-brown upperparts, pale buffy underparts, and a rufous-chestnut ear patch and face. Black breast band or spotting; very long graduated cocked tail. Thin dark bill, pale legs.
ruewea1: Compact weaver, male with bright golden-yellow body, a chestnut-rufous face and throat, and yellow-olive back. Red eye; black conical bill, pinkish legs. Female plainer yellowish-olive.
rufant10: Plump, nearly tailless antpitta, mostly warm chestnut-brown above and slightly paler chestnut below, with a contrasting white eye-ring on a rufous face. Large rounded body, long legs; stout dark bill, bluish-grey legs.
rufant2: Round tailless antpitta with olive-brown upperparts, a rufous-chestnut face and throat, and a grey-streaked greyish breast and belly. Pale eye-ring; stout body, long legs. Heavy dark bill, grey legs.
rufant3: Dark ground antthrush, blackish-brown overall with a rich rufous forehead and forecrown and rufous-tinged face. Short cocked tail, plump body, long legs. Stout black bill, pinkish-grey legs.
rufant4: Medium antbird, male uniform medium grey with an olive-brown tinge and bold white tips on the wing-coverts; female grey-brown above with a distinctive rufous face, pale tawny throat and belly. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
rufant7: Plump, almost tailless antpitta, warm rufous-brown overall, slightly brighter rufous on face, throat and breast, with paler buffy-white lower belly and vent. Faint pale eye-ring; stout dark bill, greyish legs.
rufant8: Round tailless antpitta, dark reddish yellow-brown above and lighter reddish-buff below, with a pale buff central belly and a pale eye-ring. Plump body, long legs; blackish bill with paler base, dull bluish-grey legs.
rufbab2: Small warm-toned babbler with olive-brown upperparts, a rufous-chestnut forehead and crown, and pale buffy-grey underparts with faint dusky throat streaking. Pale eye-ring; short thin bill, pinkish legs.
rufbab3: Medium dull brown babbler, greyish-brown overall with a rufous-tinged tail and wings and a slightly paler greyish throat and breast. Pale eye; long graduated tail. Slim dark bill, pale legs.
rufbar1: Medium babbler-like bird with olive-brown body, a rusty-rufous forehead and face, and grey-streaked underparts. Greyish nape, finely barred wings and tail. Short stout bill, pale legs.
rufbri1: Large dark robust bird with rich rufous-brown upperparts, a rufous face and breast, and a paler scalloped greyish belly. Long graduated tail often cocked; pale eye. Stout dark bill, strong dark legs.
rufcac2: Large bulky furnariid, uniform bright rufous-chestnut overall with a slightly shaggy crest and a long rufous tail. Heavy dark bill, dark grey legs; pale yellowish eye.
rufcan1: Slim furnariid with greyish-brown back, a rusty-rufous forecrown, and a rufous wing panel and rufous tail. Pale grey throat and underparts, faint dusky malar. Thin dark bill, dusky legs.
rufcas2: Medium flycatcher-like bird, uniform warm rufous-cinnamon overall, brightest on wings and tail, with a slightly paler throat. Plain face; broad flat dark bill, dark legs.
rufcra1: Small dark crake with olive-brown upperparts, a rufous-chestnut face and breast, and blackish underparts barred white on the belly and flanks. White wing patch in flight; short greenish bill, reddish legs.
rufcra2: Small crake, olive-brown above with a grey face and breast and bright rufous-cinnamon flanks barred faintly. Whitish throat; short pale-based bill, red legs.
ruffan13: Small slim flycatcher with grey-brown upperparts, a rufous-orange rump, uppertail base and forehead, and a black-and-white scalloped breast band below a white throat. White-tipped blackish tail often fanned; thin black bill, dark legs.
rufgle1: Stocky furnariid with rich rufous-brown upperparts and bright rufous wings and tail, and dull olive-brown underparts with a paler tawny throat. Faint pale eye-ring; heavy dark bill, greyish legs.
rufgna2: Small plump gnateater, male with rich apricot-orange face, throat and breast, an olive-brown back, and a brighter rufous crown; short tail. Slim white postocular tuft. Short dark bill, pale pinkish legs.
rufgna3: Small, plump, near-tailless antbird-like bird; warm rufous-brown crown and breast, olive-brown back, paler whitish belly, and a long white postocular tuft of plumes behind the eye that can be raised. Short blackish bill; pinkish legs.
rufgro: Chunky woodland grouse with cryptic mottled grey-brown or rufous plumage, fine dark barring on buff underparts, a fan-shaped tail with a broad black subterminal band, and erectile black neck ruffs. Short bill; small crest; feathered legs.
rufhor1: Very large hornbill with rich rufous-brown body and head, black wings, and a pale rufous-to-whitish tail. Massive yellow-and-red bill topped by a low casque; bare bluish skin around the eye; blackish legs.
rufhor2: Robust ovenbird, warm rufous-brown above with rufous wings and tail, paler buffy-white throat and underparts, and a faint pale supercilium. Straight greyish-pink bill; long pinkish legs; upright stance.
rufhum: Small hummingbird; male bright coppery-rufous on back, crown, flanks and tail, with a glittering orange-red iridescent gorget and white chest patch. Straight black needle bill; tiny feet; females green above with rufous-washed flanks.
rufmot1: Large green motmot with rich rufous head and breast, black face mask, green back and wings, turquoise-tinged tail with bare-shafted blue-and-black racket tips, and a small black breast spot. Broad black slightly decurved bill.
rufmou1: Plain medium flycatcher-like bird, uniformly dull rufous-brown overall, slightly paler and warmer on underparts, with no wing bars, streaking or markings. Broad blackish bill; dark legs; upright posture.
rufnig1: Large nightjar with cryptic rufous-brown plumage, fine dark vermiculations, a buff throat band, and bold dark scapular spots. Male shows white tail corners. Tiny dark bill with wide gape; short legs; large dark eyes.
rufpar2: Small stocky short-tailed parrot, mostly green with a rusty-red face and forehead, olive-brown wash on throat and breast, red shoulder patch, blue primaries, and a brownish-red tail tipped blue. Pale horn bill; greyish legs.
rufpic1: Tiny stub-tailed piculet; olive-green above, rich rufous-buff below and on the face, with a short pointed dark bill. Male has a small orange-red forecrown patch; striking yellow legs with only three toes.
rufpih1: Medium-sized, uniformly bright rufous-cinnamon bird with no markings, slightly paler on the throat and belly, and a rounded head. Broad blackish bill; dark legs; rather plump, big-headed, sluggish-looking shape.
rufpot1: Small potoo, deep orange-rufous overall with paler cinnamon throat, large black-edged white spots on the upper belly and scapulars, and a barred tail. Short broad hooked black bill with long bristles; large yellow eyes.
rufpri1: Small warbler with grey-brown crown and back, rufous-tinged wings, a short pale supercilium, and buffy-rufous underparts whitening on throat. Fine blackish bill; long graduated tail often cocked; pinkish legs.
rufpri2: Small pale prinia, sandy grey-brown above with a rufous forehead and forecrown, plain whitish underparts washed buff, and a long graduated tail. Short blackish bill; pinkish legs; rather plain-faced.
rufroc1: Striking ground bird with slate-grey upperparts and head, a bold white moustachial stripe and white throat patch, blackish face, and rich rufous-chestnut belly, vent and rump. Long blackish bill; long dark legs; long tail.
rufsco1: Medium screech-owl, richly rufous-brown overall with dense dark vermiculations and streaking, prominent ear tufts, and a rufous facial disc bordered darker. Greenish-grey bill; large dark eyes; feathered feet.
rufsht1: Plain medium songbird, warm rufous-brown above and rich buffy-rufous below, with a slightly paler throat and a fairly large head. Stout dark hooked bill; greyish legs; unmarked plumage with a gentle expression.
rufsib1: Slim babbler with a rich rufous head, breast and underparts, a grey-brown back and wings, grey-edged flight feathers, and a long graduated rufous-and-grey tail. Slender blackish bill; pinkish legs.
rufson1: Streaky brown songlark; warm brown above heavily streaked dark, rufous wing panel, buff underparts with a rufous wash on the vent, and a faint pale supercilium. Long thin tail; slender bill; pinkish legs; male larger.
rufspi1: Small uniformly deep rufous-chestnut spinetail with slightly darker wings and a long graduated rufous tail, and a faint dusky lore. Short dark bill; greyish legs; plain unmarked plumage.
ruftai1: Small tailorbird with a rufous forehead and forecrown, olive-green back, wings and tail, grey face and breast, and a whitish throat. Long slender slightly decurved bill; pinkish legs; long tail often cocked.
ruftho1: Slim ovenbird with a rufous forecrown, plain greyish-brown upperparts, rufous wing edgings and tail, and pale buffy-white underparts with faint dusky breast streaking. Straight greyish bill; pinkish legs; long tail.
rufthr1: Plain thrush-like bird, warm rufous-brown above and rich orange-rufous below, with a slightly paler throat and large dark eyes. Short blackish bill; dark legs; rounded head and gentle, unmarked appearance.
ruftof1: Tiny tody-flycatcher with a rusty-rufous forehead and face, olive-green crown and back, two pale wing bars, a yellow belly and pale throat. Broad flat blackish bill; pale legs; tail often cocked.
ruftre2: Large long-tailed treepie; rufous-cinnamon body and back, black head and throat, pale silvery-grey wing panel, and a very long grey tail with a broad black tip. Stout pale grey down-curved bill; dark legs.
rufvan1: Striking vanga; male has a black hood, rich rufous-chestnut back, wings and tail, and pure white underparts. Stout slightly hooked blue-grey bill; dark legs; bold clean-cut pattern.
