rufwar1: Tiny warbler with a rufous-orange face and crown bordered by black lateral crown-stripes, olive-green back, white throat, and yellow-washed breast and flanks. Fine dark bill; pale legs; active, neat-faced.
rufwhi1: Medium whistler; male grey above with a black head and broad black breast band separating a white throat from rich rufous-buff underparts. Stout black bill; dark legs; female plainer brownish-grey with streaked breast.
rufwoo2: Medium woodpecker with overall rufous-brown plumage finely barred blackish on wings and tail, and a slightly paler head. Male has a small dark-red patch below the eye. Short blackish chisel bill; grey legs.
rufwre1: Small wren, uniformly rich rufous-chestnut overall with slightly darker fine barring on wings and tail, and a faint paler throat. Slender dark bill; dark legs; longish tail often cocked; rounded shape.
rugdov: Small ground dove; male warm rusty-cinnamon overall with a pale grey crown, black spots on the wing coverts, and blackish flight feathers and tail tip. Short dark bill; pinkish legs; female duller greyish-brown.
rugfly1: Small flycatcher; male slaty-grey above with a narrow rufous-orange throat gorget, a thin white supercilium, blackish breast band, orange-buff flanks and white belly, and white tail base. Small black bill; dark legs.
ruhcha1: Slim long-tailed chachalaca, olive-brown body with a rufous-chestnut head and neck, rufous wing patches in flight, and a long dark glossy tail with paler tips. Bare reddish throat skin; dark bill; grey legs.
ruhspi1: Small spinetail with a rusty-rufous crown and nape, grey-brown back, rufous wings, pale greyish throat and underparts, and a long graduated rufous tail. Short dark bill; greyish legs.
ruhtai2: Small montane tailorbird with a rufous head, olive-green back, wings and tail, a pale buff throat and chest, and a yellow belly. Long slender slightly decurved bill; pinkish legs; long tail often cocked.
ruhtan1: Small tanager; male has a rufous-chestnut crown and face, black back and wings, yellow rump, throat and breast, and a black tail. Slender pointed dark bill; greyish legs; female olive-green and yellow.
ruhwoo1: Large woodpecker with a bright rufous-chestnut head, crest and underparts, finely black-barred rufous back and wings, and a black tail. Male shows a red malar streak; pale ivory chisel bill; grey legs.
rulkin1: Compact kingfisher with a blue-green back and wings, a rufous-buff head with a dark eye-line, white collar and underparts, and a buffy wash on the breast. Large blackish bill; dark legs; large-headed.
rulowl1: Medium owl with dark rufous-brown upperparts finely barred buff, a rounded head with no ear tufts, buff underparts boldly barred dark brown, and rich rufous legs. Pale facial disc; yellowish bill; dark eyes.
rumfly1: Medium flycatcher with olive-brown upperparts, a black-and-white striped head with a concealed orange crown patch, white throat, and bright yellow underparts; rufous edgings on wings and tail. Stout black bill; dark legs.
rumfog1: Largely rufous-brown foliage-gleaner, rich russet on back, wings and tail, warm buffy-rufous below, with a faint pale eyering. Long, slightly upturned pointed greyish bill; greyish legs; plain-faced.
rumgua1: Large brown guan with olive-brown upperparts, rufous-tinged wings, a pale-scaled breast, a white supercilium, and a long broad rufous-edged tail. Bare reddish throat skin; dark bill; reddish legs.
rumwar1: Tiny ground-dwelling warbler-like bird, dull grey-brown above and pale greyish below, with a plain face, faint pale eyering, and very short tail. Fine dark bill; pinkish legs; mouse-like skulking shape.
rungre1: Small greenlet with a rufous-brown crown and nape, olive-green back, wings and tail, a greyish face, and pale buffy-white underparts. Short stout pale bill; greyish legs; rather plain-faced.
runhor1: Very large hornbill; male rufous-brown on head, neck and underparts with a slaty-black back and wings, white-tipped flight feathers, and a white-tipped black-and-white tail. Pale yellowish bill with dark ridges; blue throat skin.
runlau1: Medium laughingthrush, olive-brown above with a black face mask and throat bordered by a bright rufous-chestnut neck patch, grey crown, and buffy-brown underparts. Dark bill; pinkish legs.
runpit1: Plump short-tailed pitta with a rusty-rufous nape and crown sides, green back and wings, a black eye-stripe, buff-scaled underparts, and a buff throat. Stout dark bill; long pinkish legs.
runpuf1: Stocky puffbird, rufous-brown above and rich rufous below, with a rufous-buff throat and a contrasting blackish-and-white half-collar across the lower neck. Stout black hooked bill; greyish legs; big-headed.
runthr1: Plain nightingale-thrush, uniform russet-brown above and on the head, paler greyish-buff below with a whitish belly, and a faint pale eyering. Bill mostly dark with paler base; pinkish legs; large dark eyes.
runwhi1: Plump bird with an olive-green back and wings, a grey face, a rich rufous nape and hindcrown, and bright yellow underparts. Stout blackish bill; greyish legs; rounded, big-headed shape.
runwor1: Large rail with slate-gray head and neck, olive-brown back, rich rufous wings and breast, and contrasting white belly and black rump and tail. Stout greenish-yellow bill, bright coral-red legs, and red eyes.
runwre2: Large boldly patterned wren with blackish crown and eyestripe, white supercilium, chestnut nape and back, and black-and-white streaked shoulders. Underparts white on throat grading to buff with dark flank barring; wings and gray-brown tail boldly barred, tail white-tipped.
runwry1: Cryptically patterned brown woodpecker-relative finely vermiculated gray, brown and buff like tree bark, with a dark crown line and a bold rufous-orange throat patch. Short pointed pale bill, gray-brown legs.
rupfly1: Entirely bright cinnamon-rufous flycatcher with a slightly darker head and long graduated rufous tail; underparts paler rufous. Stout pale bluish bill and dark eye, dark legs.
ruqdov: Plump terrestrial dove; male warm cinnamon-rufous above with purplish gloss, paler rufous-buff below, and a pale cream facial stripe below the dark cheek line. Reddish bill base, red legs.
rurant1: Small colorful antwren with pale gray head, black crown, olive back, and concealed rufous rump; dusky wings with two yellow wingbars and pale yellow belly. Long narrow dark bill, gray legs.
rurcha1: Robin-chat with slaty-black crown and back, bold white supercilium over a black face, and bright orange-rufous underparts, neck-sides and rump; gray-edged blackish wings, rufous tail with dark central feathers. Black bill and legs.
rurfog1: Medium foliage-gleaner, dark olive-brown above with a bright chestnut rump and rufous tail, buff supercilium and eyering on a dark face; pale yellowish-buff throat, olive-brown breast and belly. Straight pale-based bill, grayish legs.
rursee1: Small finch; male bluish-gray on crown and back, with striking chestnut-rufous rump and underparts, black wings and tail, and a small white wing speculum. Short conical gray bill, dark legs.
rusant1: Stocky antshrike, warm russet-brown above with rufous-edged wings and tail, faint dusky streaking on crown; buffy-olive underparts and pale supercilium. Heavy hooked grayish bill, gray legs.
rusbir1: Small, plump, short-winged ground bird with rich rufous-brown upperparts finely barred dusky, paler buff-brown underparts with fine dark scaling, and a dark-tipped throat. Long graduated tail often cocked; slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
rusbla: Slim blackbird; breeding male glossy greenish-black with a pale yellow eye. Nonbreeding birds show rusty feather edges on head, back and breast. Slender pointed dark bill, dark legs.
rusbro1: Tiny stout broadbill; brown crown and upperparts spotted black and buff, with bright rufous flanks and breast-sides bordering a white-streaked throat and central underparts. Broad flat pale bill, dull legs.
ruscra1: Small rail with olive-brown back, slaty-gray face and breast, rich rufous flanks and neck-sides, and bold black-and-white barring on flanks and undertail. Short greenish bill, pinkish legs.
rusflo1: Slim flowerpiercer; male blue-gray above and bright rufous-cinnamon below, with a pale supercilium and dark lores. Short upturned hook-tipped black bill, dark legs.
ruslau1: Plump gray-brown laughingthrush with warm rufous wings, flanks and undertail, plain face and grayish crown; underparts grayish grading to rusty. Stout pinkish-yellow bill, pinkish legs.
ruspit1: Large, uniformly rich rufous-brown bird, slightly paler and warmer below, with a plain face and dark eye; heavy build and longish tail. Stout blackish hook-tipped bill, dark legs.
russpa1: Large heavy sparrow, gray-brown above with bold rufous-chestnut streaking on the back, a rufous crown and eyeline, and a plain pale gray face and underparts. Thick pale-based bill, pinkish legs.
russpa2: Sparrow; male bright cinnamon-chestnut on crown, nape and back with black streaking on the mantle, a black throat patch and white cheeks, and pale grayish underparts. Stout dark bill, pinkish legs.
rutant1: Small antbird; male dark gray with bold white spots on wing coverts, a contrasting rufous-chestnut rump and tail, and faint white throat streaking. Slender dark bill, gray legs.
rutant2: Plump terrestrial antthrush, rich rufous-brown above and on the wings and tail, with pale buff scaly-edged underparts and a whitish throat; pale eyering. Short dark bill, long pinkish legs, very short tail.
rutant3: Small antwren; male olive-brown above with a chestnut-rufous mantle patch and rufous tail, pale-tipped wing coverts, and largely gray throat and breast with slight stippling. Red-orange eye, dark bill, gray legs.
rutant4: Antbird with bare blue facial skin around the eye, plain warm brown back, wings and tail, and a bright orange-rufous throat contrasting with grayish-brown underparts. Dark bill, grayish legs.
rutant5: Plump round antpitta with gray forecrown darkening to the rear, faint whitish eyering, rufous below the eye, rufous-chestnut upper back and dark rufous-brown lower back, wings and tail; underparts blotched gray and rusty with a whitish throat. Stout dark bill, very short tail, long pale legs.
rutatt1: Attila with gray head, olive-brown back, and bright rufous-chestnut wings, rump and tail; pale buffy-rufous underparts and a pale eye. Stout hooked black bill, gray legs.
rutbuh1: Slaty-gray crake-like rail with olive-brown back and wings, plain grayish underparts grading to cinnamon-buff vent and rufous undertail; dark crown. Greenish-yellow bill, yellow-olive legs.
rutfla1: Flat-billed flycatcher, olive-green above with two faint buff wingbars and a bright rufous tail; pale yellowish-olive underparts and a plain face. Very broad flat blackish bill, dark legs.
rutfly2: Tiny flycatcher with grayish head, olive-brown back, and bright rufous-cinnamon wings, rump and tail; pale buff-cinnamon underparts and dark eye. Small flat bill, pale legs.
rutfly6: Small flycatcher with gray-brown head and upperparts, a bright rufous-orange rump and tail, and pale buffy-orange underparts; plain face with pale eyering. Small dark bill, dark legs.
rutfog1: Slim foliage-gleaner, olive-brown above with a prominent buff supercilium and eyering, bright rufous tail, and warm buff-brown throat and breast grading to olive belly. Straight pale-based bill, grayish legs.
rutful1: Small fulvetta with rufous-brown crown, gray-brown back and wings, a bold white supercilium and black lateral crown-stripes, and a bright rufous-orange throat above whitish underparts. Small dark bill, pinkish legs.
ruther1: Stocky heron; adult rich rufous-chestnut head, neck and breast finely vermiculated black, blackish-barred rufous-brown back, and a fine white-bordered throat stripe. Stout yellowish dagger bill, greenish legs.
ruthum1: Small hummingbird; male has a glittering golden-orange throat and breast and a brilliant ruby-red crown, dusky belly and rufous tail; dark brown back. Short straight black bill, dark feet.
rutjac1: Slender glittering green jacamar with metallic golden-green upperparts and throat band, a white or buff throat, and bright rufous-cinnamon underparts and undertail; very long graduated tail. Long needle-like black bill, dark legs.
rutkit1: Small raptor; slate-gray head and upperparts, white throat with dark central stripe, gray-barred white breast, and rufous thighs and flanks; barred underwing. Hooked black bill with yellow cere, yellow legs.
rutlar2: Sturdy plain lark, sandy gray-brown above and paler below with diffuse breast streaking, and bright rufous-cinnamon wings and tail conspicuous in flight. Stout pale conical bill, pale pinkish legs.
rutpar1: Round partridge with gray breast and face, fine black-and-white forehead and supercilium, a bright rufous-chestnut throat patch, olive-brown back and chestnut-barred flanks. Short dark bill, reddish legs.
rutpla1: Finch-like plantcutter; male gray-brown streaked above, with a rufous-chestnut crown, throat and underparts, dark-streaked back, and two pale wingbars; rufous in the wings and tail. Short stout finch bill, dark legs.
rutpuf1: Chunky puffbird, brown above with a buff-spotted crown and back, a broad cinnamon-rufous breast band, two dark collars and a white throat and belly. Heavy hooked blackish bill, gray legs.
rutrob1: Small robin, gray-brown above with a bright rufous-tinged tail and rump, scaly dark crescents on a whitish breast, and a pale eyering on a plain face. Slender dark bill, pale pinkish legs.
rutsap1: Small hummingbird; male glittering golden-green with a brilliant violet-blue throat and forecrown, rufous-chestnut undertail coverts, and rufous in the tail. Straight reddish bill with dark tip, dark feet.
rutsha2: Slim shama, glossy slaty-blue above and on the breast, with a bright rufous-orange rump, belly and tail; long graduated tail. Slender black bill, pale pinkish legs.
rutshr2: Slim shrike; male sandy gray-brown above with a bright rufous-orange tail and rump, pale buff underparts, and a broad black mask through the eye bordered above by a white brow. Hooked black bill, dark legs.
rutsol1: Slaty-gray solitaire with a contrasting white throat outlined black, rufous-orange belly and undertail, and white outer tail feathers; pale eyering. Slender dark bill, orange-yellow legs.
ruttai1: Small warbler-like tailorbird, rich rufous-chestnut crown and nape, olive-green back, and clean whitish underparts with a pale gray face; long often-cocked tail. Slender slightly downcurved bill, pinkish legs.
ruttan1: Colorful tanager; green upperparts spangled black, a bright rufous-orange throat, blackish mask, and bluish-green flanks and breast with dark scaling, paler belly. Short conical dark bill, gray legs.
rutthr1: Plump thrush, warm rufous-brown above with a rufous-tinged tail, and white underparts boldly marked with large blackish crescent-shaped spots; pale eyering and dark face scaling. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
ruttyr1: Slim flycatcher, dark gray to slaty above with a contrasting bright rufous tail and rufous-edged wings, and pale grayish underparts; reddish or pale eye. Small dark bill, dark legs.
rutwea1: Large stocky weaver, scaly gray-brown above with pale-fringed feathers giving a spotted look, whitish underparts, a bright rufous rump and tail, and a pale eye. Stout dark conical bill, pinkish legs.
rutxen1: Tiny xenops, olive-brown above with a bright rufous rump and tail and a short buff supercilium; rufous-tinged wings and faintly streaked buff underparts. Short straight wedge-shaped bill, gray legs.
ruvcha1: Large slender olive-brown chachalaca with small grey head, bare reddish facial skin and pale eye. Plain greyish-brown breast grades to buff belly; long broad tail dark with bold rufous-chestnut outer feather tips. Bill dark, legs pinkish-grey.
ruvtap1: Small dark wren-like tapaculo, uniformly slate-grey overall with slightly paler underparts and contrasting rich rufous-brown lower flanks and vent. Short cocked tail, dark bill, pale brownish legs; stout rounded body.
ruvtit2: Small dark tit with glossy black head and throat, contrasting white cheek patch, and grey-black back. Underparts sooty-grey grading to bright rufous-chestnut lower belly and vent. Short crest, stubby black bill, dark legs.
ruvwar2: Small grey-brown warbler with plain greyish upperparts, paler grey underparts, and distinctive chestnut-rufous undertail-coverts. Whitish throat, pale eye, fine dark bill, dark outer tail with white corners; slim long-tailed shape.
ruvyuh1: Small olive-brown yuhina with shaggy rufous-tinged crest and grey face, white eye-ring and fine streaks on greyish throat. Olive upperparts, buff-grey underparts, and contrasting rufous-orange vent. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
ruwant2: Small antshrike, male blackish-grey above with bold white spots on wing-coverts forming wing bars, rufous edgings on flight feathers, white throat and grey underparts; concealed white back patch. Stout hooked black bill, grey legs.
ruwant3: Small grey antwren, male grey above with blackish crown, white supercilium, and black-and-white striped wing-coverts; whitish-grey underparts. Rufous-edged primaries give rusty wing tone. Fine dark bill, pale legs; long tail with white tips.
ruwant4: Small antwren, male grey above with black crown, white supercilium, black wings with bold rufous margins on flight feathers and white-tipped coverts. Underparts pale grey washed buff. Fine dark bill, greyish legs, white-cornered tail.
ruwapa1: Small active warbler with bright chestnut-rufous crown, grey face, throat and upperparts, and a broad black breast band separating throat from whitish-yellow belly. Long graduated tail, slender dark bill, pale legs.
ruwbar1: Small rufous-brown ovenbird with finely buff-spotted underparts and faint pale spotting on wings. Plain rufous-brown upperparts and rufous tail, indistinct buff supercilium and eye-ring. Short slightly upturned dark bill, pale legs.
ruwful1: Small fulvetta with chestnut-rufous crown bordered by black lateral stripes, grey face and grey-olive upperparts. Whitish throat, buff-grey underparts, and rufous-edged wing feathers. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs; rounded body.
ruwphi2: Small flycatcher-like bird, male slaty blue-grey overall with contrasting bright rufous-chestnut wings and dark tail; paler grey belly. Female browner with rufous wings. Stout broad black bill, dark eye, dark legs.
ruwspa: Plain grey-brown sparrow with rufous crown and rufous shoulder patch (lesser coverts), grey face with black malar stripe and rufous eyeline. Unmarked pale grey underparts. Yellowish lower mandible, dark upper; pinkish legs; long rounded tail.
ruwspa1: Tiny dumpy spadebill with very broad flat black bill, olive-brown upperparts and cinnamon-rufous wings. Crown olive-brown with concealed white central patch, buff supercilium, pale ear patch, white throat and buff belly. Pinkish legs.
ruwtan1: Brilliant multicoloured tanager, male with chestnut-rufous crown and nape, golden-green back, turquoise-green underparts and rump, and rufous-chestnut wing patch. Black mask and bill, dark legs; compact stocky shape.
rvgcuc1: Large terrestrial cuckoo with shaggy bushy crest, glossy bronze-green back and wings, blue-grey breast, rufous belly and bare blue-violet orbital skin. Long broad iridescent tail, heavy curved blackish bill, strong grey legs.
rwbeye1: Large blackish antbird with extensive bare red skin around the eye. Male sooty-black overall with bold reddish-chestnut wing patch and rufous-edged feathers; broad rounded tail. Stout black bill, dark legs.
rwgcuc1: Large ground-cuckoo with bushy crest, blackish-glossed green upperparts, grey breast, buff-rufous belly and bare bluish orbital skin. Rufous-chestnut primaries show in flight; long iridescent tail. Heavy decurved bill, sturdy grey legs.
ryumin1: Slim minivet, male glossy black above with dark grey underparts and a small reddish-orange wing patch and orange-red rump; rather sooty overall with limited colour. Fine black bill, black legs, long black tail.
ryurob2: Plump robin, male rich orange-rufous above from crown to tail, with black face, throat and breast sharply bordering white lower underparts. Bold contrast head pattern, dark bill, pale pinkish legs; upright stance.
ryusco1: Small greyish-brown scops-owl with short ear tufts, finely vermiculated grey-brown plumage and dark streaking below. Pale facial disc rim, yellow eyes; cryptic bark-like pattern. Dark bill, feathered pinkish-grey toes.
sabher1: Large hermit hummingbird with scaly olive-green-brown upperparts and pale underparts heavily dark-streaked, white supercilium and dark eye mask. Orange-ochre throat, orange tail sides. Long straight heavy black bill with serrated edges, hooked tip.
sabjay: Medium jay, deep violet-blue above on head, wings and tail, with blackish face and throat; underparts paler blue-grey. Pale eye in adults. Stout black bill, black legs; long tail, crestless rounded head.
sablar2: Stocky short-tailed lark, sandy grey-brown above with bold dark streaking, prominent whitish supercilium and dark-bordered ear-coverts. White throat and breast with heavy dark streaks, plain pale belly. Short stout pinkish bill, pale legs.
sabspa1: Striking sparrow with black-and-grey striped head (black crown stripes, grey median), olive-green back, and a black breast band on white underparts. Bright orange-yellow bill, yellow shoulder bend. Greyish legs; long tail.
sacbla2: Bright blackbird, male glossy black with extensive saffron-yellow crown, nape, rump and shoulder patch creating bold yellow-and-black contrast. Sharp pointed black bill, black legs; medium slender icterid shape.
sackin1: Compact kingfisher with greenish-blue crown and wings, buff-white underparts and collar, broad black eyestripe through to nape and a buff loral spot. Heavy black bill with paler base, dark legs; large-headed shape.
sacmel1: Large dull honeyeater, light grey-brown above and whitish below with diffuse dusky streaking. Plain whitish face framing a beady black eye, no bright markings. Long decurved black bill, dark legs; robust build.
sactan1: Vivid tanager with golden-yellow crown, black mask and throat, grass-green back, and turquoise-blue underparts. Black-centred wings edged green; compact body. Black bill and legs; jewel-like multicolour pattern.
saddle2: Glossy black starling-like bird with a bright reddish-chestnut saddle across back, rump and wing-coverts, and a pendulous bright orange-red wattle at the gape. Stout black bill, strong dark legs; long tail.
sadfly1: Small plain Myiarchus flycatcher, olive-brown above with greyish throat and breast and pale yellow belly. Faint pale wing edgings, slight rufous in tail. Slender black bill with paler base, dark legs; modest crest.
saffin: Bright golden-yellow finch, male rich saffron-yellow overall with orange-tinged forehead and crown, slightly duller olive-yellow back with faint streaks. Conspicuous yellow underparts. Stout greyish conical bill, pinkish legs.
safspa1: Sparrow with grey head boldly striped black, olive-green back, and a black breast band across white underparts; greyish flanks. Bright orange-yellow bill, yellow shoulder bend. Greyish legs; resembles Saffron-billed Sparrow.
saftou2: Small toucanet with rich saffron-yellow head, breast and underparts, contrasting blackish-olive back and wings, and bright red rump. Pale greenish-yellow bill with reddish base, blue-grey orbital skin, dark legs.
saggro: Very large chunky grouse, mottled grey-brown above; male with blackish belly patch, black throat bordered by white breast ruff, spiky pointed tail and yellow eye-combs above the eyes. Inflatable yellow chest air sacs in display.
sagspa1: Plain grey-headed sparrow, sandy grey-brown above with faint streaking, unstreaked grey head with white eye-ring, single dark central breast spot and dark malar stripe. Whitish underparts, dark bill, pinkish legs; long tail.
sagthr: Slim grey-brown thrasher, plain greyish-brown above with bold dark teardrop streaking on whitish underparts. Faint pale wing bars, yellow eye, white tail corners. Short straight dark bill, pale legs.
sahpar1: Stocky short-tailed parrot, mostly green with a bright golden-yellow head and orange-red shoulder and bend of wing. Greenish underparts, dark eye with pale orbital ring. Pale horn bill, grey legs.
sakwea1: Sparrow-like weaver, brown-streaked above and pale buff below, with a contrasting black face mask and throat in breeding males, pale crown and red eye. Whitish underparts, conical horn bill, pinkish legs.
salant1: Tiny antwren, male grey above and below with a black throat and upper breast, and white-tipped wing-coverts forming small spots. Plain grey overall; fine straight dark bill, pale legs, short tail.
salcur1: Large glossy black curassow with curly crest, white belly and white tail tip, and a tall bright red laterally compressed bill (casque). Heavy build, reddish-pink legs; sleek black head and neck.
salwar1: Small olive-brown leaf warbler, plain greyish-olive above with pale supercilium and dark eyestripe, dull whitish-buff underparts. Faint pale wing bar, fine dark bill with pale base, pinkish legs; very similar to Pale-legged Warbler.
samant1: Plump antpitta, olive-brown above with rufous-tinged crown, greyish face and pale eye-ring. Whitish throat and buff-brown underparts faintly streaked, plain belly. Stout dark bill, long pale pinkish legs; nearly tailless rounded body.
samant2: Small antbird, male blackish-grey above with white-spotted wing-coverts and concealed white back patch; underparts grey with black-streaked white throat and breast. Female browner. Fine dark bill, grey legs, longish tail.
samfog1: Rich rufous-brown foliage-gleaner, warm rufous above and on wings and tail, with a contrasting rufous-chestnut breast and buffier throat. Faint pale eyering, stout slightly decurved dark bill, greyish legs.
sampar1: Small green parakeet, mostly bright green with a maroon-red forehead and crown, red shoulder/bend of wing, and dull scaly breast. Reddish patch on belly, long pointed tail. Dark bill, grey legs.
samsco1: Small screech-owl with greyish-brown cryptic plumage, fine dark streaking and vermiculations, short ear tufts and a pale-rimmed facial disc. Eyes orange-yellow; dark bill, feathered greyish toes; bark-like camouflage.
samsta1: Large dark glossy starling, sooty brownish-black overall with faint greenish gloss and a dark red-brown eye. Heavy build, stout slightly decurved black bill, strong black legs; long broad tail.
samtap1: Small dark tapaculo, slaty blackish-grey above and below with a contrasting warm brown lower back, flanks and vent. Short cocked tail, stubby black bill, brownish legs; rounded skulking shape.
samwar1: Distinctive warbler, olive-green above and bright yellow below with a bold black-and-white striped head pattern (black crown sides and eyestripe, white supercilium and median crown). Fine dark bill, pale legs; ornate head most striking.
samwhi1: Plump, large-headed whistler. Male olive-green above with blacker wings, bright yellow forehead and underparts, and a dusky throat mottled with yellow; no black breast band. Stout black bill, dark legs.
sancra: Tall, long-legged crane, overall grey often stained rusty, with a bare red crown and white cheeks. Bustle of drooping tertials over the tail. Long dark bill, grey-black legs, yellow eye.
sangal1: Small, plump, short-tailed tapaculo-like bird. Pale sandy cinnamon crown, back and wings, with a blackish tail tipped cinnamon. Clean white throat and breast grading to cinnamon flanks. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
sanlar1: Small, pale sandy-grey lark, finely streaked above, with whitish underparts and faint breast streaking. Pale supercilium, short crest, and a slender pale bill. Whitish outer tail feathers; pale legs.
sanpar2: Small green parakeet with a brownish-scaled breast and face, dull reddish-maroon belly patch and rump, and bluish primaries. Dark bare facial skin; pale horn bill; grey legs.
sapayo1: Plain, broad-billed olive bird; head and upperparts dull olive-green, throat and belly yellower olive, wings and tail browner. Male shows a usually concealed yellow crown stripe. Wide flat black bill with rictal bristles, grey legs.
sarcra1: Very tall pale grey crane with a bare red head and upper neck and a small whitish ear patch. Drooping tertial bustle over the tail. Long grey bill, pinkish-red legs.
sarpar2: Tiny stub-tailed green parrotlet with a dark face, blue wing edgings, and a violet-purple rump and lower back. Bright yellow underwing in flight. Pale horn bill, dull pinkish legs.
saseme1: Small glittering hummingbird; bright golden-green above, shining green throat and breast often with violet-blue spangles, white belly. Slightly forked blue-black tail. Straight blackish bill, dark legs.
satant1: Small dark-grey antshrike with a contrasting black throat and a hooked bill. Uniform slate-grey overall with a hidden white interscapular patch. Pale eye; blackish bill; grey legs.
satbow1: Robust bowerbird; adult male glossy blue-black overall with a violet sheen, contrasting whitish-blue eye. Pale, stout ivory bill and pale legs; immatures and females olive-green above, scalloped below.
satfly1: Compact flycatcher; male glossy blue-black on head, throat and upperparts with a sharp clean white lower breast and belly. Short black bill, dark legs; female duller with rufous wing edges.
saugul2: Small gull with a black hood in breeding plumage, white crescents above and below the eye, pale grey back and white underparts. Short black bill, black legs, black wingtips with white spots.
sauter2: Tiny tern, pale grey above with white underparts, a black cap and white forehead, and a black-tipped yellow bill. Dark outer primaries; dull yellowish-brown legs; forked white tail.
savhaw1: Large long-legged hawk; pale rufous-cinnamon overall, finely barred below, with grey-and-rufous wings showing bright rufous patches in flight. Broad black-and-white banded tail, yellow cere and legs.
savnig1: Cryptic grey-brown nightjar mottled and streaked, with a buff hindneck collar. Male shows white throat patches and white tips to the outer tail and wing patches. Tiny dark bill, short dark legs.
savspa: Small streaky brown sparrow, heavily streaked above and on the breast, with a pale median crown stripe and a distinctive yellowish patch on the supercilium before the eye. Pink legs, short notched tail.
sawtan1: Small tanager; male brilliant scarlet-red on the head, back and wings with bright white underparts and flanks, leaving a narrow scarlet line down the center linking hood and undertail. Dark bill, grey legs.
saxspa1: Pale sandy sparrow; male grey-brown above with a grey crown, black throat patch and a black eyestripe, whitish underparts. Stout pale horn bill, pale pinkish legs.
saypho: Slim, upright flycatcher; brownish-grey head, back and breast with a contrasting pale cinnamon-buff belly and a blackish tail. Thin black bill, black legs; faint dark wash on wings.
saytan1: Medium tanager, uniformly pale dull blue-grey with slightly bluer wings and tail and a greyish back. Plain face, no markings. Stout greyish bill, dark grey legs.
sbcdov1: Long-tailed cuckoo-dove; warm cinnamon-brown above with a pinkish-buff head and underparts, faint greenish neck gloss. Long graduated brown tail. Dark bill, reddish legs, reddish eye.
sbeowl1: Very large dark brown eagle-owl with prominent outward-slanting ear tufts. Dark brown above, buff-white below boldly spotted and barred with black, and a whitish throat. Pale bill, feathered legs, dark eyes.
sbffal1: Medium forest-falcon, plain slaty-grey above and on the head with clean unbarred white underparts. Long graduated blackish tail with narrow white bands. Yellow-orange bare face, cere and legs; hooked bill.
sbgtyr1: Small, slim ground-tyrant; sandy grey-brown above and pale buffy-white below with faint breast streaking. Pale supercilium and dark lores. Short bill with a pale base, blackish legs; whitish outer tail.
sbmtan1: Striking mountain tanager; deep black head, back and wings with a brilliant scarlet-red belly and rump, and contrasting blue shoulder and rump patches. Stout black bill, dark legs.
sbnthr1: Dark, slim thrush; uniform slaty-grey to blackish overall with a slightly paler grey belly, and a striking pale yellow-orange eye-ring and pale orange bill. Pinkish-orange legs.
sbsbab1: Slim scimitar-babbler with a long, slender, strongly down-curved yellowish bill. Rufous-brown above, with a long white supercilium and white throat and breast, rufous flanks. Dull legs.
sbsbab2: Scimitar-babbler with a long curved bill, brown above and white below, with a bold black necklace across the breast, rufous cheeks and a black-and-white face pattern. Yellowish lower mandible, grey legs.
sbsbab3: Small scimitar-babbler; olive-brown above with a rufous neck-collar, white throat and breast boldly streaked black, and a slender down-curved bill (dark above, pale below). Dull legs.
sbtman1: Small plain manakin; dull olive-green above and on throat and breast, grading to a clear pale sulphur-yellow belly, with a partly concealed yellow crown stripe. Pale iris, short dark bill, pale legs.
sbtwea1: Small weaver; breeding male golden-yellow below and on the head with an olive-green back and brown wash, and a chestnut-brown throat. Yellowish wing edgings; black bill, pinkish legs, red eye.
sbwrai1: Plump rail; slaty-grey head, neck and breast, olive-brown back and wings, and a rufous-chestnut belly and rump. Bright greenish-yellow bill, coral-red legs, red eye.
scaant1: Plump, nearly tailless antpitta; olive-brown above with a grey nape, and buffy underparts heavily scaled black, with a black throat and small buff malar streak. Stout dark bill, long pinkish legs.
scaant2: Tiny antbird; male black above and on the breast, boldly spotted and scaled white on wings, back and breast, with a white belly. Female browner with buff scaling. Short dark bill, pale legs.
scaant3: Small antbird; warm rufous-brown above with rufous wings and tail, a grey face and breast scalloped with black crescents, and a whitish belly. Dark bill, pinkish-grey legs.
scadov1: Small ground-dove; sandy grey-brown overall with the entire body heavily scaled by dark feather edges giving a scaly look, dark-tipped wings, and rufous in the wings in flight. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
scafra2: Stocky spurfowl; grey-brown overall finely scaled and vermiculated, with dark feather edging creating a scaled pattern, and a pale throat. Red bare facial skin, reddish bill and legs.
scafru1: Plump cotinga; olive-green above heavily scaled with black, yellowish-scaled underparts, a black crown and a pale eye-ring. Short stout dark bill, greenish legs; male shows a black crown.
scalau1: Olive-brown laughingthrush with fine pale scaling across the body, a greyish nape, rufous wing panel and tail tip, and a dark-bordered scaly breast. Dark bill, brownish legs.
scamac1: Huge brilliant scarlet macaw; mostly bright red with yellow and blue across the wings and a blue rump and lower back. Long red-and-blue tail, bare white face, massive pale upper and black lower bill, grey legs.
scamin1: Slim minivet; male glossy black on head, back and throat with brilliant scarlet-red breast, belly, rump and tail edges and scarlet wing patches. Black bill, black legs; female grey-and-yellow.
scamin3: Slim minivet; male glossy black head and upperparts with flaming orange-red underparts, rump, tail sides and wing patches. Slender black bill, black legs; female grey with yellow underparts and wing patches.
scamyz1: Tiny honeyeater; male brilliant scarlet-red on the head, throat, breast and back with black wings, tail and lower belly. Slender slightly down-curved black bill, dark legs; female brownish with red wash.
scapic1: Tiny piculet; olive-brown above with a black crown spotted white (red-spotted in male), and pale underparts heavily scaled with dark crescents. Short straight dark bill, grey legs.
scapig2: Large pigeon; deep purplish-maroon head and breast with a strongly white-scaled neck and breast, dark wine-brown back and blackish wings. Red bill tipped pale, red legs, red eye-ring.
scaqua: Pale grey-blue quail with a conspicuous white-tipped buff crest, and the breast and back heavily scaled with dark crescents giving a scaly look. Short dark bill, grey legs.
scarob2: Small robin; male glossy black on head, throat and upperparts with a bright scarlet-red breast and belly, a white forehead spot and white wing bar and tail sides. Small black bill, dark legs.
scatan: Medium tanager; breeding male brilliant scarlet-red overall with sharply contrasting jet-black wings and tail. Pale grey-horn conical bill, greyish legs; female olive-yellow with darker wings.
scathr2: Large boldly scaled thrush; warm golden-brown above and whitish below, the entire body covered with crescent-shaped black scaling. Yellowish-buff face, dark bill, pinkish legs.
scathr6: Large robust thrush with warm olive-brown upperparts and whitish underparts heavily covered in black crescent scaling throughout. Pale face, dark eye, fairly long pale-based dark bill, and pinkish legs.
scawea1: Small stout pale sandy-grey weaver with finely black-and-white speckled (scaly) crown and a bold black malar stripe bordering the white throat. Plain buffy underparts, conical pinkish bill, pinkish legs.
scawoo1: Slender woodcreeper with rufous-brown upperparts, bright rufous wings and tail, and olive-brown head and breast boldly scaled with pale teardrop spots. Slim, slightly decurved pale bill; greyish legs.
scawoo2: Slim woodcreeper, plain rufous-brown back, bright rufous wings and tail, head and underparts heavily marked with pale buff scalloping and streaks. Slender, slightly downcurved pale bill; grey legs.
scbant3: Plump terrestrial antbird; male grey with bold black-and-white scalloped back and wing-covert spots and a white-tipped black tail. Female warmer brown-toned with similar scaling. Dark bill, greyish legs.
scbant8: Plump antbird; male slaty-grey with finely black-and-white scaled back and wings and a black tail; female buff-brown with similar scalloped upperparts. Short dark bill, pale eye, grey legs.
scbcup3: Tiny tailless rounded wren-like bird, rich rufous-brown above, whitish underparts heavily scaled with dark scallops. Short fine bill, large dark eye, pale buff legs, stub of a tail.
scbflo1: Tiny short-tailed flowerpecker; male glossy blue-black with a brilliant scarlet stripe from crown down the back to the rump, scarlet upper breast, whitish-grey belly. Short dark bill, dark legs.
scbflo2: Tiny stub-tailed flowerpecker; male dark glossy blue-black above with a bright scarlet breast patch, white belly and a small scarlet crown spot. Short stout bill, dark legs.
scbfru1: Plump fruiteater; male bright green above with a black face and throat bordered below by a vivid scarlet-orange breast patch, yellowish belly streaked green. Short orange-red bill, grey legs.
scbhum1: Medium hummingbird, bronze-green above, dull greyish underparts heavily scaled green on the breast, with a white spot behind the eye and white tail corners. Straight blackish bill, dark legs.
scbill1: Skulking brown babbler-thrush; warm rufous-brown above, whitish throat and belly with a grey-brown breast finely scaled white. Plain face, dark eye, slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
scblor1: Mostly bright green lorikeet with red underwing flash; breast and nape feathers edged yellow giving a scaly look, red bill and orange eye. Greenish legs; long tapered tail.
scbpar1: Plump ground partridge, olive-brown upperparts, buffy underparts finely scaled with dark crescents, a buff-grey face and breast. Short stout greyish bill, distinctive bright green-yellow legs.
scbtan1: Small olive bush-tanager with a blackish sooty cap contrasting a white eye-ring and pale throat, olive-green back and wings, dull yellowish-olive underparts. Short dark bill, dark legs.
scbtan2: Black tanager; male glossy black with a bright scarlet streak over each eye and a contrasting yellow-orange rump. Female duller grey-olive. Stout black bill, dark legs.
scbthr: Slim grey-brown thrasher; greyish-brown above, whitish underparts heavily marked with dark scalloping, pale wing-bars and a yellow eye. Slightly decurved dark bill, longish tail, dark legs.
scbwoo1: Large green woodpecker, olive-green back, underparts heavily scaled with dark crescents, a grey face and red crown (male). Long pale bill, dark moustache, greyish legs.
scbwoo3: Tiny woodpecker; bright scarlet-red back and crown (male) contrasting with a black-and-white barred face, whitish underparts faintly barred. Small dark bill, greyish legs.
scbwoo4: Large rufous-brown woodcreeper with a white throat and bold white streaking on breast and face, and a very long, strongly downcurved blackish scimitar-shaped bill. Sturdy greyish legs.
scbwre1: Small short-tailed wren; dark brown above, white throat and breast scaled with grey-brown crescents grading to barred flanks. Long slender slightly decurved bill, pale legs, often cocked tail.
sccbab1: Slim babbler, warm rufous crown finely scaled darker, grey face, olive-brown back, whitish underparts and a pale eye. Slender dark bill, longish tail, pinkish-grey legs.
sccbar1: Stocky green barbet with a bright scarlet-orange crown and forehead, olive-green back and wings, dull yellow-olive underparts, and a pale grey throat. Heavy pale bill, grey legs.
sccsun2: Sunbird; male glossy metallic green crown and throat with a brilliant scarlet breast and dark belly, blackish wings. Long decurved black bill, blackish legs; female dull olive.
scfmal1: Large long-tailed cuckoo with a white hood and curious stiff scale-like feathers running from bill over the crown, rufous neck and back, glossy black lower body and white-tipped tail. Red eye, yellowish bill.
scfpar2: Green parakeet with a bright scarlet forehead and scattered red flecks on crown and bend of wing, long pointed green tail. Pale horn bill, pale eye-ring, greyish legs.
schant1: Plump terrestrial antthrush, rufous-brown above, white throat and bold white eyebrow and eye-streak, underparts white heavily scalloped with black crescents. Short cocked tail, dark bill, pinkish legs.
schasi1: Small plump asity; breeding male olive-green with a black crown and bright yellow breast and belly, and vivid turquoise-and-blue fleshy caruncles forming an eye-wattle. Short bill, greenish legs.
schbit1: Small bittern; male warm chestnut-brown above and buff below with a slaty-grey crown and a distinct blackish line down the foreneck. Long yellowish bill, greenish-yellow legs.
schbla1: Glossy black blackbird with a brilliant scarlet head, neck and breast contrasting sharply with the all-black body. Pointed conical black bill, blackish legs.
schman1: Tiny manakin; male glossy black with a bright scarlet crown and elongated scarlet erectile horns at the rear of the crown. White thighs, short dark bill, orange legs. Female plain green.
schpar1: Stocky green parrot with dusky-edged bronze-green head feathers giving a scaly look, a blue-violet wash on throat and breast, and a red undertail. Pale bill, dark eye-ring, grey legs.
schtur1: Large green turaco with a tall rounded green crest tipped white, white markings before and behind the red eye, a red bill, and crimson flight feathers visible in flight. Black legs.
sclant1: Small antwren; male grey with a black throat and breast and bold white wing-bars and covert spots. Female buffy below with greyish upperparts. Thin dark bill, pale legs.
scltyr1: Tiny drab flycatcher; olive-green above, pale yellowish below, with two pale wing-bars, a pale supercilium and dark eyeline. Short dark bill with paler base, dark legs.
sclwhi1: Plump whistler; male olive-green above with a grey head, a black breast band and white throat over bright yellow underparts. Stout dark bill, greyish legs. Female plainer olive.
scnpar1: Large green amazon parrot with bluish-edged scaly-looking head and neck feathers, faint red speculum in wing, and a dark-tipped tail with maroon-red base. Pale horn bill, grey legs.
scnpig1: Large slaty pigeon with a vinous-purple head and breast and iridescent purple-and-green scaling on the nape and neck sides. Dark red eye with reddish orbital skin, pale-tipped red bill, dark legs.
scocro1: Stocky finch with a heavy crossed bill; male brick-red overall with darker brown wings and tail, female greenish-grey. Thick deep crossed bill, dark legs, short notched tail.
scoori: Slim oriole; male lemon-yellow with an entirely black head, breast, back, wings and tail, and a yellow shoulder patch and white wingbars. Sharp pointed blue-grey bill, grey legs.
scptyr1: Tiny tyrant with a tall bushy black-and-rufous erectile crest, olive-green upperparts, pale yellowish underparts streaked dusky, and pale wing edgings. Short dark bill, pale eye, dark legs.
scrbla1: Medium all-black blackbird with a slight bluish gloss, dark eye, and a stout pointed black bill. Black legs; plain glossy plumage, longish tail.
scrcac1: Glossy black cacique with a bright scarlet-crimson rump and lower back, contrasting all-black body. Pointed pale ivory-white bill, pale blue eye, black legs.
scrcha1: Robin-chat; bright rufous-orange underparts and rump, slate-grey back and wings, blackish face and a clean snowy-white crown. Dark eye, slender black bill, dark legs.
scrcow1: Glossy blue-black cowbird, uniform dark plumage with bluish sheen, dark eye, and concealed rufous underwing. Short conical black bill, blackish legs; stocky build.
screup1: Small euphonia; male glossy blue-black above with a yellow forecrown and bright yellow throat and underparts. Stubby dark bill, dark legs. Female olive-green above, yellow-olive below.
scrgre1: Small drab greenlet, olive-green above and pale buffy-yellow below, with a plain face, pale eye and pale lores. Short stout pinkish bill, distinctive pale pinkish-yellow legs.
scrnig1: Small greyish-brown nightjar mottled and barred buff and black, with buff wing spots and white throat patch; male shows white outer-tail corners. Tiny dark bill, short legs.
scrpih1: Plain medium grey cotinga, uniform soft grey overall, slightly paler below, with a dark eye and a broad blackish bill. Greyish legs; unmarked, rather drab plumage.
scrtan1: Small tanager; pale grey-blue overall with a buffy-rufous crown and face, greener wings and back, and whitish belly. Short conical dark bill, dark eye, greyish legs.
scrtro1: Small trogon; male has dark slaty-black head and breast, crimson-scarlet lower breast and belly sharply demarcated, and warm cinnamon-brown back. Pale blue bare skin around eye and a stout blue-and-yellow bill; finely vermiculated wing coverts and graduated tail.
scspar1: Small stocky green parrotlet with short square tail. Black forehead and crown, blue cheeks and wing coverts, and bright scarlet shoulder patch on the wing bend. Underwing scarlet; yellowish-green underparts, dark bill, pinkish legs.
scsvir1: Stocky vireo-like bird with slaty-gray cap and nape, bold white supercilium and white crescent below the eye, and a black eyeline. Olive-green back, bright yellow throat and breast, whitish belly; thick pale bill, blue-gray legs.
sctcan1: Streaky brown canastero with rufous forecrown, blackish crown streaked buff, faint pale supercilium and dark eyeline on buffy face. Buff underparts, plain throat; long spiky tail marked with irregular dark 'scribbled' barring. Slender dark bill.
sctdac1: Small tanager; male brilliant deep blue above and on head with black mask, throat, back-stripe and wings, contrasting buff-yellow belly. Diagnostic bright scarlet-orange thighs; bold pale yellow eye, dark pointed bill, pinkish legs.
sctear1: Slim brown earthcreeper with long decurved bill. Plain grayish-brown upperparts, warm rufous wing patch and rump, dull rufous tail with dark tip. Whitish throat finely scaled with dark crescents, pale buff underparts, dark legs.
sctfly: Pale gray flycatcher with very long deeply forked black-and-white tail. White underparts washed salmon-pink on flanks and belly, scarlet-red patch in underwing and flank. Black bill and legs, slender pearly-gray head and back.
scther1: Olive-green hermit hummingbird with rufous-buff underparts and rump. Dark mask bordered by buff supercilium and malar stripe; throat scaled with fine dark crescents. Long decurved bill, reddish lower mandible, long graduated white-tipped central tail feathers.
scthon1: Drab olive-brown honeyguide with heavily scaled dark-spotted throat and breast, yellowish-olive wing edgings, and white outer tail feathers flashed in flight. Pale grayish belly, stubby pale pinkish bill, gray legs; plain face.
sctlea1: Dark brown ovenbird with rufous-tinged rump and tail. Whitish throat with fine dark scaling contrasting the dark brown breast and belly. Long straight dark bill, dark legs; rounded body, short tail, skulking shape.
sctman1: Small short-tailed olive-green manakin resembling a flycatcher. Grayish face and throat, pale yellowish breast, plain wings without bars. Semi-concealed saffron-yellow crown stripe; striking pale orange eye, longish bill with pale lower mandible.
sctnig2: Slim nightjar; male has very long deeply forked tail with elongated outer feathers and bold white patches. Mottled grayish-brown and rufous plumage finely vermiculated, buff collar on hindneck, white throat band; tiny bill, large dark eyes.
scttan1: Glossy blue-black tanager with a vivid scarlet throat and upper breast (male); body otherwise entirely black with white feather bases on back shown in display. Stout black bill, black legs; female and immatures all black.
sdcsun3: Small sunbird; breeding male iridescent metallic green head, throat and back, with a broad shining violet-blue breast band above a duller gray belly. Two scarlet pectoral tufts; long decurved black bill, black legs. Female plain olive-gray.
sdmman1: Small short-tailed olive-green tyrant-manakin with grayish face and throat, pale yellowish belly, and plain unbarred wings. Semi-concealed yellow to golden crown stripe; pale eye, slender bill with pale lower mandible. Flycatcher-like build.
seacin1: Large dark sooty-blackish cinclodes; blackish-brown overall, slightly paler streaked below, with a contrasting white throat and a small whitish wing patch visible in flight. Long blackish slightly decurved bill, dark legs; robust upright body.
seaspa: Chunky dark gray-olive sparrow with large flat head and stout bill. Yellow spot before the eye, gray malar and supercilium, dull whitish throat; buffy breast and flanks with blurry dusky streaking. Dark bill, pinkish-gray legs, short pointed tail.
secfly1: Small flycatcher with sepia-brown cap contrasting olive-green upperparts. Pale buff loral spot and partial eye-ring, olive-washed yellowish breast grading to yellow belly. Two faint buffy wing bars; thin dark bill, pale legs; longish tail.
sedwre: Tiny short-tailed wren with finely streaked blackish-and-buff crown and back, plain pale buff underparts, and faintly barred wings and tail. Indistinct pale supercilium, no bold eyeline; thin dark bill, pale legs; cocked tail.
sedwre1: Tiny secretive wren with streaked black-and-buff crown and back, buff-washed unstreaked underparts, and barred wings and rufous-tinged tail. Weak buffy supercilium, plain face; short fine bill, pinkish legs, frequently cocked short tail.
semhaw: Medium raptor; slaty-gray above including head and back, with pure white underparts. Blackish flight feathers, black tail crossed by one or two narrow white bands. Bright orange-red cere and legs, black-tipped bill, dark eye.
semplo: Small plump plover; brown above, white below, with a single black breast band and black mask through eye and across forecrown. White forehead and throat; short orange bill with black tip, orange-yellow legs. Compact, round-headed.
sempuf1: Plump puffbird with large head and stout black bill. Rufous-brown crown and upperparts, white-and-buff scaled face, broad white collar on the lower foreparts, and a narrow blackish breast band. Buff underparts, dark legs.
semsan: Small dull-gray sandpiper (peep); grayish-brown above with faint scaling, white below with light breast streaking. Short straight blunt-tipped black bill, black legs, partial webbing between toes; plain face with weak supercilium.
sencou1: Large long-tailed coucal with black cap and nape, deep chestnut-rufous wings and back, and creamy-buff underparts. Long graduated blackish glossy tail, blackish rump; heavy black decurved bill, red eye, dark gray legs.
senere1: Tiny warbler-like bird; plain grayish-brown above with a faint pale supercilium, dull whitish underparts washed pale yellowish or buff. Short tail, fine pointed dark bill, pale legs; nondescript with rounded head and gray-buff tones.
senpar: Stocky short-tailed parrot with gray head, bright green back and wings, and a yellow-and-orange V-shaped belly patch contrasting the green breast. Pale yellowish eye, dark gray bill, gray legs; green-and-yellow underparts.
serant4: Small antwren; male slaty-gray above with black face, throat and central breast bordered by a broad white stripe down the side, white wing-bars and white-spotted wing coverts. Female buffier with streaked underparts; thin dark bill, gray legs.
setkne1: Slender sandy-gray-brown thick-knee with large yellow eye. Pale gray wing panel bordered by black and white bars, streaked brownish breast, whitish belly. Stout black-and-yellow bill, long thick yellowish legs, big rounded head.
sfwqua1: Chunky dark brown wood-quail with chestnut crest and crown bordered buff, brown face with bare red eye-skin and a black line below it. Back vermiculated brown and black; buff white-streaked throat, brown underparts spotted with white diamonds. Dark bill and legs.
sghspa2: Plain gray-headed sparrow; uniform gray head and underparts, warm rufous-brown back and wings, and a small white wing patch at the bend of the folded wing. Pale gray throat, stout pale horn bill, pinkish legs; no streaking.
shaaka1: Small robin-like akalat; warm orange-rufous breast and throat, olive-brown upperparts, and gray sides to the neck and face. Whitish belly, faint pale eye-ring; slender dark bill, pale pinkish legs; upright stance, short rounded tail.
shaapa2: Slender plain sooty-gray warbler (apalis) with a long graduated tail tipped white and a striking red eye. Male uniformly dark gray; female similar but with a buff-chestnut throat patch. Thin dark bill, pale legs.
sharpb1: Plump olive-green bird with scaly-spotted whitish underparts heavily scalloped dark, and finely speckled olive face. Concealed orange-red crown crest, sharply pointed pale bill, large staring eye; short tail, stout body, pale legs.
shasta2: Small starling; glossy blue-black upperparts (appearing black except in good light) with a white throat and upper breast, and buff belly, flanks and undertail. Diagnostic pale yellow eye; black bill and legs. Sexes alike.
shawre1: Rufous-brown wren with uniformly warm rufous-chestnut wings and tail, dull olive-brown back, and grayish-buff face and underparts. Faint dark barring on wings and tail; slender slightly decurved dark bill, dark legs; longish cocked tail.
shbcan1: Small canastero; warm rufous-brown above with a rufous forecrown and faint pale supercilium, dull buff underparts. Plain unstreaked back and breast, rufous wing patch and rufous-edged tail; short fine dark bill, pale legs. Short-tailed.
shbcan2: Slim long-tailed canastero, grayish-brown above with rufous wing patch and a small rufous throat spot. Pale grayish-buff underparts, faint streaking, plain face with whitish eye-ring; sharply pointed bill, rufous-edged graduated tail, pale legs.
shbcuc1: Small bronze-cuckoo; iridescent bronze-green above including crown and back, white underparts boldly barred with glossy green from chin to vent. Red eye-ring, short dark decurved bill, dark legs; coppery sheen, fine even barring.
shbdow: Medium-long-billed shorebird; breeding plumage rich rufous below with dark spotting and barring on neck and flanks. Mottled black, buff and rufous above; long straight dark bill, yellowish-green legs, pale supercilium, white wedge up the back in flight.
shblea1: Dark brown leaftosser with rich rufous throat and upper breast contrasting darker brown underparts and rufous-tinged rump and tail. Plain brown back and head; relatively short straight dark bill, dark legs; rounded skulking body.
shbmin1: Small plain pale grayish-brown miner with short straight bill. Dull sandy-brown upperparts, pale buff-white underparts faintly streaked on breast; pale supercilium, cinnamon wing patch shown in flight, dark-tipped tail. Pale legs, terrestrial build.
shbpig: Plump pigeon; deep vinous-purple head, neck and breast grading to slaty-gray back, wings and belly. Short blackish bill, dull red legs, dark eye; uniform dark coloration with no bold markings, rounded head, short tail.
shbpip1: Streaky brown pipit; buff-brown above heavily streaked dark, buff underparts with dark streaks across the breast. Pale supercilium, dark malar stripe, white outer tail feathers. Short pointed dark bill with pale base, pinkish legs.
shbtre1: Small olive-brown treehunter; warm brown above with buff streaking on crown and back, bold buff supercilium, and a buff throat. Underparts buff-brown streaked paler; short sharply pointed bill, dark legs; compact body, short stiff tail.
shcfly1: Medium Myiarchus flycatcher; grayish-brown crown and upperparts, pale gray throat and breast, pale yellow belly. Rufous edgings on wings and tail, two faint wing bars, slightly bushy crest; longish black bill, dark legs.
shclar1: Long slim pipit-like lark with slender bill; warm earth-brown upperparts boldly streaked dark and spangled, a broad buffy-white supercilium, and a diagnostic rufous rump. Whitish underparts with streaked breast; pale legs, longish tail.
shefra1: Compact francolin; finely barred black-and-white underparts giving a scaly appearance, brown crown, buff-white face with dark eyeline and malar streaks. Chestnut and brown mottled upperparts, rufous patch on lower throat/breast; reddish legs, dark bill.
shegre1: Olive-green greenbul with grayish head, pale eye-ring, and bright yellow throat and breast grading to olive flanks and yellowish belly. Plain olive wings and tail, pale or reddish eye; thin dark bill, grayish legs; rounded forest-bird shape.
shicow: Glossy black blackbird; male entirely glossy purplish-blue-black with a slender pointed black bill and dark eye. Sleek long-tailed shape, black legs. Female dull grayish-brown, paler below with a faint pale supercilium.
shidro1: Medium glossy black drongo with bluish-green sheen, deeply forked tail, and red eye. Stout black hooked bill and black legs; overall slender with the characteristic spread fish-tail.
shifly1: Glossy blue-black male with metallic sheen overall and a small upright crest; bright cobalt-blue bill and dark legs. Female is rich rufous above with white throat and underparts and blackish head.
shikra1: Small slim hawk, pale blue-grey above, white below finely barred rufous-orange; pale grey throat with faint central stripe. Yellow to orange-red eye, yellow cere and legs, and grey tail with dark bands.
shisun2: Small sunbird; male iridescent metallic green head, back and throat with a violet-blue breast band and scarlet-and-yellow pectoral tufts, blackish belly. Slender decurved black bill and dark legs.
shlcot3: Plump olive-green bird with a black cap, olive-green cheeks and back, and heavily black-scaled yellowish-white underparts. Female duller with less solid cap; short dark bill and dark legs.
shshaw: Small slate-blue-grey hawk above, white below densely barred rufous; squared tail with dark grey bands and narrow white tip. Reddish eye, yellow legs and very thin long toes; small head.
shtant1: Plump terrestrial bird, warm brown above, buffy-white below boldly streaked dark on breast; pale eye-ring and buff loral spot. Short cocked tail, longish pinkish legs, dark bill.
shtbab1: Plain brownish babbler with rufous-brown crown and nape, olive-brown back, greyish face and whitish throat and breast with faint streaking. Dark bill, pinkish legs; rather short-tailed.
shtbat1: Small flycatcher-like bird; male glossy black above with white wing patch, white underparts and black breast band, bright yellow-orange eye. Female greyer with rufous breast band and throat.
shtcou1: Large blackish coucal with glossy blue-black head, body and tail and contrasting chestnut wings. Heavy black bill, red eye and blackish legs; long broad tail.
shtfly1: Tiny tody-flycatcher with slate-grey head, olive-green back, and yellow underparts; pale eye and short upturned blackish bill. Wings dusky with faint yellowish edgings; pale legs.
shtgro: Mottled brown grouse, intricately barred and spotted buff, brown and white; whitish belly with V-shaped marks, short pointed central tail feathers. Yellow eye-comb and feathered legs.
shtgrt1: Slim grey tyrant, soft grey overall, paler below, with darker wings and a long graduated black tail. Black bill and legs; large dark eye and rather long body.
shthaw: Compact buteo; dark morph all sooty black-brown, light morph dark above and clean white below with white forehead. Short banded grey tail, yellow cere and legs, dark hooded face.
shtibi1: Glossy blackish ibis with greenish-purple sheen, bare red facial skin and forecrown, and long decurved reddish bill. Reddish legs; slender with a notably short, sharp-pointed tail.
shtnig1: Dark rufous-brown nightjar-like bird, heavily mottled, with a white throat band (males) and short tail. Tiny bill, large dark eyes, very short legs; broad rounded wings.
shtpar2: Stocky short-tailed green parrot, darker green above, yellowish-green below, with a pale greyish-horn bill. Dark eye, grey legs; squat compact shape with very short squared tail.
shtsan: Medium sandpiper; breeding adult has rufous cap, bold white supercilium, streaked breast grading to chevron-marked flanks, and scaly rufous-brown upperparts. Short dark bill, yellowish-green legs.
shtshe: Uniform sooty grey-brown shearwater with slightly paler greyish underwing, dark cap and slender body. Thin dark bill, dark legs; short rounded tail and narrow swept-back wings.
shtstr1: Dark brown ovenbird-like bird, rich brown above, blackish-brown below with bold white throat and white-streaked breast. Short squared tail, longish pinkish legs, slender straight bill.
shtswi1: Small swift, sooty blackish-brown with a contrasting whitish throat and pale grey rump and very short squared tail. Tiny black bill, blackish feet; stiff scythe-shaped wings.
shttyr1: Tiny slim tyrant; buffy-brown above streaked black, whitish below, with a black-and-white face pattern and pale supercilium. Very long, narrow, deeply forked spiky tail; small dark bill.
shwthr1: Large all-dark thrush, deep glossy blue-black with fine spangled blue spotting catching the light; blackish tail. Stout blackish bill and dark legs; robust upright build.
shyhea1: Small ground-bird, grey-brown above, whitish below with bold dark breast streaking; chestnut rump, white eyebrow, and a white patch on black flight feathers. Cocked tail, black bill.
sibacc: Small sparrow-like bird; grey crown and nape, broad orange-buff supercilium and throat, blackish eye-mask, and brown-streaked back. Buff-and-brown streaked flanks; thin dark bill, pinkish legs.
sibbro3: Plump broadbill with silvery-grey head, rufous-tinged back, and white throat and breast; chestnut shoulder and blue-and-white wing flash. Broad pale blue bill, blackish wings and tail.
sibcra1: Tall white crane with bare red face and forecrown; black primaries visible in flight. Long pinkish-red bill and long pinkish legs; entirely white body, neck and head.
sibrob: Male deep cobalt-blue above from crown to tail, with clean white throat and underparts; thin black line through eye onto breast sides. Pale pinkish legs, slim black bill.
sibrub: Brown above, whitish below; male has a vivid ruby-red throat bordered black and white, white supercilium and submoustachial stripe. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs; chat-like upright stance.
sibsir1: Grey-headed tyrant with bushy crest, grey throat and breast, pale yellowish belly, and olive-grey back. Blackish wings with pale edgings, dark tail; stout black bill and dark legs.
sibtan2: Velvety deep crimson-maroon tanager, darkest on wings and tail, with a striking enlarged silvery-blue base to the lower mandible. Black legs; female duller brownish-red.
sibthr1: Male slaty blue-black with a bold white supercilium and white belly centre and undertail; female olive-brown above, scaly buff-and-dark below. Dark bill, yellowish legs.
sibvan1: Distinctive vanga with pied plumage, white head, neck and underparts contrasting with black back, wings and tail. Very long, slender, strongly downcurved bluish-grey bill; bluish legs.
sicant1: Crested antshrike; male has black crown, face and narrow breast patch, grey nape and underparts, brown back, black white-spotted wings and barred tail. Silvery cheeks; stout black bill.
siccha1: Small grey-brown chat, soft grey above, paler below, with a rufous-orange rump and base of outer tail. Slim black bill and black legs; upright stance, plain face.
sichor1: Large black-and-white hornbill, glossy black with white belly, rump and tail tip; whitish-edged silvery-grey cheek feathers. Massive blackish bill with a tall casque; dark legs.
siclew1: Tiny leaf warbler, greyish-olive above with a greenish rump, yellowish wash below, pale yellow supercilium and dark eyestripe; single faint wingbar. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
sicswi1: Small swift, sooty blackish-brown with a paler greyish rump and throat and a short squared spine-tipped tail. Tiny black bill, dark feet; slim scythe-shaped wings.
sictit1: Small tit, brownish-grey above, buff-flanked and whitish below, with a black cap and bib and white cheeks. Short black bill and dark legs; rounded compact shape.
sieela2: Small elaenia with a very small crest, dark olive-brown head and upperparts, lighter cheeks, thin yellowish-white eyering and thin white crown stripe; two whitish wingbars. Dark bill, dark legs.
sieela3: Small crestless elaenia, olive above, with lighter yellower cheeks, yellowish lores and eyering, and pale yellow belly; two whitish wingbars on dusky wings. Short dark bill, dark legs.
sielau1: Olive-brown laughingthrush with grey crown, silvery-white ear patch, black face and bib, and rufous-edged wings and tail with yellowish flight-feather panel. Dark bill, brownish legs.
siemes1: Colourful babbler; silvery-white head with black mask, olive-green back, orange-yellow throat and breast, and red-and-yellow wing flashes. Orange bill, yellow legs; short crimson undertail.
sifcis1: Tiny warbler, rufous-brown crown, streaked greyish-brown back, plain buffy-white underparts and unmarked face. Short tail tipped buff with dark subterminal spot; thin bill, pinkish legs.
siftap1: Small dark tapaculo, slaty-grey overall with a contrasting silvery-white forehead and supercilium and rufous-brown flanks and rear. Short cocked tail, blackish bill, pinkish legs.
silant1: Antbird; male slate-grey overall with white-spotted black wing coverts and a white belly centre; female rufous-brown above, whitish below with grey breast. Pale eye, dark bill, pinkish legs.
silgre1: Small grebe, dark grey-brown above, white below, with a blackish cap reaching below the red eye and silvery-white cheeks and foreneck. Thin dark bill; pale golden ear-tufts in breeding dress.
silgul2: Pale grey-backed gull with white head and underparts and black-and-white wingtips. Bright orange-red bill, legs and eye-ring with white eye; slim, neat build.
silver3: Small olive-green-headed white-eye with a bold white eye-ring, grey back, buff flanks and whitish underparts. Fine dark bill, greyish legs; rounded compact body.
simgre1: Plain greenbul, olive-green above, paler greyish-yellow below with a pale throat; lacks bold markings. Dark eye, slender dark bill and greyish legs; medium slim build.
simspa1: Small streaky sparrow with rufous-brown back boldly streaked black, plain pale grey underparts, and a rufous crown. Face grey with darker eyeline; bill conical and dark; legs pinkish. Compact, sharp-tailed appearance.
sinant1: Small antwren; male has brown upperparts, black face, throat and breast bordered by a white supercilium and white stripe down the side, grey lower belly, and black wing coverts spotted white. Female browner with buff-streaked underparts. Black bill, grey legs.
sinbus6: Small stocky lark, sandy-brown above heavily streaked black, with rufous wing panel, pale buff underparts streaked across the breast, and a short stout pale bill. Pale supercilium; short tail with white outer feathers; flesh-coloured legs.
sincis1: Medium warm-brown cisticola with rufous-tinged crown, faintly streaked back, plain buffy underparts whitish on throat and belly, and a short rounded tail tipped buff with a dark subterminal band. Pale lores; thin dark bill; pinkish legs.
sincro1: Glossy all-black crow with a purplish sheen, slender build, fairly long pointed wings and a relatively short tail. Stout black bill and black legs; resembles a small slim raven-like crow.
sinhon1: Medium grey-brown honeyeater, drab olive-grey above and paler greyish below, with a bold black mask through the eye bordered above by a white supercilium and below by a yellow streak. Slim dark decurved bill; greyish legs.
sinpar1: Stocky green parrot; male has a dull red head fading to blue-grey on the nape, bright green body, and blue underwing coverts. Female has an all-brown head. Bill bluish-grey to reddish; short square tail; grey legs.
sinqua1: Plump rounded quail, rich rufous-brown overall with grey on the head and breast, white streaks and spots on flanks, and a long claw-footed look. Short stout dark bill; pale supercilium and throat; greyish legs. Short tail, dumpy body.
sinros1: Pale sandy-pink finch; male delicate rosy-pink overall, brightest on the face and forehead, with greyer brown back and wings and pale pink rump. Female plain greyish-buff. Short stubby pale bill; brownish legs. Compact rosefinch.
sinspa1: Small sparrow; male has grey crown, chestnut nape and back streaked black, black bib on white underparts, and a chestnut shoulder. Female plain buff-brown with pale supercilium. Stout conical bill (black in breeding male); pinkish legs.
sinwre1: Medium wren, rich rufous-brown above with grey crown sides, bold white supercilium, and a black-and-white streaked face. Underparts white on throat and breast grading to buff-rufous flanks; tail barred black. Slim decurved bill; pinkish legs.
sirmal1: Large slim cuckoo, brownish-grey overall with finely streaked head and breast, a long graduated tail broadly tipped white, and a distinctive curved bright greenish-yellow bill tipped red. Bare red skin around the eye; greyish legs.
sirnee1: Small swift, glossy blue-black overall with a contrasting clean white rump and lower back, short square tail and stiff scythe-shaped wings. Tiny black bill; dark legs. Compact spinetail-swift shape.
siryst3: Slender flycatcher, grey above and whitish below with a black cap, pale grey rump, and black wings boldly edged white on coverts and secondaries. Longer-tailed than a becard; stout black bill; dark legs.
sitnig1: Large dark nightjar, richly mottled rufous-brown and blackish overall with a buff throat patch and rufous-spotted wings. Males show white tail-corner tips; cryptic dead-leaf pattern. Tiny dark bill; very short legs; large dark eyes.
sitspi1: Plain spinetail, grey-brown above with a faintly rufous crown and wing edgings, silvery-white throat and grey underparts, and a long graduated dusky tail. Slim dark bill; greyish legs. Drab, long-tailed furnariid.
sittan1: Brilliant tanager with a golden-yellow head and underparts, opaline-green back and wings, and a black face mask and throat. Bold black streaking on the back; dark wings edged greenish. Stout black bill; greyish legs.
siwgua1: Large dark guan, blackish overall with a faint greenish gloss, bright red bare throat skin, and reddish legs. Long broad tail; sturdy curved blackish bill. Some races chestnut-bellied. Slim arboreal cracid silhouette.
siwnig1: Small nightjar, mottled greyish-brown above and barred below; male has uniquely curved, narrow sickle-shaped wingtips. Buff collar and throat; cryptic plumage. Tiny dark bill; very short legs; large dark eyes.
slaant1: Small slaty antwren; male uniform slate-grey with a concealed white shoulder patch and white-spotted black wing coverts. Female olive-brown above with rich ochraceous-buff underparts. Slim dark bill; greyish legs. Compact and short-tailed.
slabri1: Medium tapaculo-like bird; male entirely slaty-black with a slightly paler belly and a small white forehead spot. Female rufous-brown above and cinnamon below. Stout dark bill; pinkish legs. Long-tailed, skulking form.
slabru1: Brushfinch with slate-grey upperparts and breast, a rufous-chestnut crown, white throat, and white belly. Bold black face mask; grey flanks. Stout black conical bill; dark legs. Slim, long-tailed terrestrial finch.
slaela1: Plain dark elaenia, uniform sooty slate-grey overall, slightly paler on the throat and belly, with two pale grey wing bars and pale-edged flight feathers. Small concealed white crown patch; short dark bill; dark legs.
slafin1: Small drab finch; male uniform slate-grey, slightly paler below. Female olive-brown above and buff below with faint streaking. Short conical sharply pointed dark bill; pinkish legs. Plain, sparrow-like shape.
slaflo1: Tiny flowerpiercer; male entirely slate-grey, slightly paler below. Female olive-brown above and buff below. Distinctive short upturned hook-tipped black bill; dark legs. Small, slim and warbler-like.
slagna1: Plump gnateater, slaty-grey overall with a slightly browner back and a white-tipped silvery postocular plume behind the eye. Short cocked tail; long pinkish legs; small stout dark bill. Rounded, large-headed body.
slaspi1: Spinetail with grey-brown back, a rufous-chestnut crown and broad rufous wing panel, plain grey underparts whitish on the throat, and a long graduated dusky tail. Slim dark bill; greyish legs.
slathr2: Slim thrush; male dark slate-grey overall with a blackish head, contrasting bright yellow bill and yellow eye-ring, and yellow legs. Female browner with paler streaked throat. Slender long-tailed thrush shape.
slathr3: Slim thrush, slate-grey overall with a slightly darker head, whitish lower belly, and a yellow bill, eye-ring and legs. Female duller grey-brown. Plain, long-tailed, dark thrush appearance.
slavir1: Small chunky vireo, slate-grey head and upperparts with a white eye-ring and white spectacles, olive-green wings and tail, and a white throat and breast with yellowish flanks. Stout hooked grey bill; bluish-grey legs.
slbblc1: Large dusky-black cockatoo with whitish feather edging giving a scalloped look, a white cheek patch, white tail panels, and a short broad pale grey bill. Females have a larger pale cheek patch; dark crest. Grey legs.
slbcht2: Small chat-tyrant, slaty-grey head, breast and upperparts with a bold white supercilium, contrasting chestnut belly, and blackish wings with a small rufous patch. Slender black bill; dark legs. Upright flycatcher posture.
slbcro2: Glossy all-black crow with a purplish-blue sheen, fairly slim build, square tail and a stout black bill. Black legs; pale grey eyes in some birds. Medium-large compact corvid.
slbfly1: Small flycatcher; male slaty blue-grey above and rich orange-rufous on throat and breast fading to white belly, with a black face. Female browner with buffy underparts. Small dark bill; dark legs. Robin-like little flycatcher.
slbfly2: Small flycatcher; male deep slaty-blue above and on the breast with a black face and rufous-orange lower belly and vent. Female warm brown above with buff underparts. Tiny dark bill; pinkish legs. Often cocks its tail.
slbfor1: Slender forktail, slaty blue-grey crown, back and breast with a white forehead, white belly and rump, and a long deeply forked black-and-white tail. Black wings with a white bar; black bill; pale pink legs.
slbgre1: Plain greenbul, dull olive-green above and paler greyish-yellow below, with a greyish head, faint pale eye-ring, and a notably slender pointed pinkish bill. Drab, featureless; pinkish-grey legs. Slim bulbul shape.
slbgul: Large dark-backed gull; breeding adult has a slate-grey to blackish mantle and wings, white head, underparts and tail, broad white trailing edge to the wing, and pink legs. Stout yellow bill with a red gonys spot; pale eye.
slbkit1: Compact slaty-grey kite, uniform dark grey overall with a paler grey tail crossed by a single broad whitish band. Heavy strongly hooked black bill with bright orange-yellow cere and orange-yellow legs; dark eye.
slbmin1: Slim terrestrial ovenbird, grey-brown above and pale buff-white below with fine dusky breast streaking, a pale supercilium, and a rufous wing patch in flight. Long slender slightly decurved dark bill; pale legs.
slbori1: Bright golden-yellow oriole with a black eyestripe through the eye, black wings and a black-and-yellow tail. Slender, slightly decurved pinkish bill (longer and thinner than other orioles); grey legs. Robust yellow songbird.
slbpar1: Slim long-tailed parakeet, dull green overall scaled darker, with a dark red forehead and lores, a reddish patch on the belly, and a long graduated tail tinged maroon below. Distinctive long slender pale upper bill; grey legs.
slbrai1: Slim rail, chestnut crown and nape, grey face and breast, olive-brown back streaked black-and-white, and black-and-white barred flanks and belly. Long slightly decurved bill, reddish at base; reddish or grey legs.
slbsta1: Glossy slim starling, iridescent blue-green to purple-black overall with chestnut-rufous primaries flashing in flight. Long graduated tail; very slender slightly decurved black bill; black legs. Glossy, attenuated shape.
slbtes1: Tiny tail-less warbler, bright olive-green above and slaty blue-grey below, with a black eyestripe and yellowish lores. Stub-tailed, rotund body; thin dark bill with paler base; pinkish-orange legs. Bright skulker.
slbtin1: Plump ground bird, dark slaty-grey to brownish overall, greyer on the head and breast, with finely barred flanks and a tailless rounded rear. Slender slightly decurved bill; reddish legs. Hunched, rounded tinamou form.
slbtyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, grey-brown above and pale below with a yellowish wash on the belly, faint pale wing bars, and a short fine slender bill. Pale lores; large-headed, short-tailed look; pale legs. Drab and small.
slbxen1: Small slim xenops, warm brown above with a rufous tail and wing patch, finely streaked breast, and a pale malar stripe. Distinctive very slender straight pointed bill (unlike wedge-billed relatives); greyish legs.
slcant2: Tiny round antpitta, olive-brown above with a slate-grey crown and nape, plain buff throat, and white-scaled or buff breast. Big-headed, nearly tailless; long pale pinkish legs; short stout dark bill. Plump, upright posture.
slcant3: Slaty antbird; male uniform slate-grey overall with a small concealed white shoulder patch and bare blue facial skin around the eye. Female browner-grey. Stout black bill; greyish legs. Plump terrestrial antbird shape.
slcbou1: Uniformly glossy blue-black bushshrike with a stout black hooked bill, dark eyes, and blackish legs. Robust thrush-sized body, broad rounded wings and longish graduated tail, lacking any pale markings.
slccoo1: Sooty slate-grey waterbird, blackest on head and neck, with a stout whitish-to-yellowish frontal shield and bill (often dark-tipped or with reddish base). Plump rounded body, short tail, and greenish lobed-toed legs.
