slcfly1: Small flycatcher with olive-green upperparts, slaty-grey crown, bold whitish eye-ring and pale supercilium, and a scaly grey-and-buff face. Yellowish underparts with dusky breast wash, two buffy wing bars; small dark bill and pinkish legs.
slcgro1: Heavy-bodied tanager-grosbeak, slate-grey overall with a small black face mask and white throat patch, and a thick bright coral-red conical bill. Dark legs; stocky build with a stout rounded head.
slchaw2: Compact slate-grey raptor, uniformly dark grey on body and wings, with a single broad white tail band and white tail tip. Bright orange-red cere and legs, hooked dark-tipped bill, and dark eyes.
slcsee1: Small finch, uniform blue-grey above and on the breast with a contrasting white throat patch and a white wing speculum. Belly paler grey-white; stubby conical yellowish bill and dark legs.
slcsol1: Slim thrush relative, almost wholly slate-grey, slightly paler below, with a thin white eye-ring. Bill and legs orange-red to coral; upright posture and longish tail.
sleant1: Skulking antbird with grey head and underparts, rufous-brown back and wings, and a black throat (male). Pale eye, longish slim build, slender blackish bill and grey legs.
slftyr1: Small olive tyrannulet with grey-tinged head, faint pale supercilium and dark loral mark, and olive upperparts. Pale yellowish underparts, yellow-edged wing feathers (no obvious wing bars); short dark bill and slender legs.
slhpar1: Long-tailed parakeet with bright green body, a dark slaty-grey head, black chin-and-collar bordered by a blue-green nape band, and a red upper mandible with yellow tip. Maroon shoulder patch; very long blue-and-yellow central tail feathers.
sllcra1: Secretive rail with rich rufous-chestnut head, neck and breast, olive-brown upperparts, and a black belly finely barred white. Short greenish bill, red eyes, and bright coral-red legs.
sltgna1: Tiny dark gnatcatcher, slate-grey on crown and upperparts with sooty throat and breast, contrasting whitish cheeks and bold white eye-arcs, and a clean white belly. Black tail with white outer feathers; fine black bill, dark legs.
sltnig1: Slim sandy-grey nightjar finely mottled and vermiculated grey-brown, with a buffy throat band and bold white outer-tail panels and wing patches in flight. Long pointed tail; tiny bill and short legs.
sltred: Slate-grey warbler with a black-and-rufous crown, bright red lower breast and belly, and a slate-grey throat. Long blackish tail with broad white outer feathers flashed in display; thin black bill and dark legs.
slttro1: Large trogon, male glossy blue-green above and on head and breast, with a brilliant red belly separated by a narrow white breast band. Tail blackish (looks all-dark below); orange eye-ring, pale orange bill, and dark legs.
smabut2: Tiny quail-like buttonquail, buffy-brown above mottled with black, with rufous-buff breast and flanks spotted black at the sides, and a pale buff belly. Pale eyes, short greyish bill and pale legs; rounded body, short tail.
smamin1: Small slim minivet, male grey above with black flight feathers, orange-red rump and wing patch, and flame-orange breast and belly fading to yellow. Slender black bill and legs; long tail.
smanil1: Tiny niltava, male deep blue-black overall with brilliant cobalt-blue glossing on crown, neck-patch, shoulders and rump. Small black bill and dark legs; compact rounded shape.
smapra1: Small pale sandy-grey pratincole with a faint dark line through the eye, pale grey breast grading to whitish belly, and blackish flight feathers with a white wing trailing edge. Short black tail, short black bill with red gape base, dark legs.
smbani: All-black cuckoo-relative with an oily blue-purple sheen, and a very high, smooth, laterally compressed ridged black bill arched over the crown. Long loose tail, dark legs; slim long body.
smbela1: Plain greyish-olive elaenia with a whitish throat, grey breast and pale yellowish belly, faint pale eye-ring and little or no crest. Two pale wing bars; small short bill, dark legs.
smbfin1: Brushfinch with glossy black hood and upperparts, bright olive-yellow back and wings, and clean yellow throat and underparts. Stout dark conical bill and dark legs; sturdy finch shape.
smbtin1: Small ground tinamou, plain greyish-brown above, paler grey on head and breast, with a whitish throat and buffy belly, and fine dark barring on wings and rear. Short slender bill, plump tailless body, dull legs.
smbtyr1: Medium grey-and-brown bush-tyrant with a darker slightly crested head, pale throat finely streaked dusky, and greyish-brown underparts. Darker brown wings and tail; black bill and legs, upright stance.
smbtyr2: Smoky-grey bush-tyrant, dusky greyish-brown overall with a faintly streaked paler throat and slightly darker wings showing rufous in the flight feathers. Black bill and legs; upright posture, longish tail.
smbwoo1: Small woodpecker with dull smoky-brown body, browner unmarked underparts, and a pale buffy facial stripe. Male has a red crown and nape; chisel-tipped grey bill, grey legs, stiff dark tail.
smcpew1: Dark slaty-grey pewee with a slight bushy crest, uniformly dusky grey breast and slightly paler belly, and a faint white eye-ring. Broad flat bill, dark above with pale-orange base below; dark legs, upright stance.
smftyr1: Tiny tody-flycatcher with olive-green upperparts, a smoky grey-brown forehead and face, and pale yellow underparts. Dusky wings with two pale wing bars; short flat black bill and pale legs.
smilon: Sparrow-sized longspur, breeding male warm buff-orange below with a black-and-white head pattern, white ear patch, and streaked brown back. White outer tail feathers, two thin white wing bars; small conical bill, dark legs.
smowar1: Small dark leaf-warbler, uniformly dusky olive-brown above and on the breast and belly (sooty-toned), with a faint paler buffy-yellow supercilium. Fine dark bill, brownish legs; no wing bars.
snakit: Slim dark grey-black kite with a deeply hooked, slender, sharply down-curved black bill, and a square white rump and white tail base. Red-orange face skin and legs, red eyes; broad paddle-shaped wings.
snbfly1: Small flycatcher, male slaty blue-grey above with a short white brow-spot, and rich rufous-orange throat and breast fading to buff belly. Tiny dark bill, pale legs; compact upright shape.
snbnut1: Small nuthatch, blue-grey above with a blackish crown, bold white supercilium over a black eyestripe, and buffy-cinnamon underparts. Short straight grey bill, sturdy short tail, grey legs.
sncman1: Tiny stocky manakin, male velvety black with a gleaming snow-white crown and forecrown patch. Short black bill, orange-pink legs; rounded plump body, very short tail.
snoegr: Slender all-white heron with a slim black bill, bright golden-yellow feet contrasting with black legs, and yellow lores. Lacy plumes on head, breast and back in breeding plumage; graceful neck.
snoplo5: Small pale sandy plover, light grey-brown above and white below, with a white forehead, partial dark cheek and forecrown marks, and incomplete dark breast-side patches. Thin black bill, dark or greyish legs.
sntkin1: Greyish kingbird with a pale grey head, faint dark mask, and a clean snowy-white throat sharply set off from a pale grey breast and yellow lower belly. Dark notched tail, stout black bill, dark legs.
snttyr1: Tiny tody-tyrant with olive-green crown and upperparts, a short bushy crest, dull face, and pale yellowish-white underparts with a faintly streaked breast. Dusky wings with two indistinct pale wing bars; flat dark bill, pale legs.
snttyr2: Small tody-tyrant, olive-brown above with a greyish face, and whitish underparts boldly streaked dusky on the throat, neck and breast. Pale eye, two faint wing bars; flat dark-and-pale bill, pale legs.
soacha1: Chat with sooty-black plumage overall, the male showing bold white wing patches conspicuous in flight. Slender black bill and black legs; upright thrush-like stance, longish tail.
soalea1: Dark uniform brown leaftosser, deep rufous-brown overall with a slightly contrasting chestnut throat and rufous rump and tail. Long slim slightly decurved blackish bill, dark legs; rounded skulking shape.
soashe1: Large rusty-orange shelduck with a contrasting pale grey head, dark blackish flight feathers, and a green wing speculum. Stout dark bill and dark legs; female shows whitish face patches.
soasni2: Cryptic snipe, richly patterned brown above with buff back stripes, a striped buff-and-dark head, barred flanks and a streaked breast. Very long straight bill, greenish legs; plump body, pointed tail.
soasni3: Stocky snipe, dark brown above with bold buff back stripes, striped crown, heavily barred flanks and streaked breast, and a broad rufous-and-barred tail. Very long straight bill, greenish-grey legs.
soaswa2: Stocky cliff swallow, glossy blue-black crown and back, pale buff-grey rump, and dull whitish underparts finely streaked dusky on throat and breast. Short squarish tail, small black bill, dark legs.
soatan1: Dark sooty ant-tanager, male blackish-grey overall with a dull red crown patch and red-tinged throat. Stout dark bill, dark legs; medium robust tanager shape, rounded head.
soater1: Elegant tern, pale grey above with a full black cap, white underparts and forked white tail, and a long pointed coral-red bill. Red legs; slim long-winged build, black cap reaching the bill.
sobcac1: Slim all-black cacique with a glossy plumage, pale blue-white eyes, and a sharp ivory-white pointed conical bill. Black legs; long graduated tail, slender build.
sobfly1: Wholly glossy blue-black flycatcher with a subtle bluish sheen, dark eyes, slender black bill and black legs. Slim upright robin-sized body with a longish tail.
sobtyr1: Small drab tyrannulet, greyish-olive above with a slight bushy crest, pale supercilium, and dull whitish-yellow underparts. Two buffy wing bars; short stubby bill (often pale-based), dark legs.
sobtyr2: Small olive flycatcher with grey head, bold white spectacles (eye-ring plus loral line), and blackish ear patch. Yellowish-olive back, yellow underparts, and dark wings with two yellowish wingbars. Short blackish bill; dark legs.
socbab1: Slim brown babbler with rich rufous-brown upperparts and a sooty-grey to blackish crown contrasting paler greyish face. Whitish throat and breast grading to buff-brown flanks. Slender dark bill; pinkish-grey legs.
socfly1: Stocky yellow-bellied flycatcher with olive-brown back, dark grey-brown head, bold white supercilium meeting across forehead, and a concealed orange-red crown patch. Throat white, breast and belly bright yellow; short black bill, dark legs.
socfly2: Medium Myiarchus flycatcher with dusky sooty-brown crown and head, olive-grey back, and pale grey throat and breast blending to pale yellow belly. Rufous edging in the wings and tail; dark bill, blackish legs.
socwea1: Sparrow-like weaver with sandy buff-brown upperparts boldly scaled black on the back, a black chin patch, and plain pale buff underparts. Black-barred flanks; short stout pale conical bill; pinkish legs.
soffin1: Dark finch with sooty-blackish face and head, olive-green upperparts, and a yellow throat patch and yellow lower belly. Greyish breast and flanks; heavy pale-based blackish conical bill; dark legs.
sofspi1: Plain rufous-and-grey spinetail with rufous crown and wing panel, greyish-brown back, and pale grey underparts with a small blackish throat patch. Long graduated rufous-brown tail; dark bill and legs.
soghor1: Huge turkey-sized hornbill with all-black plumage, bare red facial and throat skin, and a large black down-curved casqued bill. White primaries flash in flight; long black legs; bold long eyelashes.
sohbul1: Brown-backed bulbul with glossy black cap and face, whitish throat and grey-brown breast, and a bright yellow or orange-red vent. Dark tail tipped white; slender black bill; dark legs.
sohmyn1: Glossy black myna with iridescent purple-green sheen, bright yellow facial wattles behind the eye, and large white wing patches conspicuous in flight. Stout orange-yellow bill; yellow legs.
sohtyr1: Tiny dull tyrannulet with greyish head, olive back, and pale yellowish underparts faintly streaked on the breast. Short pale-tipped wing edgings; small dark bill, dark legs; rather plain-faced.
sohwre1: Rich rufous-brown wren with a sooty-blackish crown and grey-mottled white throat and face. Warm chestnut upperparts and tawny underparts; barred wings and tail; slender dark bill; dark legs.
soioys1: Black-and-white oystercatcher with black head, neck and upperparts and clean white underparts, with a sharply defined white breast line angled forward. Long bright orange-red bill; reddish eye-ring; stout pinkish legs.
soleag1: Large stocky all-slate-grey eagle with broad wings and a short tail showing one white band and white tip. Cere and long legs yellow; heavy black-tipped bill; dark eyes.
solsan: Slim dark sandpiper with olive-brown upperparts spangled with fine white spots, a bold white eye-ring, and white underparts with streaked breast. Dark rump and barred tail sides; straight dark bill; dull greenish legs.
soltin1: Large plump ground bird with dark olive-brown upperparts finely vermiculated, a rufous-brown nape, and greyish face and throat. Underparts dull buff-brown; small head, short slender bill; sturdy grey legs.
somgre1: Plain olive-green greenbul with greyish-olive head, dull yellowish-olive underparts, and a faint pale eye-ring giving a bug-eyed look. Whitish iris; slender dark bill; greyish legs; nondescript and unmarked.
somhum1: Medium dull hummingbird with bronzy-green upperparts and greyish-green underparts lacking bright iridescence. Slightly forked dark tail; straight blackish bill; dark legs; rather sombre and plain overall.
somkin1: Stocky kingfisher with dark greenish-blue upperparts, a blackish head and broad black mask, and buffy-white collar and underparts. Heavy black bill, paler at base; dark legs; broad-headed shape.
somtit4: Small grey-and-white tit with black crown and bib, white cheeks, and grey upperparts. Whitish underparts with black central belly stripe; bold white wing edgings; short black bill; grey legs.
sonspa: Streaky brown sparrow with grey-brown upperparts boldly streaked dark, a grey supercilium and brown crown stripes, and whitish underparts heavily streaked with a dark central breast spot. Conical greyish bill; pinkish legs; long rounded tail.
sonwre1: Plump short-tailed wren with rich rufous-brown body, a dusky-grey head, and a contrasting white-flecked throat and breast. Faintly barred wings; bluish-grey orbital skin; slender dark bill; pinkish legs.
sooant1: Large blackish antbird, the male uniform sooty-black, with conspicuous pale blue bare skin around the eye. Heavy blackish bill; dark grey legs; robust rounded body and short tail.
soocha1: Small glossy black chat, the male entirely sooty-black with a white shoulder patch visible in flight. Slender black bill; blackish legs; upright robin-like posture.
soogra2: Small dull finch, the male uniform sooty grey-black overall, slightly paler below, lacking any wing markings. Short conical dark bill; dark legs; plain rounded-bodied grassquit.
soogro1: Large dark grouse with sooty grey-black plumage, finely mottled, and a yellow-orange comb over the eye. Male shows a purplish-red bare neck patch when displaying; broad dark tail with grey terminal band; feathered legs.
sooowl1: Medium owl with sooty grey-black plumage finely speckled white, a large rounded blackish facial disc, and dark eyes. Dense fine white spotting on wings and underparts; pale bill; feathered legs.
soooys1: Entirely black oystercatcher with all-black plumage, a long stout orange-red bill, and a red orbital ring. Stout pinkish-red legs; bulky build and broad wings.
soorob1: Sooty grey-black thrush with uniformly dark slate-grey plumage and a contrasting bright orange-yellow bill, eye-ring, and legs. Reddish-brown eye; robust thrush shape.
soosla1: Antshrike with the male grey overall, blackish wings barred white, and a black crown; female warmer rufous-brown with rufous crown. Heavy hooked dark bill; greyish legs; stocky body.
sooter1: Long-winged dark tern with black crown and upperparts contrasting clean white underparts and a white forehead patch. Deeply forked black tail with white outer edges; slender black bill; black legs.
sootyr1: Tiny plain tyrannulet with dark sooty-grey upperparts and slightly paler grey underparts, lacking wingbars or supercilium. Often shows a small concealed white crown patch; short black bill; black legs.
sopsku1: Bulky gull-like seabird with cold grey-brown plumage, a paler greyish head and nape contrasting a dark blackish cap, and a pale neck collar. White wing flashes at primary bases; heavy black bill; black legs.
soptit1: Tiny grey penduline-tit with pale grey-buff upperparts, a whitish face, and pale buffy underparts. Faint dark lores; short sharply pointed dark bill; grey legs; rounded and plump.
sora: Small plump rail with grey face and breast, a black mask and throat, and brown upperparts streaked black and white. Barred black-and-white flanks; short stubby yellow bill; greenish-yellow legs; white undertail.
sosfly1: Plain greyish-olive flycatcher with grey-brown head, a faint pale supercilium, and dull whitish-to-pale-yellow underparts. Two faint wingbars; short stubby black bill; dark legs; nondescript and upright.
sosrob1: Slim ground-dwelling robin with greyish-brown upperparts, a rufous rump and tail base, and pale buff underparts. Pale supercilium and dark line through the eye; long legs; slender dark bill; long cocked tail.
sotfan1: Dark fantail with sooty grey-brown plumage, a heavily white-spotted black throat and breast, and white-tipped tail feathers. Slender dark bill; dark legs; long fanned tail.
souant1: Small ground-dwelling pipit-like flycatcher with olive-brown upperparts, white underparts boldly spotted black on the breast, and a thin pale eye-ring. Pinkish legs; short slender dark bill; upright stance.
souben1: Tiny olive tyrant with olive-green upperparts, greyish head, and pale yellow underparts. Distinctive short, broad, strongly downcurved bent black bill; pale eye; dark legs; large-headed.
soublt1: Glossy black tit, the male entirely blue-black with bold white wing edgings and white wing patch. Short stout black bill; black legs; active and upright.
souboo8: Small brown hawk-owl with dark brown upperparts spotted white, a rounded head with pale eyebrows and yellow eyes, and whitish underparts boldly streaked and blotched rufous-brown. Greyish bill; yellowish feet.
soubou1: Robust bush-shrike with glossy black upperparts, head and wings, a white wing stripe, and rich rufous-buff to whitish underparts. Black tail; stout black hooked bill; blue-grey legs.
soucas1: Huge flightless bird with glossy coarse black plumage, a bare blue-and-red neck with two long red wattles, and a tall brown horny casque on the head. Red nape patch; massive grey legs with dagger-clawed feet.
soucit1: Small finch with olive-green upperparts, a yellow face and underparts, and fine dusky streaking on the flanks and back. Yellow rump; short conical dark bill; brownish legs.
souemt1: Mostly green toucanet with deep blue-green body, a black-tipped bill with a yellow upper ridge and white band at the base, and a chestnut undertail. White throat; blue-tinged face; greyish legs.
souemu1: Tiny wren-like bird with rufous-brown upperparts streaked black, a blue throat and face in the male, and pale brown underparts. Very long filamentous emu-like upright tail; fine dark bill; brownish legs.
soufis1: Black-and-white shrike with black head, back and wings, a bold white wing patch and scapular V, and white underparts. Long black white-edged tail; stout black hooked bill; black legs.
sougrc1: Stocky finch with grey-brown streaked upperparts, a heavy pale conical bill, and pale buffy-yellow underparts with diffuse streaking. Faint pale supercilium; brownish legs; large-headed.
soulap1: Striking grey-brown lapwing with grey face and neck, a black throat and breast shield, and a slender black crest. Bronze-green wing patch, white belly, black-and-white tail; red eye and red bill base; pink-red legs.
soulog1: Plump rufous-brown ground bird with bold black-and-white scaled markings on wings and back, rufous crown and nape, and a white throat bordered by a dark breast band; male has white throat, female rufous. Stiff spiny tail tips, dark eye, slim dark bill, and pale legs.
soumar: Medium swallow that is entirely glossy blue-black above and below in the male, with a slightly notched tail; female sooty-brown with paler scaly underparts. Short black bill, small dark legs, and broad-based pointed wings.
souscr1: Large grey goose-like bird with a bushy crest, bare red facial skin around the eye, and a black ring around the lower neck above a white collar. Grey body, stout pale bill, thick pinkish-red legs, and a spur on the bend of each wing.
sousun2: Small sunbird; male glossy metallic green head, back and throat with a maroon-red breast band and bright yellow belly, often with orange pectoral tufts. Female olive-grey above, pale yellowish below; both have a slender decurved black bill and dark legs.
soutch1: Medium skulking bush-shrike, rufous-chestnut on the wings and back, greyish crown and nape, and a bold black stripe through the eye separating pale supercilium. Whitish underparts, a heavy black hooked bill, and dark legs.
souwhi1: Small plump grey-brown bird with a clean white face and forehead, a narrow dark line across the lores, and whitish underparts. Short stubby finch-like grey bill, dark eye, and short tail; greyer above, paler below.
souwpw1: Cryptic nightjar mottled in grey-brown, black and buff for bark-like camouflage, with a dark throat and narrow whitish lower-throat band. Rounded head, large dark eye, tiny bill with long rictal bristles; male shows white outer tail-tip corners.
spadro1: Glossy black drongo suffused with iridescent blue-green spangles on the head, neck and breast, with bright red eyes and a long deeply forked tail that curls outward at the tips. Stout black bill and black legs.
spbant1: Small rounded antpitta, brown above with a greyish face, and whitish underparts heavily marked with bold dark speckling and scaling across the breast. Large dark eye, short stout bill, very short tail, and long pale pinkish legs.
spbant3: Stocky antshrike, black above boldly spotted white on the back and wing coverts, with a black crown and white-spotted wings; underparts greyish-white. Heavy hooked black bill, dark eye, and pale grey legs.
spbant4: Small antwren with a black crown, white supercilium and black eyestripe, grey face and underparts, and a grey back spotted black-and-white. Black wings with white spots and wing bars, slim dark bill, and pale legs.
spbant5: Small antvireo, olive-brown above and white below with bold black spotting across the breast and flanks. Plain greyish-olive face, dark eye, fairly heavy hooked bill, and pale legs; stocky short-tailed shape.
spbant6: Small antbird, rufous-brown above with a grey crown and bold white-spotted black wing coverts, and a black throat and breast scaled with white spots. Bare blue eye-ring, dark eye, slender bill, and pinkish legs.
spbduc: Large dabbling duck with a dark scaly-brown body, paler grey head and neck, a dark eyestripe and dark crown. Black bill with a bright yellow tip, white tertials and green speculum, and orange-red legs.
spbfan1: Small fantail, grey-brown above with a white throat and a dark grey breast band, and whitish belly. White supercilium and white spots on the wing coverts, broad fanned tail with white-tipped feathers, slim dark bill and dark legs.
spblap1: Striking lapwing with a black head, neck and breast, white belly, and brown back and wings. Bold yellow facial wattles and yellow eye-ring, reddish base to the black-tipped bill, and long red legs.
spbori: Bright orange oriole with a black throat, black around the eye, and bold black streaky spotting along the sides of the orange breast. Black wings with a large white patch, black tail, pointed grey-black bill, and grey legs.
spbpar1: Large parrotbill, warm rufous-brown above with a grey crown and nape and a bold black ear-patch on a whitish face. Whitish underparts heavily marked with fine black spotting on the breast; thick stubby yellowish bill and pinkish legs.
spbpuf1: Chunky puffbird, sandy-brown above heavily spotted and barred dark, with a buffy face and whitish underparts streaked and spotted dark, plus a rufous-buff collar. Large head, stout pale-based bill, dark eye, and short tail.
spbsan1: Small wading sandpiper, grey-brown above and white below; breeding adult has a rusty-red face, throat and upper breast streaked dark. Unmistakable black spatulate spoon-shaped bill, dark eye, and short black legs.
spbscb1: Scimitar-babbler, olive-brown above with a long whitish supercilium and dark eye-stripe and chestnut cheeks. White throat and breast boldly streaked and spotted dark, long decurved yellowish bill, and grey legs.
spbtho1: Rufous-and-brown thornbird, warm brown above with a rufous crown and wings, and whitish underparts heavily spotted and streaked dark on the breast. Long graduated tail, slender pointed dark bill, dark eye, and pale legs.
spbtou1: Stocky toucanet, mostly green with a black head and underparts in the male, golden-yellow ear tufts and neck stripes, and a yellow-and-black streaked bill (spotted appearance). Bare yellow-green eye-ring, red undertail, and grey legs.
spbwoo1: Woodpecker, barred black-and-white above with a red crown and nape (male) and a black-and-white moustache. Whitish to yellowish underparts boldly spotted black, a long chisel bill, dark eye, and grey legs.
spbwre1: Wren, rufous-brown above with a chestnut crown, bold white supercilium and black-and-white streaked cheeks. White throat and breast densely spotted black, buff flanks, slender slightly decurved bill, and pinkish legs.
spbwre2: Wren, warm brown above with a greyish face, faint pale supercilium, and a white throat and breast finely speckled and barred dark. Buffy flanks, fairly long barred tail, slim decurved bill, and pale legs.
spcant1: Small antvireo, plain olive-grey above and below with a grey crown finely spotted white and a pale-spotted face. Whitish belly, stout hooked dark bill, dark eye, and pale grey legs; compact short-tailed shape.
spceup1: Small finch-like tanager; male glossy blue-black above with a yellow forecrown patch, and bright yellow throat and underparts. Female olive-green above and yellowish-olive below; both have a short stubby bill and grey legs.
spchon1: Grey-brown honeyeater with fine pale streaking, a distinctive spiny white-feathered cheek patch, and a rufous-buff throat. Bluish bare skin near the eye, blue-grey at the base of the dark bill, pale eye, and grey legs.
spctan1: Colourful tanager with a black face mask, golden-buff crown spangled with green, and emerald-green upperparts and wing edgings. Blue-green breast spangled with black spots and a rufous belly; small dark bill and grey legs.
spcwoo1: Slim woodcreeper, rufous-brown with a darker brown head streaked and spotted buffy-white on the crown and nape, rufous wings and tail. Whitish underparts streaked dark, a slender slightly decurved pale bill, and grey legs.
spebar1: Barwing, warm brown above with a grey head, a bold white eye-ring giving a spectacled look, and finely streaked grey crown. Rufous-brown wings and tail barred black, buff-brown underparts, slim dark bill and pale legs.
spebul1: Bulbul, dark olive-brown above and paler below, with a black head and a striking red eye set in a bare reddish orbital ring. Yellowish vent, slim dark bill, and dark legs; slightly crested rounded head.
specha2: Slim brown chachalaca, olive-brown above and buff below, with a greyish head and neck and a pale buff belly. Long broad tail tipped buffy-white, small dark eye with bare reddish facial skin, short bill, and grey legs.
specha3: Brown chachalaca, dark olive-brown above with a greyish head, and a brown breast finely speckled and edged whitish (spotted look). Long bronzy-green tail tipped buff, bare reddish throat skin, dark bill, and grey legs.
specha4: Brown chachalaca, olive-brown above with a grey head and a breast scaled and edged paler giving a scaly pattern. Long greenish tail tipped pale, bare reddish facial skin, small dark bill, and grey legs.
spefin1: Stocky finch; male crimson-red face and head with a black crown and black wings marked with yellow and white wing bars, and brownish body. Female duller with orange-yellow face; heavy yellowish conical bill and pinkish legs.
speful1: Small fulvetta, warm rufous-brown above with a rufous crown bordered by faint dark lateral stripes, and a pale grey face with a thin whitish eye-ring. Greyish-white underparts washed buff, tiny stubby bill, and pinkish legs.
spehum1: Small hummingbird, bronze-green above and buffy below heavily spotted and speckled green-brown, with a buff supercilium and dark cheek patch. Short straight black bill, dark eye, and tiny dark feet.
spemon1: Monarch flycatcher, blue-grey above with a black face mask and forehead, rufous-orange throat and breast, and a whitish belly. Slate-grey wings and tail with white tail corners, blue-grey bill, and dark legs.
spemou1: Plain rufous-brown cotinga-like bird, uniformly cinnamon-rufous above and slightly paler below, with faint dusky scaling and small dark eye. Stout broad-based dark bill, large head, and grey legs; subtle dark wing markings.
spemou2: Long-tailed greyish-brown mousebird, finely barred (speckled) on the upperparts and breast, with a bushy crest and a very long slender tail. Bare reddish facial skin, dark eye, dark upper and pale lower mandible, and reddish legs.
speowl1: Large owl, dark brown above and on the upper breast, with a bold white facial pattern of white eyebrows and throat forming spectacles around large yellow eyes. Buffy-yellow lower underparts, no ear tufts, pale bill and feathered legs.
spepar1: Tiny stub-tailed parrotlet, mostly bright green with a pale eye-ring giving a spectacled look; male shows blue patches on the rump, lower back and wing coverts. Pale horn bill, dark eye, and pinkish-grey legs.
spepic1: Tiny piculet, olive-green above with a black-and-white-spotted crown and a whitish face with dark facial lines. Pale yellowish underparts barred and streaked dark, a short pointed black bill, and a stiff short tail.
spepig1: Large pigeon, reddish-grey overall with a vinous-pink head and neck, distinctive white spots forming rows on the maroon wings, and a grey rump. Bare red skin around the pale eye, reddish-based bill, and red legs.
spered1: Slim warbler-like redstart with a black head and a rufous-chestnut crown patch, olive-grey upperparts, and bright yellow underparts. White crescents around the eye (spectacled), white outer tail feathers, fine dark bill and dark legs.
spespi1: Streaky spinetail, warm rufous-brown above with finer pale streaking, and buff-brown underparts speckled and streaked dark on the throat and breast. Rufous wings and tail, slender pointed dark bill, and pale legs.
spespi2: Large spiderhunter, olive-green above and yellowish below streaked dark, with bare orange-yellow skin around the eye forming a spectacle. Very long decurved black bill, dark eye, and greyish legs; stocky robust build.
spetan1: Colourful tanager, green above and white below boldly spotted black all over the underparts, with a green-spangled head. Black-spotted green wings and back, small dark bill, dark eye, and grey legs.
spetea3: Small dabbling duck with uniform warm brown plumage finely vermiculated darker, slightly paler face, and rounded dark head. In flight shows an iridescent green speculum bordered buff. Bill blue-grey, legs grey.
spetet1: Medium dull olive songbird with bright olive-green upperparts, darker wings and tail, and pale yellowish underparts with a yellow throat. Bold pale 'spectacles' formed by a whitish eye-ring and supraloral. Bill short and pale, legs pinkish.
spetin1: Small stocky barbet, dark olive-brown above and pale below, the whole plumage heavily speckled and streaked with buff-white giving a spotted look. Whitish throat, stout blackish bill, dark legs.
spetyr1: Small black tyrant flycatcher; male glossy black overall with a striking white wing patch and bare bright yellow skin around the eye. Female browner and streaked. Bill yellow at base, legs black.
spewar3: Small streaky brown warbler-like bird; rufous-brown upperparts boldly streaked black and white, white underparts heavily marked with black streaks and spots. White supercilium and dark eye, fine pointed bill, pale legs.
spewea1: Slim golden-yellow weaver with olive-green back, bright yellow underparts, and a distinctive black mask through the eye joined by a black throat patch in the male. Reddish eye, slender pointed black bill, pinkish legs.
spewea2: Robust weaver; male golden-yellow with black face and throat, blackish back heavily spotted and scalloped yellow giving a mottled mantle. Pale eye, stout black conical bill, pinkish legs.
spfbar1: Small black-and-white barbet with blackish upperparts spotted white, white underparts with bold black spots along the flanks, and a yellow-and-red wash on the face and forehead. Stout black bill, dark legs.
spfgal1: Slate-grey rail with brown back, a black face and throat, and white spotting along the flanks. Bright yellow bill with a red base, and greenish legs.
spfpar1: Chunky green parrot with a head and neck dusted with white speckling over slaty-blue to pinkish-maroon tones, whitish cheeks, purplish chest, and red undertail coverts. Pale yellowish bill with red base, grey legs.
spfwea1: Small pale sparrow-weaver, sandy-brown above and whitish below, with a grey crown finely speckled black-and-white and a chestnut patch on the wing. Short stout pinkish bill, pale legs.
spgsta1: Large glossy starling, iridescent green and blue overall with violet-and-bronze sheen on wings and underparts, appearing dark and metallic. Pale creamy-yellow eye, black bill and legs.
spgthr1: Medium thrush, plain olive-brown above with two pale wing bars, and white underparts boldly marked with large round black spots. White face with dark crescents, orange-yellow bill, pinkish legs.
sphlar1: Compact lark, rufous-brown above streaked darker, with white underparts spotted and streaked on the breast. Distinctive long downcurved bill, and dark tail tipped white. Pale legs with elongated hind claw.
spigua1: Large dark brown guan with a glossy bronze-green sheen, white streaking on the neck and breast, and a bare red dewlap and blue-grey facial skin. Dull red legs, dark bill.
spispi1: Small rufous-and-grey spinetail; greyish-brown above with a rufous crown and rufous wing panel, pale greyish underparts, and a blackish throat patch flecked white. Slender bill, longish graduated tail.
spitap2: Small dark grey tapaculo, uniformly slate-grey on head and underparts with browner flanks and rump faintly barred. Short cocked tail, stubby black bill, pinkish-brown legs.
spiwaa1: Small antbird; male grey above with black-and-white streaked crown and back, white underparts heavily streaked black on the breast, and rufous flanks. Female browner. Slender bill, pale legs.
spiwoo1: Medium woodcreeper, warm brown with a rufous-chestnut back, wings and tail, and buff streaking and spotting on the crown, neck and breast. Long slightly decurved pale bill, grey legs.
spjbab1: Plump terrestrial babbler; male with rich chestnut-brown upperparts boldly spotted white on the wings, grey underparts, rufous crown, and white cheeks joining in a narrow white throat band edged black. Dark bill, blue-grey legs.
splfai1: Tiny long-tailed fairywren; breeding male brilliant violet-blue overall with a black band through the eye and across the breast, and a cocked blue tail. Female sandy-brown with bluish tail. Fine black bill, brown legs.
splsun2: Glittering sunbird; male iridescent green head and back, brilliant scarlet breast, and violet-blue wash on the belly and shoulders. Long decurved black bill, black legs.
spmthr1: Slim ground-thrush, sandy grey-brown above and whitish below boldly spotted with black across the breast. Rufous rump and tail with darker tip, dark eye-line, slender dark bill, pale legs.
spnbab1: Small rufous-brown babbler with a chestnut crown, white throat, and white spotting and streaking on the neck and breast over buff underparts. Blackish moustachial line, short stout bill, pinkish legs.
spnthr1: Olive-brown nightingale-thrush with a bright yellow throat and breast spotted and scaled with black, and a bold orange eye-ring. Grey-olive upperparts, orange bill, orange legs.
spoant1: Small antbird; male slate-grey with a black throat and breast boldly spotted white, olive-brown back, and two white wing bars. Female browner with buff spotting. Pale blue bare eye-ring, dark bill, pinkish legs.
spoant5: Plump nearly tailless antpitta with grey crown, olive-green back, and white underparts boldly streaked black on the breast with rusty flanks. Bold orange eye-ring, pale lower mandible, pinkish legs.
spoant6: Plump tailless antpitta, olive-brown above with a greyish crown, buff-white underparts with bold black streaking across the breast and buffy flanks. Conspicuous buff eye-ring, dark bill, pinkish legs.
spobam1: Tiny wren-like bird, grey-brown above and pale grey below, the underparts finely spotted and scaled darker. Long graduated rufous tail often cocked, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
spobar1: Small brown ovenbird, warm brown above and dull brown below, the breast covered with rounded buff spots edged dark. Rufous tail, thin dark bill, dark legs.
spobow1: Large grey-brown bowerbird, sandy-grey above heavily spotted buff and pale below, with a pinkish-lilac nape crest. Pale buff scalloping on the wings, dark bill, greyish legs.
spobuw1: Small dark brown skulking warbler, plain warm brown above and buffy-brown below with faint dark spotting on the throat and breast. Rounded tail, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
spobuw3: Small dark olive-brown warbler with rich brown upperparts, a greyish supercilium, and a whitish throat and breast distinctly spotted dark. Buffy flanks, fine bill, pinkish legs.
spocat2: Plump green catbird, bright green above with black-edged white spots on the wings and breast, a streaked greenish-buff head, and pale underparts spotted dark. Pale ivory bill, dark eye, greyish legs.
spocra2: Small dark rail, slaty blue-grey on the head and underparts with dark olive-brown back, and fine white spotting on the flanks and undertail. Short black bill, dull red eye, reddish-pink legs.
spocre2: Small tree-creeping bird, brown above and whitish below entirely covered with bold dark-edged white spots. Pale curved supercilium, slender decurved bill, pale legs.
spodov: Slim grey-brown dove with a pinkish breast and a broad black neck patch densely spotted with white, giving a checkered collar. Long white-tipped tail, dark bill, pinkish-red legs.
spoeao2: Large grey-brown eagle-owl finely vermiculated and barred, with prominent ear tufts, finely barred underparts, and bright yellow-orange eyes. A white throat patch, dark bill, feathered legs.
spofan1: Small dark fantail, slaty-grey to blackish overall finely spotted white on the breast and wings, with a long fan-shaped white-tipped tail. Fine dark bill, dark legs.
spofor1: Striking black-and-white forktail; black head, breast and back spotted white, white belly, white rump, and a very long deeply forked black-and-white tail. White forehead, slender black bill, pale pink legs.
spogre1: Medium greenbul, dull olive-green above heavily spotted white on the wings and tail-tips, with white underparts. Whitish face, slender dark bill, greyish legs.
spokin1: Stocky forest kingfisher, rufous-brown above spotted buff, with a green-blue back and tail, buff underparts scaled darker, and a blue malar stripe. Large pale yellowish bill, dull legs.
spolau1: Medium laughingthrush, rich rufous-brown with the back and wings boldly spotted black and white (ocellated pattern), a black-and-white scaled face, and a rufous crown. Black throat, dark bill, pinkish legs.
sponig1: Large grey-brown nightjar, intricately mottled and barred grey, buff and black, with bold buff spotting on the wings and a pale throat. White spots in the outer primaries, tiny bill, short legs.
sponit2: Olive-brown nightingale-thrush with greyish underparts heavily spotted dark on the breast, an olive head, and a bold orange eye-ring. Orange bill, orange-pink legs.
sponot1: Small partridge-like tinamou, sandy buff-brown overall heavily streaked and spotted black above and finely barred on the flanks. Rounded body, short slender curved bill, pale legs.
spoowl: Large dark brown owl, rich brown above and below heavily spotted with white, a round head without ear tufts, and dark brown eyes set in a pale-bordered facial disc. Yellowish bill, feathered legs.
spoowl1: Small grey-brown owlet finely spotted white above and on the crown, with whitish underparts barred brown, and a pale facial disc. Bright yellow eyes, greenish-yellow bill, feathered legs.
spopar1: Tiny stub-tailed pardalote; black crown and wings boldly spotted white, olive-grey back, yellow throat and undertail, and a buff-orange rump. White eyebrow, short stubby bill, pale legs.
spopic1: Tiny piculet, buff-brown above and pale below with the whole plumage spotted and barred dark; male with red-tipped black crown spotted white. Short straight bill, pale legs.
spopuf1: Stocky big-headed puffbird with brown upperparts, rufous crown and nape, and white-and-tawny underparts heavily marked with bold blackish spots. Has a broad black cheek patch, buffy collar, and a heavy black hook-tipped bill; dark eye.
sporai: Slaty-gray rail with brown-olive upperparts heavily spangled with white spots, and underparts barred black-and-white. Long greenish-yellow bill with a red base, red eye, and long pink-red legs.
sposan: Sandpiper with olive-brown upperparts and white underparts boldly marked with round black spots in breeding plumage. Shows white wedge before the wing-bend, pale eyering and supercilium, orange-pink bill with dark tip, and pale yellowish legs; teeters constantly.
sposan1: Sandy-buff sandgrouse with finely spotted upperparts, a plain pale orange-buff face and throat, and a gray-buff breast. Belly dark blackish, and the long needle-pointed central tail feathers; small head, short legs.
spotan1: Small tanager with black upperparts heavily spotted whitish-blue, turquoise-green head and rump, and white underparts spotted black. Bright opalescent green-blue wash overall; short dark bill, dark legs.
spothr1: Plump skulker with brown-olive upperparts and rich rusty-tawny underparts, a bold blue-gray eyering, and a tawny throat speckled with black spots. Bill dark above, pale below; legs pinkish.
spotow: Black-hooded towhee with black head, breast, back and tail boldly spotted white on wings and back, rufous flanks, and a white belly. Red eye, conical black bill, pinkish legs; long dark tail with white corners.
spowoo1: Brown woodcreeper with rufous wings, rump and tail, an olive-brown back, and dense buff streaking and spotting on the head, neck and breast. Buff throat, straight pale horn bill, and grayish legs.
spowre1: Large cactus-type wren with brown back streaked dark, a blackish crown, bold white supercilium, and white underparts heavily spotted black. Barred wings and tail, long slightly decurved bill, brownish legs.
spqthr1: Ground-dwelling thrush-like bird with rich brown upperparts streaked black, a black face with white supercilium and throat, and white underparts spotted and scaled black. Long graduated tail with white corners; dark bill, grayish legs.
sprgro: Plump dark forest grouse; male slaty-gray with a black throat and breast bordered white, rufous-tipped tail, and a red eye comb. Mottled brown upperparts; short dark bill, feathered legs.
sprpip: Pale buffy pipit with sandy-buff upperparts scaled dark, a plain buff face with large dark eye and faint eyering, and buffy-white underparts with a streaked breast band. Thin pale pinkish bill, pale legs.
sptant1: Tiny antwren with gray underparts, a black crown, white supercilium, and black-and-white spotted wings. Back gray, tail black with white spots and tips; thin dark bill, gray legs. Female buffier.
sptbab1: Plain brown babbler with warm rufescent-brown upperparts, a grayer face, and a white throat and belly contrasting buff-brown flanks. Faint dark throat-spotting; slender dark bill, pinkish legs.
sptfly1: Tiny flycatcher with black crown and upperparts spotted yellow-white, yellow underparts, and white-spotted black wings. Bold pale wing markings, long thin black bill, dark legs; white iris.
sptgos1: Small forest hawk with pale gray head and upperparts, salmon-pink breast and white belly, and a yellow lore-spot. Long graduated tail with three dark bands and white spots; yellow cere and legs.
sptkne1: Large-eyed thick-knee with sandy-gray-brown upperparts heavily streaked and spotted dark, pale streaked underparts, and a plain whitish belly. Big yellow eye, black-and-yellow bill, long greenish-yellow legs.
sptnig1: Cryptic nightjar with grayish-brown mottled and spotted plumage, a buff hindcollar, and dark spotting on the wings and especially the tail. Buff throat patch, large dark eye, short bill, short legs.
sptwoo1: Small slim woodcreeper with plain rufous-brown upperparts, rufous wings and tail, and a faintly spotted buff throat with light buff streaks on the breast. Straight thin pale bill, grayish legs.
spvear1: Glittering green hummingbird with iridescent green upperparts and underparts, a violet-blue ear patch and throat-center, and a blue-green tail with a dark subterminal band. Slightly decurved black bill.
spwant2: Stocky antshrike; male blue-gray overall with a black crown, black wings spotted white, and a blackish back patch. Heavy hooked black bill, dark legs. Female grayer-brown with rufous tones.
spwant3: Slaty-gray antbird; male dark gray with black wings boldly spotted white, and a concealed white back patch. Pale blue-gray bare eyering, dark bill, gray legs. Female browner with spotted wings.
spwbab1: Tiny large-headed short-tailed skulker with dull brown-gray plumage covered in fine galaxy-like whitish spots, and rusty-brown wings and tail barred blackish. Underparts buffy peppered with dark dots; horn bill and legs.
spwfal2: Small slim falconet with gray-brown upperparts streaked white, a white supercilium and dark eyestripe, and whitish underparts streaked dark. White-spotted wings, long graduated barred tail, yellow cere and legs.
spwowl1: Large dark wood-owl with no ear tufts, plain dark brown upperparts, an orange-buff facial disc, and buffy underparts finely barred brown. Dark eyes, pale bill, feathered legs; rounded head.
spwpar2: Small stub-tailed parrotlet, green overall with paler yellow-green underparts and a yellowish face. Black-and-yellow spotted wings, dark flight feathers; pale horn bill, grayish legs.
spwpig3: Large gray-brown pigeon with a vinous-pink head and breast, gray upperparts, and wing coverts edged white giving a spotted look. Dark eye with reddish orbital skin, dark bill, reddish legs.
spwqua1: Plump ground-quail with rich rufous-brown upperparts spotted white and black, a chestnut crest, and a buffy-rufous breast spotted white. Bare red orbital skin, dark bill, dark legs.
spwthr1: Thrush with warm olive-brown upperparts, a white face with two black cheek-bars, and white underparts boldly spotted black. Two whitish wing spots, orange-yellow bill, pinkish legs.
sqtbul1: Dark gray bulbul with a slightly shaggy blackish-gray crown, gray body, and paler whitish vent. Orange-red bill and legs, dark eye; square-ended tail.
sqtnig1: Grayish-brown nightjar with cryptic mottling, a buff hindcollar, and a square tail (white-cornered in male). White throat patch, white wing-band in male; large dark eye, short bill.
squant1: Antbird; male with rufous-brown crown and upperparts, a black face with white supercilium, and a whitish breast heavily scaled with bold black scalloping. Buff vent; dark bill, gray legs. Female plainer.
squcuc1: Long slender rufous cuckoo with bright chestnut upperparts, a paler rufous throat and breast, and a gray belly. Very long graduated tail with broad black-and-white tips, yellow-green bill, red eyering.
srbhor1: Slender hornbill with a long curved red bill, blackish-and-white upperparts heavily spotted white, and white underparts. Pale face, dark eye with pink skin, dark legs; long pied tail.
srlbao1: Small owl with a heart-shaped buffy-rufous facial disc, warm chestnut-brown upperparts spotted black and white, and buffy underparts spotted dark. Dark eyes, pale bill, feathered legs; ear-like head tufts.
srlscb1: Babbler with rufous-brown upperparts, a gray-brown crown, a bold creamy-white supercilium and throat, and a long decurved yellow bill. White breast, rufous flanks; grayish legs.
srwswa1: Brown swallow with gray-brown upperparts, a rufous throat and forehead, and pale grayish-buff underparts. Notched tail, dark wings; small black bill, dark legs.
sstlar1: Small sandy short-toed lark with pale grayish-buff upperparts streaked dark, a plain whitish face, and white underparts with fine breast streaking. Stubby pale pinkish bill, pale legs.
sstlar4: Small pale lark with sandy-gray upperparts streaked dark, a buffy supercilium, and white underparts with dark streaking across the breast. Short stout pinkish bill, pinkish legs; dark patch at breast sides.
sstspa: Sparrow with orange-buff face triangle bordered by gray cheeks and crown stripe, an olive-gray nape, streaked brown back, and buff-washed underparts with crisp dark streaking. Gray bill, pinkish legs.
stbant2: Antbird with brown upperparts streaked black-and-white, a black face and throat bordered white, and a buffy belly. Bold white-spotted wings, long graduated tail; dark bill, pale legs. Female buffier.
stbbit1: Small bittern with buff upperparts boldly striped black down the back, a rufous-buff neck and breast streaked dark, and a pale throat. Dark crown, yellow bill, greenish legs.
stbcan9: Streaky-brown canastero with gray-brown upperparts streaked blackish, a rufous wing patch, and pale buff underparts with a small orange throat patch. Rufous-edged tail, thin dark bill, dark legs.
stbcin1: Large robust cinclodes with dark brown upperparts, a bold buffy-white supercilium, and pale buff underparts with a whitish throat. Heavy thick blackish bill, blackish legs; rufous wing-band.
stbcro1: Pale gray-and-cream crow-like bird with a whitish head and breast, gray-brown back, and black wings and tail with a blue-green sheen. Bare blue facial skin, stout black bill, black legs.
stbear2: Earthcreeper with sandy gray-brown upperparts, a pale supercilium, and whitish underparts with a faintly streaked throat. Rufous-buff tail, a long straight thin dark bill, dark legs.
stbeat1: Slim bee-eater with green upperparts, a yellow throat bordered below by a narrow black-and-blue band, and a blue belly. Black eyestripe, deeply forked tail, slender black bill.
stbfly1: Small monarch flycatcher; male glossy steel-blue overall with a white belly and pale eyering. Female pale blue-gray head and back with rusty-red wings and tail and whitish underparts; slim blue-gray bill.
stbher1: Hermit hummingbird with green-bronze upperparts, a buff-grizzled face with dark mask and pale supercilium, and pale grayish-buff underparts. Long straight blackish bill, central tail feathers white-tipped.
stbhon2: Honeyeater with a black head, a white nape crescent, olive-green upperparts and dull grayish-green underparts with a white throat. Heavy straight black bill, white-green eye-skin, bright yellow legs.
stbkin1: Large heavy-billed kingfisher with a massive bright coral-red bill. Buffy-orange head and underparts, dull greenish-blue back, wings and tail, and a grayish-brown cap. Red legs and feet. Big-headed, large bodied.
stbori: Bright orange-yellow oriole with a black face mask and bib, black-streaked back, black wings with white wing bars and edgings, and a black tail. Pointed bluish bill, grayish legs. Slim, medium-sized.
stbree2: Slim furnariid, olive-brown above with rufous wings contrasting the back, pale buffy underparts, and a bold whitish supercilium. Long straight pointed blackish bill and sharply pointed tail. Pinkish legs.
stbspi1: Small rufous spinetail, deep cinnamon-rufous overall with a brighter rufous crown and wings, grayish face, and a long graduated rufous tail. Underparts cinnamon. Dark bill, grayish legs.
stbtre1: Robust rufous-brown furnariid, dark reddish-brown above with a streaked crown, bright rufous wings and tail, and tawny-buff underparts streaked on the breast and throat. Heavy blackish bill, grayish legs.
stbtyr1: Large bush-tyrant, gray-brown above with a bold white-streaked throat and breast, and bright rufous-cinnamon flight feathers and tail conspicuous in flight. Pale supercilium, black bill, dark legs.
stbwoo1: Very large powerful woodcreeper, rich rufous-brown overall with fine buff streaking on the head, nape and breast, plain rufous wings and tail. Long heavy slightly decurved blackish bill, gray legs.
stbwoo2: Medium woodcreeper, olive-brown above with rufous wings and tail, finely streaked grayish head and neck, and pale buff-streaked underparts. Long straight pale ivory-pinkish bill, grayish legs.
stbwre1: Small wren, warm brown above with a plain rufous-brown crown and back, white throat, and white underparts boldly streaked black on breast and flanks. Slim dark bill, pinkish legs.
stbwre2: Bold cactus-type wren, brown above with a chestnut-streaked back and nape, white crown stripe, white underparts, and a barred wings and tail. Slightly decurved dark bill, grayish legs. Medium-large.
stcant1: Small antvireo, olive-gray above with a streaked grayish crown, plain face, and pale grayish-white underparts faintly streaked. Stubby hooked dark bill, pale legs. Compact, big-headed.
stcant2: Plump rounded antpitta, olive-brown above with a buffy eyering and lores, gray crown, and whitish underparts streaked black across the breast. Stout dark bill, long pinkish legs, nearly tailless.
stcant3: Tiny antwren, olive-green above with a black-streaked rufous crown, plain grayish face, and pale yellowish underparts. Wings with pale edgings. Thin dark bill, grayish legs.
stcant4: Small antwren, brown above with a rufous crown, whitish supercilium, and whitish underparts boldly streaked black on throat and breast. Thin dark bill, long tail, pale legs.
stcgre2: Olive-green greenbul, dark olive above and on the breast with a yellowish belly, gray face with fine pale streaking on the cheeks and a faint eyering. Slim dark bill, grayish legs.
stcspa3: Small pale sparrow with russet-and-gray striped crown, plain grayish face with a small dark loral line and black malar streak, gray-brown unstreaked back, and whitish underparts. Conical bill, pinkish legs.
stcspi1: Small spinetail, brown above with a streaked rufous-and-buff crown and nape, plain grayish face, rufous wings, and pale buffy underparts. Long rufous tail, thin dark bill, grayish legs.
stcspi2: Small spinetail, grayish-brown above with a streaked black-and-buff crown, whitish supercilium, rufous wing panel, and pale grayish underparts. Long graduated rufous tail, thin bill, grayish legs.
stctre1: Large dark treehunter, dark reddish-brown overall with a streaked crown and nape, rufous wings and tail, and tawny-buff streaking on the throat and breast. Heavy blackish bill, grayish legs.
stcwoo1: Small woodpecker, olive-green above with a barred greenish back, red crown and nape (male), and a striped face with whitish cheek and dark stripes. Underparts barred greenish; dark bill, gray legs.
stebul2: Plain pale bulbul, grayish-brown above and whitish below with a faintly streaked breast, a whitish throat, and fine pale streaks on the ear coverts. Pale eye, dark bill, dark legs.
stedov1: Small ground-dove, deep rufous-brown overall with an iridescent green patch on the wing, a pale gray crown and forehead, and white-tipped tail. Dark reddish bill, reddish-purple legs. Plump, short-tailed.
stejay: Large crested jay, sooty blackish head, crest and breast grading to deep blue back, wings and tail, with fine black barring on the blue wings and tail. Black bill and legs.
stelio1: Olive-brown laughingthrush-like bird with a gray crown and ear coverts, yellow-edged wing and tail feathers forming bright panels, white spots near the eye, and yellowish underparts. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
stfgle1: Medium foliage-gleaner, olive-brown above with a buff-scaled throat and breast, a buff eyering and supercilium, rufous wings and tail, and tawny-olive underparts. Slim dark bill, grayish legs.
stftho1: Streaky thornbird, brown above with a heavily black-and-buff streaked forehead and crown, plain rufous wings and tail, and pale buffy underparts with faint streaking. Thin bill, grayish legs.
stftyr1: Tiny short-tailed flycatcher, gray-brown above with a pale grayish head, whitish underparts, a rufous rump, and dark wings with pale edgings. Very short tail, dark bill, long pale legs. Upright.
sthant1: Slim antbird, olive-brown above with a streaked head and back, a whitish supercilium, and whitish underparts streaked dark on breast and flanks. Concealed white back patch. Thin dark bill, grayish legs.
sthant2: Plump antpitta, gray-brown above with bold black-and-white streaking on the crown and nape, scaly-streaked back, and grayish-white underparts streaked dark. Stout dark bill, long pinkish legs, near tailless.
sthbrf1: Brushfinch with a glossy black head and breast band, white throat, olive-green back, grayish underparts, and a yellow bend of wing. Stout black bill, grayish legs. Slim, medium-sized.
sthbrf2: Brushfinch with a striped black-and-gray head, white supercilium, white throat, black breast band, olive-green back, and gray underparts. Conical dark bill, grayish legs.
sthbrf3: Brushfinch with a striped head showing gray central crown stripe and black sides, white throat, black breast band, olive back, and gray underparts. Dark conical bill, pinkish-gray legs.
sthbrf4: Brushfinch with striped black-and-gray crown, white throat, black breast band, olive-green back, and pale gray underparts. Conical black bill, grayish legs. Slim songbird.
sthbrf5: Brushfinch with a striped head, black mask and breast band, white throat, olive-green back and wings, and grayish underparts. Conical black bill, pinkish-gray legs.
sthbrf8: Brushfinch with a gray-and-black striped crown, gray supercilium, white throat, black breast band, olive-green back, and pale gray underparts. Conical dark bill, grayish legs.
sthbul1: Large robust bulbul, olive-brown above and below with a tawny-buff streaky crown and nape, bold black-and-white streaked ear coverts and malar, and a white throat. Stout dark bill, dark legs.
sthsee2: Small dull serin-like finch, brown above with a streaky crown, a pale buff supercilium and submoustachial stripe, brown ear coverts, and pale buffy underparts with faint streaking. Conical bill, pinkish legs.
sthspa1: Boldly marked sparrow with a striped head of rufous and gray, white central crown and supercilium, gray nape, plain gray-brown back, and whitish underparts. Yellow at bend of wing; dark bill, pinkish legs.
sthwoo1: Slender woodcreeper, olive-brown above with rufous wings and tail, a finely streaked crown and nape, a whitish supercilium, and buff-streaked underparts. Slim slightly decurved pale bill, grayish legs.
stisan: Slim long-legged sandpiper, breeding adult mottled gray-brown above, with a rufous ear patch and crown stripe, and densely barred underparts. Long slightly drooping black bill, long greenish-yellow legs.
stitap1: Small dark tapaculo, mostly slaty-gray with a brownish wash and faint barring on the brown flanks and rump. Plump body, short cocked tail, stout dark bill, strong pinkish-gray legs.
stitch1: Distinctive honeyeater, male with black head, breast and back, a bright yellow shoulder patch and wing edging, white wing patch and ear tufts, and pale underparts. Slim dark bill, gray legs.
stnfly1: Olive flycatcher, dark olive above with a streaked olive-and-yellow throat and breast, plain olive face, and yellowish belly. Wings with faint edgings, dark bill, grayish legs. Upright, big-eyed.
stocis1: Large robust cisticola, brown above with a black-streaked back and a plain rufous-tinged crown, buffy-white underparts, and a buff face. Short tail tipped buff-and-dark, pinkish bill and legs.
stofly1: Medium Myiarchus flycatcher, gray-brown above with a grayish head, pale gray throat and breast, pale yellow belly, and rufous edgings on the wings and tail. Dark bill, dark legs. Slight crest.
stonec7: Compact chat; breeding male has a black head and back, white half-collar on the neck sides, orange-rufous breast, white belly, and a black tail with a pale rump. Small dark bill, blackish legs.
stopar1: Small partridge, gray-brown finely vermiculated and streaked above and below, with a pale throat, dark-streaked crown, and a long cocked tail like a bantam. Reddish bill base, reddish-orange legs.
stptyr1: Tiny round pygmy-tyrant, olive-green above with a grayish head, a pale eyering, whitish underparts washed yellow, and dark wings with two pale wing bars. Virtually tailless; small dark bill, pale legs.
strant2: Slim antbird, blackish-brown above streaked white on the head and back, with a concealed white back patch, white-spotted wing coverts, and whitish underparts streaked black. Thin dark bill, pale legs.
strant3: Stocky antthrush, rich rufous-brown above with a bold whitish supercilium and dark eyeline, scaly-barred buff-and-black underparts, and a short cocked tail. Stout dark bill, long pinkish legs.
strbab1: Medium drab brown babbler with long graduated tail; warm grey-brown upperparts heavily streaked darker, pale buffy-white throat and breast finely streaked, plain buff belly. Slender slightly decurved dark bill, pale lores, dull yellowish legs.
strbul1: Olive-grey bulbul with whitish underparts boldly streaked dark on breast and flanks; grey-brown head, plain greyish-olive back, slight crest. Reddish-orange eye, dark bill, grey legs.
strbul2: Olive-brown bulbul with pointed crest; entire body finely streaked with pale whitish-yellow shaft streaks giving striated look, yellowish vent. Dark bill, dusky legs, dark eye.
strcuc1: Slim sandy-brown cuckoo with bushy erectile crest; upperparts streaked black and buff, plain pale buff underparts, dark eyestripe and pale supercilium. Long graduated tail, dark bill, greyish legs.
strear1: Rich rufous-brown earthcreeper with whitish throat and pale buff underparts streaked dusky; brown crown and back faintly streaked, pale supercilium. Long slightly decurved dark bill, rufous wings and tail, dark legs.
strfan5: Small grey-brown fantail with broad fanned tail; greyish-olive upperparts, pale throat and white-tipped tail feathers, breast washed buff with faint streaking, white brow. Fine dark bill, dark legs.
strfie1: Small streaky brown fieldwren; rufous-brown upperparts heavily streaked black, whitish underparts streaked dark on breast, pale supercilium. Cocked tail with dark subterminal band, fine bill, pinkish legs.
strfly1: Stocky olive-brown flycatcher boldly streaked; brown crown, blackish malar stripe, whitish underparts streaked black, rufous edges on wings and tail. Heavy black bill, pale base to lower mandible, dark legs.
strgra1: Large long-tailed brown grassbird; upperparts boldly streaked black and buff, pale buffy-white underparts with fine dark streaking on breast. Long graduated tail, stout dark bill, pinkish legs.
strher2: Small dark heron with slaty blue-grey body, glossy greenish-black cap and shaggy crest; chestnut-edged wing coverts, grey neck with white throat streak. Dagger-like dark bill, yellow-orange legs.
strhon1: Pale grey honeyeater with bold black-and-white striped head and neck; whitish breast streaked, plain pale belly, dusky wings. Slender pointed dark bill, blue-grey legs.
strkin1: Small grey-brown kingfisher with streaked head and underparts; brown back, bright blue rump and tail, black-and-white wings showing white patch in flight. Bicoloured bill (red lower, blackish upper), red legs.
strlau1: Olive-brown laughingthrush heavily streaked whitish throughout; greyish head, rufous wing panel and tail edges, pale streaking on breast and back. Dark bill, brownish legs.
strlau2: Large rich brown laughingthrush with white shaft-streaks over entire body giving striated appearance; small dark crest, plain brown wings and tail. Dark bill, brownish legs.
strlau3: Rufous-brown laughingthrush with fine pale streaking; rich chestnut-brown plumage streaked whitish on head, breast and back, grey wing panel and tail tip. Dark bill, brown legs.
strman2: Tiny stout manakin; male rich rufous-chestnut head and upperparts, whitish underparts boldly streaked red on breast and flanks. Pale eye, short dark bill, pinkish legs.
strman5: Tiny compact manakin; male reddish-brown crown and olive-green upperparts, whitish underparts heavily streaked reddish-brown. Pale eye, short dark bill, pinkish legs.
strowl1: Medium tawny-buff owl with long blackish ear-tufts; buffy face with dark rim, whitish-buff underparts boldly streaked dark, mottled brown upperparts. Dark eyes, blackish bill, feathered legs.
strpar1: Small stocky pardalote with black crown spotted white (or plain), white supercilium, yellow brow spot; grey-brown back, buff to whitish underparts, red-and-yellow wing patch with white stripe. Short stubby dark bill.
strpip1: Slim brown pipit; olive-brown upperparts streaked dark, whitish throat and belly with heavily streaked breast and flanks, pale supercilium. White outer tail feathers, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
strpri2: Long-tailed brown prinia; greyish-brown upperparts heavily streaked black, whitish underparts streaked dark on breast, pale supercilium. Long graduated streaked tail, dark bill, pinkish legs.
strpri8: Long-tailed prinia, dark grey-brown above with heavy black streaking, whitish below with dark breast streaks; pale lores. Very long graduated streaked tail, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
strpuf1: Stocky rufous-brown puffbird; finely barred and streaked upperparts, buff underparts streaked, broad rufous-buff collar and pale forehead. Large dark bill with pale base, dark eye, grey legs.
strros1: Large rosefinch; male brownish-grey heavily streaked above, deep rose-red face and breast spangled with white spots, pinkish rump. Stout dark conical bill, brownish legs.
strsal1: Olive-grey saltator with white throat bordered dark; greyish-olive upperparts, whitish underparts streaked greyish, pale supercilium. Heavy dark conical bill, dark legs.
strsee1: Small streaky brown seedeater; olive-brown upperparts streaked dark, buffy-whitish underparts heavily streaked, pale moustachial stripe, yellowish wash on wings. Conical horn-coloured bill, pinkish legs.
strsof1: Rufous-brown furnariid with shaggy streaked plumage; warm rufous-brown above with pale shaft-streaks, paler buffy throat and breast finely streaked, bright rufous tail. Dark bill, greyish legs.
strspa1: Large sparrow-like bunting; brown upperparts boldly streaked black, plain greyish breast, bold white supercilium and dark cheek patch, rufous nape. Stout dark bill, pinkish legs.
strspi1: Large olive spiderhunter; olive-green upperparts, yellowish underparts boldly streaked dark throughout, bright orange legs. Very long strongly decurved dark bill, dark eye.
strtho1: Tiny olive thornbill; olive-green upperparts, pale buff underparts finely streaked dusky, streaked forehead, pale eye. Greenish-yellow tail base with dark subterminal band, fine bill, dark legs.
strtre1: Dark brown furnariid; rich brown upperparts with fine pale streaking, brown underparts streaked buff on breast and throat, rufous wings and tail. Stout dark bill, greyish legs.
strtuf1: Brown furnariid with bushy white-streaked cheek tuft; dark brown upperparts streaked buff, buffy underparts streaked, rufous wings and tail, pale throat. Long slightly decurved dark bill, grey legs.
strwea2: Breeding male weaver with yellow crown and blackish face; brown upperparts streaked, whitish underparts heavily streaked dark on breast and flanks. Stout conical dark bill, pinkish legs.
strwoo: Black-and-white woodpecker; blackish back barred and spotted white, white underparts spotted and barred dark, black-and-white face with red nape patch (male). Chisel dark bill, grey legs.
strwoo2: Brown woodcreeper; warm brown upperparts with buff streaks, paler underparts boldly streaked dark, rufous wings and tail, streaked head. Straight pale horn-coloured bill, grey legs.
strwoo4: Rufescent-brown furnariid; warm brown upperparts, buff throat and breast streaked, plain belly, rufous tail and wings. Straight dark bill, greyish legs.
strwoo6: Small black-and-white barred woodpecker; blackish upperparts barred white, whitish underparts finely barred dark, red crown patch (male) or black-and-white face. Short dark bill, grey legs.
strxen1: Tiny rufous-brown xenops; warm brown upperparts streaked buff, buffy underparts streaked, white crescent on cheek, rufous wing patch and tail. Short slightly upturned wedge-shaped bill, grey legs.
stsbab1: Small short-tailed scimitar-babbler; rufous-brown upperparts, greyish head, white throat and breast streaked dark, rufous flanks. Long slightly decurved pale bill, pinkish legs.
stseag: Massive dark sea-eagle with huge yellow-orange bill; blackish-brown body, white shoulders, white thighs, white wedge-shaped tail, white forehead. Yellow feet, pale eye, deep arched bill.
stswar1: Small pale sandy-brown warbler with long cocked tail; pale buff underparts faintly streaked on breast, sandy upperparts, pale supercilium. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
sttant1: Small antwren; male slaty-grey with black throat spangled white (star-throated), olive-brown back, paler grey belly. Fine dark bill, greyish legs, dark eye.
sttant3: Small dark antbird; male slaty-blackish overall with concealed white interscapular patch, short tail. Fine dark bill, pale eye, greyish legs.
sttbab1: Small warm-toned tit-babbler; rufous crown, olive-brown back, yellowish underparts with fine dark streaking on whitish throat and breast. Pale eye, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
sttbar1: Greyish-brown barwing; rufous-brown upperparts, grey head, whitish throat streaked dark, barred (vermiculated) wings and tail, streaked breast. Dark bill, pinkish legs.
sttbul3: Olive-brown bulbul; brown upperparts, blackish head, white throat boldly streaked, yellowish belly and vent, slight crest. Dark bill, dark legs, dark eye.
sttcan1: Small streaky canastero; brown upperparts streaked dark, pale buff underparts with streaked throat and breast, rufous wing patch. Cocked rufous-brown tail, fine dark bill, dark legs.
stther1: Small hermit hummingbird; bronze-green upperparts, buffy-grey underparts faintly streaked on throat, rufous rump, dark mask with pale stripes. Long decurved bill (red lower mandible), white-tipped graduated tail.
stther2: Tiny hermit hummingbird; bronze-green above, buffy-cinnamon underparts with finely streaked throat, blackish ear mask bordered buff stripes. Long decurved bill (yellow lower mandible), white-tipped tail.
stthum1: Small green hummingbird; glossy emerald-green body, white belly, rufous wing patch, blue-black tail with broad white outer feathers (white tail sides). Straight black bill, dark legs.
sttjer1: Small olive-green warbler-like bird, greener above and yellowish below with fine dark streaking on the throat and breast. Pale eye, thin pointed dark bill and pinkish legs.
sttspa1: Tiny stub-tailed flycatcher with large flat-headed look; olive-brown upperparts, buffy-tawny underparts, and a bold buff face with a concealed yellow crown patch. Broad flat blackish bill, pale lores and a stubby tail.
sttspi1: Slim long-tailed furnariid, grey-brown above heavily streaked whitish, with pale streaked underparts and a streaked rufous-tinged crown. Thin pointed bill and a long graduated, spiny tail.
sttspi2: Small long-tailed tit-spinetail, finely streaked grey-brown above and pale below with diffuse streaking, rufous in wings and a rufous-tinged streaked crown. Thin dark bill and a long graduated pointed tail.
sttswa2: Small stocky swallow, dull grey-brown above with a paler rump, and dingy whitish underparts boldly streaked dark on throat and breast. Short slightly forked tail, dark bill and feet.
stttyr2: Large grey-and-white tyrant with a long deeply forked streamer tail; pale grey body, white throat bordered by a chestnut crescent, and a darker mask. Blackish bill and legs, white in wings.
sttwhy1: Breeding male is black above with a buff-white belly and a flowing straw-coloured tail; bright red bill and reddish legs. Female and nonbreeding plain streaky brown sparrow-like.
sttwoo1: Medium green woodpecker, plain olive-green above with a yellow rump, scaly-streaked whitish underparts, and a grey face. Male has a red crown, female blackish; long greyish bill and grey-green legs.
sttwre1: Small warm-brown wren, rufous-brown above and buffy below with a contrasting white throat finely streaked dark, and a pale supercilium. Thin slightly decurved bill and pinkish legs.
sttyuh1: Small crested babbler, brown above with a rufous-brown pointed crest, grey face, and rufous-buff underparts; throat whitish streaked dark. Thin dark bill and orange legs.
stuqua1: Small plump quail, mottled brown above streaked buff and black; male has a chestnut throat patch and bold dark streaking on a buffy breast. Short grey bill and pale legs.
stwbab1: Small terrestrial wren-babbler, warm brown above and below heavily streaked with bold white-and-black spots and streaks; scaly spotted breast. Short tail, longish dark bill and pinkish legs.
stwbab2: Dark forest wren-babbler, blackish-brown above with rufous tones, and white underparts boldly streaked black; white throat. Long blackish bill, short cocked tail and stout legs.
stwbab3: Boldly patterned wren-babbler, brown above striped black-and-white, with white underparts streaked black and a white-striped head. Short tail, longish pale-based bill and pinkish legs.
stwqua1: Plump rufous wood-quail with a rufous-brown body, finely spangled wings, and underparts dotted with small white star-like spots. Reddish-brown face, blackish bill and dark grey legs.
stybul1: Olive-brown bulbul with a black crown and nape, white cheeks and throat, and a small orange-red spot above the bill; yellowish-olive underparts. Dark bill and legs.
styfin1: Small finch, greenish-yellow above and bright yellow below, with a yellow face and faint streaking on the back; tail shows yellow sides. Short conical pinkish bill and pinkish legs.
styowl1: Large dark eared owl, sooty blackish-brown overall finely mottled and barred buff, with prominent blackish ear-tufts and a dark facial disc. Golden-yellow eyes, dark bill and feathered feet.
subbrw1: Plain large warbler, uniform greyish-brown above and pale greyish-buff below with little marking and a faint pale supercilium. Long graduated tail, slender dark bill and pale legs.
subbus1: Colourful bushshrike, green above with a grey crown and nape, yellow underparts washed orange on the breast, and a black mask. Yellow forehead and supercilium, stout black bill, greyish legs.
subfly: Boldly streaked flycatcher, brown above streaked dark, with whitish underparts heavily streaked, a white throat, and a black-and-white striped face. Pale yellow belly wash, stout dark bill, dark legs.
subfly1: Blue flycatcher; male deep blue above with brighter blue forehead, orange-rufous throat and breast fading to whitish belly. Female browner; small dark bill and pale legs.
subtyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, olive-green above with two pale wingbars, a whitish supercilium, and pale yellow underparts. Small dark bill and dark legs.
subwar2: Small leaf warbler, plain greyish-brown above with no wingbars, a long whitish-yellow supercilium, and yellowish underparts brightest on the undertail. Slender dark bill and dark legs.
subwhi1: Plump whistler, olive-green above with a grey head, bright sulphur-yellow underparts and throat. Stout dark bill and greyish legs.
sucant1: Terrestrial antthrush, rich brown above and paler scaly-brown below, with a buff throat and a short cocked tail; pale eyering. Stout dark bill and pinkish legs.
succoc: Large white cockatoo with a recurved yellow crest, white plumage, and pale yellow wash under wings and tail. Heavy blackish bill and grey legs.
sufdov1: Small colourful fruit-dove; male green above with a purple crown, orange nape, and white breast crossed by a broad blue-black band; green flanks. Greenish-yellow bill and reddish legs.
suifly1: Plain grey-brown tyrant flycatcher, greyish above and whitish below, with two pale wingbars and white-edged blackish tail with a contrasting pale rump. Dark bill and legs.
sulbab1: Plain brown babbler, warm brown above and buffy-brown below with a slightly paler throat and a faint pale supercilium. Slender dark bill and pinkish legs.
sulcud1: Long-tailed cuckoo-dove, warm rufous-brown above and pinkish-buff below, with a long graduated tail and faint barring; male has a glossy iridescent neck patch. Dark bill and reddish legs.
suldro1: Glossy black drongo with a bluish sheen, dark red eye, and a deeply forked tail. Stout black bill and black legs.
sulfly1: Yellow-bellied tyrant flycatcher, olive-grey above with a slightly crested grey-brown head, and bright sulphur-yellow underparts. Stout black bill and dark legs.
sulhor1: Medium-sized blackish hornbill with a dark casque-topped bill; male has yellowish-orange facial skin and casque, female bluish. Black body with white-tipped tail and dark legs.
sultit1: Large glossy-black tit with a long erect yellow crest, black upperparts and breast, and bright yellow belly. Stout black bill and dark legs.
sulwar1: Small leaf warbler, olive-green above with two pale wingbars, a yellowish supercilium, and yellowish-washed underparts. Fine dark bill, pale lower mandible and pale legs.
sumtan: Medium tanager; breeding male entirely rosy-red, female and immature olive-yellow above and yellow below. Large pale yellowish bill and grey legs.
sumwre1: Dark slaty wren, sooty grey-brown above and grey below with a slightly paler throat and faint barring on the flanks. Long slender slightly decurved bill and dark legs.
sunbit1: Cryptically patterned heron-like bird, finely barred grey, brown and black above with an ornate sunburst of chestnut, black and gold on the spread wings. Long pointed bill, slender neck, orange legs.
suncuc2: Slim grey cuckoo, plain grey above and on the head and breast, with finely barred whitish underparts. Yellow eyering, slightly decurved bill and yellow legs.
sunfro1: Cryptic rufous-brown frogmouth mottled and vermiculated grey and buff, with a huge flat hooked bill and ear-like tufts above large eyes. Broad head and short legs.
sungre1: Slim grebe-like waterbird, brown above and whitish below, with a bold black-and-white striped face and neck. Pointed reddish bill, and lobed yellow-and-black banded feet.
sunlau1: Plain greyish laughingthrush, soft grey-brown above and paler grey below, with bare blue skin around a pale eye and a slightly darker crown. Dark bill and pinkish legs.
sunwar1: Small leaf warbler, olive-green above with a grey crown bordered by blackish lateral stripes, a pale supercilium, and pale yellow underparts. Fine bill and pinkish legs.
