wrlrus1: Small stocky marsh bird, warm brown above boldly streaked black and buff, with rufous wings and short stiff dark tail; whitish throat and pale buffy underparts. Short pointed bill; long toes, brown legs.
wsfeye1: Glossy black antbird with a bright red eye; male all blackish with a white shoulder patch (often hidden). Female warm rufous-brown overall, paler below, also with red eye. Black bill and legs.
wtathr1: Dark slate-gray thrush with contrasting bright white outer tail and rump that flash in flight; blackish wings, paler gray underparts. Slim blackish bill, dark legs; upright ground-thrush posture.
wtbeat1: Slim pale green bee-eater with black eyestripe and black breast band framing a white throat and chin; rufous-tinged nape, pale blue undertail, long central tail streamers. Long decurved black bill; dark legs.
wtcfly1: Small blue-gray flycatcher with a short black crest, white wing patch, and broad white edges to the dark fanned tail; pale grayish-white underparts. Fine black bill, dark legs; restless tail-fanning shape.
wtgfin1: Slender long graduated-tailed grassland finch, buffy-brown above heavily streaked black, plain pale buff underparts; orange-yellow at bend of wing. Yellow-and-gray conical bill, pale legs.
wtmjay1: Large striking jay with blue upperparts, white underparts and face, black breast band and curling black forehead crest plumes; long blue-and-white tail. Black bill and legs.
wtqdov1: Plump terrestrial dove, warm brown above, grayish below, with a white throat, white facial stripes around a dark cheek line, and a buff forehead. Reddish-purple iridescence on neck; dark bill, red legs.
wtrcha1: Robin-chat with slate-gray crown and back, orange-rufous throat, breast and rump, and white throat; white supercilium over a dark mask, blackish tail. Thin black bill, dark legs.
wtrthr1: Compact rock-thrush; male blue-gray crown and nape, blackish mask, white throat, and rich orange-rufous breast and belly, with a large white wing patch. Slim black bill, dark legs.
wtstan1: Stocky thick-billed tanager; male glossy black above with bright golden-yellow underparts, rump and white throat patch. Female olive-yellow with grayer head. Heavy hook-tipped pale bill; gray legs.
wvvear1: Green hummingbird with shining violet-blue ear patch extending onto throat, glittering green upperparts and breast, and a contrasting white belly and undertail. Slightly decurved black bill; dark legs.
wwbfin1: Brushfinch with rufous crown, black face and upperparts, white underparts, and a prominent white wing patch; throat white. Conical black bill, dark legs; slim long-tailed shape.
wwstan1: Stout-billed tanager; male glossy black above with golden-yellow underparts, rump and a white wing patch and throat. Female olive-brown with yellowish throat. Heavy hooked pale-based bill; gray legs.
wwswar1: Large dark warbler, uniform dark rufous-brown above and on the breast with a white throat and small white carpal (shoulder) patch at the bend of the wing; long graduated tail. Slim dark bill, brownish legs.
wynlau1: Medium-large laughingthrush, dark slaty-gray crown and grayish-brown upperparts with a bold black face mask and white throat; gray breast grading to orange-rufous belly and flanks. Bill blackish above, pale yellow below; legs grayish.
y00400: Small, drab olive-gray honeyguide, plain grayish below and olive above with faint streaking; short stubby bill and a pale yellow streak along the wing edge. White outer tail flashes in flight; gray legs.
y00475: Slate-gray waterbird with a blackish head and neck, a whitish chicken-like bill with a dark reddish band near the tip and a red frontal shield; white undertail edges. Lobed greenish-yellow toes.
y00599: Velvety black tanager with a brilliant scarlet rump and lower back; rest of plumage black including head and underparts. Female duller with orange rump. Stout silvery-blue bill; dark legs.
y00621: Swallow with glossy blue-black crown and back, pale orange-rufous collar and rump, and buffy streaked underparts; deeply forked tail with long outer streamers. Small black bill, dark legs.
y00678: Large long-legged raptor; blackish body and wings, white neck and breast finely barred black, black cap, and bare orange-red facial skin. White tail with broad black terminal band; pale blue-based hooked bill; yellow legs.
y00731: Small dusky-brown swiftlet, plain grayish-brown above, slightly paler gray-brown below, with a shallowly forked tail and narrow swept-back wings. Tiny black bill, blackish legs; uniform unmarked plumage.
y00824: Slim pale gray starling with a whitish head, chestnut undertail and chestnut-washed flanks, and grayish upperparts; pale eye. Bill blue-gray with dark tip; dull orange legs.
y00839: Large brown hawk-eagle with a prominent slender crest, dark brown upperparts, and pale underparts heavily streaked brown on breast and barred on belly; barred tail. Yellow cere and feet; powerful hooked bill.
y00989: Small dingy leaf-warbler, brownish-olive above and washed yellowish-buff below, with a bold yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, and yellow throat; no wing bars. Dark-tipped pale bill; yellowish legs.
y01036: Tiny tyrannulet, grayish-olive above with a white semi-concealed crown patch (often raised crest), whitish underparts, and pale wing edgings; whitish lores. Short black bill, dark legs.
y01204: Small plain mouse-gray tyrannulet, grayish-brown above and dull whitish-gray below with no strong markings; faint pale wing edgings and indistinct pale lores. Short stubby dark bill; dark legs.
y01249: Olive flycatcher, olive-green above and pale yellowish below with dense olive streaking across breast and flanks; pale eye-ring and buffy wing markings. Short broad bill dark above, pale below; pinkish legs.
ybbwar1: Small skulking bush-warbler, warm olive-brown above and washed yellowish-buff below with a yellowish belly; faint pale supercilium, plain face. Short rounded wings, longish tail; thin bill, pinkish legs.
ybfdov2: Plump green fruit-dove; green upperparts and breast with a gray head and breast, a yellow lower belly and undertail, and chestnut-and-yellow on the nape. Short pale bill; reddish legs.
ybsvir1: Stout shrike-vireo, bright green above with a gray crown, bold yellow supercilium and yellow throat, and a green-and-yellow face; whitish belly. Pale eye; heavy hooked grayish bill; bluish-gray legs.
ybtfly1: Tiny tody-flycatcher, blackish crown and upperparts with a yellow supercilium and lores, yellow underparts, and a small white wing mark; long tail. Flat black bill, pale legs.
ybttyr1: Small crested tit-tyrant, grayish above streaked dusky, with a black erect crest, whitish underparts streaked dark on breast, and a pale eye. Short stubby yellow bill with dark tip; dark legs.
ybweye1: Small flycatcher-like bird; male dull olive-green above with brilliant yellow underparts and large fleshy green eye-wattles. Female similar but duller. Short broad black bill; grayish legs.
ycnher: Stocky gray heron with a black head bearing a creamy-white crown and cheek patch; gray body, red eye, and long white head plumes when breeding. Heavy black bill; yellow-orange legs.
yebant1: Plump round antpitta, olive-brown above with a rich golden-yellow throat and breast grading to whitish belly; plain olive face. Long pinkish legs, short tail, upright stance; stout dark bill.
yebant2: Small antwren; male gray above with white wing bars, a black crown and mask, white supercilium, and yellow underparts. Female has rufous crown. Slim black bill; gray legs.
yebant3: Small antbird, olive-brown above with a bold yellow supercilium and black-streaked face; yellow throat and breast grading to whitish belly. Thin black bill; grayish legs; long-legged understory shape.
yebapa1: Slender long-tailed warbler, green above with a grayish face and striking red eye, a bright yellow breast and white belly often separated by a narrow black bar. Fine black bill; pale legs.
yebbab1: Drab grayish-brown babbler, dull brown above and paler grayish below with faint streaking on the throat and breast; plain face, pale eye. Yellow bill and yellowish legs; loose floppy plumage.
yebboa1: Tiny flycatcher with a broad flat boat-shaped black bill; male glossy black above with bold white wing bars, a yellow forehead-stripe, white throat, and bright yellow breast and belly. Long black tail; dark legs.
yebbou1: Striking bush-shrike with glossy blue-black upperparts, crown and tail contrasting sharply with brilliant orange-yellow throat, breast and belly. Heavy black hook-tipped bill; blue-gray legs.
yebbru2: Brushfinch with a rufous-chestnut crown, black face and olive-green upperparts, and bright yellow throat and underparts. Conical black bill; dark legs; slim long-tailed shape.
yebbul2: Bulbul with grayish-brown head, olive-brown upperparts, a white throat, and yellowish underparts; bushy-headed look. Pale eye; dark bill, pinkish legs.
yebbul3: Olive-green bulbul with a bright yellow face and underparts, a conspicuous yellow eye-ring, and yellowish-olive upperparts and wing edgings. Slim dark bill; grayish legs.
yebbun: Bunting; breeding male chestnut-brown above with a black face and chin, a bright yellow throat and yellow underparts crossed by a narrow chestnut breast band; white wing patch. Pinkish bill, pale legs.
yebbun1: Bunting with a blackish head marked by a bold bright yellow supercilium and white cheek spot; brown streaked upperparts, white underparts with dark streaking on breast and flanks. Pinkish bill, pale legs.
yebbuw2: Small skulking warbler with warm rufous-brown upperparts and tail, paler buffy-brown underparts. Pale buffy supercilium, dark eyestripe, fine dark bill. Pinkish legs. Plain rounded wings, rather short tail; nondescript and stocky.
yebcac1: Glossy all-black blackbird-sized icterid with a heavy, sharply pointed pale ivory-yellow bill. Plumage entirely black with faint sheen, dark eye, blackish legs. Robust body, fairly long graduated tail.
yebcam1: Small olive-green warbler with brighter yellowish-green wings, plain greyish underparts washed yellow. Bold yellow supercilium and lores contrasting with grey crown, dark eye. Slender dark bill, pale legs; short cocked tail.
yebcar: Striking finch with bright red head and throat, grey-black back and wings, white underparts. Sharply bicolored bill, yellowish-horn above and at base. Black breast extends as collar; dark legs, dark eye.
yebcha: Large chunky warbler-like bird, olive-green above, brilliant lemon-yellow throat and breast, white belly. White spectacles (eye-ring plus loral line) on grey face, blackish lores. Stout black bill, dark legs; long tail.
yebcht1: Small dark flycatcher, slaty-olive above, bright yellow belly and lower breast, olive-grey throat and chest. Yellow forecrown/coronal patch and yellow supercilium on dark head. Small black bill, dark legs.
yebcra1: Tiny rail with rich rufous-buff face, neck and breast, yellowish-buff belly, dark olive-brown back finely flecked. Crown dark; flanks and undertail barred black-and-white. Short greenish bill, dull legs; very small and secretive.
yebcuc: Slim long-tailed cuckoo, grey-brown above, clean white below. Long graduated tail blackish below with bold white spots. Curved bill with yellow lower mandible, rufous primaries visible in wing. Reddish eye-ring, grey legs.
yebdac1: Small tanager-like bird; male has glossy blue-black upperparts, hood and breast, contrasting bright yellow belly and underwing. Red eye, pointed dark bill, dark legs. Female olive-green above, yellow below.
yebduc1: Medium dabbling duck, dark scaly-brown body with pale-edged feathers, paler head. Distinctive bright yellow bill with black saddle/ridge. Greenish-blue speculum bordered white in flight; orange legs, dark eye.
yebela1: Olive-brown crested flycatcher with bushy peaked crest often showing hidden white coronal patch, pale yellowish belly, grey-olive breast. Two whitish wingbars, pale eye-ring. Short dark bill, dark legs.
yebere1: Tiny warbler, plain grey-brown above, whitish throat and breast, pale yellow lower belly and undertail-coverts (yellow vent). Faint pale supercilium, pale eye. Slender dark bill, pale legs; short tail.
yebfan1: Tiny fantail-like flycatcher, olive-grey upperparts, brilliant yellow underparts from throat to belly. Yellow supercilium and forehead, dark mask through eye. Fine black bill, dark legs; long fanned tail with white tips.
yebfin1: Stocky bunting-like finch; male grey head and breast, olive-green back, yellow belly with fine streaking, bold yellow malar stripe and yellow eyebrow bordering dark face. Stout conical bill, dark legs.
yebflo2: Tiny plump flowerpecker, olive-green above, bright yellow breast and belly with diffuse dusky streaking on flanks. Concealed orange-red crown patch, faint malar. Short stubby dark bill, dark legs; very short tail.
yebfly: Small Empidonax flycatcher, olive-green above, distinctly yellow-washed throat and underparts. Bold yellowish eye-ring and two pale wingbars. Lower mandible orange-yellow, upper dark. Dark legs; compact upright posture.
yebfly3: Small flat-billed flycatcher, olive-green above, yellow underparts brightest on belly, olive-washed breast. Pale yellowish lores and eye-ring give blank-faced look. Broad pale-edged wing feathers; broad pale-based bill, grey legs.
yebfrd2: Plump green fruit-dove with bright green upperparts and head, paler green underparts, golden-yellow throat/bib bordered below by purplish patch. Grey or greenish bill, reddish legs, red eye. Short tail.
yebgre1: Medium greenbul, dull olive-brown above, bright yellow throat and underparts. Greyish head, pale eye, faint pale eye-ring. Slender dark bill, dark legs; plain wings and longish tail.
yebgre4: Yellowish-green finch, olive-green upperparts streaked dusky, bright yellow rump, throat and breast. Dark wings with broad yellow wing-flash and yellow-edged feathers, blackish tail with yellow base. Pale conical bill.
yebgro1: Stout finch; male blue-grey body, black hood/crown, black wings and tail with white wing patches and white tips. Massive deep-yellow conical bill. Black legs; bold and chunky.
yebjac1: Small slender jacamar; male glossy metallic green above and across breast, rufous belly, white throat. Long thin straight bill, yellow lower mandible (yellow-billed). Short legs; long pointed tail.
yebkin1: Stocky kingfisher with rufous-orange head and underparts, bluish-green back and wings, black markings on rear crown/nape. Large heavy yellow-orange bill. Whitish belly tinge; short orange legs.
yeblon1: Small slim honeyeater-like bird, olive-green above, plain yellowish underparts. Faint dusky eyestripe, pale eye. Long, slender slightly decurved dark bill; grey legs. Drab and warbler-like.
yeblor1: Vivid red parrot (lory) with green wings, green thighs and green tail-tip, black cap on crown, and a yellow band across the upper breast (yellow bib). Orange bill, grey legs.
yebmag: Black-and-white magpie with iridescent blue-green wings and long graduated blue-green tail, white belly and shoulder patches. Distinctive bright yellow bill and yellow skin around eye; black legs.
yebmag1: Bright lime-green magpie with rich rufous-chestnut wings, black mask through eye to nape, pale yellowish-green underparts. Stout red bill, red legs and red eye-ring. Long pale-tipped green tail.
yebmel1: Large dark honeyeater, sooty-brown overall, with bare yellow-orange facial skin/wattles around eye and a yellowish brow line, rufous undertail-coverts. Long slightly decurved blackish bill, dark legs.
yebnun1: All-black puffbird-like bird, uniform sooty-black plumage, with a bright orange-yellow slightly decurved bill. Dark eye, blackish legs. Slim with longish tail; the only black nunbird with yellow bill.
yebori1: Bright golden-yellow oriole (icterid) with black wings, black tail and black face/throat bib. Entire head, body and back deep yellow. Slender pointed blue-grey bill, grey legs, dark eye.
yeboxp1: Brown starling-relative, grey-brown above, paler buff-tan rump and underparts. Stout yellow bill with red tip, broad red eye-ring/yellow bare eye-ring. Sharp claws; clings to large mammals.
yeboxy1: Small skulking ground-warbler, olive-brown above, yellowish-olive underparts. Striking bright yellow eyebrow (yellowbrow) over dark eyeline on olive face. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs; short tail.
yebpin1: Slim dabbling duck, warm buff-brown body finely spotted and barred dark, paler head. Bright yellow bill with black culmen ridge. Pointed brownish tail; green-and-bronze speculum; greyish legs.
yebpri1: Slim long-tailed warbler, olive-grey above, whitish throat and breast, pale yellow belly and vent. Greyish head, indistinct pale supercilium, reddish eye. Fine dark bill, orange legs; long graduated cocked tail.
yebsap: Boldly patterned woodpecker, black-and-white barred back, red forecrown, red throat (male), black breast crescent, pale yellow-washed belly. Long white wing-stripe, white rump. Chisel bill, grey legs.
yebsee1: Small finch; male olive-grey above, with black throat/upper breast contrasting yellowish-white lower underparts, yellow undertail-coverts. Stubby grey conical bill, dark legs. Female plain buffy-olive.
yebshr1: Large long-tailed shrike, soft grey-brown above and below with fine dark streaking, rufous flight feathers and rufous in wing. Bold black mask, yellow bill. Very long graduated tail; dark legs.
yebsis1: Small siskin; male black head, throat and upperparts (or black hood) contrasting bright yellow breast, belly and rump, yellow wing patches. Pointed conical dark bill, dark legs.
yebspa1: Small streaky sparrow, brown back streaked black, plain greyish-buff underparts. Distinctive bright yellow supercilium and yellow lores on grey-streaked face. Pale conical bill, pinkish legs; flat-headed look.
yebtan1: Small tanager; male olive-green above with black wings, yellow throat and yellow nape/collar, whitish belly. Yellow rump. Slender pointed bill, dark legs. Female plainer olive-yellow.
yebtea1: Small dabbling duck, finely speckled grey-brown body, darker head, with a bright yellow bill marked by a black culmen stripe. Green-black speculum bordered buff; greyish legs, dark eye.
yebter2: Small pale tern, grey above, white below and on forehead, with black crown/nape and black eyestripe. Straight yellow bill (no black tip), yellow legs. Long pointed wings, forked white tail.
yebtit3: Tiny plain tit, olive-grey above, paler greyish-yellow below. Short yellow eyebrow, small crest, dark eye. Fine pointed bill, pale legs; faint pale wingbar. Drab and warbler-like.
yebtit4: Small tit; male glossy black head and throat with white cheek patch and white nape spot, slaty-grey back, yellow underparts. Short crest. Two pale wingbars; small black bill, grey legs.
yebtur1: Green turaco with glossy green body and crest, crimson flight feathers shown in flat, white eye-ring and white markings on face. Bright yellow-and-red bill, dark legs. Long tail glossed violet-blue.
yebtyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, olive-green above, uniform yellow underparts. Plain face with whitish eye-ring/short supercilium, no wingbars. Short stubby dark bill, dark legs. Very small, compact, big-headed.
yebwaa1: Small antbird; warm rufous-brown above, with bright yellow throat and breast finely streaked black on the chest, buffy-yellow belly. Faint pale supercilium, dark eye. Slender bill, pinkish legs; short tail.
yebwar1: Small warbler, greyish crown and olive-green back, white throat and breast, pale yellow belly and undertail. Bold white supercilium with dark eyestripe, blackish lores. Fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
yebwar2: Tiny leaf-warbler, olive-green above, bright yellow throat, breast and belly. Yellowish supercilium, dark eyestripe, no wingbars (or faint single bar). Fine dark bill with pale base, pale legs.
yebwax2: Tiny waxbill, olive-green upperparts, greyish head and breast, pale yellow belly and yellow undertail-coverts, red rump. Small red-and-black conical bill, dark legs; rounded body, short blackish tail.
yebwhi1: Medium plump songbird with olive-brown upperparts, head and breast; clean white throat and bright lemon-yellow belly and vent. Short, stout, hooked black bill; greyish legs. Plain face lacking strong markings.
yecbar1: Stocky green barbet with a bright yellow crown patch, blue cheeks and throat, and a black band across the forehead and around the eye; rest of plumage grass-green. Pale ivory bill with bristles at base; greenish-grey legs.
yeccan1: Small finch with greenish-olive streaked back, bright yellow underparts and rump; male has a yellow crown and forehead, grey nape, yellow supercilium and dark eyeline. Short conical pinkish-horn bill; pinkish-brown legs.
yecchl1: Small rotund tanager-relative, bright grass-green above and on head with a narrow black mask and a black-bordered yellow band across the lower throat/upper breast; yellow lower breast and belly. Stubby yellow bill; pale legs.
yecela1: Small olive flycatcher, greyish-olive above with two pale wing bars and a concealed yellow crown patch; whitish throat grading to pale yellow belly. Greyish supercilium and face. Small dark bill with pale base; dark legs.
yeceup1: Tiny stub-billed finch; male glossy blue-black above and on throat and breast with an extensive bright yellow forecrown, and entirely deep yellow underparts. Short thick blackish bill; dark grey legs.
yeclov: Small stocky parrot with green body and wings, a brownish-black hooded head, bright yellow collar across the nape and breast, and white eye-ring. Bright red bill; grey legs.
yecmac: Slender long-tailed macaw, mostly green above with a brownish-black forecrown, bare yellowish facial skin, and a broad yellow collar across the nape; blue flight feathers and reddish lower belly. Dark bill; pinkish legs.
yecman2: Small manakin with dark olive head and upperparts, a mostly concealed golden-yellow crown stripe, and elongated silky white throat feathers; sooty-olive breast grading to chestnut and cinnamon-rufous belly. Long narrow dark bill; dark legs.
yecpar: Small green parakeet with bright yellow leading edge to the wing (yellow chevron), otherwise overall green plumage, slightly paler below. Pale horn-coloured bill; pinkish-grey legs.
yecred1: Slender warbler-like bird, olive-green above and bright yellow below with a black head bearing a yellow crown patch; black tail with white outer feathers. Thin black bill; dark legs.
yecspi2: Small rufous spinetail with bright rufous crown, wings and tail, brownish-grey back, and whitish underparts; small yellow-orange chin spot. Whitish supercilium and face. Slender dark bill; greyish legs.
yectit1: Striking crested tit, black above heavily spotted with white, with a tall black crest, bold yellow cheeks and forehead, and a black throat extending down a yellow-and-black streaked breast. Short black bill; bluish-grey legs.
yectyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, olive-green above with two pale wing bars and a concealed yellow crown patch; grey head, whitish throat, yellow belly. Short stubby bill, dark above and pale below; dark legs.
yecwoo1: Small woodpecker with brown-and-white barred upperparts and wings; whitish underparts with bold dark streaking; pale face with brown eyestripe. Male has a yellow forecrown and red hindcrown; small yellow nape patch. Dark bill; greyish legs.
yeebab1: Warm rufous-brown above and buffy-white below with rufous wings; striking orange-yellow eye-ring around a pale yellow eye, and white lores and throat. Short stout black bill; orange-yellow legs; long graduated tail.
yeecus1: Slim grey cuckooshrike, plain blue-grey above; underparts whitish boldly barred dark grey from breast to vent. Striking yellow eye. Black bill; dark grey legs; long barred tail.
yeejun: Grey sparrow-sized bird with a slate-grey hood and breast, rufous-brown back and wings, pale grey belly, and white outer tail feathers; bright yellow-orange eye. Pinkish bill with dark culmen; pinkish legs.
yeepar1: Large slender parrot, deep green overall with extensive bright yellow on the cheeks, ear-coverts and forehead; long pointed tail. Large heavy blackish bill; grey legs.
yeespi1: Long-billed sunbird relative, olive-green above and yellow-olive below with faint streaking; conspicuous bright yellow ear patch and yellow malar area. Very long, decurved blackish bill; dark legs.
yeetou1: Small stocky toucanet with black head, breast and underparts, golden-yellow ear tufts, green-and-rufous back, and chestnut nape patch; bare greenish eye-skin. Stout bill black above and pale greenish-yellow below; bluish-grey legs.
yeewoo1: Small woodpecker with greenish-bronze barred upperparts and bold yellow ear-coverts; underparts whitish narrowly barred dark. Male has red crown. Olive-tinged face; dark bill; greenish-grey legs.
yefbar1: Green barbet with a bright yellow forehead and forecrown, blue face and throat, and a brown nape; rest of plumage green. Pale stout bill ringed with bristles; greenish legs.
yefcan: Small finch with greenish-grey streaked back, bright yellow rump and underparts; head boldly patterned with yellow supercilium, dark eyestripe and dark malar stripe framing yellow cheeks. Short conical horn bill; pinkish legs.
yefgra1: Tiny olive finch; male dull olive-green above and grey-olive below with a black throat and breast offset by bright yellow eyebrow and yellow lower throat crescent. Short conical black bill; dark legs.
yefgul: Large gull with white head and underparts, dark slate-grey back and wings, black wingtips with white spots, and a broad black-and-red band on a yellow bill. Distinctive bright yellow legs and feet.
yefhon1: Olive-grey honeyeater, brownish-olive above and pale grey below with diffuse streaking; bright yellow face with a black stripe through the eye bordered above by a white crescent. Slender slightly decurved black bill; greyish legs.
yefmyn1: Glossy black starling-relative with extensive bare yellow facial skin around and behind the eye, yellow nape patch, and a large yellow-and-orange rump and vent patch. Heavy orange-yellow bill; yellow legs.
yefpar5: Stocky green-and-yellow parrot, mostly yellowish-green with a bright yellow face, forehead and underparts, and dusky-olive crown and back; bronzy wash on wings. Pale horn bill; greyish legs.
yefpig1: Plump green pigeon with greyish-green head and underparts, lilac shoulder patch, yellowish wing edgings, and a broad pale yellowish-green breast band; greenish-grey upperparts. Pale bluish bill with reddish base; bright yellow legs and feet.
yeftin1: Tiny tinkerbird, black above boldly spotted and streaked yellow-and-white, with a bright golden-yellow forecrown spot; yellowish underparts and bold black-and-yellow facial stripes. Short black bill; greyish legs.
yefwoo1: Boldly patterned woodpecker with black upperparts, white rump, and a striking golden-yellow forehead, face and throat; barred black-and-white flanks, reddish belly patch. Male has red crown. Dark bill; greyish legs.
yeggro1: Stocky finch-like bird, bright yellowish-green overall, brighter yellow on head and underparts, with a contrasting black face mask and chin around the heavy bill; greener back and wings. Massive pale grey conical bill; grey legs.
yegvir: Olive vireo, greyish-olive above and whitish below with bright yellow flanks and undertail; yellowish supercilium and dusky eyeline, no wing bars. Stout blue-grey bill; bluish legs.
yehbla: Striking blackbird; male glossy black with a brilliant golden-yellow head, neck and breast and a white wing patch on the primary coverts. Sharp conical dark bill; black legs.
yehbla2: Small blackbird; male glossy black overall with an extensive bright yellow hood covering the head, neck and breast. Sharp pointed black bill; dark legs.
yehbrf1: Brushfinch with olive-green upperparts, grey breast and flanks, and a bright yellow head and throat; whitish belly. Stout dark conical bill; dusky legs.
yehcar1: Pale raptor with creamy-buff head, neck and underparts, dark brown back and wings, and a dark line behind the eye; bare facial skin. Heavily barred undertail. Pale bluish-grey bill; greyish legs.
yehpar: Large stocky green parrot with a bright yellow head, red shoulder patch and red-and-blue in the wing; pale eye-ring and bare facial area. Pale horn-coloured bill; greyish legs.
yehwar1: Small warbler-like bird, plain grey above and pale grey below, with a bright yellow forehead, face, throat and broad supercilium; yellow undertail. Slender pointed dark bill; dark legs.
yelbis1: Sparrow-sized weaver; breeding male black overall with a bright yellow rump, shoulders and wing edgings forming a yellow shoulder patch. Stout conical black bill; brownish legs.
yelbit: Small slim heron, warm buff-yellow overall, paler below, with a contrasting blackish crown and blackish flight feathers showing in flight; long buffy neck. Yellowish dagger bill; greenish-yellow legs.
yelbul1: Plain bulbul, greyish-olive to yellowish above and pale yellow below, with a slightly darker greyer head and pale throat. Slim slightly downcurved blackish bill; dark legs; longish tail.
yelbun1: Small bunting; breeding male greenish-yellow with olive-streaked back, yellow underparts, a greenish head with faint dark eyeline and dusky cheek surround, and a pale eye-ring; two whitish wing bars. Pinkish conical bill; pinkish legs.
yelcan1: Small finch; male bright yellow below and on face with a yellow rump, greenish-yellow streaked back, and a yellow supercilium over a faint dusky eyeline. Short conical horn bill; pinkish-brown legs.
yelcar1: Distinctive yellow-and-grey finch; male bright yellow with a tall black crest, black throat and bib, grey back, and yellow face and underparts; black-streaked grey flanks. Stout grey conical bill; dark legs.
yelfly1: Small olive flycatcher, olive-green above with two yellowish wing bars and a bold yellow eye-ring; throat and underparts washed yellow. Small bill dark above and pale orange below; dark legs.
yelfly2: Tiny warbler-like flycatcher, bright olive-yellow above and clear yellow below, with an olive-green tail (not rufous); plain yellowish face. Small fine dark bill; pale legs; longish tail often fanned.
yelgro: Large heavy-billed finch; male brilliant golden-yellow on head, underparts and rump, with black-and-white wings and tail and dusky-streaked yellowish back. Massive pale grey-and-black conical bill; greyish legs.
yellon1: Plain warbler with dark olive-grey crown and olive-green upperparts grading to yellow-tinged back and rump; greenish-yellow underparts and whitish throat. Pale yellow iris; longish slender bill; greyish legs.
yellow3: Small songbird with bright golden-yellow head and underparts contrasting with olive-brown back, wings and tail. Dark eye, short black bill, and dark legs. Compact body with a fairly long tail.
yellow5: Slender greyish cuckoo with sooty-grey body, paler grey breast, and a long graduated tail tipped white below. Bright yellow-green stout curved bill and red orbital skin around a dark eye.
yellow6: Long-tailed slim cuckoo, dark slaty-grey overall with paler underparts and a long graduated dark tail. Distinctive stout yellow-green downcurved bill; reddish eye-ring.
yelori1: Bright golden-yellow oriole with a black throat patch, black lores, black wings with white edging, and a black-and-yellow tail. Sharp pointed bluish-grey bill; dark eye; grey legs.
yelpar1: Green amazon parrot with a red forehead, yellow lores and crown patch, white eye-ring, and red wing speculum. Pale horn bill, scalloped neck feathers; short squarish tail.
yelpip2: Small streaky pipit, buff-brown above with dark streaking, and pale yellowish-buff underparts streaked on the breast. Pale supercilium, thin pointed bill, pinkish legs, and white outer tail feathers.
yelpip3: Small slim pipit, sandy grey-brown above with fine dark streaks, and whitish-buff underparts with light breast streaking. Pale supercilium, thin pale-based bill, pinkish legs, white outer tail.
yelrai: Tiny secretive rail, buffy-yellow with black-and-tawny streaked upperparts crossed by fine white bars, and buff breast. Short yellowish bill, greenish legs; white wing patch shows in flight.
yelrob1: Plump robin with grey head and upperparts, bright yellow underparts, and a yellowish-olive rump. Large dark eye, fine black bill, slender dark legs; upright posture.
yeltho1: Tiny warbler-like bird, olive-yellow above and pale yellow below with a faintly streaked throat. Pale eye, small fine bill, and a short tail; rounded compact body.
yelthr1: Glossy black thrush (male) with bright yellow bill, yellow eye-ring, and yellow legs; female olive-brown with yellow bill and legs. Slim build, upright stance.
yeltin1: Plump ground bird with dark brown finely barred upperparts, rufous-brown flanks, buffy underparts, and a small head. Slightly downcurved dark bill; bright yellow legs; very short tail.
yeltit2: Striking crested tit, glossy blue-black above and on the crest, with bright golden-yellow face, nape patch and underparts. Short black bill, dark eye, grey legs.
yeltyr1: Tiny tyrannulet, olive-green above and bright yellow below, with two yellowish wing bars and a yellow supercilium and eye-ring. Small dark bill; dark legs; short tail.
yelwar: Bright golden-yellow warbler, yellow-green above and yellow below, the male with rusty-chestnut streaks on the breast and a rufous-tinged crown. Yellow wing edgings; dark eye; pinkish legs.
yelwat1: Large grey-brown honeyeater heavily streaked white below, with a yellow belly patch and long pendulous yellow wattles hanging from the cheeks. Yellowish crown, dark bill, dark eye.
yemfly1: Small flatbill flycatcher, olive-green above and yellowish below with an olive-streaked breast, dusky face mask and pale eye-ring. Broad flat dark bill with pale lower mandible; yellow-edged wings.
yemlin1: Small finch, warm grey-brown overall with paler underparts and bright pinkish-buff edges to the wing and tail feathers (no red in plumage). Short conical grey bill; dark legs.
yemser1: Small streaky serin, brownish above and pale yellowish below heavily streaked dark, with a yellowish supercilium and throat. Short conical bill; dark eye; pinkish-brown legs.
yemthr1: Dark slaty-brown thrush with paler greyish underparts, a slightly streaked throat, and a bright orange-yellow bill and yellow eye-ring. Pinkish-yellow legs; upright stance.
yenpar1: Green amazon parrot with a broad bright yellow band across the hindneck (nape), pale horn bill, white eye-ring, and red wing speculum. Scalloped neck; short tail.
yenspu1: Large grey-brown spurfowl finely streaked white below, with bare bright red facial skin and throat, and a yellow naked neck patch. Reddish bill and legs; short tail.
yeofly1: Small flatbill flycatcher, olive-green above and pale yellow below with a faintly streaked breast and pale yellow eye-ring and lores. Broad flat dark bill with pale lower mandible.
yephon1: Greyish-olive honeyeater streaked below, with a yellow plume tuft on the side of the neck and yellow ear feathers. Slim slightly downcurved dark bill; dark eye; grey legs.
yercac1: Glossy black cacique with a bright yellow rump, yellow wing patch, yellow upper-tail and undertail coverts, and a sharp ivory-white pointed bill. Pale blue eye; black legs.
yerere1: Small plain warbler, grey-brown above and pale buff-grey below, with a contrasting pale yellow rump and a faint pale eye-ring. Slim dark bill; pale eye; dark legs.
yerflo1: Tiny stub-tailed flowerpecker, olive-green above with a bright yellow rump, greyish-olive underparts and a pale central belly stripe. Short stout dark bill; dark legs.
yermar1: Dark blackish-brown marshbird with a bright yellow rump and yellow wing-bend and flanks, streaked breast. Long sharp pointed black bill; dark eye; blackish legs.
yertho1: Small grey-brown thornbill with a black forehead spotted white, white throat, pale underparts, and a bright yellow rump with a dark tail tip. Tiny fine bill; pale eye.
yertin1: Tiny barbet, black above with bold yellow-and-white facial stripes, yellowish underparts, and a bright lemon-yellow rump. Short stout black bill; dark eye.
yerwar: Grey-streaked warbler with a yellow crown patch, yellow rump, and yellow side patches; white throat (Myrtle form), black breast band, and white wing bars. Thin dark bill; dark legs.
yesbar1: Plump barbet, mostly black with dense round yellow spots over the upperparts and wings, a red forecrown, and a yellow throat. Stout blackish bill; dark eye.
yesbul1: Olive-brown greenbul, brownish above and pale below with fine yellowish streaking on the breast and throat, and rufous-tinged wings and tail. Slim dark bill; pinkish legs.
yesgro2: Stocky grosbeak, olive-green above and yellowish-grey below, with a yellow shoulder patch, grey crown and pale eyebrow. Very heavy pale conical bill; dark eye; greyish legs.
yeshon1: Olive-green honeyeater, plain greenish above and paler below, with a bright yellow spot at the gape behind the bill and a yellowish wing panel. Slim dark bill; dark legs.
yesnic1: Robust olive-green bird with greyish underparts, yellow spots on the wing coverts and a yellow undertail, and a pale throat. Strong slightly hooked greyish bill; reddish eye.
yespet1: Pale sandy-grey sparrow, grey-brown above and whitish below, with a small yellow throat spot and faint head streaking. Stout pale conical bill; pinkish legs; rather plain face.
yeswar1: Plain leaf warbler, drab olive-brown above and dingy buff-yellow below, with a long pale buff supercilium and dark eyestripe. No wing bars; thin dark bill; pinkish legs.
yetant1: Small antwren, slaty-grey above (male) with a black-and-yellow throat and white wing spots; greyish below. Slender pointed black bill; dark eye; greyish legs.
yetbul1: Greyish-olive bulbul with a pale grey head, bright yellow throat and yellow vent, and olive-yellow wing edges. Pale eye-ring, short dark bill; greyish-brown body.
yetbun1: Boldly marked bunting (male) with a black crown and face mask, broad yellow supercilium and throat, black breast band, and rufous-streaked grey-brown back. Conical bill; pinkish legs.
yeteup1: Small chunky euphonia, glossy blue-black above and on the head with a yellow forecrown, and entirely bright yellow throat and underparts. Short stubby dark bill; dark legs.
yetfin1: Olive-and-yellow brushfinch with a blackish head, bright yellow throat and underparts, olive-green back, and yellow thighs. Stout dark bill; dark eye; dark legs.
yetfly2: Small flycatcher, olive-green above and yellow below with a bright yellow throat, dusky face and pale lores. Short broad blackish bill; dark eye; greyish legs; short tail.
yetful1: Small fulvetta, olive-grey above and pale grey below with a bright yellow throat and yellowish belly, plain greyish head. Small fine bill; dark eye; pinkish legs.
yetgre2: Olive-green greenbul, brownish-olive above and paler below, with a contrasting bright yellow throat and breast. Slim dark bill; dark eye; greyish legs; long-ish tail.
yethon1: Grey-brown honeyeater with a bright yellow throat and chin, dark grey crown, and a whitish neck stripe behind the ear. Slim slightly downcurved dark bill; pale eye; grey legs.
yethon3: Olive honeyeater with a black face mask, golden-yellow forehead, yellow ear-tufts and yellow throat, olive-yellow body. Slim slightly downcurved dark bill; dark eye; grey legs.
yetlon1: Streaky-brown pipit-like bird with a bright yellow throat bordered by a black necklace, yellow belly, and dark-streaked brown upperparts. Long pinkish legs; white outer tail feathers.
yetmin1: Pale grey honeyeater with a yellowish wash, yellow patch behind the eye and on the neck, bright yellow legs, and bare yellow skin around the eye. Slim yellow-based dark bill.
yetnic1: Robust, shrike-like greenbul with olive-green upperparts and tail, contrasting yellow throat and belly, and bold yellow spotting on the wing coverts forming spangles. Grey-tinged head, dark eye, heavy hooked blackish bill, and sturdy greyish legs.
yetori1: Bright golden-yellow oriole with a black face, throat, back, wings and central tail, the broad outer tail entirely yellow. Bold yellow shoulder patch, otherwise black wings; pointed bluish-grey bill and dark grey legs.
yetpet1: Plain greyish-brown sparrow with a broad pale buff supercilium, pale underparts, two whitish wing bars, and a small concealed yellow spot on the throat. Pale stout conical bill and pinkish-brown legs.
yetpip1: Compact, plain greyish-brown pipit with a pale buff-white supercilium, faint dusky breast streaking, and subtle yellow-green edges on the wing feathers. Slender dark bill, short pale legs, and white outer tail feathers.
yetscr1: Plump scrubwren with olive-brown upperparts and a bright lemon-yellow face and throat. Male has a black mask through the eye and ear-coverts; underparts pale olive-buff. Fine dark bill and pale legs.
yetspa1: Tiny, large-headed flycatcher with olive-green upperparts, a broad flat bill, and a bright yellow throat. Buffy-yellow eye-ring and face, olive breast, and pale belly; short tail and pale pinkish legs.
yettan1: Striking tanager with pale powder-blue upperparts and crown, a black face and lores, and a blazing yellow throat. Underparts pale cinnamon with a rusty vent; small black bill and dark legs.
yettin1: Tiny olive tinkerbird with a yellowish-green back, bright yellow throat and underparts, and a dark crown. Yellow wing edgings, dusky cheek, stubby blackish bill, and dark legs; very small and rounded.
yetvir: Stocky vireo with bright yellow throat and breast, white belly, and yellow spectacles (eye-ring plus loral patch). Olive-green head and back contrast with grey rump; two bold white wing bars, stout grey bill and blue-grey legs.
yetwar: Grey-backed warbler with a bright yellow throat and breast, black streaks on white flanks, and a bold black-and-white face pattern with white supercilium and a white neck patch. Two white wing bars; fine pointed black bill and dark legs.
yetwhi2: Male has a glossy black hood and a bright yellow throat, with bright yellow underparts, dull olive-green upperparts and a golden-yellow nape collar. Heavy black bill and dark grey legs; female plainer olive and buff.
yetwoo1: Green woodpecker with golden-olive upperparts, a bright yellow throat and face, and a red crown and malar (male). Underparts barred dark and pale; chisel-tipped grey bill and greyish legs.
yetwoo2: Black woodpecker with white-spotted black upperparts, a bold yellow forecrown tuft, red crown patch, and a yellow eye. Black breast, red belly patch, whitish rump; straight black bill and grey legs.
yetwow1: Small leaf-warbler with olive-green upperparts, a rusty-orange forecrown and face, a yellow throat and breast fading to whitish belly. Faint yellow wing edgings, fine dark bill, and pale pinkish legs.
yevbul1: Pale bulbul with brown upperparts, whitish underparts, a dark eyestripe and dusky crown contrasting with a white forehead and face. Distinctive yellow vent (undertail-coverts); slim black bill and dark legs.
yevflo1: Tiny flowerpecker with golden-olive upperparts, snow-white underparts boldly streaked with black, and orange-yellow vent. Whitish loral stripe, striking red eye, short sharp black bill, and dark legs.
yevwar1: Bright leaf-warbler with green upperparts, yellow throat and breast, a contrasting white belly, and a yellow vent. Yellow supercilium, dark eyestripe, dark crown sides; fine bill and pale legs.
yevwoo1: Small woodpecker with olive-green upperparts and a barred rump, pale yellow underparts boldly barred dark, and a yellow vent. Blackish face with white supercilium and white malar; red crown (male). Dark bill and grey legs.
yewbla2: Glossy black blackbird (male) with bright yellow shoulder patches (epaulets) on the wing. Slender pointed black conical bill and black legs; females streaky dark brown with pale supercilium.
yewbul1: Medium bulbul with dark brown upperparts, a grey-brown slightly crested head, warm brown chest and flanks, and a white belly centre. Prominent yellow eye-ring; white undertail-covert and tail tips; dark bill and legs.
yewcac1: Large black-and-yellow cacique (male) with a black head, breast and back, bright yellow rump, belly, wing patch and outer tail. Bushy black crest, pale ivory-yellow pointed bill, and dark legs.
yewgre1: Plain olive greenbul with olive-green upperparts, paler yellowish-olive underparts, and faint pale yellow whisker streaks below the dark cheek. Reddish-brown eye, broad-based dark bill, and greyish legs.
yewlap2: Pale sandy-brown lapwing with a black crown, grey-brown breast bordered below by a black band, and white belly. Bright yellow facial wattles and yellow legs; yellow bill with black tip; white-and-black wing pattern in flight.
yewtan1: Blue-grey tanager with a paler greyish head and underparts and a small dark mask. Wings blackish with a bright yellow shoulder patch and blue edgings; stout dark bill and dark grey legs.
yewvir1: Small olive vireo with greenish upperparts, yellowish underparts and face, and dull yellow wing edgings forming two faint wing bars. Yellow eye-ring, dark eye, short stout bill, and bluish-grey legs.
yfweye1: Compact white-eye with olive-green upperparts, a bright yellow forehead, throat and underparts, and a bold white eye-ring. Yellowish-green crown and face; fine pointed dark bill and pale legs.
ysbfin1: Brushfinch with olive-green upperparts, a yellow-and-olive striped head, and bright lemon-yellow underparts. Yellowish supercilium and throat with darker crown stripes; stout dark conical bill and pale legs.
ytbcoc1: Very large brownish-black cockatoo with pale yellowish scalloping on the body feathers, a yellow ear-covert patch, and a broad yellow panel in the tail. Erectile crest, heavy dark grey bill, and dark grey legs.
ytbtan1: Olive-backed chlorospingus with a dark grey-brown head, a bold bright yellow throat, and dull olive-yellow underparts. Dark eye, plain face, slender pointed dark bill, and dusky legs.
ytweye1: White-eye with olive-green upperparts, a bright yellow throat and breast, and a conspicuous white eye-ring. Greenish-yellow underparts, fine pointed dark bill, and pale grey legs.
yucfly1: Slim myiarchus flycatcher with grey-brown upperparts, a pale grey throat and breast, and a pale lemon-yellow belly. Faint rufous edges in wings and tail, bushy crest, slender dark bill, and dark legs.
yucjay1: Large jay with a glossy blue-black body, black head and underparts, and contrasting bright blue wings and tail. Bold yellow eye-ring and yellow bill and legs in adults; striking and distinctive.
yucnig1: Cryptic rufous-and-grey nightjar mottled with brown, buff and black; warm cinnamon-rufous tones overall. Male shows white tail corners and a buffy throat band; tiny dark bill, large dark eyes, and short legs.
yucpoo1: Small grey-brown nightjar finely mottled with black and buff, with a white throat band and white-tipped outer tail feathers. Rounded wings, large dark eyes, tiny bill, and short legs; rufous-tinged plumage.
yucvir: Large, plain vireo with grey-brown upperparts, pale greyish-white underparts, and a pale buffy-white supercilium. Dark eyestripe, dark eye, heavy hooked grey bill, and bluish-grey legs; no wing bars.
yucwoo: Small woodpecker with black-and-white barred back and wings, a pale grey-brown face and underparts, and a red rear crown (male, with yellow forecrown). Golden-yellow eye, straight dark bill, and grey legs.
yucwre1: Large boldly patterned wren with a streaked brown-and-black back, a blackish crown, a white supercilium, and dark spotting on a whitish breast. Buffy flanks, barred tail, long slightly decurved bill, and dark legs.
yunman1: Manakin (male) with a velvety black body, a brilliant scarlet-red crown patch, and a sky-blue back. Black wings and tail, orange-red legs, and a small dark bill; female olive-green overall.
yunnut1: Small grey nuthatch with blue-grey upperparts, a black eyestripe, white throat and cheeks, and buffy-cinnamon underparts. Short tail, long pointed grey bill, and grey legs; compact and short-tailed.
yupowl1: Tiny brown owl with rich rufous-brown upperparts finely spotted pale, a streaked whitish breast, and two black false-eye spots on the nape. Yellow eyes, small yellowish bill, and feathered yellowish feet.
yuttyr1: Tiny tody-tyrant with dark olive-green upperparts, a short bushy crest, grayish-buff face, and pale creamy-yellow underparts. Faint pale supercilium, dark wing bars, broad flat bill, and pale legs.
ywcpar: Stocky green amazon parrot with a bright yellow crown patch, red shoulder bend, and a yellow-tipped wing speculum. Red-and-yellow markings in the wing, pale horn bill, and grey legs; mostly green plumage.
zanbou1: Boubou (bush-shrike) with glossy blue-black upperparts, head and tail, and creamy-white to pale buff underparts washed pinkish on the breast. Heavy hooked black bill, dark eye, and blue-grey legs.
zapfly1: Bright blue flycatcher (male) with glossy turquoise-blue upperparts, a darker face, and a pale bluish-white belly. Blue throat and breast, slender black bill, and dark legs; female duller brownish.
zapspa1: Streaky sparrow with grey upperparts streaked dusky, a rusty-chestnut crown, a grey face, and bright yellow underparts with grey flanks. Yellow lores, stout dark conical bill, and dark legs.
zapwre1: Plain dark wren with rich brown upperparts finely barred blackish on wings and tail, and greyish-brown underparts with paler throat. Faint pale supercilium, long slender decurved bill, and dark legs.
zebdov: Small slim dove with grey-brown upperparts and a pinkish-grey face and breast, the neck and flanks finely barred black and white. Bluish-grey bare skin around the eye, slim dark bill, and pinkish legs.
zebfin2: Small finch (male) with grey upperparts, a grey crown, black-and-white barred throat, a black tear-stripe below the eye, and chestnut ear patch and flanks spotted white. Bright orange-red bill and orange legs.
zelant1: Antbird (male) uniformly slaty-black with a bare blue patch of skin around the eye. Stout black bill and dark grey legs; female warm brown with paler rufous-buff underparts and the same blue eye-ring.
zendov: Plump warm-brown dove with a pinkish-tinged breast, a few black wing spots, a small iridescent neck patch, and a white trailing edge to the secondaries. Square-tipped tail with white corners; dark bill and reddish legs.
zigher1: Tiny, dumpy dark heron, blackish-brown overall finely barred and vermiculated with rich rufous-buff zigzag wavy lines across body and wings. Short thick neck, shaggy crown, stout dark bill, dull yellowish-green legs; secretive, compact build.
zimant1: Small antbird; male warm brown above with grey head, black throat and breast contrasting sharply with white central belly, chestnut tail and buffy wing-bars, concealed white back patch. Female has chestnut breast. Dark bill, greyish legs.
zimtap1: Small dark grey tapaculo with striking white supercilium, throat and upper breast; rest of head, back and wings grey washed brown, lower breast and belly grey, flanks and vent olive-brown with dusky bars. Black bill, brownish legs.
zittyr1: Very small flycatcher, dull olive-green above with brownish-olive crown, paler grey-olive underparts and whitish-yellow throat and belly with faint dusky streaks. Two pale buff-yellow wing-bars, yellow eye, long slender bill, short cocked tail.
zoeimp1: Large pigeon, pale grey head and breast, glossy deep-green back, wings and short tail. Pinkish-buff breast and whitish belly separated by a thin black breast band; rich chestnut undertail-coverts. Short dark bill, red eye, reddish legs.
zothaw: Slim blackish hawk closely mimicking a Turkey Vulture: sooty-black overall with one or two whitish tail bands and silvery-grey flight feathers giving two-toned underwing. Yellow cere and legs, dark hooked bill; long wings held in slight dihedral.
465888: Small stocky swallow-like bird with sandy grey-brown upperparts and paler buff-grey underparts, lacking strong contrast. Short slightly forked tail showing small white spots near tip when spread; blackish underwing coverts. Dark eye, short black bill, dark legs.
afbtit2: Small tit with bright cobalt-blue crown, wings and tail, white face bordered by dark blue eye-stripe and collar. Yellow underparts, greenish-blue back. Short black bill, bluish-grey legs; rounded compact body.
afrcha1: Robust finch; male has slate-grey head and nape, warm pinkish-brown breast and back, white wing bars and white shoulder patch, greenish rump. Whitish belly, conical greyish bill, brownish legs.
alepar2: Large long-tailed green parakeet with massive red bill, deep red shoulder patch on wing coverts. Male shows narrow black chin stripe and pink-and-black neck collar. Very long graduated blue-green tail; grey legs.
alpacc1: Plump streaky sparrow-like bird; grey-brown head and breast, chestnut-streaked flanks, dark-and-white spotted throat. Brown streaked back, dark wings with white-tipped covert spots forming a wing-bar row. Yellow-based dark bill, reddish legs.
alpswi1: Large powerful swift with scythe-shaped wings; brown upperparts and brown breast-band separating a white throat from a white belly. Short forked tail, dark eye, tiny black bill, dark legs.
arcloo: Large slender diver; smooth pale grey crown and hindneck, black throat patch, bold black-and-white striped neck sides, white-spotted black back. White underparts, dagger-like grey bill held level, dark legs.
arcter: Slender pale grey tern with full black cap, short red bill (no black tip), very short red legs. Long translucent white wings with narrow dark trailing-edge tip; deeply forked long white tail streamers, grey underparts.
arcwar1: Small olive-green warbler with long pale yellowish supercilium reaching almost to nape, dark eyestripe. Whitish underparts faintly washed yellow, one faint pale wing bar. Spike-like bill with pale orange lower mandible, pinkish-orange legs.
armgul1: Medium large gull with white head and underparts, slate-grey back and wings, black wingtips with white spots. Distinctive short stubby yellow bill with broad black band before a red gonys spot; dark eye, yellow legs.
atlfly1: Striking black-and-white flycatcher; male glossy black above and pure white below, with large white wing patch, white forehead patch, and a white rump band. Small black bill, dark legs.
atlpuf: Stocky black-and-white auk with large triangular bill, ridged red-orange with bluish-grey base. Black crown and collar, broad white-grey face, white underparts. Orange legs and feet; upright dumpy posture.
audgul1: Elegant pale gull with white head and body, pale grey back, black wingtips. Distinctive dark coral-red bill with black band and yellow tip; dark eye with red orbital ring, dark grey-green legs. Long-winged slim build.
azwmag3: Slim long-tailed magpie with glossy black cap, pale grey-buff body, and pale grey throat. Bright azure-blue wings and very long blue tail. Black bill and legs; graceful elongated proportions.
bahgoo: Pale grey goose with white head crossed by two bold black bars on the nape, white face stripe down the neck sides. Pale grey body, orange-yellow bill, orange legs.
baicra1: Tiny crake with olive-brown black-streaked and white-flecked upperparts, slate-blue-grey face and breast, black-and-white barred flanks and undertail. Short greenish bill (no red), dull green legs; very small dumpy body.
balshe1: Medium shearwater with dull brown upperparts and dirty buff-brown underparts, smudgy under-tail and vent. Slender dark bill, pinkish legs; long narrow wings held stiff. Overall drab muddy brown coloration.
banswa: Small brown swallow-martin; plain grey-brown upperparts, white underparts crossed by a distinct brown breast-band. White throat, short notched tail, tiny black bill, dark legs. Smallest, plainest hirundine.
bargoo: Boldly patterned goose with creamy-white face, black crown, neck, breast and bill. Silvery-grey back barred black and white, white belly and flanks, black legs. Compact build.
barpar2: Plump partridge with grey-brown back and breast; greyish face bordered by a broad chestnut collar speckled with white spots. Greyish crown, barred chestnut-and-grey flanks. Red bill, red legs.
barpet: Small dark storm-petrel, sooty blackish-brown overall with a broad clean white rump band wrapping onto the flanks. Pale wing-covert bar, slightly forked tail; short black bill, black legs.
barswa: Glossy steel-blue above with dark chestnut-red forehead and throat, a blue-black breast-band, and creamy-white underparts. Very long deeply forked tail with thin streamers showing white spots. Black bill, dark legs.
barwar1: Large bulky grey warbler; grey-brown upperparts, pale underparts finely barred with dark crescents (scaly look). Pale yellow eye, two thin pale wing bars, white-cornered tail. Stout grey bill, greyish legs.
batgod: Large long-legged wader; breeding male with brick-red head, neck and underparts, mottled grey-brown back. Long slightly upturned bill pink at base, black tip. Tail finely barred, dark legs.
bbspet1: Blackish storm-petrel with white rump and white belly patch divided by a dark central line down the underbody. Long legs, dark webbed feet projecting past short forked tail; black bill.
bcbeat1: Slender green bee-eater; overall grass-green with rufous-buff throat, blue cheek stripe and forehead bordering black eye-mask. Coppery underwing, long central tail streamers. Long down-curved black bill, dark legs.
bcnher: Stocky short-necked heron with black crown and back, pale grey wings, white face and underparts. Two long white nape plumes; large red eye, stout dark bill, yellowish legs.
bearee1: Long-tailed tawny-cinnamon bird; male has blue-grey head with bold black moustache drooping from eye, black-and-white undertail. Warm rufous-buff body, very long graduated tail. Yellow-orange bill, dark legs.
bkbplo: Plump large plover; breeding adult silvery spangled grey-and-black above, black face, throat and belly bordered by white, white undertail. Black armpits, stout black bill, grey-black legs.
bkewhe1: Slim wheatear; sandy-buff crown and back, pale orange-buff breast, white belly. Black throat (or black mask) and black wings; white rump and tail with black inverted-T pattern. Black bill, black legs.
bkewhe2: Slim wheatear with creamy-white crown and back, black face-mask through eye and black wings. Pale buff breast fading to white belly; white rump and tail with black inverted-T. Black bill, black legs.
bkhgul: Small gull; breeding adult with chocolate-brown hood, white neck and underparts, pale grey back. White leading wing-edge, black wingtips. Dark red bill and dark red legs, narrow white eye-crescents.
bklkit: Medium gull with white head and body, pale grey back, and clean black wingtips with no white spots (dipped-in-ink look). Slender yellow bill, dark eye, short black legs.
bkskit1: Small pale falcon-like raptor; pearly grey above, white head and underparts, with bold black shoulder patches on the upperwing. Large forward-set red eyes, short black-tipped bill, yellow legs; long pointed wings.
bktgod: Tall elegant wader; breeding adult orange-rufous head, neck and breast, barred lower belly, grey-brown back. Long straight bill pink at base with dark tip; black tail-band over white rump, long dark legs.
bkwsti: Very long-legged slim wader; pure white body and head, glossy black back and wings. Extremely long bright pink-red legs, fine straight black needle bill, red eye.
blackc1: Plain grey warbler; male grey-brown above, paler grey below, with a neat glossy black cap to eye level. Greyer face and nape, no wing bars. Fine dark bill, grey legs.
blagro1: Large grouse; male glossy blue-black with a lyre-shaped curved tail, white undertail coverts forming a puffy white patch, white wing-bar. Bright red wattle over eye, dark bill, feathered dark legs.
blakit1: Medium brown raptor; dark rufous-brown overall with paler greyish head and faint pale wing patches. Long wings, distinctly shallow-forked tail. Yellow legs, dark-tipped yellow bill.
blared1: Small chat; male sooty-black face, throat and breast, dark slate-grey crown and back, blackish belly with whitish wing panel. Rusty-orange rump and tail sides. Fine black bill, black legs.
blasto1: Tall stork; glossy black head, neck, back and wings with green-purple iridescence, sharply contrasting white belly and undertail. Long straight bright red bill, long red legs, red eye-ring.
blawhe1: All-black wheatear; sooty black plumage overall with contrasting white rump, white undertail coverts, and white tail-base showing a black terminal band. Black bill, black legs.
blawoo1: Large crow-sized woodpecker; entirely black with a glaring pale yellow eye and a bright red crown (full red crown on male). Long neck, chisel pale ivory bill, grey legs.
blbsan1: Bulky sandgrouse; male sandy-buff above with fine dark spotting, grey head and throat with chestnut throat patch, narrow black breast-band above a black belly. Short greyish bill, feathered legs.
blhbun1: Bright bunting; male has glossy black head, lemon-yellow throat and underparts, and a rich rufous-chestnut back and rump. Plain unstreaked yellow belly, stout pale grey conical bill, pinkish legs.
blkfra: Striking gamebird; male glossy black with bold white cheek patches, a broad chestnut neck-collar, and white-spotted black flanks. Brown-barred wings and back, reddish bill, orange-red legs.
blkgui: Small black auk; sooty black overall with a large bold white oval wing patch. Bright scarlet-red mouth lining and legs; slender pointed black bill, dark eye.
blksco1: Bulky all-black sea duck; male entirely glossy black with a knob at the bill base; bill black with a yellow-orange patch on the upper ridge. Dark legs, pointed tail.
blkswa: Large all-black swan; sooty-black plumage with white flight feathers visible in the wing. Long curved neck, bright red bill with a white band near the tip, dark legs.
blkter: Small marsh tern; breeding adult slate-grey body with a black head and breast, dark grey wings, and white undertail coverts. Slightly forked grey tail, slender black bill, dark reddish legs.
blrwar1: Small plain warbler, uniform warm olive-brown above and pale buff-cream below, with a short faint pale supercilium and pale eye-ring giving a gentle expression. Long fine dark bill, dark legs, and a rounded tail; no wing bars or streaking.
blueth: Robin-shaped chat, warm brown above with a bold white supercilium; throat brilliant blue bordered below by black, then a rufous band, with a central red or white spot. Belly whitish; rusty-orange tail base flashes in flight, thin dark bill, slim dark legs.
blutit: Small compact tit with sky-blue crown, wings and tail, a white face crossed by a black eye-stripe and blue-black nape collar, and bright yellow underparts. Greenish back, short stubby black bill, bluish-grey legs.
blwpra1: Slim tern-like wader, warm brown above and on the breast with a black-bordered creamy throat patch, white belly, and forked tail. Diagnostic blackish underwing-coverts, short red-based dark bill, long dark legs.
bohwax: Plump pinkish-grey bird with a prominent backswept crest, black mask and bib, and a chestnut undertail. Wings show white and yellow markings with waxy red tips; tail tipped bright yellow, short dark bill, dark legs.
boneag2: Large eagle, dark brown above with a pale whitish breast and belly finely streaked dark, and a whitish nape patch. In flight long broad wings and a long grey barred tail with a broad dark terminal band; yellow legs and cere, dark hooked bill.
booeag1: Small compact eagle (pale morph) with creamy-white underparts and underwing-coverts contrasting dark flight feathers, brown upperparts with a pale wing panel. Square-tipped tail, small head, feathered legs yellow-toed, dark hooked bill.
boowar1: Tiny pale warbler, sandy grey-brown above and creamy-white below, with a short pale supercilium and dark eye-line, plus a faintly dark-bordered crown. Short fine bill with pale base, pale legs; small rounded body with short tail.
borowl: Small owl with a large square greyish-white facial disc bordered black, raised white-spotted eyebrows giving a surprised look, and yellow eyes. Chocolate-brown upperparts heavily spotted white, white underparts streaked brown; pale bill, feathered feet.
brambl: Finch with orange breast and shoulders, blackish head and back (mottled in winter), and a white belly. Bold white rump conspicuous in flight, dark wings with orange and white bars, stout pale or dark-tipped bill, pinkish legs.
brant: Small dark goose with black head, neck and breast, a small white neck collar patch, dark brownish-grey back, and pale flanks. White undertail and stern conspicuous, short black bill and black legs.
brbsan: Tiny short-legged sandpiper, dark brown above with whitish mantle stripes forming a split supercilium and pale-edged feathers, streaked breast, white belly. Long slightly downcurved black bill kinked at tip, short dark legs.
bripet: Tiny blackish storm-petrel with a square white rump patch and white underwing bar, otherwise sooty all over. Short rounded wings, square tail, small black bill with tubenose, black legs and feet.
brnowl: Pale heart-shaped white facial disc with dark eyes, golden-buff and grey upperparts finely speckled, and pure white underparts. Long white-feathered legs, dark-tipped pale bill, rounded wings; ghostly overall appearance.
brnrav1: Large all-dark corvid, glossy black with a bronzy-brown wash on the neck and nape visible in good light. Long heavy black bill, slim long-winged silhouette, wedge-shaped tail, black legs.
budger: Small slender parakeet, bright green below with a yellow face and head finely barred black on the nape and back, plus dark throat spots and a blue cheek patch. Long tapering blue-green tail, small grey-blue cere bill, greyish legs.
bulpet: Slim sooty-brown petrel, uniformly dark with a paler diagonal bar across the upperwing-coverts. Long pointed wings, a long pointed wedge-shaped tail held closed, short hooked black tubenose bill.
burthr: Slim thrush-sized chat, uniformly deep slate-blue overall with fine pale spangling, slightly darker wings and tail. Long thin blackish bill, dark legs; rounded head and upright posture.
cacgoo1: Small compact goose with black head and neck, a white chin-strap cheek patch, brown back and pale breast. Short stubby black bill and rounded head distinguish it; white rump band, dark tail, black legs.
callar1: Large bulky lark, streaky sandy-brown above and whitish below with a bold black patch on each side of the neck. Heavy pale conical bill, broad wings showing a white trailing edge in flight, pale legs, short white-cornered tail.
cangoo: Large goose with a long black neck and head bearing a broad white chin-strap cheek patch, brown back, and pale tan breast. White undertail and U-shaped rump band, black bill and black legs.
casgul2: Large pale grey-backed gull with white head and underparts, long slender pale-yellow bill, and a small dark eye giving a gentle look. Long legs pale pink to yellowish, black wingtips with white spots, sloping forehead and long neck.
caster1: Very large tern with a massive blood-red dagger bill, black cap, pale grey back and wings, and white underparts. Dusky underside to the primaries, slightly forked tail, short black legs.
categr1: Small stocky white egret with a short thick yellow-orange bill, hunched neck, and buff-orange plumes on crown, breast and back when breeding. Yellowish to dusky legs, rounded head; otherwise pure white.
cetwar1: Small rich rufous-brown warbler, warm chestnut-brown above and greyish-white below with greyer face and a short whitish supercilium. Broad rounded cocked tail, short rounded wings, fine dark bill, pinkish legs.
chifla1: Tall pinkish flamingo, pale rose-white body with brighter pink wing-coverts, and grey legs with contrasting bright red knees and feet. Strongly downbent bill pale with a black tip, long sinuous neck.
chiwig1: Striking duck with a glossy green-black head, white forecrown and cheeks, rich chestnut flanks, and a black-and-white scaled back. White wing patch, dark vermiculated breast, short blue-grey bill, grey legs.
cinvul1: Huge dark vulture, uniformly blackish-brown with a bare bluish-grey head ruffed with dark down and a pale horn-coloured bill base. In flight enormous broad rectangular wings and short wedge tail, pale feet.
cirbun1: Bunting with an olive-grey breast band and yellow underparts; male head has a black throat and eye-stripe with yellow supercilium and cheeks. Streaked chestnut back, rufous flanks streaked dark, grey rump, stout greyish bill.
citfin1: Small finch, bright yellow-green below and on the face with a soft grey nape and neck-sides, and an olive-green streaked back. Two pale wing bars, unstreaked yellowish underparts, short stubby grey bill, dark legs.
citwag: Slender wagtail with a bright lemon-yellow head and underparts, a black hindneck band, and a blue-grey back. Two bold white wing bars on dark wings, long black tail with white outer feathers, thin black bill, dark legs.
coatit2: Small tit with a glossy black cap and bib, white cheeks, and a diagnostic white nape patch. Olive-grey back, buff-grey underparts, two thin white wing bars, fine dark bill, bluish-grey legs.
cockat: Slim grey parrot with a tall pointed crest, white wing patches, and a long tapering grey tail. Face yellow with a round orange cheek patch; small grey hooked bill, grey legs.
cogwar1: Small skulking warbler, olive-brown above heavily streaked dark on crown, back and rump, with paler buff streaked breast. Faint pale supercilium, plain undertail, rounded graduated tail, fine pointed bill, pinkish legs.
colfly1: Black-and-white flycatcher; male glossy black above with a broad white collar around the neck, large white wing patch, white forehead, and pure white underparts. White rump, small flat black bill, dark legs.
colpra: Slim tern-like wader, sandy-brown above and on the breast with a black-bordered creamy throat patch, white belly, and deeply forked tail. Chestnut underwing-coverts, red-based dark bill, short dark legs.
combul2: Plain brownish bulbul, dusky grey-brown overall with a darker brown head, slightly paler throat, and whitish lower belly with yellow undertail-coverts. Slim slightly downcurved black bill, dark legs, longish tail.
combuz1: Medium raptor, variable brown above and below with a pale band across the lower breast and barred underparts. In flight broad rounded wings with dark wrist patches and dark trailing edge, barred tail, yellow cere and legs, hooked bill.
comcan: Small finch, soft greenish-yellow overall, streaked grey-green on the back, with a yellower face and breast and whitish belly. Two faint wing bars, short conical pinkish bill, pale legs.
comcha: Finch with a blue-grey crown and nape, pinkish-brown face and breast, and a greenish rump. Bold double white wing bars and white shoulder patch on dark wings, white outer tail feathers, conical grey bill, pinkish legs.
comchi1: Tiny plain warbler, dull olive-brown above and off-white washed buff below, with a faint pale supercilium and pale eye-ring. Fine dark bill, blackish legs distinguishing it; short rounded wings, frequently dipped tail.
comcra: Tall elegant grey crane with a black face and foreneck, a white stripe down the side of the neck, and a small red crown patch. Drooping bushy black-and-grey tail plumes, long dark legs, straight greyish bill.
comcuc: Slim grey bird with a long graduated white-spotted tail, grey head and breast, and white underparts finely barred grey. Pointed falcon-like wings, yellow eye-ring and feet, slightly downcurved dark bill with yellow base.
comeid: Large heavy sea-duck; male white above with a black crown, pale green nape, white breast washed pink, and black flanks, belly and tail. Wedge-shaped grey-green bill sloping into forehead, dark legs.
comgol: Compact diving duck; male with a glossy green-black rounded head, a round white spot before the golden-yellow eye, white body, and black back. Black-and-white wings, short dark bill, yellow-orange legs.
comgre: Tall pale grey-brown wader, greyish above mottled darker, with a white belly and streaked breast. Long slightly upturned bill grey with a dark tip, long greenish legs, white rump and lower back wedge in flight.
comhom1: Small martin, glossy blue-black above with a conspicuous square white rump, and pure white underparts. Short forked tail, broad-based pointed wings, tiny black bill, and white-feathered legs and feet.
comkin1: Small dumpy kingfisher with brilliant electric-blue upperparts and a turquoise back stripe, orange underparts, and orange ear patch behind a white throat. Long straight dagger bill, short red legs, large head, stubby tail.
comloo: Large diver, blackish-green head and neck with a white necklace of vertical stripes, a checkerboard black-and-white back, and white underparts. Heavy straight dagger-shaped black bill, red eye, low in water.
commer: Large slim sawbill; male with a glossy green-black head, a thin red hooked bill, white body washed pink, and a black back. Long low profile, dark wings with a large white patch, red legs.
commoo3: Medium dark slate-grey waterbird with brownish back, a bright red frontal shield and red bill tipped yellow, a broken white line along the flanks, white undertail coverts split by black, and long greenish-yellow legs with very long toes.
commur: Slim black-and-white auk with dark chocolate-brown head, neck and upperparts, clean white underparts, a long pointed black bill, thin white trailing edge to the wing, and dark legs set far back.
commyn: Stocky brown bird with glossy black head and throat, bare yellow skin patch behind the eye, yellow bill and legs, white wing patches and white tail tip conspicuous in flight, and a dark vinous-brown body.
comnig1: Plain warm rufous-brown bird with a brighter chestnut-red rounded tail, paler buff-grey underparts, faintly large dark eye, fine pale eye-ring, slim dark bill and pinkish legs; robin-like but larger and longer-tailed.
compea: Large iridescent blue-necked peacock with a fan-shaped crest of wire-tufts, glossy green-and-bronze train studded with blue-green eyespots, scaly bronze-green wing feathers, white face patches and grey legs.
compoc: Medium diving duck with rich chestnut-red head, black breast and rear, pale grey vermiculated body, a black bill crossed by a pale blue-grey band, and a red eye; sloping forehead profile.
comqua1: Tiny rotund streaky game-bird, sandy-brown above with cream streaks, buff underparts, a bold cream crown-stripe and supercilium, dark eyestripe, pale throat bordered by dark anchor marks, and pale legs.
comrav: Very large all-glossy-black corvid with purple-blue sheen, a massive heavy black bill, shaggy throat hackles, long wedge-shaped tail and broad fingered wings; stout black legs.
comred1: Medium grey-brown wader, streaked above and on the breast, with bright orange-red legs and a straight red-based black-tipped bill; in flight shows a broad white trailing wing-bar and white rump wedge.
comred2: Slim chat with blue-grey crown and back, black face and throat, white forehead, bright orange-red breast and flanks, and a rusty-orange rump and quivering tail; thin black bill and dark legs.
comros: Plump finch with rosy-red head, breast and rump in the male, brown wings and back, whitish belly, plain face with a large dark eye, two faint wing-bars and a stubby pale conical bill.
comsan: Small brown wader with olive-brown upperparts, clean white underparts forming a distinctive white wedge in front of the bent wing, fine breast streaking, a white eye-ring, pale straight bill and greenish legs; constantly teetering rear.
comshe: Large goose-like duck, mostly white with a dark glossy-green head, a broad chestnut breast-band, black scapular and belly stripes, a bright red bill with a knob, and pink legs.
comsni: Cryptic wader, richly mottled brown above with bold cream back-stripes, dark crown split by a pale central stripe, heavily barred flanks, a very long straight bill and short greenish legs.
comswi: All sooty-black aerial bird with a pale greyish throat patch, very long slender scythe-shaped swept-back wings, a short forked tail and a tiny black bill; streamlined cigar-shaped body.
comter: Slender pale-grey tern with a black cap, pale grey underparts, an orange-red bill tipped black, short red legs, long pointed wings and deeply forked white tail with long streamers.
comwax: Tiny greyish-brown waxbill finely barred all over, with a bright red bill and a broad red mask through the eye, a reddish belly patch, and a long dark tail; small and slim.
corbun1: Large plump dull bunting, streaky grey-brown above and on buff underparts, with dense dark streaking on the breast forming a central spot, a plain face, a pale stout conical bill and pinkish legs.
corcra: Buff-brown rail with grey face and breast, bold chestnut barring on the flanks, blackish streaking on the back, a short stout pale bill, pinkish legs, and bright rufous wing patches in flight.
corfin1: Small finch with a yellow-green face and breast, grey-brown nape and crown, streaked greenish-brown back, yellowish wing-bars and yellow wing-flash, and a pale conical bill; brighter and greyer-capped than a Citril Finch.
corplo: Small plump plover, sandy-brown above and white below, with a complete black breast-band, black mask and forehead, a white forehead and collar, an orange bill with black tip and orange-yellow legs.
corshe1: Large grey-brown shearwater with a pale-scaled grey-brown head and back blending into white underparts, a thick pale yellow bill with a dark tip, dark underwing margins and long broad-winged silhouette.
cowpig1: Large grey pigeon with a pinkish breast, a bold white patch on each side of the neck, a broad white wing-bar across the grey wing, an iridescent green-purple neck sheen, and a yellow-tipped pinkish bill.
crebun2: Bunting with a blue-grey head and breast, a rusty-orange throat and eye-ring, warm rufous-brown streaked back, pinkish belly and a pinkish conical bill; like Ortolan but with grey throat.
crelar1: Sandy buff-brown lark, streaked above and on the breast, with a long spiky upstanding crest, a longish slightly down-curved pale bill, pale buff underwing in flight, and a short tail with buff outer feathers.
cretit2: Small grey-brown tit with a tall pointed black-and-white speckled crest, whitish face outlined by black, a black bib and a curved black collar-mark, pale buff underparts and a short dark bill.
crwfin2: Stocky pale sandy-brown finch with a grey head, pinkish-red wash on the face and wings, bold crimson-pink wing patches and tail edges, and a pale yellowish conical bill.
cursan: Slim wader with a long down-curved black bill, in breeding plumage rich brick-red on the head, underparts and back which is also scaled black, and a white rump; black legs, longer-legged and longer-billed than Dunlin.
cypwar1: Small dark Sylvia-type warbler, slate-grey above, with a black head and heavy black scaling spotting on the white throat and breast, a red eye-ring and pale iris, and a long blackish white-edged tail.
cypwhe1: Small wheatear with black face, throat and wings contrasting with a white crown, nape and underparts, a black inverted-T tail pattern on white, and black legs; crisp black-and-white pied appearance.
dalpel1: Huge silvery-grey-white pelican with curly nape feathers, an orange-red gular pouch in breeding, a pale yellowish-grey bill, greyish legs, and pale grey feet; bulky with a massive bill.
darwar1: Small dark long-tailed warbler, slate-grey above, with a dark wine-red breast and throat speckled white, a red eye and red eye-ring, a cocked dark white-tipped tail, and a thin dark bill.
